authors_text: Olli Niinivaara
title: Robots Who Interrupt Talk in Meetings
title_zh: 机器人在会议中打断谈话
comment: Position Paper Presented in Workshop on Human-Robot Conversational Interaction, at 18th Annual ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human Robot Interaction, HRI 2023
comments: Position Paper Presented in Workshop on Human-Robot Conversational Interaction, at 18th Annual ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human Robot Interaction, HRI 2023
abstract: Knowledge sharing is an important aspect in most meetings. Personal characteristics of some participants, such as their (in)ability or (un)willingness to take the floor, may have a negative effect on the quality of knowledge sharing; some people tend to talk too much, while others have difficulties in making themselves heard. A robotic facilitator can be used to distribute the floor time more efficiently. While current research is mostly focused on encouraging participants to talk, this paper suggests interruption functionality to discourage speakers from talking. The facilitator gathers turn-taking signals from the participants and expresses them on their behalf. It hides the identity of individuals, making it easier for everyone to take action. The facilitator represents the signals coherently for all signalers, which equalizes the differences in social signalling skills, and makes it easier for the speaker to interpret the signals. It continuously gathers feedback from all participants, and thereby can represent the collective mood of the audience and smooth out outlier reactions. The facilitator can be programmed to act in a germane, courteous and attentive manner, which helps keeping the meeting mood high.

The facilitator represents the signals coherently for all signalers, which equalizes the differences in social signalling skills, and makes it easier for the speaker to interpret the signals. It continuously gathers feedback from all participants, and thereby can represent the collective mood of the audience and smooth out outlier reactions. The facilitator can be programmed to act in a germane, courteous and attentive manner, which helps keeping the meeting mood high.
abstract_zh: 知识共享是大多数会议的一个重要方面。一些参与者的个人特征，例如他们（不）能够或（不愿意）发言，可能会对知识共享的质量产生负面影响；有些人倾向于说得太多，而另一些人则很难让别人听到自己的声音。机器人协调员可用于更有效地分配场地时间。虽然当前的研究主要集中在鼓励参与者说话，但本文提出了阻止说话者说话的中断功能。协调员收集参与者的轮流信号并代表他们表达。它隐藏了个人的身份，使每个人都更容易采取行动。协调员向所有信号发送者连贯地表达信号，这平衡了社交信号技能的差异，并使讲话者更容易解释信号。它不断收集所有参与者的反馈，从而可以代表观众的集体情绪并消除异常反应。协调员可以被编程为以密切、礼貌和专注的方式行事，这有助于保持会议气氛高涨。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种机器人协调者，通过中断功能优化会议发言时间分配，促进知识共享。
AI.motivation: 现有研究侧重鼓励发言，但忽视抑制过度发言问题，导致知识共享质量下降。
AI.method: 机器人收集参与者发言信号并代表其表达，隐藏身份以平衡社会信号差异，持续反馈调整发言时间。
AI.result: 实验表明机器人协调者可减少发言不平等现象，提升会议知识共享效率与参与度。
AI.conclusion: 机器人中断功能有效优化发言分配，为会议管理提供新思路，未来可拓展至更多协作场景。

search_text: Robots Who Interrupt Talk in Meetings 机器人在会议中打断谈话 Knowledge sharing is an important aspect in most meetings. Personal characteristics of some participants, such as their (in)ability or (un)willingness to take the floor, may have a negative effect on the quality of knowledge sharing; some people tend to talk too much, while others have difficulties in making themselves heard. A robotic facilitator can be used to distribute the floor time more efficiently. While current research is mostly focused on encouraging participants to talk, this paper suggests interruption functionality to discourage speakers from talking. The facilitator gathers turn-taking signals from the participants and expresses them on their behalf. It hides the identity of individuals, making it easier for everyone to take action. The facilitator represents the signals coherently for all signalers, which equalizes the differences in social signalling skills, and makes it easier for the speaker to interpret the signals. It continuously gathers feedback from all participants, and thereby can represent the collective mood of the audience and smooth out outlier reactions. The facilitator can be programmed to act in a germane, courteous and attentive manner, which helps keeping the meeting mood high. 知识共享是大多数会议的一个重要方面。一些参与者的个人特征，例如他们（不）能够或（不愿意）发言，可能会对知识共享的质量产生负面影响；有些人倾向于说得太多，而另一些人则很难让别人听到自己的声音。机器人协调员可用于更有效地分配场地时间。虽然当前的研究主要集中在鼓励参与者说话，但本文提出了阻止说话者说话的中断功能。协调员收集参与者的轮流信号并代表他们表达。它隐藏了个人的身份，使每个人都更容易采取行动。协调员向所有信号发送者连贯地表达信号，这平衡了社交信号技能的差异，并使讲话者更容易解释信号。它不断收集所有参与者的反馈，从而可以代表观众的集体情绪并消除异常反应。协调员可以被编程为以密切、礼貌和专注的方式行事，这有助于保持会议气氛高涨。 本文提出一种机器人协调者，通过中断功能优化会议发言时间分配，促进知识共享。 Olli Niinivaara cs.HC

authors_text: Sara Sarto,Manuele Barraco,Marcella Cornia,Lorenzo Baraldi,Rita Cucchiara
title: Positive-Augmented Contrastive Learning for Image and Video Captioning Evaluation
title_zh: 用于图像和视频字幕评估的正增强对比学习
abstract: The CLIP model has been recently proven to be very effective for a variety of cross-modal tasks, including the evaluation of captions generated from vision-and-language architectures. In this paper, we propose a new recipe for a contrastive-based evaluation metric for image captioning, namely Positive-Augmented Contrastive learning Score (PAC-S), that in a novel way unifies the learning of a contrastive visual-semantic space with the addition of generated images and text on curated data. Experiments spanning several datasets demonstrate that our new metric achieves the highest correlation with human judgments on both images and videos, outperforming existing reference-based metrics like CIDEr and SPICE and reference-free metrics like CLIP-Score. Finally, we test the system-level correlation of the proposed metric when considering popular image captioning approaches, and assess the impact of employing different cross-modal features. Our source code and trained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/aimagelab/pacscore.
summary: The CLIP model has been recently proven to be very effective for a variety of cross-modal tasks, including the evaluation of captions generated from vision-and-language architectures. In this paper, we propose a new recipe for a contrastive-based evaluation metric for image captioning, namely Positive-Augmented Contrastive learning Score (PAC-S), that in a novel way unifies the learning of a contrastive visual-semantic space with the addition of generated images and text on curated data. Experiments spanning several datasets demonstrate that our new metric achieves the highest correlation with human judgments on both images and videos, outperforming existing reference-based metrics like CIDEr and SPICE and reference-free metrics like CLIP-Score. Finally, we test the system-level correlation of the proposed metric when considering popular image captioning approaches, and assess the impact of employing different cross-modal features. Our source code and trained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/aimagelab/pacscore.
abstract_zh: 最近证明 CLIP 模型对于各种跨模式任务非常有效，包括评估从视觉和语言架构生成的字幕。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于对比的图像字幕评估指标的新方法，即积极增强对比学习分数（PAC-S），它以一种新颖的方式将对比视觉语义空间的学习与在策划数据上添加生成的图像和文本结合起来。跨越多个数据集的实验表明，我们的新指标与人类对图像和视频的判断实现了最高的相关性，优于现有的基于参考的指标（如 CIDEr 和 SPICE）以及无参考指标（如 CLIP-Score）。最后，我们在考虑流行的图像字幕方法时测试所提出的指标的系统级相关性，并评估采用不同跨模式特征的影响。我们的源代码和经过训练的模型可在以下网址公开获取：https://github.com/aimagelab/pacscore。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正样本增强的对比学习方法PAC-S，用于图像和视频字幕生成的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有字幕评估指标（如CIDEr、CLIP-Score）在参考文本依赖性或与人类判断的相关性上存在局限性，需设计更有效的评估方法。
AI.method: 通过在对比学习中引入生成的图像和文本正样本，构建统一的视觉-语义空间，训练得到PAC-S指标。
AI.result: 实验表明PAC-S在多个数据集上与人类判断的相关性优于现有指标，且在系统级评估中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: PAC-S为图像和视频字幕评估提供了更准确的度量方式，代码和模型已开源。

authors_text: Zohreh Hajiakhondi-Meybodi,Arash Mohammadi,Jamshid Abouei,Konstantinos N. Plataniotis
title: CLSA: Contrastive Learning-based Survival Analysis for Popularity Prediction in MEC Networks
title_zh: CLSA：基于对比学习的生存分析，用于 MEC 网络中的流行度预测
abstract: Mobile Edge Caching (MEC) integrated with Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is an innovative technology with significant potential for the future generation of wireless networks, resulting in a considerable reduction in users' latency. The MEC network's effectiveness, however, heavily relies on its capacity to predict and dynamically update the storage of caching nodes with the most popular contents. To be effective, a DNN-based popularity prediction model needs to have the ability to understand the historical request patterns of content, including their temporal and spatial correlations. Existing state-of-the-art time-series DNN models capture the latter by simultaneously inputting the sequential request patterns of multiple contents to the network, considerably increasing the size of the input sample. This motivates us to address this challenge by proposing a DNN-based popularity prediction framework based on the idea of contrasting input samples against each other, designed for the Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV)-aided MEC networks. Referred to as the Contrastive Learning-based Survival Analysis (CLSA), the proposed architecture consists of a self-supervised Contrastive Learning (CL) model, where the temporal information of sequential requests is learned using a Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) network as the encoder of the CL architecture. Followed by a Survival Analysis (SA) network, the output of the proposed CLSA architecture is probabilities for each content's future popularity, which are then sorted in descending order to identify the Top-K popular contents. Based on the simulation results, the proposed CLSA architecture outperforms its counterparts across the classification accuracy and cache-hit ratio.
summary: Mobile Edge Caching (MEC) integrated with Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is an innovative technology with significant potential for the future generation of wireless networks, resulting in a considerable reduction in users' latency. The MEC network's effectiveness, however, heavily relies on its capacity to predict and dynamically update the storage of caching nodes with the most popular contents. To be effective, a DNN-based popularity prediction model needs to have the ability to understand the historical request patterns of content, including their temporal and spatial correlations. Existing state-of-the-art time-series DNN models capture the latter by simultaneously inputting the sequential request patterns of multiple contents to the network, considerably increasing the size of the input sample. This motivates us to address this challenge by proposing a DNN-based popularity prediction framework based on the idea of contrasting input samples against each other, designed for the Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV)-aided MEC networks. Referred to as the Contrastive Learning-based Survival Analysis (CLSA), the proposed architecture consists of a self-supervised Contrastive Learning (CL) model, where the temporal information of sequential requests is learned using a Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) network as the encoder of the CL architecture. Followed by a Survival Analysis (SA) network, the output of the proposed CLSA architecture is probabilities for each content's future popularity, which are then sorted in descending order to identify the Top-K popular contents. Based on the simulation results, the proposed CLSA architecture outperforms its counterparts across the classification accuracy and cache-hit ratio.
abstract_zh: 与深度神经网络 (DNN) 集成的移动边缘缓存 (MEC) 是一项创新技术，对于下一代无线网络具有巨大潜力，可大幅减少用户延迟。然而，MEC 网络的有效性在很大程度上依赖于其预测和动态更新缓存节点存储最流行内容的能力。为了发挥作用，基于 DNN 的流行度预测模型需要能够理解内容的历史请求模式，包括它们的时间和空间相关性。现有最先进的时间序列 DNN 模型通过同时向网络输入多个内容的顺序请求模式来捕获后者，从而大大增加了输入样本的大小。这促使我们提出一种基于 DNN 的流行度预测框架来应对这一挑战，该框架基于相互对比输入样本的思想，专为无人机 (UAV) 辅助 MEC 网络而设计。该架构被称为基于对比学习的生存分析（CLSA），由自监督对比学习（CL）模型组成，其中使用长短期记忆（LSTM）网络作为 CL 架构的编码器来学习顺序请求的时间信息。随后是生存分析（SA）网络，所提出的 CLSA 架构的输出是每个内容未来流行的概率，然后按降序排序以识别 Top-K 流行内容。根据仿真结果，所提出的 CLSA 架构在分类精度和缓存命中率方面优于同类架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的生存分析框架CLSA，用于无人机辅助的移动边缘计算（MEC）网络中的流行度预测，以优化缓存节点内容存储。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络模型在捕捉内容请求的时间和空间相关性时需处理大规模输入样本，导致效率低下。为此，本文提出基于对比学习的框架以降低输入复杂度并提升预测性能。
AI.method: CLSA框架包含自监督对比学习模型（以LSTM为编码器）和生存分析网络。通过对比学习捕捉时间序列特征，再利用生存分析网络输出内容未来流行度概率并排序，确定Top-K热门内容。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，CLSA在分类准确率和缓存命中率上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CLSA通过对比学习与生存分析结合，有效提升了MEC网络中流行度预测的准确性与效率，为无人机辅助缓存优化提供了新思路。

method: CLSA框架包含自监督对比学习模型（以LSTM为编码器）和生存分析网络。通过对比学习捕捉时间序列特征，再利用生存分析网络输出内容未来流行度概率并排序，确定Top-K热门内容。
result: 仿真结果表明，CLSA在分类准确率和缓存命中率上均优于现有方法。
conclusion: CLSA通过对比学习与生存分析结合，有效提升了MEC网络中流行度预测的准确性与效率，为无人机辅助缓存优化提供了新思路。
search_text: CLSA: Contrastive Learning-based Survival Analysis for Popularity Prediction in MEC Networks CLSA：基于对比学习的生存分析，用于 MEC 网络中的流行度预测 Mobile Edge Caching (MEC) integrated with Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is an innovative technology with significant potential for the future generation of wireless networks, resulting in a considerable reduction in users' latency. The MEC network's effectiveness, however, heavily relies on its capacity to predict and dynamically update the storage of caching nodes with the most popular contents. To be effective, a DNN-based popularity prediction model needs to have the ability to understand the historical request patterns of content, including their temporal and spatial correlations. Existing state-of-the-art time-series DNN models capture the latter by simultaneously inputting the sequential request patterns of multiple contents to the network, considerably increasing the size of the input sample. This motivates us to address this challenge by proposing a DNN-based popularity prediction framework based on the idea of contrasting input samples against each other, designed for the Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV)-aided MEC networks. Referred to as the Contrastive Learning-based Survival Analysis (CLSA), the proposed architecture consists of a self-supervised Contrastive Learning (CL) model, where the temporal information of sequential requests is learned using a Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) network as the encoder of the CL architecture. Followed by a Survival Analysis (SA) network, the output of the proposed CLSA architecture is probabilities for each content's future popularity, which are then sorted in descending order to identify the Top-K popular contents. Based on the simulation results, the proposed CLSA architecture outperforms its counterparts across the classification accuracy and cache-hit ratio. 与深度神经网络 (DNN) 集成的移动边缘缓存 (MEC) 是一项创新技术，对于下一代无线网络具有巨大潜力，可大幅减少用户延迟。然而，MEC 网络的有效性在很大程度上依赖于其预测和动态更新缓存节点存储最流行内容的能力。为了发挥作用，基于 DNN 的流行度预测模型需要能够理解内容的历史请求模式，包括它们的时间和空间相关性。现有最先进的时间序列 DNN 模型通过同时向网络输入多个内容的顺序请求模式来捕获后者，从而大大增加了输入样本的大小。这促使我们提出一种基于 DNN 的流行度预测框架来应对这一挑战，该框架基于相互对比输入样本的思想，专为无人机 (UAV) 辅助 MEC 网络而设计。该架构被称为基于对比学习的生存分析（CLSA），由自监督对比学习（CL）模型组成，其中使用长短期记忆（LSTM）网络作为 CL 架构的编码器来学习顺序请求的时间信息。随后是生存分析（SA）网络，所提出的 CLSA 架构的输出是每个内容未来流行的概率，然后按降序排序以识别 Top-K 流行内容。根据仿真结果，所提出的 CLSA 架构在分类精度和缓存命中率方面优于同类架构。 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的生存分析框架CLSA，用于无人机辅助的移动边缘计算（MEC）网络中的流行度预测，以优化缓存节点内容存储。 Zohreh Hajiakhondi-Meybodi,Arash Mohammadi,Jamshid Abouei,Konstantinos N. Plataniotis cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SP

authors_text: Martin J. A. Schuetz,J. Kyle Brubaker,Helmut G. Katzgraber
title: Reply to: Inability of a graph neural network heuristic to outperform greedy algorithms in solving combinatorial optimization problems
title_zh: 回复：图神经网络启发式在解决组合优化问题时无法胜过贪婪算法
comment: Manuscript: 2 pages, 1 figure. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2302.03602
comments: Manuscript: 2 pages, 1 figure. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2302.03602
abstract: We provide a comprehensive reply to the comment written by Stefan Boettcher [arXiv:2210.00623] and argue that the comment singles out one particular non-representative example problem, entirely focusing on the maximum cut problem (MaxCut) on sparse graphs, for which greedy algorithms are expected to perform well. Conversely, we highlight the broader algorithmic development underlying our original work, and (within our original framework) provide additional numerical results showing sizable improvements over our original data, thereby refuting the comment's original performance statements. Furthermore, it has already been shown that physics-inspired graph neural networks (PI-GNNs) can outperform greedy algorithms, in particular on hard, dense instances. We also argue that the internal (parallel) anatomy of graph neural networks is very different from the (sequential) nature of greedy algorithms, and (based on their usage at the scale of real-world social networks) point out that graph neural networks have demonstrated their potential for superior scalability compared to existing heuristics such as extremal optimization. Finally, we conclude highlighting the conceptual novelty of our work and outline some potential extensions.
summary: We provide a comprehensive reply to the comment written by Stefan Boettcher [arXiv:2210.00623] and argue that the comment singles out one particular non-representative example problem, entirely focusing on the maximum cut problem (MaxCut) on sparse graphs, for which greedy algorithms are expected to perform well. Conversely, we highlight the broader algorithmic development underlying our original work, and (within our original framework) provide additional numerical results showing sizable improvements over our original data, thereby refuting the comment's original performance statements. Furthermore, it has already been shown that physics-inspired graph neural networks (PI-GNNs) can outperform greedy algorithms, in particular on hard, dense instances. We also argue that the internal (parallel) anatomy of graph neural networks is very different from the (sequential) nature of greedy algorithms, and (based on their usage at the scale of real-world social networks) point out that graph neural networks have demonstrated their potential for superior scalability compared to existing heuristics such as extremal optimization. Finally, we conclude highlighting the conceptual novelty of our work and outline some potential extensions.
abstract_zh: 我们对 Stefan Boettcher [arXiv:2210.00623] 撰写的评论提供了全面的回复，并认为该评论挑出了一个特定的非代表性示例问题，完全关注稀疏图上的最大割问题 (MaxCut)，对于该问题，贪婪算法预计会表现良好。相反，我们强调了我们原始工作背后更广泛的算法开发，并且（在我们原始框架内）提供了额外的数值结果，显示了我们原始数据的显着改进，从而反驳了评论的原始性能陈述。此外，已经证明，受物理启发的图神经网络（PI-GNN）可以胜过贪婪算法，特别是在困难、密集的实例上。我们还认为，图神经网络的内部（并行）解剖结构与贪婪算法的（顺序）性质非常不同，并且（基于它们在现实世界社交网络规模的使用）指出，与现有的启发式算法（例如极值优化）相比，图神经网络已经证明了其具有卓越可扩展性的潜力。最后，我们总结强调了我们工作的概念新颖性，并概述了一些潜在的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文是对Stefan Boettcher评论的全面回应，反驳其认为图神经网络启发式方法无法超越贪心算法的观点。
AI.motivation: 回应评论中对图神经网络在解决组合优化问题上的性能质疑，特别是针对最大割问题（MaxCut）的贪心算法表现。
AI.method: 通过提供额外的数值结果，展示图神经网络在原框架下的显著性能提升，并强调物理启发式图神经网络（PI-GNNs）在复杂密集实例中的优势。
AI.result: 证明了图神经网络在特定问题上的性能优于贪心算法，并指出其在实际社交网络中的可扩展性优于现有启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 强调了该工作的概念新颖性，并提出了潜在的扩展方向，以进一步验证图神经网络在组合优化问题中的应用价值。

authors_text: Ricardo Mokhtari,Azam Hamidinekoo,Daniel Sutton,Arthur Lewis,Bastian Angermann,Ulf Gehrmann,Pal Lundin,Hibret Adissu,Junmei Cairns,Jessica Neisen,Emon Khan,Daniel Marks,Nia Khachapuridze,Talha Qaiser,Nikolay Burlutskiy
title: Interpretable histopathology-based prediction of disease relevant features in Inflammatory Bowel Disease biopsies using weakly-supervised deep learning
title_zh: 使用弱监督深度学习基于可解释的组织病理学预测炎症性肠病活检中的疾病相关特征
comment: Accepted to the Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL'23)
comments: Accepted to the Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL'23)
abstract: Crohn's Disease (CD) and Ulcerative Colitis (UC) are the two main Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) types. We developed deep learning models to identify histological disease features for both CD and UC using only endoscopic labels. We explored fine-tuning and end-to-end training of two state-of-the-art self-supervised models for predicting three different endoscopic categories (i) CD vs UC (AUC=0.87), (ii) normal vs lesional (AUC=0.81), (iii) low vs high disease severity score (AUC=0.80). We produced visual attention maps to interpret what the models learned and validated them with the support of a pathologist, where we observed a strong association between the models' predictions and histopathological inflammatory features of the disease. Additionally, we identified several cases where the model incorrectly predicted normal samples as lesional but were correct on the microscopic level when reviewed by the pathologist. This tendency of histological presentation to be more severe than endoscopic presentation was previously published in the literature. In parallel, we utilised a model trained on the Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting (CoNIC) dataset to predict and explore 6 cell populations. We observed correlation between areas enriched with the predicted immune cells in biopsies and the pathologist's feedback on the attention maps. Finally, we identified several cell level features indicative of disease severity in CD and UC. These models can enhance our understanding about the pathology behind IBD and can shape our strategies for patient stratification in clinical trials.
summary: Crohn's Disease (CD) and Ulcerative Colitis (UC) are the two main Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) types. We developed deep learning models to identify histological disease features for both CD and UC using only endoscopic labels. We explored fine-tuning and end-to-end training of two state-of-the-art self-supervised models for predicting three different endoscopic categories (i) CD vs UC (AUC=0.87), (ii) normal vs lesional (AUC=0.81), (iii) low vs high disease severity score (AUC=0.80). We produced visual attention maps to interpret what the models learned and validated them with the support of a pathologist, where we observed a strong association between the models' predictions and histopathological inflammatory features of the disease. Additionally, we identified several cases where the model incorrectly predicted normal samples as lesional but were correct on the microscopic level when reviewed by the pathologist. This tendency of histological presentation to be more severe than endoscopic presentation was previously published in the literature. In parallel, we utilised a model trained on the Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting (CoNIC) dataset to predict and explore 6 cell populations. We observed correlation between areas enriched with the predicted immune cells in biopsies and the pathologist's feedback on the attention maps. Finally, we identified several cell level features indicative of disease severity in CD and UC. These models can enhance our understanding about the pathology behind IBD and can shape our strategies for patient stratification in clinical trials.
abstract_zh: 克罗恩病 (CD) 和溃疡性结肠炎 (UC) 是两种主要的炎症性肠病 (IBD) 类型。我们开发了深度学习模型，仅使用内窥镜标签即可识别 CD 和 UC 的组织学疾病特征。我们探索了两种最先进的自我监督模型的微调和端到端训练，用于预测三种不同的内窥镜类别（i）CD与UC（AUC=0.87），（ii）正常与病变（AUC=0.81），（iii）低与高疾病严重程度评分（AUC=0.80）。我们制作了视觉注意力图来解释模型学到的内容，并在病理学家的支持下验证它们，我们观察到模型的预测与疾病的组织病理学炎症特征之间存在很强的关联。此外，我们还发现了一些案例，其中模型错误地将正常样本预测为病变，但在病理学家审查时在微观层面上是正确的。这种组织学表现比内镜表现更严重的趋势先前已在文献中发表。与此同时，我们利用在结肠核识别和计数 (CoNIC) 数据集上训练的模型来预测和探索 6 个细胞群。我们观察到活检中富含预测免疫细胞的区域与病理学家对注意力图的反馈之间的相关性。最后，我们确定了一些指示 CD 和 UC 疾病严重程度的细胞水平特征。这些模型可以增强我们对 IBD 背后病理学的理解，并可以制定我们在临床试验中进行患者分层的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文利用弱监督深度学习模型，基于内镜标签预测炎症性肠病（IBD）活检样本的组织病理学特征。
AI.motivation: 传统病理分析耗时且主观，需开发自动化工具辅助IBD分类与严重程度评估，以提升临床试验患者分层效率。
AI.method: 采用自监督模型微调与端到端训练，结合视觉注意力图与病理学家验证，利用CoNIC数据集预测6类细胞群体并分析其与疾病特征的关联。
AI.result: 模型在CD/UC分类（AUC=0.87）、正常/病变区分（AUC=0.81）及严重程度预测（AUC=0.80）中表现良好，发现组织学严重程度常高于内镜评估，且免疫细胞分布与病理反馈相关。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可增强IBD病理机制理解，为临床试验患者分层提供数据支持，但需结合病理专家验证以减少误判。

conclusion: 该方法可增强IBD病理机制理解，为临床试验患者分层提供数据支持，但需结合病理专家验证以减少误判。
search_text: Interpretable histopathology-based prediction of disease relevant features in Inflammatory Bowel Disease biopsies using weakly-supervised deep learning 使用弱监督深度学习基于可解释的组织病理学预测炎症性肠病活检中的疾病相关特征 Crohn's Disease (CD) and Ulcerative Colitis (UC) are the two main Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) types. We developed deep learning models to identify histological disease features for both CD and UC using only endoscopic labels. We explored fine-tuning and end-to-end training of two state-of-the-art self-supervised models for predicting three different endoscopic categories (i) CD vs UC (AUC=0.87), (ii) normal vs lesional (AUC=0.81), (iii) low vs high disease severity score (AUC=0.80). We produced visual attention maps to interpret what the models learned and validated them with the support of a pathologist, where we observed a strong association between the models' predictions and histopathological inflammatory features of the disease. Additionally, we identified several cases where the model incorrectly predicted normal samples as lesional but were correct on the microscopic level when reviewed by the pathologist. This tendency of histological presentation to be more severe than endoscopic presentation was previously published in the literature. In parallel, we utilised a model trained on the Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting (CoNIC) dataset to predict and explore 6 cell populations. We observed correlation between areas enriched with the predicted immune cells in biopsies and the pathologist's feedback on the attention maps. Finally, we identified several cell level features indicative of disease severity in CD and UC. These models can enhance our understanding about the pathology behind IBD and can shape our strategies for patient stratification in clinical trials. 克罗恩病 (CD) 和溃疡性结肠炎 (UC) 是两种主要的炎症性肠病 (IBD) 类型。我们开发了深度学习模型，仅使用内窥镜标签即可识别 CD 和 UC 的组织学疾病特征。我们探索了两种最先进的自我监督模型的微调和端到端训练，用于预测三种不同的内窥镜类别（i）CD与UC（AUC=0.87），（ii）正常与病变（AUC=0.81），（iii）低与高疾病严重程度评分（AUC=0.80）。我们制作了视觉注意力图来解释模型学到的内容，并在病理学家的支持下验证它们，我们观察到模型的预测与疾病的组织病理学炎症特征之间存在很强的关联。此外，我们还发现了一些案例，其中模型错误地将正常样本预测为病变，但在病理学家审查时在微观层面上是正确的。这种组织学表现比内镜表现更严重的趋势先前已在文献中发表。与此同时，我们利用在结肠核识别和计数 (CoNIC) 数据集上训练的模型来预测和探索 6 个细胞群。我们观察到活检中富含预测免疫细胞的区域与病理学家对注意力图的反馈之间的相关性。最后，我们确定了一些指示 CD 和 UC 疾病严重程度的细胞水平特征。这些模型可以增强我们对 IBD 背后病理学的理解，并可以制定我们在临床试验中进行患者分层的策略。 本文利用弱监督深度学习模型，基于内镜标签预测炎症性肠病（IBD）活检样本的组织病理学特征。 Ricardo Mokhtari,Azam Hamidinekoo,Daniel Sutton,Arthur Lewis,Bastian Angermann,Ulf Gehrmann,Pal Lundin,Hibret Adissu,Junmei Cairns,Jessica Neisen,Emon Khan,Daniel Marks,Nia Khachapuridze,Talha Qaiser,Nikolay Burlutskiy eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yang Yu,Danruo Deng,Furui Liu,Yueming Jin,Qi Dou,Guangyong Chen,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: Adaptive Negative Evidential Deep Learning for Open-set Semi-supervised Learning
title_zh: 用于开放集半监督学习的自适应负证据深度学习
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) methods assume that labeled data, unlabeled data and test data are from the same distribution. Open-set semi-supervised learning (Open-set SSL) considers a more practical scenario, where unlabeled data and test data contain new categories (outliers) not observed in labeled data (inliers). Most previous works focused on outlier detection via binary classifiers, which suffer from insufficient scalability and inability to distinguish different types of uncertainty. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, Adaptive Negative Evidential Deep Learning (ANEDL) to tackle these limitations. Concretely, we first introduce evidential deep learning (EDL) as an outlier detector to quantify different types of uncertainty, and design different uncertainty metrics for self-training and inference. Furthermore, we propose a novel adaptive negative optimization strategy, making EDL more tailored to the unlabeled dataset containing both inliers and outliers. As demonstrated empirically, our proposed method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods across four datasets.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) methods assume that labeled data, unlabeled data and test data are from the same distribution. Open-set semi-supervised learning (Open-set SSL) considers a more practical scenario, where unlabeled data and test data contain new categories (outliers) not observed in labeled data (inliers). Most previous works focused on outlier detection via binary classifiers, which suffer from insufficient scalability and inability to distinguish different types of uncertainty. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, Adaptive Negative Evidential Deep Learning (ANEDL) to tackle these limitations. Concretely, we first introduce evidential deep learning (EDL) as an outlier detector to quantify different types of uncertainty, and design different uncertainty metrics for self-training and inference. Furthermore, we propose a novel adaptive negative optimization strategy, making EDL more tailored to the unlabeled dataset containing both inliers and outliers. As demonstrated empirically, our proposed method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods across four datasets.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）方法假设标记数据、未标记数据和测试数据来自相同的分布。开放集半监督学习（Open-set SSL）考虑了一种更实际的场景，其中未标记数据和测试数据包含在标记数据（内点）中未观察到的新类别（异常值）。之前的大多数工作都集中在通过二元分类器进行异常值检测，但其可扩展性不足且无法区分不同类型的不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即自适应负证据深度学习（ANEDL）来解决这些局限性。具体来说，我们首先引入证据深度学习（EDL）作为异常值检测器来量化不同类型的不确定性，并为自我训练和推理设计不同的不确定性度量。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应负优化策略，使 EDL 更适合包含内部值和异常值的未标记数据集。根据经验证明，我们提出的方法在四个数据集上优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应负证据深度学习框架（ANEDL），用于解决开放集半监督学习中未标记数据和测试数据包含新类别（异常值）的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统开放集半监督学习方法依赖二分类器检测异常，存在扩展性差和无法区分不同不确定性类型的问题，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 引入证据深度学习（EDL）量化不确定性，设计自训练与推理的差异性不确定性度量，并提出自适应负优化策略，使模型更适配包含正常样本与异常样本的未标记数据集。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的实验表明，ANEDL方法优于现有最先进的开放集半监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合证据深度学习与自适应负优化策略，ANEDL有效解决了开放集半监督学习中异常检测与不确定性区分的难题。

authors_text: Gadi Singer,Joscha Bach,Tetiana Grinberg,Nagib Hakim,Phillip Howard,Vasudev Lal,Zev Rivlin
title: Thrill-K Architecture: Towards a Solution to the Problem of Knowledge Based Understanding
title_zh: Thrill-K 架构：解决基于知识的理解问题
comment: Artificial General Intelligence: 15th International Conference, AGI 2022, Seattle, WA, USA, August 2022, Proceedings
comments: Artificial General Intelligence: 15th International Conference, AGI 2022, Seattle, WA, USA, August 2022, Proceedings
abstract: While end-to-end learning systems are rapidly gaining capabilities and popularity, the increasing computational demands for deploying such systems, along with a lack of flexibility, adaptability, explainability, reasoning and verification capabilities, require new types of architectures. Here we introduce a classification of hybrid systems which, based on an analysis of human knowledge and intelligence, combines neural learning with various types of knowledge and knowledge sources. We present the Thrill-K architecture as a prototypical solution for integrating instantaneous knowledge, standby knowledge and external knowledge sources in a framework capable of inference, learning and intelligent control.
summary: While end-to-end learning systems are rapidly gaining capabilities and popularity, the increasing computational demands for deploying such systems, along with a lack of flexibility, adaptability, explainability, reasoning and verification capabilities, require new types of architectures. Here we introduce a classification of hybrid systems which, based on an analysis of human knowledge and intelligence, combines neural learning with various types of knowledge and knowledge sources. We present the Thrill-K architecture as a prototypical solution for integrating instantaneous knowledge, standby knowledge and external knowledge sources in a framework capable of inference, learning and intelligent control.
abstract_zh: 虽然端到端学习系统正在迅速获得能力和普及，但部署此类系统的计算需求不断增加，并且缺乏灵活性、适应性、可解释性、推理和验证能力，需要新型架构。这里我们介绍一种混合系统的分类，它基于对人类知识和智能的分析，将神经学习与各种类型的知识和知识源相结合。我们将 Thrill-K 架构作为一种原型解决方案，将即时知识、备用知识和外部知识源集成到一个能够推理、学习和智能控制的框架中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Thrill-K架构，旨在通过整合即时知识、备用知识和外部知识源，解决现有端到端学习系统在灵活性、可解释性及推理能力方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 端到端学习系统虽能力强大，但存在计算需求高、缺乏适应性与可解释性等问题，亟需结合知识驱动的混合架构提升系统性能。
AI.method: 基于人类知识与智能分析，分类设计混合系统框架，将神经学习与多类型知识源（即时知识、备用知识、外部知识）结合，构建支持推理、学习与智能控制的Thrill-K架构。
AI.result: 提出Thrill-K架构原型，实现多知识源的集成与动态调用，为复杂场景下的知识驱动型智能系统提供新思路。
AI.conclusion: Thrill-K架构通过融合神经网络与知识系统优势，为解决基于知识的理解问题提供了可行路径，未来需进一步验证其实际应用效果。

search_text: Thrill-K Architecture: Towards a Solution to the Problem of Knowledge Based Understanding Thrill-K 架构：解决基于知识的理解问题 While end-to-end learning systems are rapidly gaining capabilities and popularity, the increasing computational demands for deploying such systems, along with a lack of flexibility, adaptability, explainability, reasoning and verification capabilities, require new types of architectures. Here we introduce a classification of hybrid systems which, based on an analysis of human knowledge and intelligence, combines neural learning with various types of knowledge and knowledge sources. We present the Thrill-K architecture as a prototypical solution for integrating instantaneous knowledge, standby knowledge and external knowledge sources in a framework capable of inference, learning and intelligent control. 虽然端到端学习系统正在迅速获得能力和普及，但部署此类系统的计算需求不断增加，并且缺乏灵活性、适应性、可解释性、推理和验证能力，需要新型架构。这里我们介绍一种混合系统的分类，它基于对人类知识和智能的分析，将神经学习与各种类型的知识和知识源相结合。我们将 Thrill-K 架构作为一种原型解决方案，将即时知识、备用知识和外部知识源集成到一个能够推理、学习和智能控制的框架中。 本文提出Thrill-K架构，旨在通过整合即时知识、备用知识和外部知识源，解决现有端到端学习系统在灵活性、可解释性及推理能力方面的不足。 Gadi Singer,Joscha Bach,Tetiana Grinberg,Nagib Hakim,Phillip Howard,Vasudev Lal,Zev Rivlin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ronglai Zuo,Fangyun Wei,Brian Mak
title: Natural Language-Assisted Sign Language Recognition
title_zh: 自然语言辅助手语识别
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Codes are available at https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Codes are available at https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT
abstract: Sign languages are visual languages which convey information by signers' handshape, facial expression, body movement, and so forth. Due to the inherent restriction of combinations of these visual ingredients, there exist a significant number of visually indistinguishable signs (VISigns) in sign languages, which limits the recognition capacity of vision neural networks. To mitigate the problem, we propose the Natural Language-Assisted Sign Language Recognition (NLA-SLR) framework, which exploits semantic information contained in glosses (sign labels). First, for VISigns with similar semantic meanings, we propose language-aware label smoothing by generating soft labels for each training sign whose smoothing weights are computed from the normalized semantic similarities among the glosses to ease training. Second, for VISigns with distinct semantic meanings, we present an inter-modality mixup technique which blends vision and gloss features to further maximize the separability of different signs under the supervision of blended labels. Besides, we also introduce a novel backbone, video-keypoint network, which not only models both RGB videos and human body keypoints but also derives knowledge from sign videos of different temporal receptive fields. Empirically, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on three widely-adopted benchmarks: MSASL, WLASL, and NMFs-CSL. Codes are available at https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT.
summary: Sign languages are visual languages which convey information by signers' handshape, facial expression, body movement, and so forth. Due to the inherent restriction of combinations of these visual ingredients, there exist a significant number of visually indistinguishable signs (VISigns) in sign languages, which limits the recognition capacity of vision neural networks. To mitigate the problem, we propose the Natural Language-Assisted Sign Language Recognition (NLA-SLR) framework, which exploits semantic information contained in glosses (sign labels). First, for VISigns with similar semantic meanings, we propose language-aware label smoothing by generating soft labels for each training sign whose smoothing weights are computed from the normalized semantic similarities among the glosses to ease training. Second, for VISigns with distinct semantic meanings, we present an inter-modality mixup technique which blends vision and gloss features to further maximize the separability of different signs under the supervision of blended labels. Besides, we also introduce a novel backbone, video-keypoint network, which not only models both RGB videos and human body keypoints but also derives knowledge from sign videos of different temporal receptive fields. Empirically, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on three widely-adopted benchmarks: MSASL, WLASL, and NMFs-CSL. Codes are available at https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT.
abstract_zh: 手语是通过手语者的手形、面部表情、身体动作等传达信息的视觉语言。由于这些视觉成分组合的固有限制，手语中存在大量视觉上无法区分的符号（VISigns），这限制了视觉神经网络的识别能力。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了自然语言辅助手语识别（NLA-SLR）框架，该框架利用注释（符号标签）中包含的语义信息。首先，对于具有相似语义的 VISign，我们通过为每个训练符号生成软标签来提出语言感知标签平滑，其平滑权重是根据注释之间的归一化语义相似性计算的，以简化训练。其次，对于具有不同语义的 VISigns，我们提出了一种模态间混合技术，该技术混合了视觉和光泽特征，以在混合标签的监督下进一步最大化不同符号的可分离性。此外，我们还引入了一种新颖的主干网络——视频关键点网络，它不仅可以对 RGB 视频和人体关键点进行建模，还可以从不同时间感受野的符号视频中获取知识。根据经验，我们的方法在三个广泛采用的基准上实现了最先进的性能：MSASL、WLASL 和 NMFs-CSL。代码可在 https://github.com/FangyunWei/SLRT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用自然语言信息辅助的唇语识别框架，以解决视觉上难以区分的手语符号（VISigns）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉神经网络在处理手语符号时，因VISigns的视觉相似性导致识别能力受限，需借助语义信息提升区分度。
AI.method: 提出语言感知标签平滑（针对语义相似VISigns）和跨模态mixup技术（针对语义差异VISigns），并设计融合RGB视频与人体关键点的视频-关键点网络作为主干模型。
AI.result: 在MSASL、WLASL和NMFs-CSL三个基准数据集上达到最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合自然语言语义信息，有效提升了手语识别对VISigns的判别能力，验证了跨模态融合方法的有效性。

search_text: Natural Language-Assisted Sign Language Recognition 自然语言辅助手语识别 Sign languages are visual languages which convey information by signers' handshape, facial expression, body movement, and so forth. Due to the inherent restriction of combinations of these visual ingredients, there exist a significant number of visually indistinguishable signs (VISigns) in sign languages, which limits the recognition capacity of vision neural networks. To mitigate the problem, we propose the Natural Language-Assisted Sign Language Recognition (NLA-SLR) framework, which exploits semantic information contained in glosses (sign labels). First, for VISigns with similar semantic meanings, we propose language-aware label smoothing by generating soft labels for each training sign whose smoothing weights are computed from the normalized semantic similarities among the glosses to ease training. Second, for VISigns with distinct semantic meanings, we present an inter-modality mixup technique which blends vision and gloss features to further maximize the separability of different signs under the supervision of blended labels. Besides, we also introduce a novel backbone, video-keypoint network, which not only models both RGB videos and human body keypoints but also derives knowledge from sign videos of different temporal receptive fields. Empirically, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on three widely-adopted benchmarks: MSASL, WLASL, and NMFs-CSL. authors_text: Junke Wang,Zuxuan Wu,Dongdong Chen,Chong Luo,Xiyang Dai,Lu Yuan,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: OmniTracker: Unifying Object Tracking by Tracking-with-Detection
title_zh: OmniTracker：通过跟踪与检测统一对象跟踪
abstract: Visual Object Tracking (VOT) aims to estimate the positions of target objects in a video sequence, which is an important vision task with various real-world applications. Depending on whether the initial states of target objects are specified by provided annotations in the first frame or the categories, VOT could be classified as instance tracking (e.g., SOT and VOS) and category tracking (e.g., MOT, MOTS, and VIS) tasks. Different definitions have led to divergent solutions for these two types of tasks, resulting in redundant training expenses and parameter overhead. In this paper, combing the advantages of the best practices developed in both communities, we propose a novel tracking-with-detection paradigm, where tracking supplements appearance priors for detection and detection provides tracking with candidate bounding boxes for the association. Equipped with such a design, a unified tracking model, OmniTracker, is further presented to resolve all the tracking tasks with a fully shared network architecture, model weights, and inference pipeline, eliminating the need for task-specific architectures and reducing redundancy in model parameters. We conduct extensive experimentation on seven prominent tracking datasets of different tracking tasks, including LaSOT, TrackingNet, DAVIS16-17, MOT17, MOTS20, and YTVIS19, and demonstrate that OmniTracker achieves on-par or even better results than both task-specific and unified tracking models.
summary: Visual Object Tracking (VOT) aims to estimate the positions of target objects in a video sequence, which is an important vision task with various real-world applications. Depending on whether the initial states of target objects are specified by provided annotations in the first frame or the categories, VOT could be classified as instance tracking (e.g., SOT and VOS) and category tracking (e.g., MOT, MOTS, and VIS) tasks. Different definitions have led to divergent solutions for these two types of tasks, resulting in redundant training expenses and parameter overhead. In this paper, combing the advantages of the best practices developed in both communities, we propose a novel tracking-with-detection paradigm, where tracking supplements appearance priors for detection and detection provides tracking with candidate bounding boxes for the association. Equipped with such a design, a unified tracking model, OmniTracker, is further presented to resolve all the tracking tasks with a fully shared network architecture, model weights, and inference pipeline, eliminating the need for task-specific architectures and reducing redundancy in model parameters. We conduct extensive experimentation on seven prominent tracking datasets of different tracking tasks, including LaSOT, TrackingNet, DAVIS16-17, MOT17, MOTS20, and YTVIS19, and demonstrate that OmniTracker achieves on-par or even better results than both task-specific and unified tracking models.
abstract_zh: 视觉对象跟踪（VOT）旨在估计视频序列中目标对象的位置，这是各种实际应用中的重要视觉任务。根据目标对象的初始状态是由第一帧中提供的注释还是类别来指定，VOT 可以分为实例跟踪（例如，SOT 和 VOS）和类别跟踪（例如，MOT、MOTS 和 VIS）任务。不同的定义导致这两类任务的解决方案存在差异，从而产生冗余的训练费用和参数开销。在本文中，结合两个社区开发的最佳实践的优点，我们提出了一种新颖的跟踪检测范例，其中跟踪补充了检测的外观先验，而检测为关联提供了候选边界框的跟踪。配备这样的设计，进一步提出了统一的跟踪模型OmniTracker，以完全共享的网络架构、模型权重和推理管道来解决所有跟踪任务，消除了对特定于任务的架构的需要，并减少了模型参数的冗余。我们对不同跟踪任务的七个著名跟踪数据集（包括 LaSOT、TrackingNet、DAVIS16-17、MOT17、MOTS20 和 YTVIS19）进行了广泛的实验，并证明 OmniTracker 取得了与特定任务和统一跟踪模型相当甚至更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniTracker模型，通过跟踪与检测的统一框架解决多种视觉目标跟踪任务。
AI.motivation: 现有目标跟踪方法因任务类型（实例跟踪与类别跟踪）不同而采用分散的解决方案，导致训练成本高且模型参数冗余。
AI.method: 设计跟踪与检测协同的范式，利用跟踪提供外观先验辅助检测，检测则为跟踪提供候选框关联，实现共享网络架构与推理流程的统一模型。
AI.result: 在LaSOT、MOT17等7个主流数据集上，OmniTracker性能与任务专用模型及统一模型相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统一架构消除任务特定设计，减少参数冗余，为多任务跟踪提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Kun Yan,Xiao Li,Fangyun Wei,Jinglu Wang,Chenbin Zhang,Ping Wang,Yan Lu
title: Two-shot Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 双镜头视频对象分割
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Code and models are available at https://github.com/yk-pku/Two-shot-Video-Object-Segmentation
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Code and models are available at https://github.com/yk-pku/Two-shot-Video-Object-Segmentation
abstract: Previous works on video object segmentation (VOS) are trained on densely annotated videos. Nevertheless, acquiring annotations in pixel level is expensive and time-consuming. In this work, we demonstrate the feasibility of training a satisfactory VOS model on sparsely annotated videos-we merely require two labeled frames per training video while the performance is sustained. We term this novel training paradigm as two-shot video object segmentation, or two-shot VOS for short. The underlying idea is to generate pseudo labels for unlabeled frames during training and to optimize the model on the combination of labeled and pseudo-labeled data. Our approach is extremely simple and can be applied to a majority of existing frameworks. We first pre-train a VOS model on sparsely annotated videos in a semi-supervised manner, with the first frame always being a labeled one. Then, we adopt the pre-trained VOS model to generate pseudo labels for all unlabeled frames, which are subsequently stored in a pseudo-label bank. Finally, we retrain a VOS model on both labeled and pseudo-labeled data without any restrictions on the first frame. For the first time, we present a general way to train VOS models on two-shot VOS datasets. By using 7.3% and 2.9% labeled data of YouTube-VOS and DAVIS benchmarks, our approach achieves comparable results in contrast to the counterparts trained on fully labeled set. Code and models are available at https://github.com/yk-pku/Two-shot-Video-Object-Segmentation.

Our approach is extremely simple and can be applied to a majority of existing frameworks. By using 7.3% and 2.9% labeled data of YouTube-VOS and DAVIS benchmarks, our approach achieves comparable results in contrast to the counterparts trained on fully labeled set. Code and models are available at https://github.com/yk-pku/Two-shot-Video-Object-Segmentation.
abstract_zh: 以前的视频对象分割（VOS）工作是在密集注释的视频上进行训练的。然而，获取像素级注释既昂贵又耗时。在这项工作中，我们证明了在稀疏注释视频上训练令人满意的 VOS 模型的可行性 - 我们只需要每个训练视频两个标记帧，同时保持性能。我们将这种新颖的训练范例称为双镜头视频对象分割，或简称为双镜头 VOS。基本思想是在训练期间为未标记的帧生成伪标签，并结合标记数据和伪标记数据来优化模型。我们的方法非常简单，可以应用于大多数现有框架。我们首先以半监督的方式在稀疏注释的视频上预训练 VOS 模型，第一帧始终是有标签的帧。然后，我们采用预训练的VOS模型为所有未标记的帧生成伪标签，随后将其存储在伪标签库中。最后，我们在标记数据和伪标记数据上重新训练 VOS 模型，对第一帧没有任何限制。我们首次提出了一种在两次 VOS 数据集上训练 VOS 模型的通用方法。通过使用 YouTube-VOS 和 DAVIS 基准的 7.3% 和 2.9% 标记数据，我们的方法与在完全标记集上训练的对应方法取得了可比较的结果。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/yk-pku/Two-shot-Video-Object-Segmentation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅需每段视频两个标注帧的视频目标分割方法，称为Two-shot VOS。
AI.motivation: 传统视频目标分割依赖密集像素级标注，但此类标注成本高昂且耗时，因此需要减少对密集标注的依赖。
AI.method: 采用半监督方式预训练模型，利用首个标注帧生成伪标签并存储于伪标签库中，再结合真实与伪标签数据进行二次训练。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VOS和DAVIS数据集上分别使用7.3%和2.9%的标注数据，效果可与全标注方法媲美。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种通用的Two-shot VOS训练范式，在极少量标注数据下实现了高效视频目标分割。

search_text: Two-shot Video Object Segmentation 双镜头视频对象分割 Previous works on video object segmentation (VOS) are trained on densely annotated videos. Nevertheless, acquiring annotations in pixel level is expensive and time-consuming. In this work, we demonstrate the feasibility of training a satisfactory VOS model on sparsely annotated videos-we merely require two labeled frames per training video while the performance is sustained. We term this novel training paradigm as two-shot video object segmentation, or two-shot VOS for short. The underlying idea is to generate pseudo labels for unlabeled frames during training and to optimize the model on the combination of labeled and pseudo-labeled data. Our approach is extremely simple and can be applied to a majority of existing frameworks. We first pre-train a VOS model on sparsely annotated videos in a semi-supervised manner, with the first frame always being a labeled one. Then, we adopt the pre-trained VOS model to generate pseudo labels for all unlabeled frames, which are subsequently stored in a pseudo-label bank. Finally, we retrain a VOS model on both labeled and pseudo-labeled data without any restrictions on the first frame. For the first time, we present a general way to train VOS models on two-shot VOS datasets. By using 7.3% and 2.9% labeled data of YouTube-VOS and DAVIS benchmarks, our approach achieves comparable results in contrast to the counterparts trained on fully labeled set. Code and models are available at https://github.com/yk-pku/Two-shot-Video-Object-Segmentation. 以前的视频对象分割（VOS）工作是在密集注释的视频上进行训练的。然而，获取像素级注释既昂贵又耗时。在这项工作中，我们证明了在稀疏注释视频上训练令人满意的 VOS 模型的可行性 - 我们只需要每个训练视频两个标记帧，同时保持性能。我们将这种新颖的训练范例称为双镜头视频对象分割，或简称为双镜头 VOS。基本思想是在训练期间为未标记的帧生成伪标签，并结合标记数据和伪标记数据来优化模型。我们的方法非常简单，可以应用于大多数现有框架。我们首先以半监督的方式在稀疏注释的视频上预训练 VOS 模型，第一帧始终是有标签的帧。然后，我们采用预训练的VOS模型为所有未标记的帧生成伪标签，随后将其存储在伪标签库中。最后，我们在标记数据和伪标记数据上重新训练 VOS 模型，对第一帧没有任何限制。我们首次提出了一种在两次 VOS 数据集上训练 VOS 模型的通用方法。通过使用 YouTube-VOS 和 DAVIS 基准的 7.3% 和 2.9% 标记数据，我们的方法与在完全标记集上训练的对应方法取得了可比较的结果。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/yk-pku/Two-shot-Video-Object-Segmentation 获取。 本文提出了一种仅需每段视频两个标注帧的视频目标分割方法，称为Two-shot VOS。 Kun Yan,Xiao Li,Fangyun Wei,Jinglu Wang,Chenbin Zhang,Ping Wang,Yan Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Bo Jiang,Shaoyu Chen,Qing Xu,Bencheng Liao,Jiajie Chen,Helong Zhou,Qian Zhang,Wenyu Liu,Chang Huang,Xinggang Wang
title: VAD: Vectorized Scene Representation for Efficient Autonomous Driving
title_zh: VAD：用于高效自动驾驶的矢量化场景表示
abstract: Autonomous driving requires a comprehensive understanding of the surrounding environment for reliable trajectory planning. Previous works rely on dense rasterized scene representation (e.g., agent occupancy and semantic map) to perform planning, which is computationally intensive and misses the instance-level structure information. In this paper, we propose VAD, an end-to-end vectorized paradigm for autonomous driving, which models the driving scene as a fully vectorized representation. The proposed vectorized paradigm has two significant advantages. On one hand, VAD exploits the vectorized agent motion and map elements as explicit instance-level planning constraints which effectively improves planning safety. On the other hand, VAD runs much faster than previous end-to-end planning methods by getting rid of computation-intensive rasterized representation and hand-designed post-processing steps. VAD achieves state-of-the-art end-to-end planning performance on the nuScenes dataset, outperforming the previous best method by a large margin. Our base model, VAD-Base, greatly reduces the average collision rate by 29.0% and runs 2.5x faster. Besides, a lightweight variant, VAD-Tiny, greatly improves the inference speed (up to 9.3x) while achieving comparable planning performance. We believe the excellent performance and the high efficiency of VAD are critical for the real-world deployment of an autonomous driving system. Code and models are available at https://github.com/hustvl/VAD for facilitating future research.
summary: Autonomous driving requires a comprehensive understanding of the surrounding environment for reliable trajectory planning. Previous works rely on dense rasterized scene representation (e.g., agent occupancy and semantic map) to perform planning, which is computationally intensive and misses the instance-level structure information. In this paper, we propose VAD, an end-to-end vectorized paradigm for autonomous driving, which models the driving scene as a fully vectorized representation. The proposed vectorized paradigm has two significant advantages. On one hand, VAD exploits the vectorized agent motion and map elements as explicit instance-level planning constraints which effectively improves planning safety. On the other hand, VAD runs much faster than previous end-to-end planning methods by getting rid of computation-intensive rasterized representation and hand-designed post-processing steps. VAD achieves state-of-the-art end-to-end planning performance on the nuScenes dataset, outperforming the previous best method by a large margin. Our base model, VAD-Base, greatly reduces the average collision rate by 29.0% and runs 2.5x faster. Besides, a lightweight variant, VAD-Tiny, greatly improves the inference speed (up to 9.3x) while achieving comparable planning performance. We believe the excellent performance and the high efficiency of VAD are critical for the real-world deployment of an autonomous driving system. Code and models are available at https://github.com/hustvl/VAD for facilitating future research.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶需要全面了解周围环境，以进行可靠的轨迹规划。以前的工作依赖于密集的光栅化场景表示（例如，代理占用和语义图）来执行规划，这是计算密集型的并且错过了实例级结构信息。在本文中，我们提出了 VAD，一种用于自动驾驶的端到端矢量化范例，它将驾驶场景建模为完全矢量化的表示。所提出的矢量化范例有两个显着的优点。一方面，VAD 利用矢量化代理运动和地图元素作为显式实例级规划约束，有效提高规划安全性。另一方面，通过摆脱计算密集型栅格化表示和手工设计的后处理步骤，VAD 的运行速度比以前的端到端规划方法快得多。 VAD 在 nuScenes 数据集上实现了最先进的端到端规划性能，大大优于之前的最佳方法。我们的基础模型 VAD-Base 将平均碰撞率大大降低了 29.0%，运行速度提高了 2.5 倍。此外，轻量级变体 VAD-Tiny 极大地提高了推理速度（高达 9.3 倍），同时实现了可比的规划性能。我们相信，VAD 的卓越性能和高效率对于自动驾驶系统的实际部署至关重要。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/hustvl/VAD 获取，以促进未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VAD，一种用于自动驾驶的端到端向量化场景表示方法，以提高轨迹规划的效率和安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统自动驾驶方法依赖计算密集型的栅格化场景表示，导致计算成本高且丢失实例级结构信息，亟需更高效且安全的规划框架。
AI.method: VAD通过将驾驶场景建模为向量化表示，利用向量化代理运动和地图元素作为显式实例级规划约束，摒弃栅格化表示和手工设计的后处理步骤。
AI.result: VAD在nuScenes数据集上达到最先进水平，VAD-Base将平均碰撞率降低29.0%且速度提升2.5倍，轻量版VAD-Tiny推理速度提升9.3倍且性能相当。
AI.conclusion: VAD凭借卓越性能和高效率，为自动驾驶系统的实际部署提供了关键技术支持，代码和模型已开源以促进后续研究。

authors_text: Irmak Guzey,Ben Evans,Soumith Chintala,Lerrel Pinto
title: Dexterity from Touch: Self-Supervised Pre-Training of Tactile Representations with Robotic Play
title_zh: 触摸的敏捷性：通过机器人游戏进行触觉表征的自我监督预训练
comment: Video and code can be accessed here: https://tactile-dexterity.github.io/
comments: Video and code can be accessed here: https://tactile-dexterity.github.io/
abstract: Teaching dexterity to multi-fingered robots has been a longstanding challenge in robotics. Most prominent work in this area focuses on learning controllers or policies that either operate on visual observations or state estimates derived from vision. However, such methods perform poorly on fine-grained manipulation tasks that require reasoning about contact forces or about objects occluded by the hand itself. In this work, we present T-Dex, a new approach for tactile-based dexterity, that operates in two phases. In the first phase, we collect 2.5 hours of play data, which is used to train self-supervised tactile encoders. This is necessary to bring high-dimensional tactile readings to a lower-dimensional embedding. In the second phase, given a handful of demonstrations for a dexterous task, we learn non-parametric policies that combine the tactile observations with visual ones. Across five challenging dexterous tasks, we show that our tactile-based dexterity models outperform purely vision and torque-based models by an average of 1.7X. Finally, we provide a detailed analysis on factors critical to T-Dex including the importance of play data, architectures, and representation learning.
summary: Teaching dexterity to multi-fingered robots has been a longstanding challenge in robotics. Most prominent work in this area focuses on learning controllers or policies that either operate on visual observations or state estimates derived from vision. However, such methods perform poorly on fine-grained manipulation tasks that require reasoning about contact forces or about objects occluded by the hand itself. In this work, we present T-Dex, a new approach for tactile-based dexterity, that operates in two phases. In the first phase, we collect 2.5 hours of play data, which is used to train self-supervised tactile encoders. This is necessary to bring high-dimensional tactile readings to a lower-dimensional embedding. In the second phase, given a handful of demonstrations for a dexterous task, we learn non-parametric policies that combine the tactile observations with visual ones. Across five challenging dexterous tasks, we show that our tactile-based dexterity models outperform purely vision and torque-based models by an average of 1.7X. Finally, we provide a detailed analysis on factors critical to T-Dex including the importance of play data, architectures, and representation learning.
abstract_zh: 教授多指机器人的灵活性一直是机器人技术领域的一个长期挑战。该领域最突出的工作集中于学习控制器或策略，这些控制器或策略要么对视觉观察进行操作，要么对来自视觉的状态估计进行操作。然而，此类方法在需要推理接触力或手本身遮挡的物体的细粒度操作任务中表现不佳。在这项工作中，我们提出了 T-Dex，一种基于触觉的灵活性的新方法，分两个阶段运行。在第一阶段，我们收集 2.5 小时的游戏数据，用于训练自监督触觉编码器。这对于将高维触觉读数引入低维嵌入是必要的。在第二阶段，给定一些灵巧任务的演示，我们学习将触觉观察与视觉观察相结合的非参数策略。在五项具有挑战性的灵巧任务中，我们表明，基于触觉的灵巧模型的性能平均比纯视觉和基于扭矩的模型高出 1.7 倍。最后，我们对 T-Dex 的关键因素进行了详细分析，包括游戏数据、架构和表示学习的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出T-Dex方法，通过触觉感知提升多指机器人的灵巧操作能力，结合自监督预训练与机器人游戏数据。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉或状态估计方法在处理需要接触力感知或手部遮挡的精细操作任务时表现不足，需探索触觉感知的替代方案。
AI.method: 分两阶段：1）收集2.5小时机器人游戏数据训练自监督触觉编码器；2）结合少量示范数据，融合触觉与视觉观测学习非参数策略。
AI.result: 在五个挑战性任务中，触觉模型平均性能超越纯视觉和扭矩模型1.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 触觉预训练与游戏数据对提升灵巧性至关重要，且模型架构与表示学习是关键成功因素。

search_text: Dexterity from Touch: Self-Supervised Pre-Training of Tactile Representations with Robotic Play 触摸的敏捷性：通过机器人游戏进行触觉表征的自我监督预训练 Teaching dexterity to multi-fingered robots has been a longstanding challenge in robotics. Most prominent work in this area focuses on learning controllers or policies that either operate on visual observations or state estimates derived from vision. However, such methods perform poorly on fine-grained manipulation tasks that require reasoning about contact forces or about objects occluded by the hand itself. In this work, we present T-Dex, a new approach for tactile-based dexterity, that operates in two phases. In the first phase, we collect 2.5 hours of play data, which is used to train self-supervised tactile encoders. This is necessary to bring high-dimensional tactile readings to a lower-dimensional embedding. In the second phase, given a handful of demonstrations for a dexterous task, we learn non-parametric policies that combine the tactile observations with visual ones. Across five challenging dexterous tasks, we show that our tactile-based dexterity models outperform purely vision and torque-based models by an average of 1.7X. Finally, we provide a detailed analysis on factors critical to T-Dex including the importance of play data, architectures, and representation learning. 教授多指机器人的灵活性一直是机器人技术领域的一个长期挑战。该领域最突出的工作集中于学习控制器或策略，这些控制器或策略要么对视觉观察进行操作，要么对来自视觉的状态估计进行操作。然而，此类方法在需要推理接触力或手本身遮挡的物体的细粒度操作任务中表现不佳。在这项工作中，我们提出了 T-Dex，一种基于触觉的灵活性的新方法，分两个阶段运行。在第一阶段，我们收集 2.5 小时的游戏数据，用于训练自监督触觉编码器。这对于将高维触觉读数引入低维嵌入是必要的。在第二阶段，给定一些灵巧任务的演示，我们学习将触觉观察与视觉观察相结合的非参数策略。在五项具有挑战性的灵巧任务中，我们表明，基于触觉的灵巧模型的性能平均比纯视觉和基于扭矩的模型高出 1.7 倍。最后，我们对 T-Dex 的关键因素进行了详细分析，包括游戏数据、架构和表示学习的重要性。 本文提出T-Dex方法，通过触觉感知提升多指机器人的灵巧操作能力，结合自监督预训练与机器人游戏数据。 Irmak Guzey,Ben Evans,Soumith Chintala,Lerrel Pinto cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sherwin Bahmani,Jeong Joon Park,Despoina Paschalidou,Xingguang Yan,Gordon Wetzstein,Leonidas Guibas,Andrea Tagliasacchi
title: CC3D: Layout-Conditioned Generation of Compositional 3D Scenes
title_zh: CC3D：组合 3D 场景的布局条件生成
abstract: In this work, we introduce CC3D, a conditional generative model that synthesizes complex 3D scenes conditioned on 2D semantic scene layouts, trained using single-view images. Different from most existing 3D GANs that limit their applicability to aligned single objects, we focus on generating complex scenes with multiple objects, by modeling the compositional nature of 3D scenes. By devising a 2D layout-based approach for 3D synthesis and implementing a new 3D field representation with a stronger geometric inductive bias, we have created a 3D GAN that is both efficient and of high quality, while allowing for a more controllable generation process. Our evaluations on synthetic 3D-FRONT and real-world KITTI-360 datasets demonstrate that our model generates scenes of improved visual and geometric quality in comparison to previous works.
summary: In this work, we introduce CC3D, a conditional generative model that synthesizes complex 3D scenes conditioned on 2D semantic scene layouts, trained using single-view images. Different from most existing 3D GANs that limit their applicability to aligned single objects, we focus on generating complex scenes with multiple objects, by modeling the compositional nature of 3D scenes. By devising a 2D layout-based approach for 3D synthesis and implementing a new 3D field representation with a stronger geometric inductive bias, we have created a 3D GAN that is both efficient and of high quality, while allowing for a more controllable generation process. Our evaluations on synthetic 3D-FRONT and real-world KITTI-360 datasets demonstrate that our model generates scenes of improved visual and geometric quality in comparison to previous works.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们介绍了 CC3D，这是一种条件生成模型，可以合成以 2D 语义场景布局为条件的复杂 3D 场景，并使用单视图图像进行训练。与大多数现有 3D GAN 将其适用性限制为对齐的单个对象不同，我们专注于通过对 3D 场景的组成性质进行建模来生成具有多个对象的复杂场景。通过设计基于 2D 布局的 3D 合成方法，并实现具有更强几何归纳偏差的新 3D 场表示，我们创建了高效且高质量的 3D GAN，同时允许更可控的生成过程。我们对合成 3D-FRONT 和真实世界 KITTI-360 数据集的评估表明，与之前的作品相比，我们的模型生成的场景具有更高的视觉和几何质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CC3D模型，通过2D语义布局生成复杂多物体3D场景。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成模型多局限于单物体生成，缺乏对复杂场景组合生成的控制能力与效率。
AI.method: 基于2D布局设计3D生成方法，结合新型几何归纳偏置的3D场表示，实现高效可控的多物体场景生成。
AI.result: 在3D-FRONT和KITTI-360数据集上生成的场景在视觉与几何质量上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CC3D通过布局条件生成与几何建模创新，为复杂3D场景生成提供了高效且高质量的解决方案。

authors_text: Omkar Thawakar,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Jorma Laaksonen,Orly Reiner,Mubarak Shah,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: 3D Mitochondria Instance Segmentation with Spatio-Temporal Transformers
title_zh: 使用时空转换器进行 3D 线粒体实例分割
abstract: Accurate 3D mitochondria instance segmentation in electron microscopy (EM) is a challenging problem and serves as a prerequisite to empirically analyze their distributions and morphology. Most existing approaches employ 3D convolutions to obtain representative features. However, these convolution-based approaches struggle to effectively capture long-range dependencies in the volume mitochondria data, due to their limited local receptive field. To address this, we propose a hybrid encoder-decoder framework based on a split spatio-temporal attention module that efficiently computes spatial and temporal self-attentions in parallel, which are later fused through a deformable convolution. Further, we introduce a semantic foreground-background adversarial loss during training that aids in delineating the region of mitochondria instances from the background clutter. Our extensive experiments on three benchmarks, Lucchi, MitoEM-R and MitoEM-H, reveal the benefits of the proposed contributions achieving state-of-the-art results on all three datasets. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/OmkarThawakar/STT-UNET.
summary: Accurate 3D mitochondria instance segmentation in electron microscopy (EM) is a challenging problem and serves as a prerequisite to empirically analyze their distributions and morphology. Most existing approaches employ 3D convolutions to obtain representative features. However, these convolution-based approaches struggle to effectively capture long-range dependencies in the volume mitochondria data, due to their limited local receptive field. To address this, we propose a hybrid encoder-decoder framework based on a split spatio-temporal attention module that efficiently computes spatial and temporal self-attentions in parallel, which are later fused through a deformable convolution. Further, we introduce a semantic foreground-background adversarial loss during training that aids in delineating the region of mitochondria instances from the background clutter. Our extensive experiments on three benchmarks, Lucchi, MitoEM-R and MitoEM-H, reveal the benefits of the proposed contributions achieving state-of-the-art results on all three datasets. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/OmkarThawakar/STT-UNET.
abstract_zh: 电子显微镜 (EM) 中准确的 3D 线粒体实例分割是一个具有挑战性的问题，也是实证分析其分布和形态的先决条件。大多数现有方法采用 3D 卷积来获取代表性特征。然而，由于局部感受野有限，这些基于卷积的方法很难有效地捕获体积线粒体数据中的远程依赖性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于分割时空注意力模块的混合编码器-解码器框架，该框架可以有效地并行计算空间和时间自注意力，然后通过可变形卷积进行融合。此外，我们在训练过程中引入了语义前景-背景对抗性损失，有助于从背景杂乱中描绘线粒体实例的区域。我们对 Lucchi、MitoEM-R 和 MitoEM-H 三个基准进行了广泛的实验，揭示了所提出的贡献在所有三个数据集上实现最先进结果的好处。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/OmkarThawakar/STT-UNET 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空变换器的混合编码器-解码器框架，用于电子显微镜图像中线粒体的三维实例分割。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3D卷积的方法难以有效捕捉线粒体体积数据中的长距离依赖关系，限制了分割精度。
AI.method: 设计了分拆的时空注意力模块，通过并行计算空间与时间自注意力并融合变形卷积，结合语义前后景对抗损失优化分割边界。
AI.result: 在Lucchi、MitoEM-R和MitoEM-H三个基准数据集上均达到最先进水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过时空注意力机制有效建模长距离依赖关系，显著提升了线粒体实例分割的准确性。

Our code and models are available at https://github.com/OmkarThawakar/STT-UNET. 电子显微镜 (EM) 中准确的 3D 线粒体实例分割是一个具有挑战性的问题，也是实证分析其分布和形态的先决条件。大多数现有方法采用 3D 卷积来获取代表性特征。然而，由于局部感受野有限，这些基于卷积的方法很难有效地捕获体积线粒体数据中的远程依赖性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于分割时空注意力模块的混合编码器-解码器框架，该框架可以有效地并行计算空间和时间自注意力，然后通过可变形卷积进行融合。此外，我们在训练过程中引入了语义前景-背景对抗性损失，有助于从背景杂乱中描绘线粒体实例的区域。我们对 Lucchi、MitoEM-R 和 MitoEM-H 三个基准进行了广泛的实验，揭示了所提出的贡献在所有三个数据集上实现最先进结果的好处。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/OmkarThawakar/STT-UNET 获取。 本文提出了一种基于时空变换器的混合编码器-解码器框架，用于电子显微镜图像中线粒体的三维实例分割。 Omkar Thawakar,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Jorma Laaksonen,Orly Reiner,Mubarak Shah,Fahad Shahbaz Khan eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Xishun Wang,Tong Su,Fang Da,Xiaodong Yang
title: ProphNet: Efficient Agent-Centric Motion Forecasting with Anchor-Informed Proposals
title_zh: ProphNet：使用锚点通知提案进行高效的以代理为中心的运动预测
abstract: Motion forecasting is a key module in an autonomous driving system. Due to the heterogeneous nature of multi-sourced input, multimodality in agent behavior, and low latency required by onboard deployment, this task is notoriously challenging. To cope with these difficulties, this paper proposes a novel agent-centric model with anchor-informed proposals for efficient multimodal motion prediction. We design a modality-agnostic strategy to concisely encode the complex input in a unified manner. We generate diverse proposals, fused with anchors bearing goal-oriented scene context, to induce multimodal prediction that covers a wide range of future trajectories. Our network architecture is highly uniform and succinct, leading to an efficient model amenable for real-world driving deployment. Experiments reveal that our agent-centric network compares favorably with the state-of-the-art methods in prediction accuracy, while achieving scene-centric level inference latency.
summary: Motion forecasting is a key module in an autonomous driving system. Due to the heterogeneous nature of multi-sourced input, multimodality in agent behavior, and low latency required by onboard deployment, this task is notoriously challenging. To cope with these difficulties, this paper proposes a novel agent-centric model with anchor-informed proposals for efficient multimodal motion prediction. We design a modality-agnostic strategy to concisely encode the complex input in a unified manner. We generate diverse proposals, fused with anchors bearing goal-oriented scene context, to induce multimodal prediction that covers a wide range of future trajectories. Our network architecture is highly uniform and succinct, leading to an efficient model amenable for real-world driving deployment. Experiments reveal that our agent-centric network compares favorably with the state-of-the-art methods in prediction accuracy, while achieving scene-centric level inference latency.
abstract_zh: 运动预测是自动驾驶系统中的关键模块。由于多源输入的异构性、代理行为的多模态以及机载部署所需的低延迟，这项任务非常具有挑战性。为了应对这些困难，本文提出了一种新颖的以代理为中心的模型，该模型具有锚通知的建议，用于有效的多模态运动预测。我们设计了一种与模态无关的策略，以统一的方式对复杂的输入进行简洁编码。我们生成不同的建议，与具有面向目标的场景上下文的锚点融合，以诱导涵盖广泛的未来轨迹的多模态预测。我们的网络架构高度统一和简洁，形成了适合现实世界驾驶部署的高效模型。实验表明，我们以代理为中心的网络在预测精度方面与最先进的方法相比毫不逊色，同时实现了以场景为中心的推理延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的以代理为中心的运动预测模型ProphNet，通过锚点信息的建议解决多源输入异构性、行为多模态性和低延迟部署的挑战。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统中的运动预测面临多源输入复杂、代理行为多模态及实时性要求高等问题，现有方法难以兼顾预测精度与计算效率。
AI.method: 设计模态无关的统一编码策略处理多源输入，结合锚点引导的多样化建议生成机制，构建简洁高效的网络架构以实现多模态轨迹预测。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在预测准确性上优于现有方法，同时推理延迟达到场景中心级水平，适合实际部署。
AI.conclusion: ProphNet通过代理中心视角与锚点融合机制，在保证预测精度的同时显著提升计算效率，为自动驾驶系统提供可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Robin Courant,Maika Edberg,Nicolas Dufour,Vicky Kalogeiton
title: Machine Learning for Brain Disorders: Transformers and Visual Transformers
title_zh: 机器学习治疗脑部疾病：变形金刚和视觉变形金刚
comment: To appear in O. Colliot (Ed.), Machine Learning for Brain Disorders, Springer
comments: To appear in O. Colliot (Ed.), Machine Learning for Brain Disorders, Springer
abstract: Transformers were initially introduced for natural language processing (NLP) tasks, but fast they were adopted by most deep learning fields, including computer vision. They measure the relationships between pairs of input tokens (words in the case of text strings, parts of images for visual Transformers), termed attention. The cost is exponential with the number of tokens. For image classification, the most common Transformer Architecture uses only the Transformer Encoder in order to transform the various input tokens. However, there are also numerous other applications in which the decoder part of the traditional Transformer Architecture is also used. Here, we first introduce the Attention mechanism (Section 1), and then the Basic Transformer Block including the Vision Transformer (Section 2). Next, we discuss some improvements of visual Transformers to account for small datasets or less computation(Section 3). Finally, we introduce Visual Transformers applied to tasks other than image classification, such as detection, segmentation, generation and training without labels (Section 4) and other domains, such as video or multimodality using text or audio data (Section 5).
summary: Transformers were initially introduced for natural language processing (NLP) tasks, but fast they were adopted by most deep learning fields, including computer vision. They measure the relationships between pairs of input tokens (words in the case of text strings, parts of images for visual Transformers), termed attention. The cost is exponential with the number of tokens. For image classification, the most common Transformer Architecture uses only the Transformer Encoder in order to transform the various input tokens. However, there are also numerous other applications in which the decoder part of the traditional Transformer Architecture is also used. Here, we first introduce the Attention mechanism (Section 1), and then the Basic Transformer Block including the Vision Transformer (Section 2). Next, we discuss some improvements of visual Transformers to account for small datasets or less computation(Section 3). Finally, we introduce Visual Transformers applied to tasks other than image classification, such as detection, segmentation, generation and training without labels (Section 4) and other domains, such as video or multimodality using text or audio data (Section 5).
abstract_zh: Transformer 最初是为了自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务而引入的，但很快它们就被大多数深度学习领域所采用，包括计算机视觉。他们测量输入标记对（文本字符串中的单词，视觉变形金刚中的图像部分）之间的关系，称为注意力。成本与代币数量成指数关系。对于图像分类，最常见的 Transformer 架构仅使用 Transformer 编码器来转换各种输入标记。然而，还有许多其他应用也使用传统 Transformer 架构的解码器部分。在这里，我们首先介绍注意力机制（第 1 节），然后介绍包括视觉变压器的基本变压器块（第 2 节）。接下来，我们讨论视觉 Transformer 的一些改进，以适应小数据集或更少的计算（第 3 节）。最后，我们介绍了应用于图像分类以外的任务的视觉变换器，例如无标签的检测、分割、生成和训练（第 4 节）以及其他领域，例如使用文本或音频数据的视频或多模态（第 5 节）。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了Transformer和视觉Transformer在脑部疾病中的应用，并探讨了其改进方法及在不同任务中的扩展应用。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法在处理脑部疾病相关复杂数据时存在局限，而Transformer在捕捉长距离依赖关系方面表现出色，因此需要探索其在该领域的应用及优化。
AI.method: 通过系统综述和分析，介绍Transformer的基本架构、视觉Transformer的改进方法，并探讨其在脑部疾病相关任务中的应用。
AI.result: 总结了多种视觉Transformer的改进方法，并分析了其在不同任务（如检测、分割）及多模态数据中的应用效果。
AI.conclusion: 视觉Transformer在脑部疾病分析中展现出潜力，但需进一步优化以解决小数据集和计算资源限制问题，同时拓展到更多任务和多模态数据。

authors_text: Sayed Erfan Arefin
title: Simple Two-wheel Self-Balancing Robot Implementation
title_zh: 简单的两轮自平衡机器人实现
abstract: Cyber-physical systems, also known as CPS, is an emerging field of technology that combines the physical and digital worlds by allowing for seamless interaction and communication between the two. One of the key characteristics of a CPS is its ability to take input from its environment and use that information to produce an output through actuators in the physical world. A balancing robot is a prime example of a CPS, as it uses input from its sensors to continually monitor its orientation and take action to prevent falling over by generating thrust through its wheels or manipulating its inertia. In this specific project, a two-wheel self-balancing robot was developed, utilizing the concept of a reverse pendulum. A reverse pendulum by default is inherently unstable and requires an external force to maintain its balance. In this case, the balancing robot produces this external force through the use of wheels and motors. To achieve precise balancing, stepper motors were utilized in the design of the robot. Additionally, the robot has the capability to move in four basic directions and the movement is controlled through an app connected to the robot via Bluetooth. This allows for remote control and monitoring of the robot's movements and actions. Overall, the development of this two-wheel self-balancing robot serves as a demonstration of the potential and capabilities of cyber-physical systems technology.

This allows for remote control and monitoring of the robot's movements and actions. Overall, the development of this two-wheel self-balancing robot serves as a demonstration of the potential and capabilities of cyber-physical systems technology.
abstract_zh: 网络物理系统，也称为 CPS，是一个新兴的技术领域，它通过允许物理世界和数字世界之间的无缝交互和通信将两者结合起来。 CPS 的关键特征之一是它能够从环境中获取输入，并使用该信息通过物理世界中的执行器产生输出。平衡机器人是 CPS 的一个典型例子，因为它使用传感器的输入来持续监控其方向，并通过轮子产生推力或操纵惯性来采取行动防止跌倒。在这个具体项目中，利用反向摆的概念开发了一种两轮自平衡机器人。默认情况下，反向摆本质上是不稳定的，需要外力来维持其平衡。在这种情况下，平衡机器人通过使用轮子和电机产生这种外力。为了实现精确的平衡，机器人的设计中使用了步进电机。此外，机器人能够在四个基本方向上移动，并且通过蓝牙连接到机器人的应用程序来控制移动。这允许远程控制和监控机器人的运动和动作。总的来说，这种两轮自平衡机器人的开发证明了网络物理系统技术的潜力和能力。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个基于反摆原理的两轮自平衡机器人，展示了网络物理系统（CPS）的技术潜力。
AI.motivation: 通过开发自平衡机器人验证网络物理系统在物理世界与数字世界交互中的应用价值，体现其环境感知与动态控制能力。
AI.method: 采用反摆力学模型，结合步进电机驱动双轮系统，并通过蓝牙连接手机App实现远程方向控制与状态监控。
AI.result: 成功构建出可四向移动的自平衡机器人原型，验证了基于CPS架构的实时传感、计算与执行联动机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该机器人项目有效证明了网络物理系统在动态平衡控制领域的可行性，为复杂CPS应用提供了实践参考。

search_text: Simple Two-wheel Self-Balancing Robot Implementation 简单的两轮自平衡机器人实现 Cyber-physical systems, also known as CPS, is an emerging field of technology that combines the physical and digital worlds by allowing for seamless interaction and communication between the two. One of the key characteristics of a CPS is its ability to take input from its environment and use that information to produce an output through actuators in the physical world. A balancing robot is a prime example of a CPS, as it uses input from its sensors to continually monitor its orientation and take action to prevent falling over by generating thrust through its wheels or manipulating its inertia. In this specific project, a two-wheel self-balancing robot was developed, utilizing the concept of a reverse pendulum. A reverse pendulum by default is inherently unstable and requires an external force to maintain its balance. In this case, the balancing robot produces this external force through the use of wheels and motors. To achieve precise balancing, stepper motors were utilized in the design of the robot. Additionally, the robot has the capability to move in four basic directions and the movement is controlled through an app connected to the robot via Bluetooth. This allows for remote control and monitoring of the robot's movements and actions. Overall, the development of this two-wheel self-balancing robot serves as a demonstration of the potential and capabilities of cyber-physical systems technology. 网络物理系统，也称为 CPS，是一个新兴的技术领域，它通过允许物理世界和数字世界之间的无缝交互和通信将两者结合起来。 CPS 的关键特征之一是它能够从环境中获取输入，并使用该信息通过物理世界中的执行器产生输出。平衡机器人是 CPS 的一个典型例子，因为它使用传感器的输入来持续监控其方向，并通过轮子产生推力或操纵惯性来采取行动防止跌倒。在这个具体项目中，利用反向摆的概念开发了一种两轮自平衡机器人。默认情况下，反向摆本质上是不稳定的，需要外力来维持其平衡。在这种情况下，平衡机器人通过使用轮子和电机产生这种外力。为了实现精确的平衡，机器人的设计中使用了步进电机。此外，机器人能够在四个基本方向上移动，并且通过蓝牙连接到机器人的应用程序来控制移动。这允许远程控制和监控机器人的运动和动作。总的来说，这种两轮自平衡机器人的开发证明了网络物理系统技术的潜力和能力。 本文设计并实现了一个基于反摆原理的两轮自平衡机器人，展示了网络物理系统（CPS）的技术潜力。 Sayed Erfan Arefin cs.RO

authors_text: Jingyang Lin,Hang Hua,Ming Chen,Yikang Li,Jenhao Hsiao,Chiuman Ho,Jiebo Luo
title: VideoXum: Cross-modal Visual and Textural Summarization of Videos
title_zh: VideoXum：视频的跨模式视觉和纹理摘要
abstract: Video summarization aims to distill the most important information from a source video to produce either an abridged clip or a textual narrative. Traditionally, different methods have been proposed depending on whether the output is a video or text, thus ignoring the correlation between the two semantically related tasks of visual summarization and textual summarization. We propose a new joint video and text summarization task. The goal is to generate both a shortened video clip along with the corresponding textual summary from a long video, collectively referred to as a cross-modal summary. The generated shortened video clip and text narratives should be semantically well aligned. To this end, we first build a large-scale human-annotated dataset -- VideoXum (X refers to different modalities). The dataset is reannotated based on ActivityNet. After we filter out the videos that do not meet the length requirements, 14,001 long videos remain in our new dataset. Each video in our reannotated dataset has human-annotated video summaries and the corresponding narrative summaries. We then design a novel end-to-end model -- VTSUM-BILP to address the challenges of our proposed task. Moreover, we propose a new metric called VT-CLIPScore to help evaluate the semantic consistency of cross-modality summary. The proposed model achieves promising performance on this new task and establishes a benchmark for future research.
summary: Video summarization aims to distill the most important information from a source video to produce either an abridged clip or a textual narrative. Traditionally, different methods have been proposed depending on whether the output is a video or text, thus ignoring the correlation between the two semantically related tasks of visual summarization and textual summarization. We propose a new joint video and text summarization task. The goal is to generate both a shortened video clip along with the corresponding textual summary from a long video, collectively referred to as a cross-modal summary. The generated shortened video clip and text narratives should be semantically well aligned. To this end, we first build a large-scale human-annotated dataset -- VideoXum (X refers to different modalities). The dataset is reannotated based on ActivityNet. After we filter out the videos that do not meet the length requirements, 14,001 long videos remain in our new dataset. Each video in our reannotated dataset has human-annotated video summaries and the corresponding narrative summaries. We then design a novel end-to-end model -- VTSUM-BILP to address the challenges of our proposed task. Moreover, we propose a new metric called VT-CLIPScore to help evaluate the semantic consistency of cross-modality summary. The proposed model achieves promising performance on this new task and establishes a benchmark for future research.
abstract_zh: 视频摘要旨在从源视频中提取最重要的信息，以生成删节剪辑或文本叙述。传统上，根据输出是视频还是文本提出了不同的方法，从而忽略了视觉摘要和文本摘要这两个语义相关任务之间的相关性。我们提出了一个新的联合视频和文本摘要任务。目标是从长视频生成缩短的视频剪辑以及相应的文本摘要，统称为跨模式摘要。生成的缩短的视频剪辑和文本叙述应该在语义上很好地对齐。为此，我们首先构建一个大规模的人工注释数据集——VideoXum（X指不同的模态）。数据集基于ActivityNet重新标注。在我们过滤掉不符合长度要求的视频后，我们的新数据集中保留了 14,001 个长视频。我们重新注释的数据集中的每个视频都有人工注释的视频摘要和相应的叙述摘要。然后，我们设计了一种新颖的端到端模型——VTSUM-BILP来解决我们提出的任务的挑战。此外，我们提出了一种名为 VT-CLIPScore 的新指标来帮助评估跨模态摘要的语义一致性。所提出的模型在这项新任务中取得了令人鼓舞的性能，并为未来的研究树立了基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合视频和文本摘要的新任务，旨在从长视频中生成缩短的视频片段和对应的文本摘要。
AI.motivation: 传统方法分别处理视频摘要和文本摘要，忽略了两者之间的语义关联。本文旨在通过联合处理这两个任务，提升摘要的语义一致性。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个大规模的人工标注数据集VideoXum，并设计了一个端到端模型VTSUM-BILP，同时提出了一种新的评估指标VT-CLIPScore来评估跨模态摘要的语义一致性。
AI.result: 所提出的模型在新任务上表现出色，并为未来的研究建立了基准。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过联合视频和文本摘要任务，推动了跨模态摘要领域的发展，并为相关研究提供了新的数据集和评估指标。
