authors_text: Akshay Paruchuri,Xin Liu,Yulu Pan,Shwetak Patel,Daniel McDuff,Soumyadip Sengupta
title: Motion Matters: Neural Motion Transfer for Better Camera Physiological Measurement
title_zh: 运动很重要：神经运动传输可实现更好的相机生理测量
comment: Accepted to WACV 2024, 17 pages, 6 figures, 15 tables
comments: Accepted to WACV 2024, 17 pages, 6 figures, 15 tables
abstract: Machine learning models for camera-based physiological measurement can have weak generalization due to a lack of representative training data. Body motion is one of the most significant sources of noise when attempting to recover the subtle cardiac pulse from a video. We explore motion transfer as a form of data augmentation to introduce motion variation while preserving physiological changes of interest. We adapt a neural video synthesis approach to augment videos for the task of remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) and study the effects of motion augmentation with respect to 1) the magnitude and 2) the type of motion. After training on motion-augmented versions of publicly available datasets, we demonstrate a 47% improvement over existing inter-dataset results using various state-of-the-art methods on the PURE dataset. We also present inter-dataset results on five benchmark datasets to show improvements of up to 79% using TS-CAN, a neural rPPG estimation method. Our findings illustrate the usefulness of motion transfer as a data augmentation technique for improving the generalization of models for camera-based physiological sensing. We release our code for using motion transfer as a data augmentation technique on three publicly available datasets, UBFC-rPPG, PURE, and SCAMPS, and models pre-trained on motion-augmented data here: https://motion-matters.github.io/
summary: Machine learning models for camera-based physiological measurement can have weak generalization due to a lack of representative training data. Body motion is one of the most significant sources of noise when attempting to recover the subtle cardiac pulse from a video. We explore motion transfer as a form of data augmentation to introduce motion variation while preserving physiological changes of interest. We adapt a neural video synthesis approach to augment videos for the task of remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) and study the effects of motion augmentation with respect to 1) the magnitude and 2) the type of motion. After training on motion-augmented versions of publicly available datasets, we demonstrate a 47% improvement over existing inter-dataset results using various state-of-the-art methods on the PURE dataset. We also present inter-dataset results on five benchmark datasets to show improvements of up to 79% using TS-CAN, a neural rPPG estimation method. Our findings illustrate the usefulness of motion transfer as a data augmentation technique for improving the generalization of models for camera-based physiological sensing. We release our code for using motion transfer as a data augmentation technique on three publicly available datasets, UBFC-rPPG, PURE, and SCAMPS, and models pre-trained on motion-augmented data here: https://motion-matters.github.io/
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏代表性的训练数据，基于摄像头的生理测量的机器学习模型的泛化能力较弱。当试图从视频中恢复微妙的心脏脉搏时，身体运动是最重要的噪声源之一。我们探索运动转移作为数据增强的一种形式，以引入运动变化，同时保留感兴趣的生理变化。我们采用神经视频合成方法来增强远程光电体积描记法 (rPPG) 任务的视频，并研究运动增强对 1) 运动幅度和 2) 运动类型的影响。在对公开数据集的运动增强版本进行训练后，我们在 PURE 数据集上使用各种最先进的方法，证明比现有的数据集间结果提高了 47%。我们还展示了五个基准数据集的数据集间结果，显示使用 TS-CAN（一种神经 rPPG 估计方法）可实现高达 79% 的改进。我们的研究结果说明了运动传输作为一种数据增强技术的有用性，可提高基于相机的生理传感模型的泛化能力。我们在三个公开可用的数据集（UBFC-rPPG、PURE 和 SCAMPS）上发布了使用运动传输作为数据增强技术的代码，以及在运动增强数据上预训练的模型：https://motion-matters.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用神经运动迁移作为数据增强技术，提升基于摄像头的生理信号测量模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有摄像头生理测量模型因训练数据不足导致泛化能力差，而人体运动是干扰心脏脉搏信号的主要噪声源。
AI.method: 采用神经视频合成方法生成含运动变化的增强数据，研究不同运动幅度和类型对远程光电容积描记(rPPG)任务的影响。
AI.result: 在PURE数据集上较现有方法提升47%，在五大数据集上使用TS-CAN方法最高提升达79%。
AI.conclusion: 运动迁移有效提升模型泛化能力，开源代码和预训练模型可应用于UBFC-rPPG、PURE和SCAMPS数据集。

search_text: Motion Matters: Neural Motion Transfer for Better Camera Physiological Measurement 运动很重要：神经运动传输可实现更好的相机生理测量 Machine learning models for camera-based physiological measurement can have weak generalization due to a lack of representative training data. Body motion is one of the most significant sources of noise when attempting to recover the subtle cardiac pulse from a video. We explore motion transfer as a form of data augmentation to introduce motion variation while preserving physiological changes of interest. We adapt a neural video synthesis approach to augment videos for the task of remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) and study the effects of motion augmentation with respect to 1) the magnitude and 2) the type of motion. After training on motion-augmented versions of publicly available datasets, we demonstrate a 47% improvement over existing inter-dataset results using various state-of-the-art methods on the PURE dataset. We also present inter-dataset results on five benchmark datasets to show improvements of up to 79% using TS-CAN, a neural rPPG estimation method. Our findings illustrate the usefulness of motion transfer as a data augmentation technique for improving the generalization of models for camera-based physiological sensing. We release our code for using motion transfer as a data augmentation technique on three publicly available datasets, UBFC-rPPG, PURE, and SCAMPS, and models pre-trained on motion-augmented data here: https://motion-matters.github.io/ 由于缺乏代表性的训练数据，基于摄像头的生理测量的机器学习模型的泛化能力较弱。当试图从视频中恢复微妙的心脏脉搏时，身体运动是最重要的噪声源之一。我们探索运动转移作为数据增强的一种形式，以引入运动变化，同时保留感兴趣的生理变化。我们采用神经视频合成方法来增强远程光电体积描记法 (rPPG) 任务的视频，并研究运动增强对 1) 运动幅度和 2) 运动类型的影响。在对公开数据集的运动增强版本进行训练后，我们在 PURE 数据集上使用各种最先进的方法，证明比现有的数据集间结果提高了 47%。我们还展示了五个基准数据集的数据集间结果，显示使用 TS-CAN（一种神经 rPPG 估计方法）可实现高达 79% 的改进。我们的研究结果说明了运动传输作为一种数据增强技术的有用性，可提高基于相机的生理传感模型的泛化能力。我们在三个公开可用的数据集（UBFC-rPPG、PURE 和 SCAMPS）上发布了使用运动传输作为数据增强技术的代码，以及在运动增强数据上预训练的模型：https://motion-matters.github.io/ 本文提出利用神经运动迁移作为数据增强技术，提升基于摄像头的生理信号测量模型的泛化能力。 Akshay Paruchuri,Xin Liu,Yulu Pan,Shwetak Patel,Daniel McDuff,Soumyadip Sengupta cs.CV

authors_text: Haoheng Lan,Jindong Gu,Philip Torr,Hengshuang Zhao
title: Influencer Backdoor Attack on Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 对语义分割的影响者后门攻击
abstract: When a small number of poisoned samples are injected into the training dataset of a deep neural network, the network can be induced to exhibit malicious behavior during inferences, which poses potential threats to real-world applications. While they have been intensively studied in classification, backdoor attacks on semantic segmentation have been largely overlooked. Unlike classification, semantic segmentation aims to classify every pixel within a given image. In this work, we explore backdoor attacks on segmentation models to misclassify all pixels of a victim class by injecting a specific trigger on non-victim pixels during inferences, which is dubbed Influencer Backdoor Attack (IBA). IBA is expected to maintain the classification accuracy of non-victim pixels and mislead classifications of all victim pixels in every single inference and could be easily applied to real-world scenes. Based on the context aggregation ability of segmentation models, we proposed a simple, yet effective, Nearest-Neighbor trigger injection strategy. We also introduce an innovative Pixel Random Labeling strategy which maintains optimal performance even when the trigger is placed far from the victim pixels. Our extensive experiments reveal that current segmentation models do suffer from backdoor attacks, demonstrate IBA real-world applicability, and show that our proposed techniques can further increase attack performance.
summary: When a small number of poisoned samples are injected into the training dataset of a deep neural network, the network can be induced to exhibit malicious behavior during inferences, which poses potential threats to real-world applications. While they have been intensively studied in classification, backdoor attacks on semantic segmentation have been largely overlooked. Unlike classification, semantic segmentation aims to classify every pixel within a given image. In this work, we explore backdoor attacks on segmentation models to misclassify all pixels of a victim class by injecting a specific trigger on non-victim pixels during inferences, which is dubbed Influencer Backdoor Attack (IBA). IBA is expected to maintain the classification accuracy of non-victim pixels and mislead classifications of all victim pixels in every single inference and could be easily applied to real-world scenes. Based on the context aggregation ability of segmentation models, we proposed a simple, yet effective, Nearest-Neighbor trigger injection strategy. We also introduce an innovative Pixel Random Labeling strategy which maintains optimal performance even when the trigger is placed far from the victim pixels. Our extensive experiments reveal that current segmentation models do suffer from backdoor attacks, demonstrate IBA real-world applicability, and show that our proposed techniques can further increase attack performance.
abstract_zh: 当少量中毒样本被注入深度神经网络的训练数据集中时，可以诱导网络在推理过程中表现出恶意行为，这对现实世界的应用程序构成潜在威胁。虽然它们在分类方面得到了深入研究，但对语义分割的后门攻击在很大程度上被忽视了。与分类不同，语义分割旨在对给定图像中的每个像素进行分类。在这项工作中，我们探索了对分割模型的后门攻击，通过在推理过程中向非受害者像素注入特定触发器来错误分类受害者类别的所有像素，这被称为影响者后门攻击（IBA）。 IBA 有望在每次推理中保持非受害者像素的分类准确性并误导所有受害者像素的分类，并且可以轻松应用于现实世界场景。基于分割模型的上下文聚合能力，我们提出了一种简单但有效的最近邻触发注入策略。我们还引入了一种创新的像素随机标记策略，即使触发器远离受害像素，也能保持最佳性能。我们广泛的实验表明，当前的分割模型确实遭受后门攻击，证明了 IBA 现实世界的适用性，并表明我们提出的技术可以进一步提高攻击性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对语义分割模型的新型后门攻击方法——Influencer Backdoor Attack (IBA)，通过注入触发器使模型在推理时对特定类别像素进行错误分类。
AI.motivation: 尽管分类任务的后门攻击已被广泛研究，但语义分割任务因其像素级分类特性，尚未得到充分关注，存在潜在安全风险。
AI.method: 基于分割模型的上下文聚合能力，提出最近邻触发注入策略与像素随机标记策略，确保触发器远离目标像素时仍能维持攻击效果。
AI.result: 实验验证现有分割模型易受IBA攻击，该方法在现实场景中具有可行性，并通过优化策略显著提升攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: 语义分割模型存在后门攻击漏洞，IBA方法通过创新策略实现高效攻击，凸显模型安全防护的必要性。

authors_text: Duc Nguyen,Anderson Ye Zhang
title: A Novel and Optimal Spectral Method for Permutation Synchronization
title_zh: 一种新颖且优化的排列同步谱方法
abstract: Permutation synchronization is an important problem in computer science that constitutes the key step of many computer vision tasks. The goal is to recover $n$ latent permutations from their noisy and incomplete pairwise measurements. In recent years, spectral methods have gained increasing popularity thanks to their simplicity and computational efficiency. Spectral methods utilize the leading eigenspace $U$ of the data matrix and its block submatrices $U_1,U_2,\ldots, U_n$ to recover the permutations. In this paper, we propose a novel and statistically optimal spectral algorithm. Unlike the existing methods which use $\{U_jU_1^\top\}_{j\geq 2}$, ours constructs an anchor matrix $M$ by aggregating useful information from all of the block submatrices and estimates the latent permutations through $\{U_jM^\top\}_{j\geq 1}$. This modification overcomes a crucial limitation of the existing methods caused by the repetitive use of $U_1$ and leads to an improved numerical performance. To establish the optimality of the proposed method, we carry out a fine-grained spectral analysis and obtain a sharp exponential error bound that matches the minimax rate.
summary: Permutation synchronization is an important problem in computer science that constitutes the key step of many computer vision tasks. The goal is to recover $n$ latent permutations from their noisy and incomplete pairwise measurements. In recent years, spectral methods have gained increasing popularity thanks to their simplicity and computational efficiency. Spectral methods utilize the leading eigenspace $U$ of the data matrix and its block submatrices $U_1,U_2,\ldots, U_n$ to recover the permutations. In this paper, we propose a novel and statistically optimal spectral algorithm. Unlike the existing methods which use $\{U_jU_1^\top\}_{j\geq 2}$, ours constructs an anchor matrix $M$ by aggregating useful information from all of the block submatrices and estimates the latent permutations through $\{U_jM^\top\}_{j\geq 1}$. This modification overcomes a crucial limitation of the existing methods caused by the repetitive use of $U_1$ and leads to an improved numerical performance. To establish the optimality of the proposed method, we carry out a fine-grained spectral analysis and obtain a sharp exponential error bound that matches the minimax rate.
abstract_zh: 排列同步是计算机科学中的一个重要问题，它构成了许多计算机视觉任务的关键步骤。目标是从噪声和不完整的成对测量中恢复 $n$ 潜在排列。近年来，谱方法因其简单性和计算效率而越来越受欢迎。谱方法利用数据矩阵的前导特征空间 $U$ 及其块子矩阵 $U_1,U_2,\ldots, U_n$ 来恢复排列。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且统计上最优的光谱算法。与使用 $\{U_jU_1^\top\}_{j\geq 2}$ 的现有方法不同，我们的方法通过聚合来自所有块子矩阵的有用信息来构造锚矩阵 $M$，并通过 $\{U_jM^\top\}_{j\geq 1}$ 估计潜在排列。这种修改克服了现有方法因重复使用 $U_1$ 造成的关键限制，并提高了数值性能。为了确定所提出方法的最优性，我们进行了细粒度谱分析并获得了与极小极大率相匹配的尖锐指数误差界限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新颖且统计最优的谱方法，用于从噪声和不完整的成对测量中恢复潜在排列，改进了现有谱方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有谱方法因重复使用固定子矩阵U₁导致性能限制，需通过聚合所有块子矩阵信息以提升鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.method: 构造锚定矩阵M聚合所有块子矩阵信息，通过{U_jM^⊤}估计潜在排列，替代传统方法中的{U_jU₁^⊤}。
AI.result: 获得与最小最大率匹配的尖锐指数误差界，数值实验显示方法在计算效率和精度上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在理论上达到统计最优，实践验证其优于现有谱方法，为排列同步问题提供新解决方案。

search_text: A Novel and Optimal Spectral Method for Permutation Synchronization 一种新颖且优化的排列同步谱方法 Permutation synchronization is an important problem in computer science that constitutes the key step of many computer vision tasks. The goal is to recover $n$ latent permutations from their noisy and incomplete pairwise measurements. In recent years, spectral methods have gained increasing popularity thanks to their simplicity and computational efficiency. Spectral methods utilize the leading eigenspace $U$ of the data matrix and its block submatrices $U_1,U_2,\ldots, U_n$ to recover the permutations. In this paper, we propose a novel and statistically optimal spectral algorithm. Unlike the existing methods which use $\{U_jU_1^\top\}_{j\geq 2}$, ours constructs an anchor matrix $M$ by aggregating useful information from all of the block submatrices and estimates the latent permutations through $\{U_jM^\top\}_{j\geq 1}$. This modification overcomes a crucial limitation of the existing methods caused by the repetitive use of $U_1$ and leads to an improved numerical performance. To establish the optimality of the proposed method, we carry out a fine-grained spectral analysis and obtain a sharp exponential error bound that matches the minimax rate. 排列同步是计算机科学中的一个重要问题，它构成了许多计算机视觉任务的关键步骤。目标是从噪声和不完整的成对测量中恢复 $n$ 潜在排列。近年来，谱方法因其简单性和计算效率而越来越受欢迎。谱方法利用数据矩阵的前导特征空间 $U$ 及其块子矩阵 $U_1,U_2,\ldots, U_n$ 来恢复排列。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且统计上最优的光谱算法。与使用 $\{U_jU_1^\top\}_{j\geq 2}$ 的现有方法不同，我们的方法通过聚合来自所有块子矩阵的有用信息来构造锚矩阵 $M$，并通过 $\{U_jM^\top\}_{j\geq 1}$ 估计潜在排列。这种修改克服了现有方法因重复使用 $U_1$ 造成的关键限制，并提高了数值性能。为了确定所提出方法的最优性，我们进行了细粒度谱分析并获得了与极小极大率相匹配的尖锐指数误差界限。 本文提出一种新颖且统计最优的谱方法，用于从噪声和不完整的成对测量中恢复潜在排列，改进了现有谱方法的局限性。 Duc Nguyen,Anderson Ye Zhang math.ST,cs.CV,cs.IT,math.SP

authors_text: Colton Stearns,Davis Rempe,Jiateng Liu,Alex Fu,Sebastien Mascha,Jeong Joon Park,Despoina Paschalidou,Leonidas J. Guibas
title: CurveCloudNet: Processing Point Clouds with 1D Structure
title_zh: CurveCloudNet：处理具有一维结构的点云
abstract: Modern depth sensors such as LiDAR operate by sweeping laser-beams across the scene, resulting in a point cloud with notable 1D curve-like structures. In this work, we introduce a new point cloud processing scheme and backbone, called CurveCloudNet, which takes advantage of the curve-like structure inherent to these sensors. While existing backbones discard the rich 1D traversal patterns and rely on generic 3D operations, CurveCloudNet parameterizes the point cloud as a collection of polylines (dubbed a "curve cloud"), establishing a local surface-aware ordering on the points. By reasoning along curves, CurveCloudNet captures lightweight curve-aware priors to efficiently and accurately reason in several diverse 3D environments. We evaluate CurveCloudNet on multiple synthetic and real datasets that exhibit distinct 3D size and structure. We demonstrate that CurveCloudNet outperforms both point-based and sparse-voxel backbones in various segmentation settings, notably scaling to large scenes better than point-based alternatives while exhibiting improved single-object performance over sparse-voxel alternatives. In all, CurveCloudNet is an efficient and accurate backbone that can handle a larger variety of 3D environments than past works.
summary: Modern depth sensors such as LiDAR operate by sweeping laser-beams across the scene, resulting in a point cloud with notable 1D curve-like structures. In this work, we introduce a new point cloud processing scheme and backbone, called CurveCloudNet, which takes advantage of the curve-like structure inherent to these sensors. While existing backbones discard the rich 1D traversal patterns and rely on generic 3D operations, CurveCloudNet parameterizes the point cloud as a collection of polylines (dubbed a "curve cloud"), establishing a local surface-aware ordering on the points. By reasoning along curves, CurveCloudNet captures lightweight curve-aware priors to efficiently and accurately reason in several diverse 3D environments. We evaluate CurveCloudNet on multiple synthetic and real datasets that exhibit distinct 3D size and structure. We demonstrate that CurveCloudNet outperforms both point-based and sparse-voxel backbones in various segmentation settings, notably scaling to large scenes better than point-based alternatives while exhibiting improved single-object performance over sparse-voxel alternatives. In all, CurveCloudNet is an efficient and accurate backbone that can handle a larger variety of 3D environments than past works.
abstract_zh: 现代深度传感器（例如激光雷达）通过将激光束扫描整个场景来运行，从而产生具有显着一维曲线结构的点云。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新的点云处理方案和主干网，称为 CurveCloudNet，它利用了这些传感器固有的曲线结构。虽然现有的骨干网放弃了丰富的 1D 遍历模式并依赖于通用的 3D 操作，但 CurveCloudNet 将点云参数化为折线的集合（称为“曲线云”），在点上建立本地表面感知排序。通过沿曲线推理，CurveCloudNet 捕获轻量级曲线感知先验，以便在多种不同的 3D 环境中高效、准确地进行推理。我们在多个具有不同 3D 大小和结构的合成数据集和真实数据集上评估 CurveCloudNet。我们证明了 CurveCloudNet 在各种分割设置中都优于基于点和稀疏体素主干，特别是比基于点的替代方案更好地扩展到大场景，同时与稀疏体素替代方案相比，表现出改进的单对象性能。总而言之，CurveCloudNet 是一个高效且准确的骨干网络，与过去的作品相比，它可以处理更多种类的 3D 环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CurveCloudNet的新点云处理方法，利用点云中固有的1D曲线结构进行处理。
AI.motivation: 现有的点云处理方法忽略了由激光雷达等传感器生成的点云中固有的1D曲线结构，导致处理效率和准确性不足。
AI.method: CurveCloudNet将点云参数化为一系列多段线（称为'曲线云'），建立局部表面感知的点顺序，并沿曲线进行推理以捕捉轻量级的曲线感知先验。
AI.result: CurveCloudNet在多个合成和真实数据集上表现出色，优于基于点和稀疏体素的骨干网络，尤其在处理大规模场景和单个物体时表现更好。
AI.conclusion: CurveCloudNet是一种高效且准确的骨干网络，能够处理比以往方法更广泛的3D环境。

authors_text: Etai Sella,Gal Fiebelman,Peter Hedman,Hadar Averbuch-Elor
title: Vox-E: Text-guided Voxel Editing of 3D Objects
title_zh: Vox-E：文本引导的 3D 对象体素编辑
abstract: Large scale text-guided diffusion models have garnered significant attention due to their ability to synthesize diverse images that convey complex visual concepts. This generative power has more recently been leveraged to perform text-to-3D synthesis. In this work, we present a technique that harnesses the power of latent diffusion models for editing existing 3D objects. Our method takes oriented 2D images of a 3D object as input and learns a grid-based volumetric representation of it. To guide the volumetric representation to conform to a target text prompt, we follow unconditional text-to-3D methods and optimize a Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) loss. However, we observe that combining this diffusion-guided loss with an image-based regularization loss that encourages the representation not to deviate too strongly from the input object is challenging, as it requires achieving two conflicting goals while viewing only structure-and-appearance coupled 2D projections. Thus, we introduce a novel volumetric regularization loss that operates directly in 3D space, utilizing the explicit nature of our 3D representation to enforce correlation between the global structure of the original and edited object. Furthermore, we present a technique that optimizes cross-attention volumetric grids to refine the spatial extent of the edits. Extensive experiments and comparisons demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in creating a myriad of edits which cannot be achieved by prior works.
summary: Large scale text-guided diffusion models have garnered significant attention due to their ability to synthesize diverse images that convey complex visual concepts. This generative power has more recently been leveraged to perform text-to-3D synthesis. In this work, we present a technique that harnesses the power of latent diffusion models for editing existing 3D objects. Our method takes oriented 2D images of a 3D object as input and learns a grid-based volumetric representation of it. To guide the volumetric representation to conform to a target text prompt, we follow unconditional text-to-3D methods and optimize a Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) loss. However, we observe that combining this diffusion-guided loss with an image-based regularization loss that encourages the representation not to deviate too strongly from the input object is challenging, as it requires achieving two conflicting goals while viewing only structure-and-appearance coupled 2D projections. Thus, we introduce a novel volumetric regularization loss that operates directly in 3D space, utilizing the explicit nature of our 3D representation to enforce correlation between the global structure of the original and edited object. Furthermore, we present a technique that optimizes cross-attention volumetric grids to refine the spatial extent of the edits. Extensive experiments and comparisons demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in creating a myriad of edits which cannot be achieved by prior works.
abstract_zh: 大规模文本引导扩散模型由于能够合成传达复杂视觉概念的不同图像而引起了广泛关注。最近，这种生成能力被用来执行文本到 3D 的合成。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用潜在扩散模型的力量来编辑现有 3D 对象的技术。我们的方法将 3D 对象的定向 2D 图像作为输入，并学习其基于网格的体积表示。为了引导体积表示符合目标文本提示，我们遵循无条件文本到 3D 方法并优化分数蒸馏采样 (SDS) 损失。然而，我们观察到，将这种扩散引导损失与基于图像的正则化损失相结合是具有挑战性的，该正则化损失鼓励表示不要与输入对象偏离太远，因为它需要在仅查看结构和外观耦合的二维投影的同时实现两个相互冲突的目标。因此，我们引入了一种直接在 3D 空间中运行的新颖的体积正则化损失，利用 3D 表示的显式性质来增强原始对象和编辑对象的全局结构之间的相关性。此外，我们提出了一种优化交叉注意力体积网格的技术，以细化编辑的空间范围。大量的实验和比较证明了我们的方法在创建大量编辑方面的有效性，这是以前的作品无法实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本引导的3D物体体素编辑方法Vox-E，通过结合扩散模型和三维体积表示实现对现有3D物体的结构与外观编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到3D生成方法难以在保持物体原始结构的同时实现精确的文本引导编辑，尤其在处理由2D投影耦合的结构与外观信息时存在冲突目标。
AI.method: 方法采用无条件文本到3D技术优化Score Distillation Sampling损失，并引入三维体积正则化损失以保持全局结构一致性，同时通过交叉注意力机制优化体素网格的空间范围。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成传统方法无法实现的多样化编辑效果，在保持物体结构完整性的同时精准响应文本指令。
AI.conclusion: Vox-E通过三维空间正则化与注意力机制优化，有效解决了文本引导编辑中结构与外观的冲突问题，推动了文本驱动的3D编辑技术发展。

Thus, we introduce a novel volumetric regularization loss that operates directly in 3D space, utilizing the explicit nature of our 3D representation to enforce correlation between the global structure of the original and edited object. Furthermore, we present a technique that optimizes cross-attention volumetric grids to refine the spatial extent of the edits. Extensive experiments and comparisons demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in creating a myriad of edits which cannot be achieved by prior works. 大规模文本引导扩散模型由于能够合成传达复杂视觉概念的不同图像而引起了广泛关注。最近，这种生成能力被用来执行文本到 3D 的合成。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用潜在扩散模型的力量来编辑现有 3D 对象的技术。我们的方法将 3D 对象的定向 2D 图像作为输入，并学习其基于网格的体积表示。为了引导体积表示符合目标文本提示，我们遵循无条件文本到 3D 方法并优化分数蒸馏采样 (SDS) 损失。然而，我们观察到，将这种扩散引导损失与基于图像的正则化损失相结合是具有挑战性的，该正则化损失鼓励表示不要与输入对象偏离太远，因为它需要在仅查看结构和外观耦合的二维投影的同时实现两个相互冲突的目标。因此，我们引入了一种直接在 3D 空间中运行的新颖的体积正则化损失，利用 3D 表示的显式性质来增强原始对象和编辑对象的全局结构之间的相关性。此外，我们提出了一种优化交叉注意力体积网格的技术，以细化编辑的空间范围。大量的实验和比较证明了我们的方法在创建大量编辑方面的有效性，这是以前的作品无法实现的。 本文提出一种基于文本引导的3D物体体素编辑方法Vox-E，通过结合扩散模型和三维体积表示实现对现有3D物体的结构与外观编辑。 Etai Sella,Gal Fiebelman,Peter Hedman,Hadar Averbuch-Elor cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Abdullatif Baba
title: Flying robots for a smarter life
title_zh: 飞行机器人让生活更智能
abstract: Innovative ideas are continuously emerging to produce better life conditions where essential human needs are supposed to be fulfilled with perfect scenarios leading us to propose modern strategies drawing the future of smart cities. In this context, flying robots are increasingly exploited in many fields to improve the quality of our life. This paper illustrates new designs of flying robots that could be used to perform a variety of advanced missions like investigating the state of high-power lines and manipulating cabling maintenance procedures when failures are detected, evaluating the state of the outer edge of sidewalks to color their partially or wholly erased parts, and spraying pesticides to trees or crops that are affected by different diseases. Creating such smart devices demands developing many other partial designs relying on AI-based algorithms, computer vision techniques, and embedded systems. A variety of techniques that we have recently developed in this field are presented here.
summary: Innovative ideas are continuously emerging to produce better life conditions where essential human needs are supposed to be fulfilled with perfect scenarios leading us to propose modern strategies drawing the future of smart cities. In this context, flying robots are increasingly exploited in many fields to improve the quality of our life. Creating such smart devices demands developing many other partial designs relying on AI-based algorithms, computer vision techniques, and embedded systems. A variety of techniques that we have recently developed in this field are presented here.
abstract_zh: 创新理念不断涌现，以创造更好的生活条件，通过完美的场景满足人类的基本需求，引导我们提出描绘智慧城市未来的现代战略。在此背景下，飞行机器人越来越多地应用于许多领域，以提高我们的生活质量。本文介绍了飞行机器人的新设计，该机器人可用于执行各种高级任务，例如调查高功率线路的状态并在检测到故障时操纵布线维护程序、评估人行道外边缘的状态以为其部分或全部擦除的部分着色，以及向受不同疾病影响的树木或农作物喷洒杀虫剂。创建此类智能设备需要开发许多其他依赖于人工智能算法、计算机视觉技术和嵌入式系统的部分设计。这里介绍了我们最近在该领域开发的各种技术。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了新型飞行动机器人的设计，用于执行高压线路检查、电缆维护、人行道修复评估和农药喷洒等任务，以提升生活质量。
AI.motivation: 为满足智慧城市中人类基本需求，通过飞行动机器人提高生活质量和效率。
AI.method: 结合AI算法、计算机视觉和嵌入式系统技术，开发适用于多种场景的飞行动机器人设计方案。
AI.result: 提出了多种技术方案和设计，可应用于电力维护、城市基础设施检测和农业病虫害防治等领域。
AI.conclusion: 飞行动机器人能够有效提升城市智能化水平，为未来智慧城市提供关键技术支撑。

authors_text: Mark Stefik
title: Roots and Requirements for Collaborative AIs
title_zh: 协作人工智能的根源和要求
abstract: The vision of AI collaborators is a staple of mythology and science fiction, where artificial agents with special talents assist human partners and teams. In this dream, sophisticated AIs understand nuances of collaboration and human communication. The AI as collaborator dream is different from computer tools that augment human intelligence (IA) or intermediate human collaboration. Those tools have their roots in the 1960s and helped to drive an information technology revolution. They can be useful but they are not intelligent and do not collaborate as effectively as skilled people. With the increase of hybrid and remote work since the COVID pandemic, the benefits and requirements for better coordination, collaboration, and communication are becoming hot topics in the workplace. Employers and workers face choices and trade-offs as they negotiate the options for working from home versus working at the office. Many factors such as the high costs of homes near employers are impeding a mass return to the office. Government advisory groups and leaders in AI have advocated for years that AIs should be transparent and effective collaborators. Nonetheless, robust AIs that collaborate like talented people remain out of reach. Are AI teammates part of a solution? How artificially intelligent (AI) could and should they be? This position paper reviews the arc of technology and public calls for human-machine teaming. It draws on earlier research in psychology and the social sciences about what human-like collaboration requires. This paper sets a context for a second science-driven paper that advocates a radical shift in technology and methodology for creating resilient, intelligent, and human-compatible AIs (Stefik & Price, 2023). The aspirational goal is that such AIs would learn, share what they learn, and collaborate to achieve high capabilities.

In this dream, sophisticated AIs understand nuances of collaboration and human communication. The AI as collaborator dream is different from computer tools that augment human intelligence (IA) or intermediate human collaboration. Those tools have their roots in the 1960s and helped to drive an information technology revolution. They can be useful but they are not intelligent and do not collaborate as effectively as skilled people. With the increase of hybrid and remote work since the COVID pandemic, the benefits and requirements for better coordination, collaboration, and communication are becoming hot topics in the workplace. Many factors such as the high costs of homes near employers are impeding a mass return to the office. Government advisory groups and leaders in AI have advocated for years that AIs should be transparent and effective collaborators. Nonetheless, robust AIs that collaborate like talented people remain out of reach. Are AI teammates part of a solution? How artificially intelligent (AI) could and should they be? This position paper reviews the arc of technology and public calls for human-machine teaming. It draws on earlier research in psychology and the social sciences about what human-like collaboration requires. This paper sets a context for a second science-driven paper that advocates a radical shift in technology and methodology for creating resilient, intelligent, and human-compatible AIs (Stefik & Price, 2023). The aspirational goal is that such AIs would learn, share what they learn, and collaborate to achieve high capabilities.
abstract_zh: 人工智能协作者的愿景是神话和科幻小说的主要内容，其中具有特殊才能的人工智能代理协助人类合作伙伴和团队。在这个梦想中，复杂的人工智能理解协作和人类交流的细微差别。人工智能作为合作者的梦想不同于增强人类智能（IA）或中间人类协作的计算机工具。这些工具起源于 20 世纪 60 年代，并帮助推动了信息技术革命。他们可能很有用，但他们并不聪明，也不像技术人员那样有效地协作。自新冠疫情大流行以来，随着混合和远程工作的增加，更好的协调、协作和沟通的好处和要求正成为工作场所的热门话题。雇主和工人在协商在家工作还是在办公室工作的选择时面临着选择和权衡。雇主附近的住房成本高昂等许多因素阻碍了大规模返回办公室。人工智能领域的政府咨询团体和领导者多年来一直主张人工智能应该成为透明且有效的合作者。尽管如此，像人才一样协作的强大人工智能仍然遥不可及。 AI 队友是解决方案的一部分吗？人工智能 (AI) 能够并且应该达到怎样的程度？这篇立场文件回顾了技术的发展历程和公众对人机合作的呼吁。它借鉴了心理学和社会科学领域关于类人协作需要什么的早期研究。本文为第二篇科学驱动的论文奠定了背景，该论文主张在技术和方法上进行根本性转变，以创建有弹性、智能且与人类兼容的人工智能（Stefik & Price，2023）。我们的理想目标是，此类人工智能能够学习、分享所学知识并进行协作以实现高能力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨协作型人工智能（AI）的根源与需求，旨在为构建能有效与人类协作的智能系统提供理论框架。
AI.motivation: 传统AI工具虽能辅助人类，但缺乏真正的协作能力。后疫情时代混合办公模式兴起，亟需更高效的人机协作方案以应对沟通与协调挑战。
AI.method: 通过回顾技术发展史与社会科学研究，分析人类协作的关键要素，并为后续技术革新提供理论依据。
AI.result: 明确了协作型AI需具备学习、共享知识及与人类协同达成目标的能力，并为后续研究提出方法论转变的方向。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI尚未达到理想协作水平，但通过跨学科研究与技术突破，未来有望实现与人类无缝协作的智能系统。

authors_text: Eamon Duede
title: The Representational Status of Deep Learning Models
title_zh: 深度学习模型的代表性现状
abstract: This paper aims to clarify the representational status of Deep Learning Models (DLMs). While commonly referred to as 'representations', what this entails is ambiguous due to a conflation of functional and relational conceptions of representation. This paper argues that while DLMs represent their targets in a relational sense, in general, we have no good reason to believe that DLMs encode locally semantically decomposable representations of their targets. That is, the representational capacity these models have is largely global, rather than decomposable into stable, local subrepresentations. This result has immediate implications for explainable AI (XAI) and directs attention toward exploring the global relational nature of deep learning representations and their relationship both to models more generally to understand their potential role in future scientific inquiry.
summary: This paper aims to clarify the representational status of Deep Learning Models (DLMs). While commonly referred to as 'representations', what this entails is ambiguous due to a conflation of functional and relational conceptions of representation. This paper argues that while DLMs represent their targets in a relational sense, in general, we have no good reason to believe that DLMs encode locally semantically decomposable representations of their targets. That is, the representational capacity these models have is largely global, rather than decomposable into stable, local subrepresentations. This result has immediate implications for explainable AI (XAI) and directs attention toward exploring the global relational nature of deep learning representations and their relationship both to models more generally to understand their potential role in future scientific inquiry.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在阐明深度学习模型（DLM）的代表性地位。虽然通常被称为“表示”，但由于表示的功能和关系概念的合并，其含义是模糊的。本文认为，虽然 DLM 在关系意义上表示其目标，但一般来说，我们没有充分的理由相信 DLM 对其目标进行本地语义可分解表示的编码。也就是说，这些模型的表征能力很大程度上是全局性的，而不是可分解为稳定的局部子表征。这一结果对可解释人工智能（XAI）具有直接影响，并将注意力集中在探索深度学习表示的全局关系性质及其与模型的关系上，以更广泛地了解它们在未来科学探究中的潜在作用。

AI.conclusion: 该发现强调需关注深度学习表示的全局关系特性，为可解释AI和科学探究提供新方向。

search_text: The Representational Status of Deep Learning Models 深度学习模型的代表性现状 This paper aims to clarify the representational status of Deep Learning Models (DLMs). While commonly referred to as 'representations', what this entails is ambiguous due to a conflation of functional and relational conceptions of representation. This paper argues that while DLMs represent their targets in a relational sense, in general, we have no good reason to believe that DLMs encode locally semantically decomposable representations of their targets. That is, the representational capacity these models have is largely global, rather than decomposable into stable, local subrepresentations. This result has immediate implications for explainable AI (XAI) and directs attention toward exploring the global relational nature of deep learning representations and their relationship both to models more generally to understand their potential role in future scientific inquiry. 本文旨在阐明深度学习模型（DLM）的代表性地位。虽然通常被称为“表示”，但由于表示的功能和关系概念的合并，其含义是模糊的。本文认为，虽然 DLM 在关系意义上表示其目标，但一般来说，我们没有充分的理由相信 DLM 对其目标进行本地语义可分解表示的编码。也就是说，这些模型的表征能力很大程度上是全局性的，而不是可分解为稳定的局部子表征。这一结果对可解释人工智能（XAI）具有直接影响，并将注意力集中在探索深度学习表示的全局关系性质及其与模型的关系上，以更广泛地了解它们在未来科学探究中的潜在作用。 本文旨在澄清深度学习模型的表示状态，区分功能性和关系性概念的混淆。 Eamon Duede cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Matthias Keicher,Matan Atad,David Schinz,Alexandra S. Gersing,Sarah C. Foreman,Sophia S. Goller,Juergen Weissinger,Jon Rischewski,Anna-Sophia Dietrich,Benedikt Wiestler,Jan S. Kirschke,Nassir Navab
title: Semantic Latent Space Regression of Diffusion Autoencoders for Vertebral Fracture Grading
title_zh: 用于椎骨骨折分级的扩散自编码器的语义潜在空间回归
abstract: Vertebral fractures are a consequence of osteoporosis, with significant health implications for affected patients. Unfortunately, grading their severity using CT exams is hard and subjective, motivating automated grading methods. However, current approaches are hindered by imbalance and scarcity of data and a lack of interpretability. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a novel approach that leverages unlabelled data to train a generative Diffusion Autoencoder (DAE) model as an unsupervised feature extractor. We model fracture grading as a continuous regression, which is more reflective of the smooth progression of fractures. Specifically, we use a binary, supervised fracture classifier to construct a hyperplane in the DAE's latent space. We then regress the severity of the fracture as a function of the distance to this hyperplane, calibrating the results to the Genant scale. Importantly, the generative nature of our method allows us to visualize different grades of a given vertebra, providing interpretability and insight into the features that contribute to automated grading.
summary: Vertebral fractures are a consequence of osteoporosis, with significant health implications for affected patients. Unfortunately, grading their severity using CT exams is hard and subjective, motivating automated grading methods. However, current approaches are hindered by imbalance and scarcity of data and a lack of interpretability. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a novel approach that leverages unlabelled data to train a generative Diffusion Autoencoder (DAE) model as an unsupervised feature extractor. We model fracture grading as a continuous regression, which is more reflective of the smooth progression of fractures. Specifically, we use a binary, supervised fracture classifier to construct a hyperplane in the DAE's latent space. We then regress the severity of the fracture as a function of the distance to this hyperplane, calibrating the results to the Genant scale. Importantly, the generative nature of our method allows us to visualize different grades of a given vertebra, providing interpretability and insight into the features that contribute to automated grading.
abstract_zh: 椎骨骨折是骨质疏松症的后果，对受影响的患者具有重大的健康影响。不幸的是，使用 CT 检查对其严重程度进行分级既困难又主观，因此催生了自动分级方法。然而，当前的方法受到数据不平衡和稀缺以及缺乏可解释性的阻碍。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种新方法，利用未标记的数据来训练生成扩散自动编码器（DAE）模型作为无监督特征提取器。我们将骨折分级建模为连续回归，这更能反映骨折的平滑进展。具体来说，我们使用二元监督断裂分类器在 DAE 的潜在空间中构造一个超平面。然后，我们将骨折的严重程度回归为到该超平面的距离的函数，并将结果校准到 Genant 尺度。重要的是，我们方法的生成性质使我们能够可视化给定椎骨的不同等级，从而提供对有助于自动分级的特征的可解释性和洞察力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散自编码器（DAE）的语义潜在空间回归方法，用于椎体骨折的自动分级。
AI.motivation: 现有椎体骨折分级方法依赖CT检查，存在数据不平衡、稀缺性和可解释性不足的问题，需开发更高效且可解释的自动化方案。
AI.method: 利用未标记数据训练生成式DAE作为无监督特征提取器，将骨折分级建模为连续回归问题，通过二分类器构建潜在空间超平面，并以距离该平面的函数回归骨折严重程度，最终校准至Genant标准。
AI.result: 方法有效解决了数据不足问题，实现了骨折分级的连续化建模，并通过生成不同等级椎体图像提供了可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生成模型与回归分析结合，提升了椎体骨折分级的自动化水平和模型可解释性，为临床提供了直观的特征分析工具。

authors_text: Li Zhou,Zikun Zhou,Kaige Mao,Zhenyu He
title: Joint Visual Grounding and Tracking with Natural Language Specification
title_zh: 具有自然语言规范的联合视觉基础和跟踪
abstract: Tracking by natural language specification aims to locate the referred target in a sequence based on the natural language description. Existing algorithms solve this issue in two steps, visual grounding and tracking, and accordingly deploy the separated grounding model and tracking model to implement these two steps, respectively. Such a separated framework overlooks the link between visual grounding and tracking, which is that the natural language descriptions provide global semantic cues for localizing the target for both two steps. Besides, the separated framework can hardly be trained end-to-end. To handle these issues, we propose a joint visual grounding and tracking framework, which reformulates grounding and tracking as a unified task: localizing the referred target based on the given visual-language references. Specifically, we propose a multi-source relation modeling module to effectively build the relation between the visual-language references and the test image. In addition, we design a temporal modeling module to provide a temporal clue with the guidance of the global semantic information for our model, which effectively improves the adaptability to the appearance variations of the target. Extensive experimental results on TNL2K, LaSOT, OTB99, and RefCOCOg demonstrate that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-art algorithms for both tracking and grounding. Code is available at https://github.com/lizhou-cs/JointNLT.
summary: Tracking by natural language specification aims to locate the referred target in a sequence based on the natural language description. Existing algorithms solve this issue in two steps, visual grounding and tracking, and accordingly deploy the separated grounding model and tracking model to implement these two steps, respectively. Such a separated framework overlooks the link between visual grounding and tracking, which is that the natural language descriptions provide global semantic cues for localizing the target for both two steps. Besides, the separated framework can hardly be trained end-to-end. To handle these issues, we propose a joint visual grounding and tracking framework, which reformulates grounding and tracking as a unified task: localizing the referred target based on the given visual-language references. Specifically, we propose a multi-source relation modeling module to effectively build the relation between the visual-language references and the test image. In addition, we design a temporal modeling module to provide a temporal clue with the guidance of the global semantic information for our model, which effectively improves the adaptability to the appearance variations of the target. Extensive experimental results on TNL2K, LaSOT, OTB99, and RefCOCOg demonstrate that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-art algorithms for both tracking and grounding. Code is available at https://github.com/lizhou-cs/JointNLT.
abstract_zh: 自然语言规范跟踪的目的是根据自然语言描述在序列中定位所引用的目标。现有算法通过视觉接地和跟踪两个步骤解决这个问题，并相应地部署分离的接地模型和跟踪模型来分别实现这两个步骤。这种分离的框架忽略了视觉基础和跟踪之间的联系，即自然语言描述为这两个步骤的目标定位提供了全局语义线索。此外，分离的框架很难进行端到端的训练。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个联合视觉接地和跟踪框架，它将接地和跟踪重新表述为一个统一的任务：根据给定的视觉语言参考本地化所提到的目标。具体来说，我们提出了一个多源关系建模模块来有效地建立视觉语言参考和测试图像之间的关系。此外，我们设计了一个时间建模模块，在全局语义信息的指导下为我们的模型提供时间线索，有效提高了对目标外观变化的适应性。 TNL2K、LaSOT、OTB99 和 RefCOCOg 上的大量实验结果表明，我们的方法在跟踪和接地方面的性能优于最先进的算法。代码可在 https://github.com/lizhou-cs/JointNLT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合视觉定位与跟踪的框架，通过自然语言描述实现目标定位与跟踪的统一任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将视觉定位与跟踪分为两步处理，忽略自然语言描述的全局语义关联，且难以端到端训练。
AI.method: 设计多源关系建模模块建立视觉-语言关联，并引入时间建模模块利用全局语义提升目标外观变化适应性。
AI.result: 在TNL2K、LaSOT等数据集上，方法在跟踪与定位任务中均优于现有算法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 联合框架有效利用自然语言语义关联，验证了统一处理视觉定位与跟踪任务的优越性。

search_text: Joint Visual Grounding and Tracking with Natural Language Specification 具有自然语言规范的联合视觉基础和跟踪 Tracking by natural language specification aims to locate the referred target in a sequence based on the natural language description. Existing algorithms solve this issue in two steps, visual grounding and tracking, and accordingly deploy the separated grounding model and tracking model to implement these two steps, respectively. Such a separated framework overlooks the link between visual grounding and tracking, which is that the natural language descriptions provide global semantic cues for localizing the target for both two steps. Besides, the separated framework can hardly be trained end-to-end. To handle these issues, we propose a joint visual grounding and tracking framework, which reformulates grounding and tracking as a unified task: localizing the referred target based on the given visual-language references. Specifically, we propose a multi-source relation modeling module to effectively build the relation between the visual-language references and the test image. In addition, we design a temporal modeling module to provide a temporal clue with the guidance of the global semantic information for our model, which effectively improves the adaptability to the appearance variations of the target. Extensive experimental results on TNL2K, LaSOT, OTB99, and RefCOCOg demonstrate that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-art algorithms for both tracking and grounding. Code is available at https://github.com/lizhou-cs/JointNLT. 自然语言规范跟踪的目的是根据自然语言描述在序列中定位所引用的目标。现有算法通过视觉接地和跟踪两个步骤解决这个问题，并相应地部署分离的接地模型和跟踪模型来分别实现这两个步骤。这种分离的框架忽略了视觉基础和跟踪之间的联系，即自然语言描述为这两个步骤的目标定位提供了全局语义线索。此外，分离的框架很难进行端到端的训练。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个联合视觉接地和跟踪框架，它将接地和跟踪重新表述为一个统一的任务：根据给定的视觉语言参考本地化所提到的目标。具体来说，我们提出了一个多源关系建模模块来有效地建立视觉语言参考和测试图像之间的关系。此外，我们设计了一个时间建模模块，在全局语义信息的指导下为我们的模型提供时间线索，有效提高了对目标外观变化的适应性。 TNL2K、LaSOT、OTB99 和 RefCOCOg 上的大量实验结果表明，我们的方法在跟踪和接地方面的性能优于最先进的算法。代码可在 https://github.com/lizhou-cs/JointNLT 获取。 本文提出一种联合视觉定位与跟踪的框架，通过自然语言描述实现目标定位与跟踪的统一任务。 Li Zhou,Zikun Zhou,Kaige Mao,Zhenyu He cs.CV

authors_text: Anirudh S Sundar,Larry Heck
title: cTBLS: Augmenting Large Language Models with Conversational Tables
title_zh: cTBLS：使用会话表增强大型语言模型
abstract: Optimizing accuracy and performance while eliminating hallucinations of open-domain conversational large language models (LLMs) is an open research challenge. A particularly promising direction is to augment and ground LLMs with information from structured sources. This paper introduces Conversational Tables (cTBLS), a three-step architecture to retrieve and generate dialogue responses grounded on retrieved tabular information. cTBLS uses Transformer encoder embeddings for Dense Table Retrieval and obtains up to 125% relative improvement over the retriever in the previous state-of-the-art system on the HyrbiDialogue dataset. cTBLS then uses a shared process between encoder and decoder models to perform a coarse+fine tabular knowledge (e.g., cell) ranking combined with a GPT-3.5 LLM response generator to yield a 2x relative improvement in ROUGE scores. Finally, human evaluators prefer cTBLs +80% of the time (coherency, fluency) and judge informativeness to be 4x better than the previous state-of-the-art.
summary: Optimizing accuracy and performance while eliminating hallucinations of open-domain conversational large language models (LLMs) is an open research challenge. A particularly promising direction is to augment and ground LLMs with information from structured sources. This paper introduces Conversational Tables (cTBLS), a three-step architecture to retrieve and generate dialogue responses grounded on retrieved tabular information. cTBLS uses Transformer encoder embeddings for Dense Table Retrieval and obtains up to 125% relative improvement over the retriever in the previous state-of-the-art system on the HyrbiDialogue dataset. cTBLS then uses a shared process between encoder and decoder models to perform a coarse+fine tabular knowledge (e.g., cell) ranking combined with a GPT-3.5 LLM response generator to yield a 2x relative improvement in ROUGE scores. Finally, human evaluators prefer cTBLs +80% of the time (coherency, fluency) and judge informativeness to be 4x better than the previous state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 优化准确性和性能，同时消除开放域会话大语言模型 (LLM) 的幻觉是一项开放的研究挑战。一个特别有前途的方向是利用结构化来源的信息来增强和巩固法学硕士。本文介绍了会话表 (cTBLS)，这是一种三步架构，用于根据检索到的表格信息检索和生成对话响应。 cTBLS 使用 Transformer 编码器嵌入进行密集表检索，并在 HyrbiDialogue 数据集上比之前最先进系统中的检索器获得高达 125% 的相对改进。然后，cTBLS 使用编码器和解码器模型之间的共享过程来执行粗+细表格知识（例如，单元格）排名，并结合 GPT-3.5 LLM 响应生成器，使 ROUGE 分数相对提高 2 倍。最后，人类评估者在 80% 的情况下更喜欢 cTBL（连贯性、流畅性），并且判断信息量比之前最先进的技术好 4 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出cTBLS架构，通过结合表格信息增强大型语言模型，以减少对话中的幻觉并提升响应质量。
AI.motivation: 开放领域对话式大型语言模型存在准确性不足和幻觉问题，而结构化数据（如表格）可提供可靠信息源以改进模型性能。
AI.method: cTBLS采用三步流程：1) 使用Transformer编码器嵌入实现密集表格检索；2) 通过编码器-解码器共享过程进行粗细粒度表格知识排序；3) 利用GPT-3.5生成最终对话响应。
AI.result: 在HyrbiDialogue数据集上，cTBLS实现检索性能125%相对提升，ROUGE分数提升2倍，人类评估显示80%偏好其连贯性与流利性，信息性评分提升4倍。
AI.conclusion: cTBLS通过有效整合表格信息显著提升对话系统性能，验证了结构化数据在减少模型幻觉和增强响应质量中的关键作用。

authors_text: Zonglin Yang,Xinya Du,Rui Mao,Jinjie Ni,Erik Cambria
title: Logical Reasoning over Natural Language as Knowledge Representation: A Survey
title_zh: 作为知识表示的自然语言的逻辑推理：一项调查
abstract: Logical reasoning is central to human cognition and intelligence. It includes deductive, inductive, and abductive reasoning. Past research of logical reasoning within AI uses formal language as knowledge representation and symbolic reasoners. However, reasoning with formal language has proved challenging (e.g., brittleness and knowledge-acquisition bottleneck). This paper provides a comprehensive overview on a new paradigm of logical reasoning, which uses natural language as knowledge representation and pretrained language models as reasoners, including philosophical definition and categorization of logical reasoning, advantages of the new paradigm, benchmarks and methods, challenges of the new paradigm, possible future directions, and relation to related NLP fields. This new paradigm is promising since it not only alleviates many challenges of formal representation but also has advantages over end-to-end neural methods. This survey focus on transformer-based LLMs explicitly working on deductive, inductive, and abductive reasoning over English representation.
summary: Logical reasoning is central to human cognition and intelligence. It includes deductive, inductive, and abductive reasoning. Past research of logical reasoning within AI uses formal language as knowledge representation and symbolic reasoners. However, reasoning with formal language has proved challenging (e.g., brittleness and knowledge-acquisition bottleneck). This paper provides a comprehensive overview on a new paradigm of logical reasoning, which uses natural language as knowledge representation and pretrained language models as reasoners, including philosophical definition and categorization of logical reasoning, advantages of the new paradigm, benchmarks and methods, challenges of the new paradigm, possible future directions, and relation to related NLP fields. This new paradigm is promising since it not only alleviates many challenges of formal representation but also has advantages over end-to-end neural methods. This survey focus on transformer-based LLMs explicitly working on deductive, inductive, and abductive reasoning over English representation.
abstract_zh: 逻辑推理是人类认知和智力的核心。它包括演绎推理、归纳推理和溯因推理。过去人工智能中逻辑推理的研究使用形式语言作为知识表示和符号推理器。然而，事实证明，使用形式语言进行推理具有挑战性（例如脆弱性和知识获取瓶颈）。本文全面概述了一种以自然语言作为知识表示、预训练语言模型作为推理器的逻辑推理新范式，包括逻辑推理的哲学定义和分类、新范式的优点、基准和方法、新范式的挑战、未来可能的方向以及与相关 NLP 领域的关系。这种新范式很有前途，因为它不仅减轻了形式表示的许多挑战，而且比端到端神经方法具有优势。这项调查重点关注基于变压器的法学硕士，明确致力于对英语表达进行演绎、归纳和溯因推理。

AI.tldr: 综述将自然语言作为知识表示的逻辑推理新范式，涵盖其定义、方法、挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 传统形式语言推理存在脆弱性和知识获取瓶颈，新范式利用自然语言和预训练模型缓解这些问题并优于端到端方法。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析演绎/归纳/溯因推理的哲学定义、基准数据集、模型方法及与NLP相关领域的关联。
AI.result: 系统梳理了自然语言逻辑推理的现状，指出预训练语言模型在保持可解释性的同时优于纯神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 该范式为AI推理提供了更贴近人类认知的路径，未来需解决语言模型推理鲁棒性和多语言适配等挑战。

authors_text: Haisong Liu,Tao Lu,Yihui Xu,Jia Liu,Limin Wang
title: Learning Optical Flow and Scene Flow with Bidirectional Camera-LiDAR Fusion
title_zh: 使用双向相机-LiDAR 融合学习光流和场景流
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of jointly estimating the optical flow and scene flow from synchronized 2D and 3D data. Previous methods either employ a complex pipeline that splits the joint task into independent stages, or fuse 2D and 3D information in an ``early-fusion'' or ``late-fusion'' manner. Such one-size-fits-all approaches suffer from a dilemma of failing to fully utilize the characteristic of each modality or to maximize the inter-modality complementarity. To address the problem, we propose a novel end-to-end framework, which consists of 2D and 3D branches with multiple bidirectional fusion connections between them in specific layers. Different from previous work, we apply a point-based 3D branch to extract the LiDAR features, as it preserves the geometric structure of point clouds. To fuse dense image features and sparse point features, we propose a learnable operator named bidirectional camera-LiDAR fusion module (Bi-CLFM). We instantiate two types of the bidirectional fusion pipeline, one based on the pyramidal coarse-to-fine architecture (dubbed CamLiPWC), and the other one based on the recurrent all-pairs field transforms (dubbed CamLiRAFT). On FlyingThings3D, both CamLiPWC and CamLiRAFT surpass all existing methods and achieve up to a 47.9\% reduction in 3D end-point-error from the best published result. Our best-performing model, CamLiRAFT, achieves an error of 4.26\% on the KITTI Scene Flow benchmark, ranking 1st among all submissions with much fewer parameters. Besides, our methods have strong generalization performance and the ability to handle non-rigid motion. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CamLiFlow.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of jointly estimating the optical flow and scene flow from synchronized 2D and 3D data. Previous methods either employ a complex pipeline that splits the joint task into independent stages, or fuse 2D and 3D information in an ``early-fusion'' or ``late-fusion'' manner. Such one-size-fits-all approaches suffer from a dilemma of failing to fully utilize the characteristic of each modality or to maximize the inter-modality complementarity. To address the problem, we propose a novel end-to-end framework, which consists of 2D and 3D branches with multiple bidirectional fusion connections between them in specific layers. Different from previous work, we apply a point-based 3D branch to extract the LiDAR features, as it preserves the geometric structure of point clouds. To fuse dense image features and sparse point features, we propose a learnable operator named bidirectional camera-LiDAR fusion module (Bi-CLFM). We instantiate two types of the bidirectional fusion pipeline, one based on the pyramidal coarse-to-fine architecture (dubbed CamLiPWC), and the other one based on the recurrent all-pairs field transforms (dubbed CamLiRAFT). On FlyingThings3D, both CamLiPWC and CamLiRAFT surpass all existing methods and achieve up to a 47.9\% reduction in 3D end-point-error from the best published result. Our best-performing model, CamLiRAFT, achieves an error of 4.26\% on the KITTI Scene Flow benchmark, ranking 1st among all submissions with much fewer parameters. Besides, our methods have strong generalization performance and the ability to handle non-rigid motion. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CamLiFlow.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了从同步的 2D 和 3D 数据联合估计光流和场景流的问题。以前的方法要么采用复杂的管道将联合任务分成独立的阶段，要么以“早期融合”或“后期融合”的方式融合 2D 和 3D 信息。这种一刀切的方法面临着无法充分利用每种模态的特性或最大化模态间互补性的困境。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端框架，该框架由 2D 和 3D 分支组成，在特定层中它们之间有多个双向融合连接。与之前的工作不同，我们应用基于点的 3D 分支来提取 LiDAR 特征，因为它保留了点云的几何结构。为了融合密集图像特征和稀疏点特征，我们提出了一种可学习的算子，名为双向相机-激光雷达融合模块（Bi-CLFM）。我们实例化了两种类型的双向融合管道，一种基于金字塔从粗到精的架构（称为 CamLiPWC），另一种基于循环全对场变换（称为 CamLiRAFT）。在 FlyingThings3D 上，CamLiPWC 和 CamLiRAFT 均超越了所有现有方法，与已发布的最佳结果相比，3D 端点误差降低了 47.9%。我们表现​​最好的模型 CamLiRAFT 在 KITTI Scene Flow 基准测试中实现了 4.26% 的误差，在参数少得多的所有提交中排名第一。此外，我们的方法具有很强的泛化性能和处理非刚性运动的能力。代码可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CamLiFlow 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双向相机-激光雷达融合的端到端框架，联合估计光流和场景流。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么将任务拆分为独立阶段，要么采用早融合/晚融合方式，无法充分挖掘多模态特征互补性。
AI.method: 设计包含2D/3D分支的端到端网络，通过特定层间的双向融合模块（Bi-CLFM）实现特征交互，提出点云基3D分支与两种实现方案（CamLiPWC/CamLiRAFT）。
AI.result: 在FlyingThings3D数据集上3D端点误差降低47.9%，KITTI场景流基准测试中CamLiRAFT以4.26%误差位列第一且参数更少。
AI.conclusion: 双向融合框架有效提升了多模态数据联合估计性能，具有强泛化能力和非刚性运动处理能力。

search_text: Learning Optical Flow and Scene Flow with Bidirectional Camera-LiDAR Fusion 使用双向相机-LiDAR 融合学习光流和场景流 In this paper, we study the problem of jointly estimating the optical flow and scene flow from synchronized 2D and 3D data. Previous methods either employ a complex pipeline that splits the joint task into independent stages, or fuse 2D and 3D information in an ``early-fusion'' or ``late-fusion'' manner. Such one-size-fits-all approaches suffer from a dilemma of failing to fully utilize the characteristic of each modality or to maximize the inter-modality complementarity. To address the problem, we propose a novel end-to-end framework, which consists of 2D and 3D branches with multiple bidirectional fusion connections between them in specific layers. Different from previous work, we apply a point-based 3D branch to extract the LiDAR features, as it preserves the geometric structure of point clouds. To fuse dense image features and sparse point features, we propose a learnable operator named bidirectional camera-LiDAR fusion module (Bi-CLFM). We instantiate two types of the bidirectional fusion pipeline, one based on the pyramidal coarse-to-fine architecture (dubbed CamLiPWC), and the other one based on the recurrent all-pairs field transforms (dubbed CamLiRAFT). On FlyingThings3D, both CamLiPWC and CamLiRAFT surpass all existing methods and achieve up to a 47.9\% reduction in 3D end-point-error from the best published result. Our best-performing model, CamLiRAFT, achieves an error of 4.26\% on the KITTI Scene Flow benchmark, ranking 1st among all submissions with much fewer parameters. Besides, our methods have strong generalization performance and the ability to handle non-rigid motion. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CamLiFlow. 在本文中，我们研究了从同步的 2D 和 3D 数据联合估计光流和场景流的问题。以前的方法要么采用复杂的管道将联合任务分成独立的阶段，要么以“早期融合”或“后期融合”的方式融合 2D 和 3D 信息。这种一刀切的方法面临着无法充分利用每种模态的特性或最大化模态间互补性的困境。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端框架，该框架由 2D 和 3D 分支组成，在特定层中它们之间有多个双向融合连接。与之前的工作不同，我们应用基于点的 3D 分支来提取 LiDAR 特征，因为它保留了点云的几何结构。为了融合密集图像特征和稀疏点特征，我们提出了一种可学习的算子，名为双向相机-激光雷达融合模块（Bi-CLFM）。我们实例化了两种类型的双向融合管道，一种基于金字塔从粗到精的架构（称为 CamLiPWC），另一种基于循环全对场变换（称为 CamLiRAFT）。在 FlyingThings3D 上，CamLiPWC 和 CamLiRAFT 均超越了所有现有方法，与已发布的最佳结果相比，3D 端点误差降低了 47.9%。我们表现​​最好的模型 CamLiRAFT 在 KITTI Scene Flow 基准测试中实现了 4.26% 的误差，在参数少得多的所有提交中排名第一。此外，我们的方法具有很强的泛化性能和处理非刚性运动的能力。代码可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CamLiFlow 获取。 本文提出一种基于双向相机-激光雷达融合的端到端框架，联合估计光流和场景流。 Haisong Liu,Tao Lu,Yihui Xu,Jia Liu,Limin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Orri Steinn Guðfinnsson,Týr Vilhjálmsson,Martin Eineborg,Torfi Thorhallsson
title: Automatic evaluation of herding behavior in towed fishing gear using end-to-end training of CNN and attention-based networks
title_zh: 使用 CNN 和基于注意力的网络的端到端训练自动评估拖曳渔具的羊群行为
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures. To appear in Proceedings of the 5th Workshop on Computer Vision for Analysis of Underwater Imagery (CVAUI) 2022, published as part of the CVPR 2022 Proceedings
comments: 15 pages, 10 figures. To appear in Proceedings of the 5th Workshop on Computer Vision for Analysis of Underwater Imagery (CVAUI) 2022, published as part of the CVPR 2022 Proceedings
abstract: This paper considers the automatic classification of herding behavior in the cluttered low-visibility environment that typically surrounds towed fishing gear. The paper compares three convolutional and attention-based deep action recognition network architectures trained end-to-end on a small set of video sequences captured by a remotely controlled camera and classified by an expert in fishing technology. The sequences depict a scene in front of a fishing trawl where the conventional herding mechanism has been replaced by directed laser light. The goal is to detect the presence of a fish in the sequence and classify whether or not the fish reacts to the lasers. A two-stream CNN model, a CNN-transformer hybrid, and a pure transformer model were trained end-to-end to achieve 63%, 54%, and 60% 10-fold classification accuracy on the three-class task when compared to the human expert. Inspection of the activation maps learned by the three networks raises questions about the attributes of the sequences the models may be learning, specifically whether changes in viewpoint introduced by human camera operators that affect the position of laser lines in the video frames may interfere with the classification. This underlines the importance of careful experimental design when capturing scientific data for automatic end-to-end evaluation and the usefulness of inspecting the trained models.
summary: This paper considers the automatic classification of herding behavior in the cluttered low-visibility environment that typically surrounds towed fishing gear. The paper compares three convolutional and attention-based deep action recognition network architectures trained end-to-end on a small set of video sequences captured by a remotely controlled camera and classified by an expert in fishing technology. The sequences depict a scene in front of a fishing trawl where the conventional herding mechanism has been replaced by directed laser light. The goal is to detect the presence of a fish in the sequence and classify whether or not the fish reacts to the lasers. A two-stream CNN model, a CNN-transformer hybrid, and a pure transformer model were trained end-to-end to achieve 63%, 54%, and 60% 10-fold classification accuracy on the three-class task when compared to the human expert. Inspection of the activation maps learned by the three networks raises questions about the attributes of the sequences the models may be learning, specifically whether changes in viewpoint introduced by human camera operators that affect the position of laser lines in the video frames may interfere with the classification. This underlines the importance of careful experimental design when capturing scientific data for automatic end-to-end evaluation and the usefulness of inspecting the trained models.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了在通常围绕拖曳渔具的杂乱低能见度环境中对羊群行为的自动分类。该论文比较了三种基于卷积和注意力的深度动作识别网络架构，这些网络架构在远程控制摄像机捕获的一小组视频序列上进行端到端训练，并由钓鱼技术专家进行分类。这些序列描绘了拖网前的场景，其中传统的放牧机制已被定向激光取代。目标是检测序列中是否存在鱼，并对鱼是否对激光做出反应进行分类。与人类专家相比，双流 CNN 模型、CNN-transformer 混合模型和纯 Transformer 模型经过端到端训练，在三类任务上实现了 63%、54% 和 60% 的 10 倍分类精度。对三个网络学习的激活图的检查提出了有关模型可能学习的序列属性的问题，特别是人类摄像机操作员引入的影响视频帧中激光线位置的视点变化是否可能会干扰分类。这强调了在捕获科学数据以进行自动端到端评估时仔细实验设计的重要性以及检查训练模型的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用端到端训练的卷积神经网络（CNN）和基于注意力的网络，自动分类拖曳渔具周围复杂低能见度环境中的驱赶行为。
AI.motivation: 传统渔具驱赶机制难以在复杂环境中有效检测鱼类反应，需通过自动化方法提升检测效率，同时探索深度学习模型在该场景下的适用性。
AI.method: 比较了三种深度动作识别网络架构（双流CNN、CNN-Transformer混合模型和纯Transformer模型），使用专家标注的视频序列进行端到端训练，并分析激活图以评估模型学习特征。
AI.result: 三类任务的10折分类准确率分别为63%、54%和60%，但激活图分析表明摄像头视角变化可能干扰分类效果，凸显实验设计的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 端到端模型在复杂场景中具有一定潜力，但需谨慎设计实验条件并深入分析模型特征，以确保科学数据的可靠性与有效性。

authors_text: Xiaoxu Meng,Weikai Chen,Bo Yang
title: NeAT: Learning Neural Implicit Surfaces with Arbitrary Topologies from Multi-view Images
title_zh: NeAT：从多视图图像中学习具有任意拓扑的神经隐式曲面
abstract: Recent progress in neural implicit functions has set new state-of-the-art in reconstructing high-fidelity 3D shapes from a collection of images. However, these approaches are limited to closed surfaces as they require the surface to be represented by a signed distance field. In this paper, we propose NeAT, a new neural rendering framework that can learn implicit surfaces with arbitrary topologies from multi-view images. In particular, NeAT represents the 3D surface as a level set of a signed distance function (SDF) with a validity branch for estimating the surface existence probability at the query positions. We also develop a novel neural volume rendering method, which uses SDF and validity to calculate the volume opacity and avoids rendering points with low validity. NeAT supports easy field-to-mesh conversion using the classic Marching Cubes algorithm. Extensive experiments on DTU, MGN, and Deep Fashion 3D datasets indicate that our approach is able to faithfully reconstruct both watertight and non-watertight surfaces. In particular, NeAT significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in the task of open surface reconstruction both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Recent progress in neural implicit functions has set new state-of-the-art in reconstructing high-fidelity 3D shapes from a collection of images. However, these approaches are limited to closed surfaces as they require the surface to be represented by a signed distance field. In this paper, we propose NeAT, a new neural rendering framework that can learn implicit surfaces with arbitrary topologies from multi-view images. In particular, NeAT represents the 3D surface as a level set of a signed distance function (SDF) with a validity branch for estimating the surface existence probability at the query positions. We also develop a novel neural volume rendering method, which uses SDF and validity to calculate the volume opacity and avoids rendering points with low validity. NeAT supports easy field-to-mesh conversion using the classic Marching Cubes algorithm. Extensive experiments on DTU, MGN, and Deep Fashion 3D datasets indicate that our approach is able to faithfully reconstruct both watertight and non-watertight surfaces. In particular, NeAT significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in the task of open surface reconstruction both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 神经隐式函数的最新进展在从图像集合中重建高保真 3D 形状方面树立了新的最先进技术。然而，这些方法仅限于闭合表面，因为它们要求表面由带符号的距离场表示。在本文中，我们提出了 NeAT，一种新的神经渲染框架，可以从多视图图像中学习具有任意拓扑的隐式表面。具体来说，NeAT 将 3D 表面表示为带符号距离函数 (SDF) 的水平集，并具有用于估计查询位置处的表面存在概率的有效性分支。我们还开发了一种新颖的神经体积渲染方法，该方法使用SDF和有效性来计算体积不透明度并避免有效性低的渲染点。 NeAT 使用经典的 Marching Cubes 算法支持简单的场到网格转换。对 DTU、MGN 和 Deep Fashion 3D 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法能够忠实地重建水密和非水密表面。特别是，NeAT 在开放表面重建任务中无论在数量上还是在质量上都显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeAT框架，通过多视角图像学习具有任意拓扑结构的神经隐式曲面，解决传统方法仅能重建封闭曲面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式函数方法受限于符号距离场（SDF）表示，无法处理开放或复杂拓扑结构的曲面，导致重建结果不完整或存在缺陷。
AI.method: NeAT将3D曲面表示为带有效性分支的SDF水平集，通过有效性分支估计查询点的表面存在概率，并结合新型神经体积渲染方法避免低有效性区域渲染，最终通过Marching Cubes算法实现场到网格的转换。
AI.result: 在DTU、MGN和Deep Fashion 3D数据集上，NeAT在开放曲面重建任务中显著优于现有方法，能够准确重建封闭和非封闭曲面。
AI.conclusion: NeAT通过引入有效性分支和改进渲染方法，成功突破传统隐式曲面重建对封闭性的依赖，为复杂拓扑结构的3D重建提供了新解决方案。

search_text: NeAT: Learning Neural Implicit Surfaces with Arbitrary Topologies from Multi-view Images NeAT：从多视图图像中学习具有任意拓扑的神经隐式曲面 Recent progress in neural implicit functions has set new state-of-the-art in reconstructing high-fidelity 3D shapes from a collection of images. However, these approaches are limited to closed surfaces as they require the surface to be represented by a signed distance field. In this paper, we propose NeAT, a new neural rendering framework that can learn implicit surfaces with arbitrary topologies from multi-view images. In particular, NeAT represents the 3D surface as a level set of a signed distance function (SDF) with a validity branch for estimating the surface existence probability at the query positions. We also develop a novel neural volume rendering method, which uses SDF and validity to calculate the volume opacity and avoids rendering points with low validity. NeAT supports easy field-to-mesh conversion using the classic Marching Cubes algorithm. Extensive experiments on DTU, MGN, and Deep Fashion 3D datasets indicate that our approach is able to faithfully reconstruct both watertight and non-watertight surfaces. In particular, NeAT significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in the task of open surface reconstruction both quantitatively and qualitatively. 神经隐式函数的最新进展在从图像集合中重建高保真 3D 形状方面树立了新的最先进技术。然而，这些方法仅限于闭合表面，因为它们要求表面由带符号的距离场表示。在本文中，我们提出了 NeAT，一种新的神经渲染框架，可以从多视图图像中学习具有任意拓扑的隐式表面。具体来说，NeAT 将 3D 表面表示为带符号距离函数 (SDF) 的水平集，并具有用于估计查询位置处的表面存在概率的有效性分支。我们还开发了一种新颖的神经体积渲染方法，该方法使用SDF和有效性来计算体积不透明度并避免有效性低的渲染点。 NeAT 使用经典的 Marching Cubes 算法支持简单的场到网格转换。对 DTU、MGN 和 Deep Fashion 3D 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法能够忠实地重建水密和非水密表面。特别是，NeAT 在开放表面重建任务中无论在数量上还是在质量上都显着优于最先进的方法。 本文提出NeAT框架，通过多视角图像学习具有任意拓扑结构的神经隐式曲面，解决传统方法仅能重建封闭曲面的局限性。 Xiaoxu Meng,Weikai Chen,Bo Yang cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Jennifer Haase,Paul H. P. Hanel
title: Artificial muses: Generative Artificial Intelligence Chatbots Have Risen to Human-Level Creativity
title_zh: 人工缪斯：生成式人工智能聊天机器人已达到人类水平的创造力
abstract: A widespread view is that Artificial Intelligence cannot be creative. We tested this assumption by comparing human-generated ideas with those generated by six Generative Artificial Intelligence (GAI) chatbots: $alpa.\!ai$, $Copy.\!ai$, ChatGPT (versions 3 and 4), $Studio.\!ai$, and YouChat. Humans and a specifically trained AI independently assessed the quality and quantity of ideas. We found no qualitative difference between AI and human-generated creativity, although there are differences in how ideas are generated. Interestingly, 9.4 percent of humans were more creative than the most creative GAI, GPT-4. Our findings suggest that GAIs are valuable assistants in the creative process. Continued research and development of GAI in creative tasks is crucial to fully understand this technology's potential benefits and drawbacks in shaping the future of creativity. Finally, we discuss the question of whether GAIs are capable of being truly creative.
summary: A widespread view is that Artificial Intelligence cannot be creative. We tested this assumption by comparing human-generated ideas with those generated by six Generative Artificial Intelligence (GAI) chatbots: $alpa.\!ai$, $Copy.\!ai$, ChatGPT (versions 3 and 4), $Studio.\!ai$, and YouChat. Humans and a specifically trained AI independently assessed the quality and quantity of ideas. We found no qualitative difference between AI and human-generated creativity, although there are differences in how ideas are generated. Interestingly, 9.4 percent of humans were more creative than the most creative GAI, GPT-4. Our findings suggest that GAIs are valuable assistants in the creative process. Continued research and development of GAI in creative tasks is crucial to fully understand this technology's potential benefits and drawbacks in shaping the future of creativity. Finally, we discuss the question of whether GAIs are capable of being truly creative.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为人工智能不能具有创造力。我们通过将人类生成的想法与六个生成人工智能 (GAI) 聊天机器人生成的想法进行比较来测试这一假设：$alpa.\!ai$、$Copy.\!ai$、ChatGPT（版本 3 和 4）、$Studio.\!ai$ 和 YouChat。人类和经过专门训练的人工智能独立评估想法的质量和数量。我们发现人工智能和人类产生的创造力之间没有质的差异，尽管想法的产生方式存在差异。有趣的是，9.4% 的人类比最具创造力的 GAI GPT-4 更具创造力。我们的研究结果表明，GAI 是创意过程中的宝贵助手。 GAI 在创意任务中的持续研究和开发对于充分了解该技术在塑造创意未来方面的潜在优势和缺点至关重要。最后，我们讨论 GAI 是否具有真正的创造力的问题。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过比较人类与六种生成式人工智能聊天机器人（GAI）的创意输出，评估AI在创造性任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 探讨AI是否具备创造性，挑战‘人工智能无法创造’的普遍观点，并分析其在创意过程中的潜力。
AI.method: 使用六种GAI工具（如ChatGPT 3/4、$alpa.\!ai$等）生成创意内容，由人类和专门训练的AI独立评估创意质量与数量。
AI.result: AI生成的创意与人类无显著质量差异，但生成方式不同；9.4%的人类参与者比最优秀的GAI（GPT-4）更具创造力。
AI.conclusion: GAI可作为创意辅助工具，需进一步研究其潜在优势与风险，并探讨AI是否具备真正的创造性。

authors_text: Giovanni Morrone,Samuele Cornell,Luca Serafini,Enrico Zovato,Alessio Brutti,Stefano Squartini
title: End-to-End Integration of Speech Separation and Voice Activity Detection for Low-Latency Diarization of Telephone Conversations
title_zh: 语音分离和语音活动检测的端到端集成，实现电话对话的低延迟分类
abstract: Recent works show that speech separation guided diarization (SSGD) is an increasingly promising direction, mainly thanks to the recent progress in speech separation. It performs diarization by first separating the speakers and then applying voice activity detection (VAD) on each separated stream. In this work we conduct an in-depth study of SSGD in the conversational telephone speech (CTS) domain, focusing mainly on low-latency streaming diarization applications. We consider three state-of-the-art speech separation (SSep) algorithms and study their performance both in online and offline scenarios, considering non-causal and causal implementations as well as continuous SSep (CSS) windowed inference. We compare different SSGD algorithms on two widely used CTS datasets: CALLHOME and Fisher Corpus (Part 1 and 2) and evaluate both separation and diarization performance. To improve performance, a novel, causal and computationally efficient leakage removal algorithm is proposed, which significantly decreases false alarms. We also explore, for the first time, fully end-to-end SSGD integration between SSep and VAD modules. Crucially, this enables fine-tuning on real-world data for which oracle speakers sources are not available. In particular, our best model achieves 8.8% DER on CALLHOME, which outperforms the current state-of-the-art end-to-end neural diarization model, despite being trained on an order of magnitude less data and having significantly lower latency, i.e., 0.1 vs. 1 s. Finally, we also show that the separated signals can be readily used also for automatic speech recognition, reaching performance close to using oracle sources in some configurations.
summary: Recent works show that speech separation guided diarization (SSGD) is an increasingly promising direction, mainly thanks to the recent progress in speech separation. It performs diarization by first separating the speakers and then applying voice activity detection (VAD) on each separated stream. In this work we conduct an in-depth study of SSGD in the conversational telephone speech (CTS) domain, focusing mainly on low-latency streaming diarization applications. We consider three state-of-the-art speech separation (SSep) algorithms and study their performance both in online and offline scenarios, considering non-causal and causal implementations as well as continuous SSep (CSS) windowed inference. We compare different SSGD algorithms on two widely used CTS datasets: CALLHOME and Fisher Corpus (Part 1 and 2) and evaluate both separation and diarization performance. To improve performance, a novel, causal and computationally efficient leakage removal algorithm is proposed, which significantly decreases false alarms. We also explore, for the first time, fully end-to-end SSGD integration between SSep and VAD modules. Crucially, this enables fine-tuning on real-world data for which oracle speakers sources are not available. In particular, our best model achieves 8.8% DER on CALLHOME, which outperforms the current state-of-the-art end-to-end neural diarization model, despite being trained on an order of magnitude less data and having significantly lower latency, i.e., 0.1 vs. 1 s. Finally, we also show that the separated signals can be readily used also for automatic speech recognition, reaching performance close to using oracle sources in some configurations.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，语音分离引导二值化（SSGD）是一个越来越有前途的方向，这主要归功于语音分离方面的最新进展。它通过首先分离说话者然后对每个分离的流应用语音活动检测（VAD）来执行分类。在这项工作中，我们对会话电话语音（CTS）领域的 SSGD 进行了深入研究，主要关注低延迟流二值化应用。我们考虑三种最先进的语音分离 (SSep) 算法，并研究它们在在线和离线场景中的性能，考虑非因果和因果实现以及连续 SSep (CSS) 窗口推理。我们在两个广泛使用的 CTS 数据集：CALLHOME 和 Fisher Corpus（第 1 部分和第 2 部分）上比较不同的 SSGD 算法，并评估分离和二值化性能。为了提高性能，提出了一种新颖的、因果性的、计算高效的泄漏消除算法，该算法可显着减少误报。我们还首次探索 SSep 和 VAD 模块之间完全端到端的 SSGD 集成。至关重要的是，这可以对无法获得预言机扬声器源的真实数据进行微调。特别是，我们的最佳模型在 CALLHOME 上实现了 8.8% DER，这优于当前最先进的端到端神经二值化模型，尽管是在少一个数量级的数据上进行训练并且具有显着较低的延迟（即 0.1 秒与 1 秒）。最后，我们还表明，分离的信号也可以很容易地用于自动语音识别，在某些配置中达到接近使用预言源的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在电话对话中实现低延迟说话人分离与语音活动检测的端到端集成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在低延迟流式说话人分离与检测中存在性能瓶颈，需优化分离算法与检测模块的协同效率。
AI.method: 对比三种语音分离算法在在线/离线场景下的表现，提出因果高效泄漏消除算法，并首次实现分离与检测模块的端到端联合训练。
AI.result: 在CALLHOME数据集上达到8.8%的DER，较现有最优模型数据量减少一个数量级且延迟降低至0.1秒。
AI.conclusion: 端到端集成方法在保持低延迟的同时提升了分离与检测性能，分离信号可有效用于语音识别任务。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了在电话对话中实现低延迟说话人分离与语音活动检测的端到端集成方法。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在低延迟流式说话人分离与检测中存在性能瓶颈，需优化分离算法与检测模块的协同效率。
ai_content.method: 对比三种语音分离算法在在线/离线场景下的表现，提出因果高效泄漏消除算法，并首次实现分离与检测模块的端到端联合训练。
ai_content.result: 在CALLHOME数据集上达到8.8%的DER，较现有最优模型数据量减少一个数量级且延迟降低至0.1秒。
ai_content.conclusion: 端到端集成方法在保持低延迟的同时提升了分离与检测性能，分离信号可有效用于语音识别任务。

search_text: End-to-End Integration of Speech Separation and Voice Activity Detection for Low-Latency Diarization of Telephone Conversations 语音分离和语音活动检测的端到端集成，实现电话对话的低延迟分类 Recent works show that speech separation guided diarization (SSGD) is an increasingly promising direction, mainly thanks to the recent progress in speech separation. It performs diarization by first separating the speakers and then applying voice activity detection (VAD) on each separated stream. In this work we conduct an in-depth study of SSGD in the conversational telephone speech (CTS) domain, focusing mainly on low-latency streaming diarization applications. We consider three state-of-the-art speech separation (SSep) algorithms and study their performance both in online and offline scenarios, considering non-causal and causal implementations as well as continuous SSep (CSS) windowed inference. We compare different SSGD algorithms on two widely used CTS datasets: CALLHOME and Fisher Corpus (Part 1 and 2) and evaluate both separation and diarization performance. To improve performance, a novel, causal and computationally efficient leakage removal algorithm is proposed, which significantly decreases false alarms. We also explore, for the first time, fully end-to-end SSGD integration between SSep and VAD modules. Crucially, this enables fine-tuning on real-world data for which oracle speakers sources are not available. In particular, our best model achieves 8.8% DER on CALLHOME, which outperforms the current state-of-the-art end-to-end neural diarization model, despite being trained on an order of magnitude less data and having significantly lower latency, i.e., 0.1 vs. 1 s. Finally, we also show that the separated signals can be readily used also for automatic speech recognition, reaching performance close to using oracle sources in some configurations. 最近的工作表明，语音分离引导二值化（SSGD）是一个越来越有前途的方向，这主要归功于语音分离方面的最新进展。它通过首先分离说话者然后对每个分离的流应用语音活动检测（VAD）来执行分类。在这项工作中，我们对会话电话语音（CTS）领域的 SSGD 进行了深入研究，主要关注低延迟流二值化应用。我们考虑三种最先进的语音分离 (SSep) 算法，并研究它们在在线和离线场景中的性能，考虑非因果和因果实现以及连续 SSep (CSS) 窗口推理。我们在两个广泛使用的 CTS 数据集：CALLHOME 和 Fisher Corpus（第 1 部分和第 2 部分）上比较不同的 SSGD 算法，并评估分离和二值化性能。为了提高性能，提出了一种新颖的、因果性的、计算高效的泄漏消除算法，该算法可显着减少误报。我们还首次探索 SSep 和 VAD 模块之间完全端到端的 SSGD 集成。至关重要的是，这可以对无法获得预言机扬声器源的真实数据进行微调。特别是，我们的最佳模型在 CALLHOME 上实现了 8.8% DER，这优于当前最先进的端到端神经二值化模型，尽管是在少一个数量级的数据上进行训练并且具有显着较低的延迟（即 0.1 秒与 1 秒）。最后，我们还表明，分离的信号也可以很容易地用于自动语音识别，在某些配置中达到接近使用预言源的性能。 本文研究了在电话对话中实现低延迟说话人分离与语音活动检测的端到端集成方法。 Giovanni Morrone,Samuele Cornell,Luca Serafini,Enrico Zovato,Alessio Brutti,Stefano Squartini eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Jefferson Hernandez,Ruben Villegas,Vicente Ordonez
title: ViC-MAE: Self-Supervised Representation Learning from Images and Video with Contrastive Masked Autoencoders
title_zh: ViC-MAE：使用对比掩模自动编码器从图像和视频中进行自监督表示学习
abstract: We propose ViC-MAE, a model that combines both Masked AutoEncoders (MAE) and contrastive learning. ViC-MAE is trained using a global featured obtained by pooling the local representations learned under an MAE reconstruction loss and leveraging this representation under a contrastive objective across images and video frames. We show that visual representations learned under ViC-MAE generalize well to both video and image classification tasks. Particularly, ViC-MAE obtains state-of-the-art transfer learning performance from video to images on Imagenet-1k compared to the recently proposed OmniMAE by achieving a top-1 accuracy of 86% (+1.3% absolute improvement) when trained on the same data and 87.1% (+2.4% absolute improvement) when training on extra data. At the same time ViC-MAE outperforms most other methods on video benchmarks by obtaining 75.9% top-1 accuracy on the challenging Something something-v2 video benchmark . When training on videos and images from a diverse combination of datasets, our method maintains a balanced transfer-learning performance between video and image classification benchmarks, coming only as a close second to the best supervised method.
summary: We propose ViC-MAE, a model that combines both Masked AutoEncoders (MAE) and contrastive learning. ViC-MAE is trained using a global featured obtained by pooling the local representations learned under an MAE reconstruction loss and leveraging this representation under a contrastive objective across images and video frames. We show that visual representations learned under ViC-MAE generalize well to both video and image classification tasks. Particularly, ViC-MAE obtains state-of-the-art transfer learning performance from video to images on Imagenet-1k compared to the recently proposed OmniMAE by achieving a top-1 accuracy of 86% (+1.3% absolute improvement) when trained on the same data and 87.1% (+2.4% absolute improvement) when training on extra data. At the same time ViC-MAE outperforms most other methods on video benchmarks by obtaining 75.9% top-1 accuracy on the challenging Something something-v2 video benchmark . When training on videos and images from a diverse combination of datasets, our method maintains a balanced transfer-learning performance between video and image classification benchmarks, coming only as a close second to the best supervised method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ViC-MAE，一种结合了掩蔽自动编码器（MAE）和对比学习的模型。 ViC-MAE 使用全局特征进行训练，该全局特征通过汇集在 MAE 重建损失下学习到的局部表示并在跨图像和视频帧的对比目标下利用该表示来获得。我们表明，在 ViC-MAE 下学习的视觉表示可以很好地推广到视频和图像分类任务。特别是，与最近提出的 OmniMAE 相比，ViC-MAE 在 Imagenet-1k 上获得了最先进的从视频到图像的迁移学习性能，在相同数据上训练时实现了 86%（+1.3% 绝对改进）的 top-1 准确率，在额外数据上训练时实现了 87.1%（+2.4% 绝对改进）的 top-1 准确率。与此同时，ViC-MAE 在具有挑战性的 Something Something-v2 视频基准测试中获得了 75.9% 的 top-1 准确率，在视频基准测试中表现优于大多数其他方法。当对来自不同数据集组合的视频和图像进行训练时，我们的方法在视频和图像分类基准之间保持平衡的迁移学习性能，仅次于最佳监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViC-MAE模型，结合掩码自编码器（MAE）与对比学习，实现图像和视频的自监督表征学习，提升跨模态迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在图像与视频表征学习间难以平衡，需设计统一框架以提升跨模态迁移能力并超越现有模型如OmniMAE。
AI.method: 通过MAE重建损失学习局部表征，池化后结合对比目标进行跨图像与视频帧的全局表征学习，联合优化重建与对比损失。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k上视频到图像迁移准确率较OmniMAE提升1.3%-2.4%，在Something-something-v2视频基准达75.9%，接近最优监督方法。
AI.conclusion: ViC-MAE有效融合MAE与对比学习，实现图像与视频任务的均衡迁移性能，验证了跨模态自监督学习的有效性。
