ViC-MAE is trained using a global featured obtained by pooling the local representations learned under an MAE reconstruction loss and leveraging this representation under a contrastive objective across images and video frames. We show that visual representations learned under ViC-MAE generalize well to both video and image classification tasks. Particularly, ViC-MAE obtains state-of-the-art transfer learning performance from video to images on Imagenet-1k compared to the recently proposed OmniMAE by achieving a top-1 accuracy of 86% (+1.3% absolute improvement) when trained on the same data and 87.1% (+2.4% absolute improvement) when training on extra data. At the same time ViC-MAE outperforms most other methods on video benchmarks by obtaining 75.9% top-1 accuracy on the challenging Something something-v2 video benchmark . When training on videos and images from a diverse combination of datasets, our method maintains a balanced transfer-learning performance between video and image classification benchmarks, coming only as a close second to the best supervised method. 我们提出了 ViC-MAE，一种结合了掩蔽自动编码器（MAE）和对比学习的模型。 ViC-MAE 使用全局特征进行训练，该全局特征通过汇集在 MAE 重建损失下学习到的局部表示并在跨图像和视频帧的对比目标下利用该表示来获得。我们表明，在 ViC-MAE 下学习的视觉表示可以很好地推广到视频和图像分类任务。特别是，与最近提出的 OmniMAE 相比，ViC-MAE 在 Imagenet-1k 上获得了最先进的从视频到图像的迁移学习性能，在相同数据上训练时实现了 86%（+1.3% 绝对改进）的 top-1 准确率，在额外数据上训练时实现了 87.1%（+2.4% 绝对改进）的 top-1 准确率。与此同时，ViC-MAE 在具有挑战性的 Something Something-v2 视频基准测试中获得了 75.9% 的 top-1 准确率，在视频基准测试中表现优于大多数其他方法。当对来自不同数据集组合的视频和图像进行训练时，我们的方法在视频和图像分类基准之间保持平衡的迁移学习性能，仅次于最佳监督方法。 本文提出ViC-MAE模型，结合掩码自编码器（MAE）与对比学习，实现图像和视频的自监督表征学习，提升跨模态迁移性能。 Jefferson Hernandez,Ruben Villegas,Vicente Ordonez cs.CV

authors_text: Saizhe Ding,Jinze Chen,Yang Wang,Yu Kang,Weiguo Song,Jie Cheng,Yang Cao
title: E-MLB: Multilevel Benchmark for Event-Based Camera Denoising
title_zh: E-MLB：基于事件的相机去噪的多级基准
abstract: Event cameras, such as dynamic vision sensors (DVS), are biologically inspired vision sensors that have advanced over conventional cameras in high dynamic range, low latency and low power consumption, showing great application potential in many fields. Event cameras are more sensitive to junction leakage current and photocurrent as they output differential signals, losing the smoothing function of the integral imaging process in the RGB camera. The logarithmic conversion further amplifies noise, especially in low-contrast conditions. Recently, researchers proposed a series of datasets and evaluation metrics but limitations remain: 1) the existing datasets are small in scale and insufficient in noise diversity, which cannot reflect the authentic working environments of event cameras; and 2) the existing denoising evaluation metrics are mostly referenced evaluation metrics, relying on APS information or manual annotation. To address the above issues, we construct a large-scale event denoising dataset (multilevel benchmark for event denoising, E-MLB) for the first time, which consists of 100 scenes, each with four noise levels, that is 12 times larger than the largest existing denoising dataset. We also propose the first nonreference event denoising metric, the event structural ratio (ESR), which measures the structural intensity of given events. ESR is inspired by the contrast metric, but is independent of the number of events and projection direction. Based on the proposed benchmark and ESR, we evaluate the most representative denoising algorithms, including classic and SOTA, and provide denoising baselines under various scenes and noise levels. The corresponding results and codes are available at https://github.com/KugaMaxx/cuke-emlb.
summary: Event cameras, such as dynamic vision sensors (DVS), are biologically inspired vision sensors that have advanced over conventional cameras in high dynamic range, low latency and low power consumption, showing great application potential in many fields. Event cameras are more sensitive to junction leakage current and photocurrent as they output differential signals, losing the smoothing function of the integral imaging process in the RGB camera. The logarithmic conversion further amplifies noise, especially in low-contrast conditions. Recently, researchers proposed a series of datasets and evaluation metrics but limitations remain: 1) the existing datasets are small in scale and insufficient in noise diversity, which cannot reflect the authentic working environments of event cameras; and 2) the existing denoising evaluation metrics are mostly referenced evaluation metrics, relying on APS information or manual annotation. To address the above issues, we construct a large-scale event denoising dataset (multilevel benchmark for event denoising, E-MLB) for the first time, which consists of 100 scenes, each with four noise levels, that is 12 times larger than the largest existing denoising dataset. We also propose the first nonreference event denoising metric, the event structural ratio (ESR), which measures the structural intensity of given events. ESR is inspired by the contrast metric, but is independent of the number of events and projection direction. Based on the proposed benchmark and ESR, we evaluate the most representative denoising algorithms, including classic and SOTA, and provide denoising baselines under various scenes and noise levels. The corresponding results and codes are available at https://github.com/KugaMaxx/cuke-emlb.
abstract_zh: 事件相机，如动态视觉传感器（DVS），是受生物学启发的视觉传感器，在高动态范围、低延迟和低功耗方面优于传统相机，在许多领域显示出巨大的应用潜力。事件相机由于输出差分信号，对结漏电流和光电流更加敏感，失去了RGB相机中积分成像过程的平滑功能。对数转换进一步放大了噪声，尤其是在低对比度条件下。最近，研究人员提出了一系列数据集和评估指标，但仍然存在局限性：1）现有数据集规模较小，噪声多样性不足，无法反映事件摄像机的真实工作环境； 2）现有的去噪评估指标大多是参考评估指标，依赖于APS信息或人工标注。为了解决上述问题，我们首次构建了大规模事件去噪数据集（事件去噪的多级基准，E-MLB），该数据集由100个场景组成，每个场景有四个噪声级别，比现有最大的去噪数据集大12倍。我们还提出了第一个非参考事件去噪指标，即事件结构比（ESR），它衡量给定事件的结构强度。 ESR 的灵感来自于对比度度量，但与事件数量和投影方向无关。基于提出的基准和ESR，我们评估了最具代表性的去噪算法，包括经典和SOTA，并提供了各种场景和噪声水平下的去噪基线。相应的结果和代码可以在 https://github.com/KugaMaxx/cuke-emlb 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出E-MLB事件相机去噪多级基准数据集及非参考评估指标ESR，解决现有数据集规模小、噪声多样性不足及评估指标依赖APS信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 事件相机因输出差分信号导致噪声问题显著，现有去噪数据集规模有限且噪声类型单一，评估指标依赖APS信息或人工标注，难以真实反映实际工作环境。
AI.method: 构建包含100个场景、4级噪声的E-MLB数据集（规模为现有最大数据集的12倍），提出基于结构强度的非参考评估指标ESR，无需依赖事件数量和投影方向。
AI.result: 在E-MLB数据集上评估经典及最新去噪算法，提供多场景多噪声水平的去噪基线，结果与代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: E-MLB和ESR有效解决了事件相机去噪领域数据集规模不足与评估指标局限性问题，为后续研究提供可靠基准。

search_text: E-MLB: Multilevel Benchmark for Event-Based Camera Denoising E-MLB：基于事件的相机去噪的多级基准 Event cameras, such as dynamic vision sensors (DVS), are biologically inspired vision sensors that have advanced over conventional cameras in high dynamic range, low latency and low power consumption, showing great application potential in many fields. Event cameras are more sensitive to junction leakage current and photocurrent as they output differential signals, losing the smoothing function of the integral imaging process in the RGB camera. The logarithmic conversion further amplifies noise, especially in low-contrast conditions. Recently, researchers proposed a series of datasets and evaluation metrics but limitations remain: 1) the existing datasets are small in scale and insufficient in noise diversity, which cannot reflect the authentic working environments of event cameras; and 2) the existing denoising evaluation metrics are mostly referenced evaluation metrics, relying on APS information or manual annotation. To address the above issues, we construct a large-scale event denoising dataset (multilevel benchmark for event denoising, E-MLB) for the first time, which consists of 100 scenes, each with four noise levels, that is 12 times larger than the largest existing denoising dataset. We also propose the first nonreference event denoising metric, the event structural ratio (ESR), which measures the structural intensity of given events. ESR is inspired by the contrast metric, but is independent of the number of events and projection direction. Based on the proposed benchmark and ESR, we evaluate the most representative denoising algorithms, including classic and SOTA, and provide denoising baselines under various scenes and noise levels. The corresponding results and codes are available at https://github.com/KugaMaxx/cuke-emlb. 事件相机，如动态视觉传感器（DVS），是受生物学启发的视觉传感器，在高动态范围、低延迟和低功耗方面优于传统相机，在许多领域显示出巨大的应用潜力。事件相机由于输出差分信号，对结漏电流和光电流更加敏感，失去了RGB相机中积分成像过程的平滑功能。对数转换进一步放大了噪声，尤其是在低对比度条件下。最近，研究人员提出了一系列数据集和评估指标，但仍然存在局限性：1）现有数据集规模较小，噪声多样性不足，无法反映事件摄像机的真实工作环境； 2）现有的去噪评估指标大多是参考评估指标，依赖于APS信息或人工标注。为了解决上述问题，我们首次构建了大规模事件去噪数据集（事件去噪的多级基准，E-MLB），该数据集由100个场景组成，每个场景有四个噪声级别，比现有最大的去噪数据集大12倍。我们还提出了第一个非参考事件去噪指标，即事件结构比（ESR），它衡量给定事件的结构强度。 ESR 的灵感来自于对比度度量，但与事件数量和投影方向无关。基于提出的基准和ESR，我们评估了最具代表性的去噪算法，包括经典和SOTA，并提供了各种场景和噪声水平下的去噪基线。相应的结果和代码可以在 https://github.com/KugaMaxx/cuke-emlb 获取。 本文提出E-MLB事件相机去噪多级基准数据集及非参考评估指标ESR，解决现有数据集规模小、噪声多样性不足及评估指标依赖APS信息的问题。 Saizhe Ding,Jinze Chen,Yang Wang,Yu Kang,Weiguo Song,Jie Cheng,Yang Cao cs.CV

authors_text: Lukas Höllein,Ang Cao,Andrew Owens,Justin Johnson,Matthias Nießner
title: Text2Room: Extracting Textured 3D Meshes from 2D Text-to-Image Models
title_zh: Text2Room：从 2D 文本到图像模型中提取纹理 3D 网格
comment: Accepted to ICCV 2023 (Oral) video: https://youtu.be/fjRnFL91EZc project page: https://lukashoel.github.io/text-to-room/ code: https://github.com/lukasHoel/text2room
comments: Accepted to ICCV 2023 (Oral) video: https://youtu.be/fjRnFL91EZc project page: https://lukashoel.github.io/text-to-room/ code: https://github.com/lukasHoel/text2room
abstract: We present Text2Room, a method for generating room-scale textured 3D meshes from a given text prompt as input. To this end, we leverage pre-trained 2D text-to-image models to synthesize a sequence of images from different poses. In order to lift these outputs into a consistent 3D scene representation, we combine monocular depth estimation with a text-conditioned inpainting model. The core idea of our approach is a tailored viewpoint selection such that the content of each image can be fused into a seamless, textured 3D mesh. More specifically, we propose a continuous alignment strategy that iteratively fuses scene frames with the existing geometry to create a seamless mesh. Unlike existing works that focus on generating single objects or zoom-out trajectories from text, our method generates complete 3D scenes with multiple objects and explicit 3D geometry. We evaluate our approach using qualitative and quantitative metrics, demonstrating it as the first method to generate room-scale 3D geometry with compelling textures from only text as input.
summary: We present Text2Room, a method for generating room-scale textured 3D meshes from a given text prompt as input. To this end, we leverage pre-trained 2D text-to-image models to synthesize a sequence of images from different poses. In order to lift these outputs into a consistent 3D scene representation, we combine monocular depth estimation with a text-conditioned inpainting model. The core idea of our approach is a tailored viewpoint selection such that the content of each image can be fused into a seamless, textured 3D mesh. More specifically, we propose a continuous alignment strategy that iteratively fuses scene frames with the existing geometry to create a seamless mesh. Unlike existing works that focus on generating single objects or zoom-out trajectories from text, our method generates complete 3D scenes with multiple objects and explicit 3D geometry. We evaluate our approach using qualitative and quantitative metrics, demonstrating it as the first method to generate room-scale 3D geometry with compelling textures from only text as input.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Text2Room，一种根据给定文本提示作为输入生成房间尺度纹理 3D 网格的方法。为此，我们利用预先训练的 2D 文本到图像模型来合成不同姿势的图像序列。为了将这些输出提升为一致的 3D 场景表示，我们将单目深度估计与文本条件修复模型相结合。我们方法的核心思想是定制视点选择，以便每个图像的内容可以融合到无缝、有纹理的 3D 网格中。更具体地说，我们提出了一种连续对齐策略，该策略迭代地将场景帧与现有几何体融合以创建无缝网格。与专注于从文本生成单个对象或缩小轨迹的现有作品不同，我们的方法生成具有多个对象和显式 3D 几何形状的完整 3D 场景。我们使用定性和定量指标评估我们的方法，证明它是第一种仅通过文本作为输入生成具有引人注目的纹理的房间规模 3D 几何图形的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Text2Room方法，通过文本提示生成房间尺度的带纹理3D网格。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多聚焦于生成单个物体或缩放轨迹，缺乏对完整3D场景及多物体几何结构的生成能力。
AI.method: 利用预训练2D文图模型生成多视角图像，结合单目深度估计与文本条件修复模型，通过连续对齐策略迭代融合场景帧生成无缝网格。
AI.result: 首次实现仅通过文本输入生成具有说服力纹理的房间尺度3D几何结构，经定性定量评估验证效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法填补了文本到完整3D场景生成的空白，为多物体复杂几何重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yuebing Liang,Fangyi Ding,Guan Huang,Zhan Zhao
title: Deep trip generation with graph neural networks for bike sharing system expansion
title_zh: 使用图神经网络进行深度行程生成，用于自行车共享系统扩展
abstract: Bike sharing is emerging globally as an active, convenient, and sustainable mode of transportation. To plan successful bike-sharing systems (BSSs), many cities start from a small-scale pilot and gradually expand the system to cover more areas. For station-based BSSs, this means planning new stations based on existing ones over time, which requires prediction of the number of trips generated by these new stations across the whole system. Previous studies typically rely on relatively simple regression or machine learning models, which are limited in capturing complex spatial relationships. Despite the growing literature in deep learning methods for travel demand prediction, they are mostly developed for short-term prediction based on time series data, assuming no structural changes to the system. In this study, we focus on the trip generation problem for BSS expansion, and propose a graph neural network (GNN) approach to predicting the station-level demand based on multi-source urban built environment data. Specifically, it constructs multiple localized graphs centered on each target station and uses attention mechanisms to learn the correlation weights between stations. We further illustrate that the proposed approach can be regarded as a generalized spatial regression model, indicating the commonalities between spatial regression and GNNs. The model is evaluated based on realistic experiments using multi-year BSS data from New York City, and the results validate the superior performance of our approach compared to existing methods. We also demonstrate the interpretability of the model for uncovering the effects of built environment features and spatial interactions between stations, which can provide strategic guidance for BSS station location selection and capacity planning.
summary: Bike sharing is emerging globally as an active, convenient, and sustainable mode of transportation. To plan successful bike-sharing systems (BSSs), many cities start from a small-scale pilot and gradually expand the system to cover more areas. For station-based BSSs, this means planning new stations based on existing ones over time, which requires prediction of the number of trips generated by these new stations across the whole system. Previous studies typically rely on relatively simple regression or machine learning models, which are limited in capturing complex spatial relationships. Despite the growing literature in deep learning methods for travel demand prediction, they are mostly developed for short-term prediction based on time series data, assuming no structural changes to the system. In this study, we focus on the trip generation problem for BSS expansion, and propose a graph neural network (GNN) approach to predicting the station-level demand based on multi-source urban built environment data. Specifically, it constructs multiple localized graphs centered on each target station and uses attention mechanisms to learn the correlation weights between stations. We further illustrate that the proposed approach can be regarded as a generalized spatial regression model, indicating the commonalities between spatial regression and GNNs. The model is evaluated based on realistic experiments using multi-year BSS data from New York City, and the results validate the superior performance of our approach compared to existing methods. We also demonstrate the interpretability of the model for uncovering the effects of built environment features and spatial interactions between stations, which can provide strategic guidance for BSS station location selection and capacity planning.
abstract_zh: 共享单车作为一种积极、便捷、可持续的交通方式正在全球兴起。为了规划成功的自行车共享系统（BSS），许多城市从小规模试点开始，逐步扩大该系统以覆盖更多地区。对于基于站点的 BSS，这意味着随着时间的推移，在现有站点的基础上规划新站点，这需要预测这些新站点在整个系统中产生的行程数量。以前的研究通常依赖于相对简单的回归或机器学习模型，这些模型在捕获复杂的空间关系方面受到限制。尽管用于出行需求预测的深度学习方法的文献越来越多，但它们大多是为基于时间序列数据的短期预测而开发的，假设系统没有结构变化。在本研究中，我们关注BSS扩展的行程生成问题，并提出一种基于多源城市建成环境数据预测车站级需求的图神经网络（GNN）方法。具体来说，它构建以每个目标站为中心的多个局部图，并使用注意力机制来学习站之间的相关权重。我们进一步说明，所提出的方法可以被视为广义空间回归模型，表明空间回归和 GNN 之间的共性。该模型是根据使用纽约市多年 BSS 数据的实际实验进行评估的，结果验证了我们的方法与现有方法相比的优越性能。我们还展示了该模型的可解释性，以揭示建筑环境特征和站点之间空间相互作用的影响，这可以为 BSS 站点位置选择和容量规划提供战略指导。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法，用于预测共享单车系统扩展中新站点的出行需求，以优化站点选址和容量规划。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以捕捉复杂空间关系，且深度学习模型多用于短期预测，无法适应系统结构变化。需要更有效的模型支持共享单车系统的扩展规划。
AI.method: 构建以目标站点为中心的多源局部图，结合注意力机制学习站点间关联权重，并将模型视为广义空间回归模型。
AI.result: 基于纽约市多源数据的实验表明，该方法在预测性能上优于现有方法，且能解释建成环境特征与站点间空间交互的影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效支持共享单车系统扩展规划，为站点选址和容量配置提供战略指导。

For station-based BSSs, this means planning new stations based on existing ones over time, which requires prediction of the number of trips generated by these new stations across the whole system. Previous studies typically rely on relatively simple regression or machine learning models, which are limited in capturing complex spatial relationships. Despite the growing literature in deep learning methods for travel demand prediction, they are mostly developed for short-term prediction based on time series data, assuming no structural changes to the system. In this study, we focus on the trip generation problem for BSS expansion, and propose a graph neural network (GNN) approach to predicting the station-level demand based on multi-source urban built environment data. Specifically, it constructs multiple localized graphs centered on each target station and uses attention mechanisms to learn the correlation weights between stations. We further illustrate that the proposed approach can be regarded as a generalized spatial regression model, indicating the commonalities between spatial regression and GNNs. The model is evaluated based on realistic experiments using multi-year BSS data from New York City, and the results validate the superior performance of our approach compared to existing methods. We also demonstrate the interpretability of the model for uncovering the effects of built environment features and spatial interactions between stations, which can provide strategic guidance for BSS station location selection and capacity planning. 共享单车作为一种积极、便捷、可持续的交通方式正在全球兴起。为了规划成功的自行车共享系统（BSS），许多城市从小规模试点开始，逐步扩大该系统以覆盖更多地区。对于基于站点的 BSS，这意味着随着时间的推移，在现有站点的基础上规划新站点，这需要预测这些新站点在整个系统中产生的行程数量。以前的研究通常依赖于相对简单的回归或机器学习模型，这些模型在捕获复杂的空间关系方面受到限制。尽管用于出行需求预测的深度学习方法的文献越来越多，但它们大多是为基于时间序列数据的短期预测而开发的，假设系统没有结构变化。在本研究中，我们关注BSS扩展的行程生成问题，并提出一种基于多源城市建成环境数据预测车站级需求的图神经网络（GNN）方法。具体来说，它构建以每个目标站为中心的多个局部图，并使用注意力机制来学习站之间的相关权重。我们进一步说明，所提出的方法可以被视为广义空间回归模型，表明空间回归和 GNN 之间的共性。该模型是根据使用纽约市多年 BSS 数据的实际实验进行评估的，结果验证了我们的方法与现有方法相比的优越性能。我们还展示了该模型的可解释性，以揭示建筑环境特征和站点之间空间相互作用的影响，这可以为 BSS 站点位置选择和容量规划提供战略指导。 本文提出基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法，用于预测共享单车系统扩展中新站点的出行需求，以优化站点选址和容量规划。 Yuebing Liang,Fangyi Ding,Guan Huang,Zhan Zhao cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Nati Ofir,Yotam Ben Shoshan,Ran Badanes,Boris Sherman
title: Defect Detection Approaches Based on Simulated Reference Image
title_zh: 基于模拟参考图像的缺陷检测方法
abstract: This work is addressing the problem of defect anomaly detection based on a clean reference image. Specifically, we focus on SEM semiconductor defects in addition to several natural image anomalies. There are well-known methods to create a simulation of an artificial reference image by its defect specimen. In this work, we introduce several applications for this capability, that the simulated reference is beneficial for improving their results. Among these defect detection methods are classic computer vision applied on difference-image, supervised deep-learning (DL) based on human labels, and unsupervised DL which is trained on feature-level patterns of normal reference images. We show in this study how to incorporate correctly the simulated reference image for these defect and anomaly detection applications. As our experiment demonstrates, simulated reference achieves higher performance than the real reference of an image of a defect and anomaly. This advantage of simulated reference occurs mainly due to the less noise and geometric variations together with better alignment and registration to the original defect background.
summary: This work is addressing the problem of defect anomaly detection based on a clean reference image. Specifically, we focus on SEM semiconductor defects in addition to several natural image anomalies. There are well-known methods to create a simulation of an artificial reference image by its defect specimen. In this work, we introduce several applications for this capability, that the simulated reference is beneficial for improving their results. Among these defect detection methods are classic computer vision applied on difference-image, supervised deep-learning (DL) based on human labels, and unsupervised DL which is trained on feature-level patterns of normal reference images. We show in this study how to incorporate correctly the simulated reference image for these defect and anomaly detection applications. As our experiment demonstrates, simulated reference achieves higher performance than the real reference of an image of a defect and anomaly. This advantage of simulated reference occurs mainly due to the less noise and geometric variations together with better alignment and registration to the original defect background.
abstract_zh: 这项工作正在解决基于干净参考图像的缺陷异常检测问题。具体来说，除了几种自然图像异常之外，我们还关注 SEM 半导体缺陷。有众所周知的方法可以通过缺陷样本创建人工参考图像的模拟。在这项工作中，我们介绍了此功能的几种应用，模拟参考有利于改善其结果。这些缺陷检测方法包括应用于差异图像的经典计算机视觉、基于人类标签的监督深度学习 (DL) 以及根据正常参考图像的特征级模式进行训练的无监督深度学习。我们在本研究中展示了如何为这些缺陷和异常检测应用正确合并模拟参考图像。正如我们的实验所证明的，模拟参考比缺陷和异常图像的真实参考具有更高的性能。模拟参考的这种优势主要是由于噪声和几何变化较少，以及与原始缺陷背景更好的对齐和配准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于模拟参考图像的缺陷检测方法，用于改进半导体缺陷及自然图像异常检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 真实缺陷图像存在噪声和几何变形等问题，而模拟参考图像能提供更少噪声、更好对齐的缺陷背景，从而提升检测效果。
AI.method: 结合经典计算机视觉差分图像分析、基于人工标注的监督深度学习（DL）以及基于正常图像特征模式的无监督DL方法，整合模拟参考图像进行缺陷检测。
AI.result: 实验表明，模拟参考图像在缺陷检测任务中优于真实缺陷图像，主要得益于更低的噪声和更精确的对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: 模拟参考图像能有效提升缺陷检测性能，为相关应用提供更可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Colton Crum,Patrick Tinsley,Aidan Boyd,Jacob Piland,Christopher Sweet,Timothy Kelley,Kevin Bowyer,Adam Czajka
title: Explain To Me: Salience-Based Explainability for Synthetic Face Detection Models
title_zh: 向我解释一下：合成人脸检测模型基于显着性的可解释性
abstract: The performance of convolutional neural networks has continued to improve over the last decade. At the same time, as model complexity grows, it becomes increasingly more difficult to explain model decisions. Such explanations may be of critical importance for reliable operation of human-machine pairing setups, or for model selection when the "best" model among many equally-accurate models must be established. Saliency maps represent one popular way of explaining model decisions by highlighting image regions models deem important when making a prediction. However, examining salience maps at scale is not practical. In this paper, we propose five novel methods of leveraging model salience to explain a model behavior at scale. These methods ask: (a) what is the average entropy for a model's salience maps, (b) how does model salience change when fed out-of-set samples, (c) how closely does model salience follow geometrical transformations, (d) what is the stability of model salience across independent training runs, and (e) how does model salience react to salience-guided image degradations. To assess the proposed measures on a concrete and topical problem, we conducted a series of experiments for the task of synthetic face detection with two types of models: those trained traditionally with cross-entropy loss, and those guided by human salience when training to increase model generalizability. These two types of models are characterized by different, interpretable properties of their salience maps, which allows for the evaluation of the correctness of the proposed measures. We offer source codes for each measure along with this paper.
summary: The performance of convolutional neural networks has continued to improve over the last decade. At the same time, as model complexity grows, it becomes increasingly more difficult to explain model decisions. Such explanations may be of critical importance for reliable operation of human-machine pairing setups, or for model selection when the "best" model among many equally-accurate models must be established. Saliency maps represent one popular way of explaining model decisions by highlighting image regions models deem important when making a prediction. However, examining salience maps at scale is not practical. In this paper, we propose five novel methods of leveraging model salience to explain a model behavior at scale. These methods ask: (a) what is the average entropy for a model's salience maps, (b) how does model salience change when fed out-of-set samples, (c) how closely does model salience follow geometrical transformations, (d) what is the stability of model salience across independent training runs, and (e) how does model salience react to salience-guided image degradations. To assess the proposed measures on a concrete and topical problem, we conducted a series of experiments for the task of synthetic face detection with two types of models: those trained traditionally with cross-entropy loss, and those guided by human salience when training to increase model generalizability. These two types of models are characterized by different, interpretable properties of their salience maps, which allows for the evaluation of the correctness of the proposed measures. We offer source codes for each measure along with this paper.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络的性能在过去十年中不断提高。与此同时，随着模型复杂性的增加，解释模型决策变得越来越困难。这种解释对于人机配对设置的可靠运行，或者当必须在许多同样准确的模型中建立“最佳”模型时，对于模型选择可能至关重要。显着图是通过突出显示模型在进行预测时认为重要的图像区域来解释模型决策的一种流行方式。然而，大规模检查显着图是不切实际的。在本文中，我们提出了五种利用模型显着性来大规模解释模型行为的新颖方法。这些方法询问：（a）模型显着性图的平均熵是多少，（b）当输入集外样本时模型显着性如何变化，（c）模型显着性遵循几何变换的紧密程度如何，（d）独立训练运行中模型显着性的稳定性是什么，以及（e）模型显着性如何对显着性引导的图像退化做出反应。为了评估针对具体和热门问题所提出的措施，我们使用两种类型的模型进行了一系列合成人脸检测任务的实验：传统上使用交叉熵损失进行训练的模型，以及在训练时以人类显着性为指导以提高模型泛化性的模型。这两类模型的特点是其显着性图具有不同的、可解释的属性，这使得可以评估所提出的措施的正确性。我们随本文提供了每项措施的源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出五种基于显著性图的可解释性方法，用于大规模解释合成人脸检测模型的行为。
AI.motivation: 随着模型复杂度增加，解释卷积神经网络决策变得困难，而显著性图难以大规模分析，需开发有效评估方法。
AI.method: 设计五种衡量指标：显著性熵平均值、样本外显著性变化、几何变换一致性、训练稳定性及显著性引导的图像退化反应。
AI.result: 实验验证了两种模型（传统交叉熵训练与人类显著性引导）在显著性特性上的差异，证明方法可有效评估模型行为。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可解释性方法能区分模型类型并评估其泛化能力，为模型选择提供依据。

abstract: Planning for multi-robot teams in complex environments is a challenging problem, especially when these teams must coordinate to accomplish a common objective. In general, optimal solutions to these planning problems are computationally intractable, since the decision space grows exponentially with the number of robots. In this paper, we present a novel approach for multi-robot planning on topological graphs using mixed-integer programming. Central to our approach is the notion of a dynamic topological graph, where edge weights vary dynamically based on the locations of the robots in the graph. We construct this graph using the critical features of the planning problem and the relationships between robots; we then leverage mixed-integer programming to minimize a shared cost that depends on the paths of all robots through the graph. To improve computational tractability, we formulated our optimization problem with a fully convex relaxation and designed our decision space around eliminating the exponential dependence on the number of robots. We test our approach on a multi-robot reconnaissance scenario, where robots must coordinate to minimize detectability and maximize safety while gathering information. We demonstrate that our approach is able to scale to a series of representative scenarios and is capable of computing optimal coordinated strategic behaviors for autonomous multi-robot teams in seconds.
summary: Planning for multi-robot teams in complex environments is a challenging problem, especially when these teams must coordinate to accomplish a common objective. In general, optimal solutions to these planning problems are computationally intractable, since the decision space grows exponentially with the number of robots. In this paper, we present a novel approach for multi-robot planning on topological graphs using mixed-integer programming. Central to our approach is the notion of a dynamic topological graph, where edge weights vary dynamically based on the locations of the robots in the graph. We construct this graph using the critical features of the planning problem and the relationships between robots; we then leverage mixed-integer programming to minimize a shared cost that depends on the paths of all robots through the graph. To improve computational tractability, we formulated our optimization problem with a fully convex relaxation and designed our decision space around eliminating the exponential dependence on the number of robots. We test our approach on a multi-robot reconnaissance scenario, where robots must coordinate to minimize detectability and maximize safety while gathering information. We demonstrate that our approach is able to scale to a series of representative scenarios and is capable of computing optimal coordinated strategic behaviors for autonomous multi-robot teams in seconds.
abstract_zh: 在复杂环境中规划多机器人团队是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是当这些团队必须协调以实现共同目标时。一般来说，这些规划问题的最佳解决方案在计算上很难处理，因为决策空间随着机器人数量呈指数增长。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用混合整数编程在拓扑图上进行多机器人规划的新方法。我们方法的核心是动态拓扑图的概念，其中边权重根据图中机器人的位置动态变化。我们利用规划问题的关键特征和机器人之间的关系构建了这个图；然后，我们利用混合整数编程来最小化取决于所有机器人通过图表的路径的共享成本。为了提高计算的易处理性，我们用完全凸松弛来制定优化问题，并围绕消除对机器人数量的指数依赖来设计我们的决策空间。我们在多机器人侦察场景中测试我们的方法，其中机器人必须协调以最大限度地减少可检测性并在收集信息时最大限度地提高安全性。我们证明，我们的方法能够扩展到一系列代表性场景，并且能够在几秒钟内计算出自主多机器人团队的最佳协调战略行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合整数规划的多机器人动态拓扑图路径规划方法。
AI.motivation: 多机器人团队在复杂环境中进行协调任务时，最优解的计算复杂度极高，因此需要一种高效且可扩展的规划方法。
AI.method: 本文引入了动态拓扑图的概念，其中边权重根据机器人位置动态变化，并利用混合整数规划来最小化所有机器人路径的共享成本。
AI.result: 该方法在多机器人侦察场景中进行了测试，能够快速计算出最优的协调策略，并且在多个代表性场景中表现出良好的扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过凸松弛和决策空间设计，有效降低了计算复杂度，为多机器人系统的协调规划提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mark Abdelshiheed,John Wesley Hostetter,Preya Shabrina,Tiffany Barnes,Min Chi
title: The Power of Nudging: Exploring Three Interventions for Metacognitive Skills Instruction across Intelligent Tutoring Systems
title_zh: 助推的力量：探索智能辅导系统元认知技能教学的三种干预措施
abstract: Deductive domains are typical of many cognitive skills in that no single problem-solving strategy is always optimal for solving all problems. It was shown that students who know how and when to use each strategy (StrTime) outperformed those who know neither and stick to the default strategy (Default). In this work, students were trained on a logic tutor that supports a default forward-chaining and a backward-chaining (BC) strategy, then a probability tutor that only supports BC. We investigated three types of interventions on teaching the Default students how and when to use which strategy on the logic tutor: Example, Nudge and Presented. Meanwhile, StrTime students received no interventions. Overall, our results show that Nudge outperformed their Default peers and caught up with StrTime on both tutors.
summary: Deductive domains are typical of many cognitive skills in that no single problem-solving strategy is always optimal for solving all problems. It was shown that students who know how and when to use each strategy (StrTime) outperformed those who know neither and stick to the default strategy (Default). In this work, students were trained on a logic tutor that supports a default forward-chaining and a backward-chaining (BC) strategy, then a probability tutor that only supports BC. We investigated three types of interventions on teaching the Default students how and when to use which strategy on the logic tutor: Example, Nudge and Presented. Meanwhile, StrTime students received no interventions. Overall, our results show that Nudge outperformed their Default peers and caught up with StrTime on both tutors.
abstract_zh: 演绎领域是许多认知技能的典型特征，因为没有一种单一的问题解决策略总是能够解决所有问题的最佳策略。结果表明，知道如何以及何时使用每种策略 (StrTime) 的学生的表现优于那些既不知道又坚持使用默认策略 (Default) 的学生。在这项工作中，学生接受了支持默认前向链接和后向链接 (BC) 策略的逻辑导师的训练，然后是仅支持 BC 的概率导师的训练。我们研究了三种类型的干预措施，用于教授默认学生如何以及何时对逻辑导师使用哪种策略：示例、助推和呈现。与此同时，StrTime 的学生没有受到任何干预。总体而言，我们的结果表明，Nudge 的表现优于默认同行，并且在两位导师上都赶上了 StrTime。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了三种干预措施在智能导师系统中提升学生元认知策略选择能力的效果。
AI.motivation: 在需要多策略解决问题的领域中，学生缺乏策略选择能力会导致学习效率低下，而传统教学方法难以有效培养这种能力。
AI.method: 通过逻辑导师系统（支持正向推理和逆向推理）和概率导师系统（仅支持逆向推理），对采用默认策略的学生实施例证教学、助推干预和直接呈现三种干预措施，并与已掌握策略选择能力的学生进行对比。
AI.result: 助推干预组在两个系统中均显著优于默认策略组，且表现接近已掌握策略选择能力的对照组。
AI.conclusion: 助推干预能有效提升学生策略选择能力，在智能导师系统中具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Dongqing Wang,Tong Zhang,Sabine Süsstrunk
title: NEMTO: Neural Environment Matting for Novel View and Relighting Synthesis of Transparent Objects
title_zh: NEMTO：用于新颖视图的神经环境抠图和透明物体的重新照明合成
abstract: We propose NEMTO, the first end-to-end neural rendering pipeline to model 3D transparent objects with complex geometry and unknown indices of refraction. Commonly used appearance modeling such as the Disney BSDF model cannot accurately address this challenging problem due to the complex light paths bending through refractions and the strong dependency of surface appearance on illumination. With 2D images of the transparent object as input, our method is capable of high-quality novel view and relighting synthesis. We leverage implicit Signed Distance Functions (SDF) to model the object geometry and propose a refraction-aware ray bending network to model the effects of light refraction within the object. Our ray bending network is more tolerant to geometric inaccuracies than traditional physically-based methods for rendering transparent objects. We provide extensive evaluations on both synthetic and real-world datasets to demonstrate our high-quality synthesis and the applicability of our method.
summary: We propose NEMTO, the first end-to-end neural rendering pipeline to model 3D transparent objects with complex geometry and unknown indices of refraction. Commonly used appearance modeling such as the Disney BSDF model cannot accurately address this challenging problem due to the complex light paths bending through refractions and the strong dependency of surface appearance on illumination. With 2D images of the transparent object as input, our method is capable of high-quality novel view and relighting synthesis. We leverage implicit Signed Distance Functions (SDF) to model the object geometry and propose a refraction-aware ray bending network to model the effects of light refraction within the object. Our ray bending network is more tolerant to geometric inaccuracies than traditional physically-based methods for rendering transparent objects. We provide extensive evaluations on both synthetic and real-world datasets to demonstrate our high-quality synthesis and the applicability of our method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 NEMTO，这是第一个端到端神经渲染管道，用于对具有复杂几何形状和未知折射率的 3D 透明对象进行建模。由于通过折射弯曲的复杂光路以及表面外观对照明的强烈依赖性，常用的外观建模（例如 Disney BSDF 模型）无法准确解决这一具有挑战性的问题。以透明物体的 2D 图像作为输入，我们的方法能够实现高质量的新颖视图和重新照明合成。我们利用隐式有符号距离函数（SDF）来建模对象几何形状，并提出一种折射感知光线弯曲网络来建模对象内光折射的效果。与传统的基于物理的渲染透明对象的方法相比，我们的光线弯曲网络更能容忍几何误差。我们对合成数据集和现实数据集进行了广泛的评估，以证明我们的高质量合成和方法的适用性。

AI.tldr: 提出NEMTO方法，实现透明物体的高质量新视角与重新照明合成
AI.motivation: 传统模型无法准确处理透明物体的复杂折射与光照依赖问题，需更鲁棒的解决方案
AI.method: 结合隐式SDF几何建模与折射感知光线弯曲网络，提升几何误差容忍度
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证了方法的有效性，实现高质量合成
AI.conclusion: NEMTO有效解决了透明物体渲染难题，为相关应用提供新思路

search_text: NEMTO: Neural Environment Matting for Novel View and Relighting Synthesis of Transparent Objects NEMTO：用于新颖视图的神经环境抠图和透明物体的重新照明合成 We propose NEMTO, the first end-to-end neural rendering pipeline to model 3D transparent objects with complex geometry and unknown indices of refraction. Commonly used appearance modeling such as the Disney BSDF model cannot accurately address this challenging problem due to the complex light paths bending through refractions and the strong dependency of surface appearance on illumination. With 2D images of the transparent object as input, our method is capable of high-quality novel view and relighting synthesis. We leverage implicit Signed Distance Functions (SDF) to model the object geometry and propose a refraction-aware ray bending network to model the effects of light refraction within the object. Our ray bending network is more tolerant to geometric inaccuracies than traditional physically-based methods for rendering transparent objects. We provide extensive evaluations on both synthetic and real-world datasets to demonstrate our high-quality synthesis and the applicability of our method. 我们提出 NEMTO，这是第一个端到端神经渲染管道，用于对具有复杂几何形状和未知折射率的 3D 透明对象进行建模。由于通过折射弯曲的复杂光路以及表面外观对照明的强烈依赖性，常用的外观建模（例如 Disney BSDF 模型）无法准确解决这一具有挑战性的问题。以透明物体的 2D 图像作为输入，我们的方法能够实现高质量的新颖视图和重新照明合成。我们利用隐式有符号距离函数（SDF）来建模对象几何形状，并提出一种折射感知光线弯曲网络来建模对象内光折射的效果。与传统的基于物理的渲染透明对象的方法相比，我们的光线弯曲网络更能容忍几何误差。我们对合成数据集和现实数据集进行了广泛的评估，以证明我们的高质量合成和方法的适用性。 提出NEMTO方法，实现透明物体的高质量新视角与重新照明合成 Dongqing Wang,Tong Zhang,Sabine Süsstrunk cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Mark Abdelshiheed,Mehak Maniktala,Song Ju,Ayush Jain,Tiffany Barnes,Min Chi
title: Preparing Unprepared Students For Future Learning
title_zh: 让尚未做好准备的学生为未来的学习做好准备
abstract: Based on strategy-awareness (knowing which problem-solving strategy to use) and time-awareness (knowing when to use it), students are categorized into Rote (neither type of awareness), Dabbler (strategy-aware only) or Selective (both types of awareness). It was shown that Selective is often significantly more prepared for future learning than Rote and Dabbler (Abdelshiheed et al., 2020). In this work, we explore the impact of explicit strategy instruction on Rote and Dabbler students across two domains: logic and probability. During the logic instruction, our logic tutor handles both Forward-Chaining (FC) and Backward-Chaining (BC) strategies, with FC being the default; the Experimental condition is taught how to use BC via worked examples and when to use it via prompts. Six weeks later, all students are trained on a probability tutor that supports BC only. Our results show that Experimental significantly outperforms Control in both domains, and Experimental Rote catches up with Selective.
summary: Based on strategy-awareness (knowing which problem-solving strategy to use) and time-awareness (knowing when to use it), students are categorized into Rote (neither type of awareness), Dabbler (strategy-aware only) or Selective (both types of awareness). It was shown that Selective is often significantly more prepared for future learning than Rote and Dabbler (Abdelshiheed et al., 2020). In this work, we explore the impact of explicit strategy instruction on Rote and Dabbler students across two domains: logic and probability. During the logic instruction, our logic tutor handles both Forward-Chaining (FC) and Backward-Chaining (BC) strategies, with FC being the default; the Experimental condition is taught how to use BC via worked examples and when to use it via prompts. Six weeks later, all students are trained on a probability tutor that supports BC only. Our results show that Experimental significantly outperforms Control in both domains, and Experimental Rote catches up with Selective.
abstract_zh: 根据策略意识（知道使用哪种解决问题的策略）和时间意识（知道何时使用策略），学生被分为死记硬背（两种类型的意识）、涉猎型（仅策略意识）或选择性（两种类型的意识）。结果表明，选择性通常比死记硬背和 Dabbler 为未来的学习做好了更多准备（Abdelshiheed 等人，2020）。在这项工作中，我们探讨了显式策略教学对死记硬背和涉足学生的影响，涉及两个领域：逻辑和概率。在逻辑教学期间，我们的逻辑导师处理前向链接（FC）和后向链接（BC）策略，FC是默认策略；实验条件通过工作示例教授如何使用 BC 以及何时通过提示使用它。六周后，所有学生都接受了仅支持 BC 的概率导师的培训。我们的结果表明，实验性在两个领域都显着优于控制性，而实验性死记硬背则赶上了选择性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过显式策略教学帮助缺乏策略意识和时间意识的学生（Rote和Dabbler类型）提升未来学习能力的效果。
AI.motivation: 已有研究表明具备策略和时间意识的学生（Selective类型）在学习中表现更优，但如何帮助缺乏这些能力的学生（Rote和Dabbler）提升学习效果仍需探索。
AI.method: 在逻辑和概率两个领域进行实验：逻辑教学中通过示例和提示教授反向链（BC）策略，六周后在仅支持BC的概率教学中比较实验组（接受BC教学）与对照组（未接受BC教学）的表现。
AI.result: 实验组在两个领域均显著优于对照组，且原本为Rote类型的学生在实验后表现接近Selective类型。
AI.conclusion: 显式策略教学能有效提升Rote和Dabbler学生的学习准备度，使其未来学习表现接近具备双重意识的Selective学生。

authors_text: Xiang Chen,Hao Li,Mingqiang Li,Jinshan Pan
title: Learning A Sparse Transformer Network for Effective Image Deraining
title_zh: 学习稀疏变压器网络以实现有效的图像去雨
comment: Accepted as a highlight paper in CVPR 2023
comments: Accepted as a highlight paper in CVPR 2023
abstract: Transformers-based methods have achieved significant performance in image deraining as they can model the non-local information which is vital for high-quality image reconstruction. In this paper, we find that most existing Transformers usually use all similarities of the tokens from the query-key pairs for the feature aggregation. However, if the tokens from the query are different from those of the key, the self-attention values estimated from these tokens also involve in feature aggregation, which accordingly interferes with the clear image restoration. To overcome this problem, we propose an effective DeRaining network, Sparse Transformer (DRSformer) that can adaptively keep the most useful self-attention values for feature aggregation so that the aggregated features better facilitate high-quality image reconstruction. Specifically, we develop a learnable top-k selection operator to adaptively retain the most crucial attention scores from the keys for each query for better feature aggregation. Simultaneously, as the naive feed-forward network in Transformers does not model the multi-scale information that is important for latent clear image restoration, we develop an effective mixed-scale feed-forward network to generate better features for image deraining. To learn an enriched set of hybrid features, which combines local context from CNN operators, we equip our model with mixture of experts feature compensator to present a cooperation refinement deraining scheme. Extensive experimental results on the commonly used benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method achieves favorable performance against state-of-the-art approaches. The source code and trained models are available at https://github.com/cschenxiang/DRSformer.
summary: Transformers-based methods have achieved significant performance in image deraining as they can model the non-local information which is vital for high-quality image reconstruction. In this paper, we find that most existing Transformers usually use all similarities of the tokens from the query-key pairs for the feature aggregation. However, if the tokens from the query are different from those of the key, the self-attention values estimated from these tokens also involve in feature aggregation, which accordingly interferes with the clear image restoration. To overcome this problem, we propose an effective DeRaining network, Sparse Transformer (DRSformer) that can adaptively keep the most useful self-attention values for feature aggregation so that the aggregated features better facilitate high-quality image reconstruction. Specifically, we develop a learnable top-k selection operator to adaptively retain the most crucial attention scores from the keys for each query for better feature aggregation. Simultaneously, as the naive feed-forward network in Transformers does not model the multi-scale information that is important for latent clear image restoration, we develop an effective mixed-scale feed-forward network to generate better features for image deraining. To learn an enriched set of hybrid features, which combines local context from CNN operators, we equip our model with mixture of experts feature compensator to present a cooperation refinement deraining scheme. Extensive experimental results on the commonly used benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method achieves favorable performance against state-of-the-art approaches. The source code and trained models are available at https://github.com/cschenxiang/DRSformer.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的方法在图像去雨方面取得了显着的性能，因为它们可以对非局部信息进行建模，这对于高质量图像重建至关重要。在本文中，我们发现大多数现有的 Transformer 通常使用查询键对中标记的所有相似性来进行特征聚合。然而，如果查询中的标记与密钥的标记不同，则根据这些标记估计的自注意力值也会参与特征聚合，从而干扰清晰的图像恢复。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种有效的 DeRaining 网络——稀疏变换器（DRSformer），它可以自适应地保留最有用的自注意力值进行特征聚合，以便聚合的特征更好地促进高质量图像重建。具体来说，我们开发了一个可学习的 top-k 选择运算符，以自适应地保留每个查询的键中最关键的注意力分数，以实现更好的特征聚合。同时，由于 Transformers 中的朴素前馈网络并未对对于潜在清晰图像恢复很重要的多尺度信息进行建模，因此我们开发了一种有效的混合尺度前馈网络来生成更好的图像去雨特征。为了学习一组丰富的混合特征，这些特征结合了 CNN 操作员的本地上下文，我们为我们的模型配备了混合专家特征补偿器，以提出一种合作细化去雨方案。对常用基准的大量实验结果表明，所提出的方法相对于最先进的方法取得了良好的性能。源代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/cschenfang/DRSformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种稀疏Transformer网络（DRSformer），通过自适应选择关键注意力值和混合尺度特征提取，提升图像去雨效果。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer方法在图像去雨中因使用所有查询-键相似性导致冗余注意力干扰清晰图像恢复，需改进特征聚合方式。
AI.method: 设计可学习top-k选择算子保留关键注意力值，构建混合尺度前馈网络建模多尺度信息，并引入混合专家特征补偿器融合局部CNN特征。
AI.result: 在常用基准测试中优于现有SOTA方法，代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: DRSformer通过稀疏注意力机制与混合特征补偿有效提升了图像去雨质量，验证了方法的有效性与实用性。

To learn an enriched set of hybrid features, which combines local context from CNN operators, we equip our model with mixture of experts feature compensator to present a cooperation refinement deraining scheme. Extensive experimental results on the commonly used benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method achieves favorable performance against state-of-the-art approaches. The source code and trained models are available at https://github.com/cschenxiang/DRSformer. 基于 Transformer 的方法在图像去雨方面取得了显着的性能，因为它们可以对非局部信息进行建模，这对于高质量图像重建至关重要。在本文中，我们发现大多数现有的 Transformer 通常使用查询键对中标记的所有相似性来进行特征聚合。然而，如果查询中的标记与密钥的标记不同，则根据这些标记估计的自注意力值也会参与特征聚合，从而干扰清晰的图像恢复。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种有效的 DeRaining 网络——稀疏变换器（DRSformer），它可以自适应地保留最有用的自注意力值进行特征聚合，以便聚合的特征更好地促进高质量图像重建。具体来说，我们开发了一个可学习的 top-k 选择运算符，以自适应地保留每个查询的键中最关键的注意力分数，以实现更好的特征聚合。同时，由于 Transformers 中的朴素前馈网络并未对对于潜在清晰图像恢复很重要的多尺度信息进行建模，因此我们开发了一种有效的混合尺度前馈网络来生成更好的图像去雨特征。为了学习一组丰富的混合特征，这些特征结合了 CNN 操作员的本地上下文，我们为我们的模型配备了混合专家特征补偿器，以提出一种合作细化去雨方案。对常用基准的大量实验结果表明，所提出的方法相对于最先进的方法取得了良好的性能。源代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/cschenfang/DRSformer 获取。 本文提出一种稀疏Transformer网络（DRSformer），通过自适应选择关键注意力值和混合尺度特征提取，提升图像去雨效果。 Xiang Chen,Hao Li,Mingqiang Li,Jinshan Pan cs.CV

authors_text: Farshid Keivanian,Raymond Chiong,Zongwen Fan
title: A fuzzy adaptive evolutionary-based feature selection and machine learning framework for single and multi-objective body fat prediction
title_zh: 用于单目标和多目标体脂肪预测的基于模糊自适应进化的特征选择和机器学习框架
comment: Due to unforeseen challenges in coordination and supervision, including unavoidable delays, this study requires further review and refinement. To ensure it meets necessary academic and methodological standards, we have decided to withdraw the paper. We appreciate the understanding of the research community
comments: Due to unforeseen challenges in coordination and supervision, including unavoidable delays, this study requires further review and refinement. To ensure it meets necessary academic and methodological standards, we have decided to withdraw the paper. We appreciate the understanding of the research community
abstract: Predicting body fat can provide medical practitioners and users with essential information for preventing and diagnosing heart diseases. Hybrid machine learning models offer better performance than simple regression analysis methods by selecting relevant body measurements and capturing complex nonlinear relationships among selected features in modelling body fat prediction problems. There are, however, some disadvantages to them. Current machine learning. Modelling body fat prediction as a combinatorial single- and multi-objective optimisation problem often gets stuck in local optima. When multiple feature subsets produce similar or close predictions, avoiding local optima becomes more complex. Evolutionary feature selection has been used to solve several machine-learning-based optimisation problems. A fuzzy set theory determines appropriate levels of exploration and exploitation while managing parameterisation and computational costs. A weighted-sum body fat prediction approach was explored using evolutionary feature selection, fuzzy set theory, and machine learning algorithms, integrating contradictory metrics into a single composite goal optimised by fuzzy adaptive evolutionary feature selection. Hybrid fuzzy adaptive global learning local search universal diversity-based feature selection is applied to this single-objective feature selection-machine learning framework (FAGLSUD-based FS-ML). While using fewer features, this model achieved a more accurate and stable estimate of body fat percentage than other hybrid and state-of-the-art machine learning models. A multi-objective FAGLSUD-based FS-MLP is also proposed to analyse accuracy, stability, and dimensionality conflicts simultaneously. To make informed decisions about fat deposits in the most vital body parts and blood lipid levels, medical practitioners and users can use a well-distributed Pareto set of trade-off solutions.

Hybrid machine learning models offer better performance than simple regression analysis methods by selecting relevant body measurements and capturing complex nonlinear relationships among selected features in modelling body fat prediction problems. There are, however, some disadvantages to them. Current machine learning. Modelling body fat prediction as a combinatorial single- and multi-objective optimisation problem often gets stuck in local optima. When multiple feature subsets produce similar or close predictions, avoiding local optima becomes more complex. Evolutionary feature selection has been used to solve several machine-learning-based optimisation problems. A fuzzy set theory determines appropriate levels of exploration and exploitation while managing parameterisation and computational costs. A weighted-sum body fat prediction approach was explored using evolutionary feature selection, fuzzy set theory, and machine learning algorithms, integrating contradictory metrics into a single composite goal optimised by fuzzy adaptive evolutionary feature selection. Hybrid fuzzy adaptive global learning local search universal diversity-based feature selection is applied to this single-objective feature selection-machine learning framework (FAGLSUD-based FS-ML). While using fewer features, this model achieved a more accurate and stable estimate of body fat percentage than other hybrid and state-of-the-art machine learning models. A multi-objective FAGLSUD-based FS-MLP is also proposed to analyse accuracy, stability, and dimensionality conflicts simultaneously. To make informed decisions about fat deposits in the most vital body parts and blood lipid levels, medical practitioners and users can use a well-distributed Pareto set of trade-off solutions.
abstract_zh: 预测身体脂肪可以为医生和用户提供预防和诊断心脏病的重要信息。混合机器学习模型通过选择相关的身体测量值并在建模身体脂肪预测问题时捕获所选特征之间的复杂非线性关系，提供比简单回归分析方法更好的性能。然而，它们也有一些缺点。当前的机器学习。将身体脂肪预测建模为组合单目标和多目标优化问题经常陷入局部最优。当多个特征子集产生相似或接近的预测时，避免局部最优变得更加复杂。进化特征选择已被用来解决一些基于机器学习的优化问题。模糊集理论确定适当的探索和开发水平，同时管理参数化和计算成本。使用进化特征选择、模糊集理论和机器学习算法探索了加权和体脂肪预测方法，将矛盾的指标集成到通过模糊自适应进化特征选择优化的单个复合目标中。混合模糊自适应全局学习局部搜索通用基于多样性的特征选择被应用于该单目标特征选择机器学习框架（基于FAGLSUD的FS-ML）。虽然使用的特征较少，但该模型比其他混合和最先进的机器学习模型实现了更准确、更稳定的身体脂肪百分比估计。还提出了一种基于 FAGLSUD 的多目标 FS-MLP 来同时分析准确性、稳定性和维数冲突。为了对最重要的身体部位的脂肪沉积和血脂水平做出明智的决定，医生和用户可以使用一组分布良好的帕累托权衡解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合模糊自适应进化算法与机器学习的特征选择框架，用于单目标和多目标身体脂肪预测。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型在预测身体脂肪时易陷入局部最优，且难以平衡多目标（如准确性、稳定性、维度）的冲突，需改进特征选择与优化策略。
AI.method: 融合模糊集理论、进化特征选择与机器学习算法，构建FAGLSUD-based FS-ML单目标框架及多目标FS-MLP模型，通过权衡矛盾指标优化预测。
AI.result: 该模型在使用更少特征的情况下，较其他混合模型实现更准确稳定的体脂率预测，并提供多目标帕累托最优解集辅助医疗决策。
AI.conclusion: 框架有效解决了局部最优问题与多目标冲突，为体脂预测提供了兼顾精度与实用性的解决方案。

authors_text: Hongyan Ran,Caiyan Jia
title: Unsupervised Cross-Domain Rumor Detection with Contrastive Learning and Cross-Attention
title_zh: 利用对比学习和交叉注意力的无监督跨域谣言检测
abstract: Massive rumors usually appear along with breaking news or trending topics, seriously hindering the truth. Existing rumor detection methods are mostly focused on the same domain, and thus have poor performance in cross-domain scenarios due to domain shift. In this work, we propose an end-to-end instance-wise and prototype-wise contrastive learning model with a cross-attention mechanism for cross-domain rumor detection. The model not only performs cross-domain feature alignment but also enforces target samples to align with the corresponding prototypes of a given source domain. Since target labels in a target domain are unavailable, we use a clustering-based approach with carefully initialized centers by a batch of source domain samples to produce pseudo labels. Moreover, we use a cross-attention mechanism on a pair of source data and target data with the same labels to learn domain-invariant representations. Because the samples in a domain pair tend to express similar semantic patterns, especially on the people's attitudes (e.g., supporting or denying) towards the same category of rumors, the discrepancy between a pair of the source domain and target domain will be decreased. We conduct experiments on four groups of cross-domain datasets and show that our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Massive rumors usually appear along with breaking news or trending topics, seriously hindering the truth. Existing rumor detection methods are mostly focused on the same domain, and thus have poor performance in cross-domain scenarios due to domain shift. In this work, we propose an end-to-end instance-wise and prototype-wise contrastive learning model with a cross-attention mechanism for cross-domain rumor detection. The model not only performs cross-domain feature alignment but also enforces target samples to align with the corresponding prototypes of a given source domain. Since target labels in a target domain are unavailable, we use a clustering-based approach with carefully initialized centers by a batch of source domain samples to produce pseudo labels. Moreover, we use a cross-attention mechanism on a pair of source data and target data with the same labels to learn domain-invariant representations. Because the samples in a domain pair tend to express similar semantic patterns, especially on the people's attitudes (e.g., supporting or denying) towards the same category of rumors, the discrepancy between a pair of the source domain and target domain will be decreased. We conduct experiments on four groups of cross-domain datasets and show that our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 海量谣言通常与突发新闻或热门话题一起出现，严重阻碍真相。现有的谣言检测方法大多集中在同一领域，因此由于领域转移而在跨领域场景中性能较差。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种端到端实例和原型对比学习模型，具有用于跨域谣言检测的交叉注意机制。该模型不仅执行跨域特征对齐，还强制目标样本与给定源域的相应原型对齐。由于目标域中的目标标签不可用，我们使用基于聚类的方法，通过一批源域样本仔细初始化中心来生成伪标签。此外，我们在一对具有相同标签的源数据和目标数据上使用交叉注意机制来学习域不变表示。由于域对中的样本倾向于表达相似的语义模式，尤其是人们对同一类别谣言的态度（例如支持或否认），因此源域和目标域对之间的差异将会减少。我们对四组跨域数据集进行了实验，并表明我们提出的模型实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习和交叉注意力的无监督跨域谣言检测方法，解决领域偏移导致的跨域检测性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有谣言检测方法多局限于单一领域，在跨域场景中因领域偏移导致性能下降，且目标域标签缺失增加了跨域对齐难度。
AI.method: 设计端到端对比学习模型，结合实例级与原型级对齐机制，利用交叉注意力学习领域不变表示，并通过聚类生成伪标签实现无监督跨域对齐。
AI.result: 在四个跨域数据集上达到最先进性能，验证了模型在无监督跨域谣言检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过对比学习和交叉注意力有效缓解领域偏移，为无监督跨域谣言检测提供了新思路。

We conduct experiments on four groups of cross-domain datasets and show that our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance. 海量谣言通常与突发新闻或热门话题一起出现，严重阻碍真相。现有的谣言检测方法大多集中在同一领域，因此由于领域转移而在跨领域场景中性能较差。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种端到端实例和原型对比学习模型，具有用于跨域谣言检测的交叉注意机制。该模型不仅执行跨域特征对齐，还强制目标样本与给定源域的相应原型对齐。由于目标域中的目标标签不可用，我们使用基于聚类的方法，通过一批源域样本仔细初始化中心来生成伪标签。此外，我们在一对具有相同标签的源数据和目标数据上使用交叉注意机制来学习域不变表示。由于域对中的样本倾向于表达相似的语义模式，尤其是人们对同一类别谣言的态度（例如支持或否认），因此源域和目标域对之间的差异将会减少。我们对四组跨域数据集进行了实验，并表明我们提出的模型实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于对比学习和交叉注意力的无监督跨域谣言检测方法，解决领域偏移导致的跨域检测性能下降问题。 Hongyan Ran,Caiyan Jia cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Kevin Schmidt,Othalia Larue,Ray Kulhanek,Dylan Flaute,Razvan Veliche,Christian Manasseh,Nelson Dellis,Scott Clouse,Jared Culbertson,Steve Rogers
title: Representational Tenets for Memory Athletics
title_zh: 记忆运动的代表性原则
abstract: We describe the current state of world-class memory competitions, including the methods used to prepare for and compete in memory competitions, based on the subjective report of World Memory Championship Grandmaster and co-author Nelson Dellis. We then explore the reported experiences through the lens of the Simulated, Situated, and Structurally coherent Qualia (S3Q) theory of consciousness, in order to propose a set of experiments to help further understand the boundaries of expert memory performance.
summary: We describe the current state of world-class memory competitions, including the methods used to prepare for and compete in memory competitions, based on the subjective report of World Memory Championship Grandmaster and co-author Nelson Dellis. We then explore the reported experiences through the lens of the Simulated, Situated, and Structurally coherent Qualia (S3Q) theory of consciousness, in order to propose a set of experiments to help further understand the boundaries of expert memory performance.
abstract_zh: 我们根据世界记忆锦标赛特级大师和合著者尼尔森·戴利斯的主观报告，描述了世界级记忆比赛的现状，包括记忆比赛的准备和比赛方法。然后，我们通过模拟、情景和结构连贯的 Qualia (S3Q) 意识理论的视角来探索所报告的经验，以便提出一组实验来帮助进一步了解专家记忆表现的界限。

AI.tldr: 本文通过世界记忆冠军Nelson Dellis的主观报告，结合S3Q意识理论，探讨记忆竞赛的表征原则并设计实验以研究专家记忆表现的边界。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆竞赛训练方法缺乏系统性理论支撑，需通过意识理论框架解析记忆专家的认知机制，明确其能力边界。
AI.method: 基于主观经验报告，运用S3Q理论（模拟、情境化、结构化意识）对记忆竞赛方法进行理论分析，并提出验证性实验方案。
AI.result: 提出一套结合意识理论的实验框架，用于量化分析记忆专家的表征策略与认知边界。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论与实验结合，可深化对记忆竞赛认知机制的理解，为训练方法提供科学依据。

authors_text: Yu-Jhe Li,Tao Xu,Ji Hou,Bichen Wu,Xiaoliang Dai,Albert Pumarola,Peizhao Zhang,Peter Vajda,Kris Kitani
title: 3D-CLFusion: Fast Text-to-3D Rendering with Contrastive Latent Diffusion
title_zh: 3D-CLFusion：具有对比潜在扩散的快速文本到 3D 渲染
abstract: We tackle the task of text-to-3D creation with pre-trained latent-based NeRFs (NeRFs that generate 3D objects given input latent code). Recent works such as DreamFusion and Magic3D have shown great success in generating 3D content using NeRFs and text prompts, but the current approach of optimizing a NeRF for every text prompt is 1) extremely time-consuming and 2) often leads to low-resolution outputs. To address these challenges, we propose a novel method named 3D-CLFusion which leverages the pre-trained latent-based NeRFs and performs fast 3D content creation in less than a minute. In particular, we introduce a latent diffusion prior network for learning the w latent from the input CLIP text/image embeddings. This pipeline allows us to produce the w latent without further optimization during inference and the pre-trained NeRF is able to perform multi-view high-resolution 3D synthesis based on the latent. We note that the novelty of our model lies in that we introduce contrastive learning during training the diffusion prior which enables the generation of the valid view-invariant latent code. We demonstrate through experiments the effectiveness of our proposed view-invariant diffusion process for fast text-to-3D creation, e.g., 100 times faster than DreamFusion. We note that our model is able to serve as the role of a plug-and-play tool for text-to-3D with pre-trained NeRFs.
summary: We tackle the task of text-to-3D creation with pre-trained latent-based NeRFs (NeRFs that generate 3D objects given input latent code). Recent works such as DreamFusion and Magic3D have shown great success in generating 3D content using NeRFs and text prompts, but the current approach of optimizing a NeRF for every text prompt is 1) extremely time-consuming and 2) often leads to low-resolution outputs. To address these challenges, we propose a novel method named 3D-CLFusion which leverages the pre-trained latent-based NeRFs and performs fast 3D content creation in less than a minute. In particular, we introduce a latent diffusion prior network for learning the w latent from the input CLIP text/image embeddings. This pipeline allows us to produce the w latent without further optimization during inference and the pre-trained NeRF is able to perform multi-view high-resolution 3D synthesis based on the latent. We note that the novelty of our model lies in that we introduce contrastive learning during training the diffusion prior which enables the generation of the valid view-invariant latent code. We demonstrate through experiments the effectiveness of our proposed view-invariant diffusion process for fast text-to-3D creation, e.g., 100 times faster than DreamFusion. We note that our model is able to serve as the role of a plug-and-play tool for text-to-3D with pre-trained NeRFs.
abstract_zh: 我们使用预先训练的基于潜在的 NeRF（根据输入潜在代码生成 3D 对象的 NeRF）来解决文本到 3D 创建的任务。最近的作品（例如 DreamFusion 和 Magic3D）在使用 NeRF 和文本提示生成 3D 内容方面取得了巨大成功，但当前针对每个文本提示优化 NeRF 的方法是 1）极其耗时，2）通常会导致低分辨率输出。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为 3D-CLFusion 的新颖方法，该方法利用预先训练的基于潜在的 NeRF，并在不到一分钟的时间内执行快速 3D 内容创建。特别是，我们引入了一个潜在扩散先验网络，用于从输入的 CLIP 文本/图像嵌入中学习 w 潜在特征。该流程允许我们在推理过程中无需进一步优化即可生成 w 潜在变量，并且预训练的 NeRF 能够基于该潜在变量执行多视图高分辨率 3D 合成。我们注意到，我们模型的新颖之处在于，我们在训练扩散先验期间引入了对比学习，从而能够生成有效的视图不变潜在代码。我们通过实验证明了我们提出的视图不变扩散过程对于快速文本到 3D 创建的有效性，例如比 DreamFusion 快 100 倍。我们注意到，我们的模型能够充当带有预先训练的 NeRF 的文本转 3D 的即插即用工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出3D-CLFusion方法，通过预训练潜在NeRF和对比学习扩散先验网络，实现快速文本到3D生成。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到3D生成方法（如DreamFusion）存在训练耗时且输出分辨率低的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入对比学习的扩散先验网络，从CLIP文本/图像嵌入中学习潜在码w，结合预训练NeRF实现无需优化的快速多视角高分辨率合成。
AI.result: 生成速度较DreamFusion提升100倍，可输出高质量3D内容，作为预训练NeRF的即插即用工具。
AI.conclusion: 3D-CLFusion通过对比学习与预训练模型结合，有效解决了文本到3D生成的效率与质量矛盾，推动该领域发展。

Recent works such as DreamFusion and Magic3D have shown great success in generating 3D content using NeRFs and text prompts, but the current approach of optimizing a NeRF for every text prompt is 1) extremely time-consuming and 2) often leads to low-resolution outputs. To address these challenges, we propose a novel method named 3D-CLFusion which leverages the pre-trained latent-based NeRFs and performs fast 3D content creation in less than a minute. In particular, we introduce a latent diffusion prior network for learning the w latent from the input CLIP text/image embeddings. We note that the novelty of our model lies in that we introduce contrastive learning during training the diffusion prior which enables the generation of the valid view-invariant latent code. We demonstrate through experiments the effectiveness of our proposed view-invariant diffusion process for fast text-to-3D creation, e.g., 100 times faster than DreamFusion. We note that our model is able to serve as the role of a plug-and-play tool for text-to-3D with pre-trained NeRFs. 我们使用预先训练的基于潜在的 NeRF（根据输入潜在代码生成 3D 对象的 NeRF）来解决文本到 3D 创建的任务。最近的作品（例如 DreamFusion 和 Magic3D）在使用 NeRF 和文本提示生成 3D 内容方面取得了巨大成功，但当前针对每个文本提示优化 NeRF 的方法是 1）极其耗时，2）通常会导致低分辨率输出。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为 3D-CLFusion 的新颖方法，该方法利用预先训练的基于潜在的 NeRF，并在不到一分钟的时间内执行快速 3D 内容创建。特别是，我们引入了一个潜在扩散先验网络，用于从输入的 CLIP 文本/图像嵌入中学习 w 潜在特征。该流程允许我们在推理过程中无需进一步优化即可生成 w 潜在变量，并且预训练的 NeRF 能够基于该潜在变量执行多视图高分辨率 3D 合成。我们注意到，我们模型的新颖之处在于，我们在训练扩散先验期间引入了对比学习，从而能够生成有效的视图不变潜在代码。我们通过实验证明了我们提出的视图不变扩散过程对于快速文本到 3D 创建的有效性，例如比 DreamFusion 快 100 倍。我们注意到，我们的模型能够充当带有预先训练的 NeRF 的文本转 3D 的即插即用工具。 本文提出3D-CLFusion方法，通过预训练潜在NeRF和对比学习扩散先验网络，实现快速文本到3D生成。 Yu-Jhe Li,Tao Xu,Ji Hou,Bichen Wu,Xiaoliang Dai,Albert Pumarola,Peizhao Zhang,Peter Vajda,Kris Kitani cs.CV

authors_text: Evan Becker,Jingdong Gao,Ted Zadouri,Baharan Mirzasoleiman
title: High Probability Bounds for Stochastic Continuous Submodular Maximization
title_zh: 随机连续子模最大化的高概率界
comment: Proceedings of the 26th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2023
comments: Proceedings of the 26th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2023
abstract: We consider maximization of stochastic monotone continuous submodular functions (CSF) with a diminishing return property. Existing algorithms only guarantee the performance \textit{in expectation}, and do not bound the probability of getting a bad solution. This implies that for a particular run of the algorithms, the solution may be much worse than the provided guarantee in expectation. In this paper, we first empirically verify that this is indeed the case. Then, we provide the first \textit{high-probability} analysis of the existing methods for stochastic CSF maximization, namely PGA, boosted PGA, SCG, and SCG++. Finally, we provide an improved high-probability bound for SCG, under slightly stronger assumptions, with a better convergence rate than that of the expected solution. Through extensive experiments on non-concave quadratic programming (NQP) and optimal budget allocation, we confirm the validity of our bounds and show that even in the worst-case, PGA converges to $OPT/2$, and boosted PGA, SCG, SCG++ converge to $(1 - 1/e)OPT$, but at a slower rate than that of the expected solution.
summary: We consider maximization of stochastic monotone continuous submodular functions (CSF) with a diminishing return property. Existing algorithms only guarantee the performance \textit{in expectation}, and do not bound the probability of getting a bad solution. This implies that for a particular run of the algorithms, the solution may be much worse than the provided guarantee in expectation. In this paper, we first empirically verify that this is indeed the case. Then, we provide the first \textit{high-probability} analysis of the existing methods for stochastic CSF maximization, namely PGA, boosted PGA, SCG, and SCG++. Finally, we provide an improved high-probability bound for SCG, under slightly stronger assumptions, with a better convergence rate than that of the expected solution. Through extensive experiments on non-concave quadratic programming (NQP) and optimal budget allocation, we confirm the validity of our bounds and show that even in the worst-case, PGA converges to $OPT/2$, and boosted PGA, SCG, SCG++ converge to $(1 - 1/e)OPT$, but at a slower rate than that of the expected solution.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑具有递减收益性质的随机单调连续子模函数（CSF）的最大化。现有算法仅保证性能\textit{预期}，并且不限制获得不良解决方案的概率。这意味着对于算法的特定运行，解决方案可能比所提供的预期保证要差得多。在本文中，我们首先通过实证验证情况确实如此。然后，我们对现有的随机 CSF 最大化方法（即 PGA、boosted PGA、SCG 和 SCG++）进行了第一个 \textit{高概率} 分析。最后，我们在稍强的假设下为 SCG 提供了改进的高概率界限，其收敛速度比预期解更好。通过对非凹二次规划 (NQP) 和最优预算分配的大量实验，我们确认了边界的有效性，并表明即使在最坏的情况下，PGA 也收敛到 $OPT/2$，并且 boosted PGA、SCG、SCG++ 收敛到 $(1 - 1/e)OPT$，但速度比预期解要慢。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机单调连续子模函数（CSF）最大化问题，旨在提供现有算法的高概率性能保证。
AI.motivation: 现有算法仅提供期望性能保证，无法限制得到劣解的概率，导致实际运行中可能远低于预期性能，需填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 通过实验验证现有方法的缺陷，对PGA、boosted PGA、SCG、SCG++进行高概率分析，并在更强假设下改进SCG的收敛速率。
AI.result: 实验表明PGA收敛至OPT/2，boosted PGA、SCG、SCG++收敛至(1-1/e)OPT，但收敛速度慢于期望解。

search_text: High Probability Bounds for Stochastic Continuous Submodular Maximization 随机连续子模最大化的高概率界 We consider maximization of stochastic monotone continuous submodular functions (CSF) with a diminishing return property. Existing algorithms only guarantee the performance \textit{in expectation}, and do not bound the probability of getting a bad solution. This implies that for a particular run of the algorithms, the solution may be much worse than the provided guarantee in expectation. In this paper, we first empirically verify that this is indeed the case. Then, we provide the first \textit{high-probability} analysis of the existing methods for stochastic CSF maximization, namely PGA, boosted PGA, SCG, and SCG++. Finally, we provide an improved high-probability bound for SCG, under slightly stronger assumptions, with a better convergence rate than that of the expected solution. Through extensive experiments on non-concave quadratic programming (NQP) and optimal budget allocation, we confirm the validity of our bounds and show that even in the worst-case, PGA converges to $OPT/2$, and boosted PGA, SCG, SCG++ converge to $(1 - 1/e)OPT$, but at a slower rate than that of the expected solution. 我们考虑具有递减收益性质的随机单调连续子模函数（CSF）的最大化。现有算法仅保证性能\textit{预期}，并且不限制获得不良解决方案的概率。这意味着对于算法的特定运行，解决方案可能比所提供的预期保证要差得多。在本文中，我们首先通过实证验证情况确实如此。然后，我们对现有的随机 CSF 最大化方法（即 PGA、boosted PGA、SCG 和 SCG++）进行了第一个 \textit{高概率} 分析。最后，我们在稍强的假设下为 SCG 提供了改进的高概率界限，其收敛速度比预期解更好。通过对非凹二次规划 (NQP) 和最优预算分配的大量实验，我们确认了边界的有效性，并表明即使在最坏的情况下，PGA 也收敛到 $OPT/2$，并且 boosted PGA、SCG、SCG++ 收敛到 $(1 - 1/e)OPT$，但速度比预期解要慢。 本文研究了随机单调连续子模函数（CSF）最大化问题，旨在提供现有算法的高概率性能保证。 Evan Becker,Jingdong Gao,Ted Zadouri,Baharan Mirzasoleiman cs.DS,cs.LG,math.OC

authors_text: Bouthaina Slika,Fadi Dornaika,Hamid Merdji,Karim Hammoudi
title: Vision Transformer-based Model for Severity Quantification of Lung Pneumonia Using Chest X-ray Images
title_zh: 基于 Vision Transformer 的模型使用胸部 X 射线图像对肺部肺炎的严重程度进行量化
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: To develop generic and reliable approaches for diagnosing and assessing the severity of COVID-19 from chest X-rays (CXR), a large number of well-maintained COVID-19 datasets are needed. Existing severity quantification architectures require expensive training calculations to achieve the best results. For healthcare professionals to quickly and automatically identify COVID-19 patients and predict associated severity indicators, computer utilities are needed. In this work, we propose a Vision Transformer (ViT)-based neural network model that relies on a small number of trainable parameters to quantify the severity of COVID-19 and other lung diseases. We present a feasible approach to quantify the severity of CXR, called Vision Transformer Regressor Infection Prediction (ViTReg-IP), derived from a ViT and a regression head. We investigate the generalization potential of our model using a variety of additional test chest radiograph datasets from different open sources. In this context, we performed a comparative study with several competing deep learning analysis methods. The experimental results show that our model can provide peak performance in quantifying severity with high generalizability at a relatively low computational cost. The source codes used in our work are publicly available at https://github.com/bouthainas/ViTReg-IP.
summary: To develop generic and reliable approaches for diagnosing and assessing the severity of COVID-19 from chest X-rays (CXR), a large number of well-maintained COVID-19 datasets are needed. Existing severity quantification architectures require expensive training calculations to achieve the best results. For healthcare professionals to quickly and automatically identify COVID-19 patients and predict associated severity indicators, computer utilities are needed. In this work, we propose a Vision Transformer (ViT)-based neural network model that relies on a small number of trainable parameters to quantify the severity of COVID-19 and other lung diseases. We present a feasible approach to quantify the severity of CXR, called Vision Transformer Regressor Infection Prediction (ViTReg-IP), derived from a ViT and a regression head. We investigate the generalization potential of our model using a variety of additional test chest radiograph datasets from different open sources. In this context, we performed a comparative study with several competing deep learning analysis methods. The experimental results show that our model can provide peak performance in quantifying severity with high generalizability at a relatively low computational cost. The source codes used in our work are publicly available at https://github.com/bouthainas/ViTReg-IP.
abstract_zh: 为了开发通过胸部 X 光 (CXR) 诊断和评估 COVID-19 严重程度的通用且可靠的方法，需要大量维护良好的 COVID-19 数据集。现有的严重性量化架构需要昂贵的训练计算才能获得最佳结果。为了让医疗保健专业人员快速、自动识别 COVID-19 患者并预测相关的严重程度指标，需要计算机实用程序。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的神经网络模型，该模型依赖少量可训练参数来量化 COVID-19 和其他肺部疾病的严重程度。我们提出了一种量化 CXR 严重程度的可行方法，称为视觉变换回归器感染预测 (ViTReg-IP)，源自 ViT 和回归头。我们使用来自不同开源的各种附加测试胸部放射线照片数据集来研究我们模型的泛化潜力。在这种背景下，我们与几种相互竞争的深度学习分析方法进行了比较研究。实验结果表明，我们的模型可以以相对较低的计算成本在量化严重性方面提供最佳性能，并具有较高的通用性。我们工作中使用的源代码可在 https://github.com/bouthainas/ViTReg-IP 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer（ViT）的神经网络模型，用于通过胸部X光图像量化COVID-19及其他肺部疾病严重程度。
AI.motivation: 现有严重程度量化方法计算成本高且需大量标注数据，亟需一种高效、通用的模型以辅助临床快速诊断与评估。
AI.method: 设计名为ViTReg-IP的模型，结合ViT架构与回归头，利用少量可训练参数实现严重程度量化，并在多源公开胸部X光数据集上验证泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在保持高泛化性的同时，以较低计算成本实现严重程度量化任务的峰值性能。
AI.conclusion: ViTReg-IP为临床提供了一种高效可靠的肺部疾病严重程度评估工具，开源代码可促进后续研究与应用。

authors_text: Trenton Bricken,Xander Davies,Deepak Singh,Dmitry Krotov,Gabriel Kreiman
title: Sparse Distributed Memory is a Continual Learner
title_zh: 稀疏分布式内存是一个持续学习者
abstract: Continual learning is a problem for artificial neural networks that their biological counterparts are adept at solving. Building on work using Sparse Distributed Memory (SDM) to connect a core neural circuit with the powerful Transformer model, we create a modified Multi-Layered Perceptron (MLP) that is a strong continual learner. We find that every component of our MLP variant translated from biology is necessary for continual learning. Our solution is also free from any memory replay or task information, and introduces novel methods to train sparse networks that may be broadly applicable.
summary: Continual learning is a problem for artificial neural networks that their biological counterparts are adept at solving. Building on work using Sparse Distributed Memory (SDM) to connect a core neural circuit with the powerful Transformer model, we create a modified Multi-Layered Perceptron (MLP) that is a strong continual learner. We find that every component of our MLP variant translated from biology is necessary for continual learning. Our solution is also free from any memory replay or task information, and introduces novel methods to train sparse networks that may be broadly applicable.
abstract_zh: 持续学习是人工神经网络面临的一个问题，而生物神经网络则擅长解决这一问题。基于使用稀疏分布式内存 (SDM) 将核心神经电路与强大的 Transformer 模型连接起来的工作，我们创建了一个经过修改的多层感知器 (MLP)，它是一个强大的持续学习器。我们发现从生物学翻译而来的 MLP 变体的每个组成部分对于持续学习都是必要的。我们的解决方案也不受任何内存重放或任务信息的影响，并引入了新的方法来训练可能广泛适用的稀疏网络。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于生物原理的改进型多层感知机（MLP），通过结合稀疏分布式存储（SDM）与Transformer模型，实现无需记忆回放的持续学习。
AI.motivation: 人工神经网络在持续学习任务中表现不佳，而生物神经网络具有天然的持续学习能力，需探索生物机制与深度学习的结合以解决此问题。
AI.method: 基于SDM与Transformer的连接机制，构建改进MLP，通过生物启发的组件设计实现持续学习，并提出无需任务信息或记忆回放的训练方法。
AI.result: 验证了改进MLP中所有生物翻译组件对持续学习的必要性，且新方法在训练稀疏网络方面具有潜在广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过生物机制启发的改进MLP有效解决了持续学习问题，为稀疏网络训练提供了新思路，可能推动相关领域应用。

Our solution is also free from any memory replay or task information, and introduces novel methods to train sparse networks that may be broadly applicable. 持续学习是人工神经网络面临的一个问题，而生物神经网络则擅长解决这一问题。基于使用稀疏分布式内存 (SDM) 将核心神经电路与强大的 Transformer 模型连接起来的工作，我们创建了一个经过修改的多层感知器 (MLP)，它是一个强大的持续学习器。我们发现从生物学翻译而来的 MLP 变体的每个组成部分对于持续学习都是必要的。我们的解决方案也不受任何内存重放或任务信息的影响，并引入了新的方法来训练可能广泛适用的稀疏网络。 本文设计了一种基于生物原理的改进型多层感知机（MLP），通过结合稀疏分布式存储（SDM）与Transformer模型，实现无需记忆回放的持续学习。 Trenton Bricken,Xander Davies,Deepak Singh,Dmitry Krotov,Gabriel Kreiman cs.NE,cond-mat.dis-nn,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Sukrut Rao,Moritz Böhle,Amin Parchami-Araghi,Bernt Schiele
title: Studying How to Efficiently and Effectively Guide Models with Explanations
title_zh: 研究如何通过解释高效且有效地指导模型
comment: 41 pages, 38 figures, 4 tables, IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2023
comments: 41 pages, 38 figures, 4 tables, IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2023
abstract: Despite being highly performant, deep neural networks might base their decisions on features that spuriously correlate with the provided labels, thus hurting generalization. To mitigate this, 'model guidance' has recently gained popularity, i.e. the idea of regularizing the models' explanations to ensure that they are "right for the right reasons". While various techniques to achieve such model guidance have been proposed, experimental validation of these approaches has thus far been limited to relatively simple and / or synthetic datasets. To better understand the effectiveness of the various design choices that have been explored in the context of model guidance, in this work we conduct an in-depth evaluation across various loss functions, attribution methods, models, and 'guidance depths' on the PASCAL VOC 2007 and MS COCO 2014 datasets. As annotation costs for model guidance can limit its applicability, we also place a particular focus on efficiency. Specifically, we guide the models via bounding box annotations, which are much cheaper to obtain than the commonly used segmentation masks, and evaluate the robustness of model guidance under limited (e.g. with only 1% of annotated images) or overly coarse annotations. Further, we propose using the EPG score as an additional evaluation metric and loss function ('Energy loss'). We show that optimizing for the Energy loss leads to models that exhibit a distinct focus on object-specific features, despite only using bounding box annotations that also include background regions. Lastly, we show that such model guidance can improve generalization under distribution shifts. Code available at: https://github.com/sukrutrao/Model-Guidance.

To mitigate this, 'model guidance' has recently gained popularity, i.e. the idea of regularizing the models' explanations to ensure that they are "right for the right reasons". While various techniques to achieve such model guidance have been proposed, experimental validation of these approaches has thus far been limited to relatively simple and / or synthetic datasets. To better understand the effectiveness of the various design choices that have been explored in the context of model guidance, in this work we conduct an in-depth evaluation across various loss functions, attribution methods, models, and 'guidance depths' on the PASCAL VOC 2007 and MS COCO 2014 datasets. As annotation costs for model guidance can limit its applicability, we also place a particular focus on efficiency. Specifically, we guide the models via bounding box annotations, which are much cheaper to obtain than the commonly used segmentation masks, and evaluate the robustness of model guidance under limited (e.g. with only 1% of annotated images) or overly coarse annotations. Further, we propose using the EPG score as an additional evaluation metric and loss function ('Energy loss'). We show that optimizing for the Energy loss leads to models that exhibit a distinct focus on object-specific features, despite only using bounding box annotations that also include background regions. Lastly, we show that such model guidance can improve generalization under distribution shifts. Code available at: https://github.com/sukrutrao/Model-Guidance.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络性能很高，但其决策可能会基于与所提供的标签虚假相关的特征，从而损害泛化能力。为了缓解这种情况，“模型指导”最近变得流行，即规范模型解释以确保它们“因正确的原因而正确”的想法。虽然已经提出了实现这种模型指导的各种技术，但这些方法的实验验证迄今为止仅限于相对简单和/或合成的数据集。为了更好地理解在模型指导背景下探索的各种设计选择的有效性，在这项工作中，我们对 PASCAL VOC 2007 和 MS COCO 2014 数据集上的各种损失函数、归因方法、模型和“指导深度”进行了深入评估。由于模型指导的注释成本可能会限制其适用性，因此我们还特别关注效率。具体来说，我们通过边界框注释来指导模型，这比常用的分割掩模更便宜，并评估模型指导在有限（例如只有 1% 的注释图像）或过于粗糙的注释下的鲁棒性。此外，我们建议使用 EPG 分数作为附加评估指标和损失函数（“能量损失”）。我们表明，尽管仅使用也包括背景区域的边界框注释，但针对能量损失进行优化会导致模型表现出对特定于对象的特征的明显关注。最后，我们表明这种模型指导可以提高分布变化下的泛化能力。代码位于：https://github.com/sukrutrao/Model-Guidance。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过模型解释高效指导深度神经网络，以提升其泛化能力并降低标注成本。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络可能依赖于与标签偶然相关的特征，现有模型指导方法多在简单数据集验证，且标注成本高，需更高效方案。
AI.method: 在PASCAL VOC 2007和MS COCO 2014数据集上评估多种损失函数、归因方法及指导深度，采用边界框标注替代分割掩码，并提出EPG分数与能量损失作为新指标。
AI.result: 能量损失优化使模型聚焦于目标特征，边界框标注下模型泛化能力提升，且在标注有限或粗糙时仍具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 模型指导能有效提升泛化能力，尤其在真实场景中，能量损失与边界框标注结合为高效方案提供了可行路径。
