authors_text: Goffredo Giordano,Saravana Prashanth Murali Babu,Barbara Mazzolai
title: Soft robotics towards sustainable development goals and climate actions
title_zh: 软机器人实现可持续发展目标和气候行动
abstract: Soft robotics technology can aid in achieving United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) and the Paris Climate Agreement through development of autonomous, environmentally responsible machines powered by renewable energy. By utilizing soft robotics, we can mitigate the detrimental effects of climate change on human society and the natural world through fostering adaptation, restoration, and remediation. Moreover, the implementation of soft robotics can lead to groundbreaking discoveries in material science, biology, control systems, energy efficiency, and sustainable manufacturing processes. However, to achieve these goals, we need further improvements in understanding biological principles at the basis of embodied and physical intelligence, environment-friendly materials, and energy-saving strategies to design and manufacture self-piloting and field-ready soft robots. This paper provides insights on how soft robotics can address the pressing issue of environmental sustainability. Sustainable manufacturing of soft robots at a large scale, exploring the potential of biodegradable and bioinspired materials, and integrating onboard renewable energy sources to promote autonomy and intelligence are some of the urgent challenges of this field that we discuss in this paper. Specifically, we will present field-ready soft robots that address targeted productive applications in urban farming, healthcare, land and ocean preservation, disaster remediation, and clean and affordable energy, thus supporting some of the SDGs. By embracing soft robotics as a solution, we can concretely support economic growth and sustainable industry, drive solutions for environment protection and clean energy, and improve overall health and well-being.

However, to achieve these goals, we need further improvements in understanding biological principles at the basis of embodied and physical intelligence, environment-friendly materials, and energy-saving strategies to design and manufacture self-piloting and field-ready soft robots. By embracing soft robotics as a solution, we can concretely support economic growth and sustainable industry, drive solutions for environment protection and clean energy, and improve overall health and well-being.
abstract_zh: 软机器人技术可以通过开发由可再生能源驱动的自主、对环境负责的机器，帮助实现联合国可持续发展目标 (SDG) 和巴黎气候协议。通过利用软机器人技术，我们可以通过促进适应、恢复和补救来减轻气候变化对人类社会和自然世界的不利影响。此外，软机器人技术的实施可以在材料科学、生物学、控制系统、能源效率和可持续制造工艺方面带来突破性的发现。然而，为了实现这些目标，我们需要进一步加深对基于实体智能、物理智能、环保材料和节能策略的生物学原理的理解，以设计和制造自动驾驶和现场准备的软机器人。本文提供了有关软机器人如何解决环境可持续性这一紧迫问题的见解。大规模可持续制造软机器人、探索可生物降解和仿生材料的潜力以及集成机载可再生能源以促进自主性和智能化是我们在本文中讨论的该领域的一些紧迫挑战。具体来说，我们将展示可现场使用的软机器人，解决城市农业、医疗保健、土地和海洋保护、灾难修复以及清洁和负担得起的能源等领域的有针对性的生产应用，从而支持一些可持续发展目标。通过采用软体机器人作为解决方案，我们可以切实支持经济增长和可持续工业，推动环境保护和清洁能源解决方案，并改善整体健康和福祉。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨软体机器人技术如何助力实现联合国可持续发展目标和气候行动，通过开发自主、环保的可再生能源驱动机器，应对气候变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 气候变化和环境退化威胁人类社会与自然，需通过技术创新推动可持续发展，软体机器人具备适应性和环保潜力，可成为解决方案。
AI.method: 分析软体机器人技术在材料科学、控制系统及可持续制造领域的进展，识别生物启发原理、环保材料及节能策略等关键挑战，并提出面向实际应用的解决方案。
AI.result: 提出可大规模制造的软体机器人方案，利用可降解材料与可再生能源，应用于农业、医疗、生态修复等领域，支持多个可持续发展目标。
AI.conclusion: 软体机器人技术若突破现有瓶颈，可有效促进经济可持续发展、环境保护及人类福祉，需跨学科合作推动其规模化应用。

Sustainable manufacturing of soft robots at a large scale, exploring the potential of biodegradable and bioinspired materials, and integrating onboard renewable energy sources to promote autonomy and intelligence are some of the urgent challenges of this field that we discuss in this paper. Specifically, we will present field-ready soft robots that address targeted productive applications in urban farming, healthcare, land and ocean preservation, disaster remediation, and clean and affordable energy, thus supporting some of the SDGs. By embracing soft robotics as a solution, we can concretely support economic growth and sustainable industry, drive solutions for environment protection and clean energy, and improve overall health and well-being. 软机器人技术可以通过开发由可再生能源驱动的自主、对环境负责的机器，帮助实现联合国可持续发展目标 (SDG) 和巴黎气候协议。通过利用软机器人技术，我们可以通过促进适应、恢复和补救来减轻气候变化对人类社会和自然世界的不利影响。此外，软机器人技术的实施可以在材料科学、生物学、控制系统、能源效率和可持续制造工艺方面带来突破性的发现。然而，为了实现这些目标，我们需要进一步加深对基于实体智能、物理智能、环保材料和节能策略的生物学原理的理解，以设计和制造自动驾驶和现场准备的软机器人。本文提供了有关软机器人如何解决环境可持续性这一紧迫问题的见解。大规模可持续制造软机器人、探索可生物降解和仿生材料的潜力以及集成机载可再生能源以促进自主性和智能化是我们在本文中讨论的该领域的一些紧迫挑战。具体来说，我们将展示可现场使用的软机器人，解决城市农业、医疗保健、土地和海洋保护、灾难修复以及清洁和负担得起的能源等领域的有针对性的生产应用，从而支持一些可持续发展目标。通过采用软体机器人作为解决方案，我们可以切实支持经济增长和可持续工业，推动环境保护和清洁能源解决方案，并改善整体健康和福祉。 本文探讨软体机器人技术如何助力实现联合国可持续发展目标和气候行动，通过开发自主、环保的可再生能源驱动机器，应对气候变化带来的挑战。 Goffredo Giordano,Saravana Prashanth Murali Babu,Barbara Mazzolai cs.RO,physics.app-ph

authors_text: Shihao Wang,Yingfei Liu,Tiancai Wang,Ying Li,Xiangyu Zhang
title: Exploring Object-Centric Temporal Modeling for Efficient Multi-View 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 探索以对象为中心的时间建模以实现高效的多视图 3D 对象检测
abstract: In this paper, we propose a long-sequence modeling framework, named StreamPETR, for multi-view 3D object detection. Built upon the sparse query design in the PETR series, we systematically develop an object-centric temporal mechanism. The model is performed in an online manner and the long-term historical information is propagated through object queries frame by frame. Besides, we introduce a motion-aware layer normalization to model the movement of the objects. StreamPETR achieves significant performance improvements only with negligible computation cost, compared to the single-frame baseline. On the standard nuScenes benchmark, it is the first online multi-view method that achieves comparable performance (67.6% NDS & 65.3% AMOTA) with lidar-based methods. The lightweight version realizes 45.0% mAP and 31.7 FPS, outperforming the state-of-the-art method (SOLOFusion) by 2.3% mAP and 1.8x faster FPS. Code has been available at https://github.com/exiawsh/StreamPETR.git.
summary: In this paper, we propose a long-sequence modeling framework, named StreamPETR, for multi-view 3D object detection. Built upon the sparse query design in the PETR series, we systematically develop an object-centric temporal mechanism. The model is performed in an online manner and the long-term historical information is propagated through object queries frame by frame. Besides, we introduce a motion-aware layer normalization to model the movement of the objects. StreamPETR achieves significant performance improvements only with negligible computation cost, compared to the single-frame baseline. On the standard nuScenes benchmark, it is the first online multi-view method that achieves comparable performance (67.6% NDS & 65.3% AMOTA) with lidar-based methods. The lightweight version realizes 45.0% mAP and 31.7 FPS, outperforming the state-of-the-art method (SOLOFusion) by 2.3% mAP and 1.8x faster FPS. Code has been available at https://github.com/exiawsh/StreamPETR.git.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 StreamPETR 的长序列建模框架，用于多视图 3D 对象检测。基于PETR系列中的稀疏查询设计，我们系统地开发了一种以对象为中心的时间机制。模型以在线方式执行，长期历史信息通过对象查询逐帧传播。此外，我们引入了运动感知层归一化来模拟对象的运动。与单帧基线相比，StreamPETR 仅以可忽略的计算成本实现了显着的性能改进。在标准 nuScenes 基准测试中，它是第一个与基于激光雷达的方法实现可比性能（67.6% NDS 和 65.3% AMOTA）的在线多视图方法。轻量级版本实现了 45.0% mAP 和 31.7 FPS，比最先进的方法 (SOLOFusion) 提高了 2.3% mAP 和 1.8 倍更快的 FPS。代码已在 https://github.com/exiawsh/StreamPETR.git 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为StreamPETR的长序列建模框架，用于高效的多视角3D目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有单帧方法在多视角3D目标检测中存在性能瓶颈，需通过引入时间信息建模提升效果并保持计算效率。
AI.method: 基于PETR系列的稀疏查询设计，开发以物体为中心的时间机制，通过物体查询逐帧传播历史信息，并引入运动感知的层归一化模块。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，StreamPETR达到67.6% NDS和65.3% AMOTA，轻量版实现45.0% mAP和31.7 FPS，优于SOLOFusion方法。
AI.conclusion: StreamPETR通过在线处理和运动感知机制，在保持低计算成本的同时显著提升多视角3D检测性能。

authors_text: Hancheng Ye,Bo Zhang,Tao Chen,Jiayuan Fan,Bin Wang
title: Performance-aware Approximation of Global Channel Pruning for Multitask CNNs
title_zh: 多任务 CNN 全局通道修剪的性能感知近似
comment: Accepted for publication in T-PAMI, our code is available at http://www.github.com/HankYe/PAGCP.git
comments: Accepted for publication in T-PAMI, our code is available at http://www.github.com/HankYe/PAGCP.git
abstract: Global channel pruning (GCP) aims to remove a subset of channels (filters) across different layers from a deep model without hurting the performance. Previous works focus on either single task model pruning or simply adapting it to multitask scenario, and still face the following problems when handling multitask pruning: 1) Due to the task mismatch, a well-pruned backbone for classification task focuses on preserving filters that can extract category-sensitive information, causing filters that may be useful for other tasks to be pruned during the backbone pruning stage; 2) For multitask predictions, different filters within or between layers are more closely related and interacted than that for single task prediction, making multitask pruning more difficult. Therefore, aiming at multitask model compression, we propose a Performance-Aware Global Channel Pruning (PAGCP) framework. We first theoretically present the objective for achieving superior GCP, by considering the joint saliency of filters from intra- and inter-layers. Then a sequentially greedy pruning strategy is proposed to optimize the objective, where a performance-aware oracle criterion is developed to evaluate sensitivity of filters to each task and preserve the globally most task-related filters. Experiments on several multitask datasets show that the proposed PAGCP can reduce the FLOPs and parameters by over 60% with minor performance drop, and achieves 1.2x$\sim$3.3x acceleration on both cloud and mobile platforms.
summary: Global channel pruning (GCP) aims to remove a subset of channels (filters) across different layers from a deep model without hurting the performance. Previous works focus on either single task model pruning or simply adapting it to multitask scenario, and still face the following problems when handling multitask pruning: 1) Due to the task mismatch, a well-pruned backbone for classification task focuses on preserving filters that can extract category-sensitive information, causing filters that may be useful for other tasks to be pruned during the backbone pruning stage; 2) For multitask predictions, different filters within or between layers are more closely related and interacted than that for single task prediction, making multitask pruning more difficult. Therefore, aiming at multitask model compression, we propose a Performance-Aware Global Channel Pruning (PAGCP) framework. We first theoretically present the objective for achieving superior GCP, by considering the joint saliency of filters from intra- and inter-layers. Then a sequentially greedy pruning strategy is proposed to optimize the objective, where a performance-aware oracle criterion is developed to evaluate sensitivity of filters to each task and preserve the globally most task-related filters. Experiments on several multitask datasets show that the proposed PAGCP can reduce the FLOPs and parameters by over 60% with minor performance drop, and achieves 1.2x$\sim$3.3x acceleration on both cloud and mobile platforms.
abstract_zh: 全局通道修剪（GCP）旨在从深度模型中删除跨不同层的通道（过滤器）子集，而不损害性能。以前的工作要么关注单任务模型剪枝，要么简单地使其适应多任务场景，在处理多任务剪枝时仍然面临以下问题：1）由于任务不匹配，经过良好剪枝的分类任务主干侧重于保留可以提取类别敏感信息的过滤器，导致可能对其他任务有用的过滤器在主干剪枝阶段被剪枝； 2）对于多任务预测，层内或层间的不同过滤器比单任务预测更紧密地相关和交互，使得多任务剪枝更加困难。因此，针对多任务模型压缩，我们提出了性能感知全局通道修剪（PAGCP）框架。我们首先通过考虑层内和层间滤波器的联合显着性，从理论上提出实现卓越 GCP 的目标。然后提出了顺序贪婪修剪策略来优化目标，其中开发了性能感知的预言机标准来评估过滤器对每个任务的敏感性并保留全局最与任务相关的过滤器。在多个多任务数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 PAGCP 可以将 FLOP 和参数减少 60% 以上，并且性能下降较小，并在云和移动平台上实现 1.2x$\sim$3.3x 的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向多任务CNN的性能感知全局通道剪枝框架（PAGCP），旨在解决多任务场景下通道剪枝时的任务冲突与滤波器关联性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多任务剪枝中存在任务不匹配导致的有用滤波器误删问题，且多任务预测中滤波器的层内/层间关联性使剪枝难度增加。
AI.method: 通过理论推导建立联合显著性目标函数，提出序列贪心剪枝策略，并设计性能感知的Oracle准则评估滤波器对各任务的敏感性以保留全局关键滤波器。
AI.result: 在多个多任务数据集上实现超过60%的FLOPs和参数量减少，仅造成轻微性能下降，在云平台和移动平台分别实现1.2x~3.3x的加速。
AI.conclusion: PAGCP通过联合优化多任务滤波器显著性，有效解决了多任务CNN剪枝中的性能保持与加速需求矛盾。

authors_text: Dingkang Yang,Zhaoyu Chen,Yuzheng Wang,Shunli Wang,Mingcheng Li,Siao Liu,Xiao Zhao,Shuai Huang,Zhiyan Dong,Peng Zhai,Lihua Zhang
title: Context De-confounded Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 情境去混杂情绪识别
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. CCIM is available at https://github.com/ydk122024/CCIM
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. CCIM is available at https://github.com/ydk122024/CCIM
abstract: Context-Aware Emotion Recognition (CAER) is a crucial and challenging task that aims to perceive the emotional states of the target person with contextual information. Recent approaches invariably focus on designing sophisticated architectures or mechanisms to extract seemingly meaningful representations from subjects and contexts. However, a long-overlooked issue is that a context bias in existing datasets leads to a significantly unbalanced distribution of emotional states among different context scenarios. Concretely, the harmful bias is a confounder that misleads existing models to learn spurious correlations based on conventional likelihood estimation, significantly limiting the models' performance. To tackle the issue, this paper provides a causality-based perspective to disentangle the models from the impact of such bias, and formulate the causalities among variables in the CAER task via a tailored causal graph. Then, we propose a Contextual Causal Intervention Module (CCIM) based on the backdoor adjustment to de-confound the confounder and exploit the true causal effect for model training. CCIM is plug-in and model-agnostic, which improves diverse state-of-the-art approaches by considerable margins. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our CCIM and the significance of causal insight.

abstract_zh: 情境感知情绪识别（CAER）是一项至关重要且具有挑战性的任务，旨在通过情境信息感知目标人的情绪状态。最近的方法总是侧重于设计复杂的架构或机制，以从主题和上下文中提取看似有意义的表示。然而，一个长期被忽视的问题是，现有数据集中的上下文偏差导致不同上下文场景之间情绪状态的分布显着不平衡。具体来说，有害偏差是一种混杂因素，它会误导现有模型基于传统似然估计来学习虚假相关性，从而显着限制模型的性能。为了解决这个问题，本文提供了一种基于因果关系的视角，使模型免受此类偏差的影响，并通过定制的因果图制定 CAER 任务中变量之间的因果关系。然后，我们提出了一种基于后门调整的上下文因果干预模块（CCIM），以消除混杂因素并利用真正的因果效应进行模型训练。 CCIM 是插件且与模型无关，它极大地改进了各种最先进的方法。对三个基准数据集的大量实验证明了我们的 CCIM 的有效性以及因果洞察的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因果推理的上下文去混淆方法，用于改进情境感知情绪识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有情绪识别模型因数据集中的上下文偏差导致情感状态分布不平衡，从而学习到虚假相关性，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 通过构建定制化因果图，提出基于后门调整的上下文因果干预模块（CCIM），消除混淆因素并挖掘真实因果效应。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，CCIM显著提升了多种先进方法的性能，验证了因果视角的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 因果推理能有效解决上下文偏差问题，为情境感知情绪识别提供了新的理论视角和实用模块。

authors_text: Minal Suresh Patil,Kary Främling
title: Do intermediate feature coalitions aid explainability of black-box models?
title_zh: 中间特征联盟是否有助于黑盒模型的可解释性？
comment: 14 pages,The 1st World Conference on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence, 2023
comments: 14 pages,The 1st World Conference on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence, 2023
abstract: This work introduces the notion of intermediate concepts based on levels structure to aid explainability for black-box models. The levels structure is a hierarchical structure in which each level corresponds to features of a dataset (i.e., a player-set partition). The level of coarseness increases from the trivial set, which only comprises singletons, to the set, which only contains the grand coalition. In addition, it is possible to establish meronomies, i.e., part-whole relationships, via a domain expert that can be utilised to generate explanations at an abstract level. We illustrate the usability of this approach in a real-world car model example and the Titanic dataset, where intermediate concepts aid in explainability at different levels of abstraction.
summary: This work introduces the notion of intermediate concepts based on levels structure to aid explainability for black-box models. The levels structure is a hierarchical structure in which each level corresponds to features of a dataset (i.e., a player-set partition). The level of coarseness increases from the trivial set, which only comprises singletons, to the set, which only contains the grand coalition. In addition, it is possible to establish meronomies, i.e., part-whole relationships, via a domain expert that can be utilised to generate explanations at an abstract level. We illustrate the usability of this approach in a real-world car model example and the Titanic dataset, where intermediate concepts aid in explainability at different levels of abstraction.
abstract_zh: 这项工作引入了基于层次结构的中间概念的概念，以帮助黑盒模型的可解释性。级别结构是一种分层结构，其中每个级别对应于数据集的特征（即，玩家集分区）。粗糙程度从仅包含单例的平凡集合增加到仅包含大联盟的集合。此外，还可以通过领域专家建立部分-整体关系，该领域专家可用于生成抽象级别的解释。我们在现实世界的汽车模型示例和泰坦尼克数据集中说明了这种方法的可用性，其中中间概念有助于不同抽象级别的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于层次结构的中间概念，以增强黑箱模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在不同抽象层次上解释黑箱模型存在不足，需结构化方法结合领域知识提升解释效果。
AI.method: 构建层次结构划分特征，并利用领域专家定义部分-整体关系，生成多层级解释。
AI.result: 实验显示中间概念在不同抽象层次上有效提升解释性。
AI.conclusion: 中间概念结合层次结构与领域知识能有效提升黑箱模型的可解释性，提供多层次解释。

authors_text: Kaixun Jiang,Zhaoyu Chen,Hao Huang,Jiafeng Wang,Dingkang Yang,Bo Li,Yan Wang,Wenqiang Zhang
title: Efficient Decision-based Black-box Patch Attacks on Video Recognition
title_zh: 针对视频识别的高效基于决策的黑盒补丁攻击
abstract: Although Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have demonstrated excellent performance, they are vulnerable to adversarial patches that introduce perceptible and localized perturbations to the input. Generating adversarial patches on images has received much attention, while adversarial patches on videos have not been well investigated. Further, decision-based attacks, where attackers only access the predicted hard labels by querying threat models, have not been well explored on video models either, even if they are practical in real-world video recognition scenes. The absence of such studies leads to a huge gap in the robustness assessment for video models. To bridge this gap, this work first explores decision-based patch attacks on video models. We analyze that the huge parameter space brought by videos and the minimal information returned by decision-based models both greatly increase the attack difficulty and query burden. To achieve a query-efficient attack, we propose a spatial-temporal differential evolution (STDE) framework. First, STDE introduces target videos as patch textures and only adds patches on keyframes that are adaptively selected by temporal difference. Second, STDE takes minimizing the patch area as the optimization objective and adopts spatialtemporal mutation and crossover to search for the global optimum without falling into the local optimum. Experiments show STDE has demonstrated state-of-the-art performance in terms of threat, efficiency and imperceptibility. Hence, STDE has the potential to be a powerful tool for evaluating the robustness of video recognition models.
summary: Although Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have demonstrated excellent performance, they are vulnerable to adversarial patches that introduce perceptible and localized perturbations to the input. Generating adversarial patches on images has received much attention, while adversarial patches on videos have not been well investigated. Further, decision-based attacks, where attackers only access the predicted hard labels by querying threat models, have not been well explored on video models either, even if they are practical in real-world video recognition scenes. The absence of such studies leads to a huge gap in the robustness assessment for video models. To bridge this gap, this work first explores decision-based patch attacks on video models. We analyze that the huge parameter space brought by videos and the minimal information returned by decision-based models both greatly increase the attack difficulty and query burden. To achieve a query-efficient attack, we propose a spatial-temporal differential evolution (STDE) framework. First, STDE introduces target videos as patch textures and only adds patches on keyframes that are adaptively selected by temporal difference. Second, STDE takes minimizing the patch area as the optimization objective and adopts spatialtemporal mutation and crossover to search for the global optimum without falling into the local optimum. Experiments show STDE has demonstrated state-of-the-art performance in terms of threat, efficiency and imperceptibility. Hence, STDE has the potential to be a powerful tool for evaluating the robustness of video recognition models.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）表现出了出色的性能，但它们很容易受到对抗性补丁的影响，这些补丁会给输入带来可感知的局部扰动。在图像上生成对抗性补丁受到了广泛关注，而视频上的对抗性补丁尚未得到很好的研究。此外，基于决策的攻击（攻击者仅通过查询威胁模型来访问预测的硬标签）在视频模型上也没有得到很好的探索，即使它们在现实世界的视频识别场景中很实用。缺乏此类研究导致视频模型的稳健性评估存在巨大差距。为了弥补这一差距，这项工作首先探讨了对视频模型的基于决策的补丁攻击。我们分析，视频带来的巨大参数空间和基于决策的模型返回的极少信息都大大增加了攻击难度和查询负担。为了实现高效的查询攻击，我们提出了时空差分进化（STDE）框架。首先，STDE 将目标视频引入为补丁纹理，并且仅在通过时间差异自适应选择的关键帧上添加补丁。其次，STDE以最小化斑块面积为优化目标，采用时空变异和交叉来搜索全局最优，而不陷入局部最优。实验表明，STDE 在威胁、效率和不可察觉性方面表现出了最先进的性能。因此，STDE 有潜力成为评估视频识别模型鲁棒性的强大工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的基于决策的黑盒补丁攻击方法STDE，用于针对视频识别模型的对抗攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对视频模型的对抗补丁攻击和基于决策的攻击方法探索不足，导致视频模型鲁棒性评估存在重大缺口。
AI.method: 提出时空差分进化（STDE）框架，通过目标视频生成补丁纹理并选择关键帧添加，结合时空变异与交叉优化算法最小化补丁面积以提升攻击效率。
AI.result: STDE在攻击威胁性、效率和不可感知性指标上均达到当前最优水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: STDE为评估视频识别模型鲁棒性提供了有效的工具，凸显了视频模型在对抗攻击下的脆弱性。

method: 提出时空差分进化（STDE）框架，通过目标视频生成补丁纹理并选择关键帧添加，结合时空变异与交叉优化算法最小化补丁面积以提升攻击效率。
result: STDE在攻击威胁性、效率和不可感知性指标上均达到当前最优水平（SOTA）。
conclusion: STDE为评估视频识别模型鲁棒性提供了有效的工具，凸显了视频模型在对抗攻击下的脆弱性。
search_text: Efficient Decision-based Black-box Patch Attacks on Video Recognition 针对视频识别的高效基于决策的黑盒补丁攻击 Although Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have demonstrated excellent performance, they are vulnerable to adversarial patches that introduce perceptible and localized perturbations to the input. Generating adversarial patches on images has received much attention, while adversarial patches on videos have not been well investigated. Further, decision-based attacks, where attackers only access the predicted hard labels by querying threat models, have not been well explored on video models either, even if they are practical in real-world video recognition scenes. The absence of such studies leads to a huge gap in the robustness assessment for video models. To bridge this gap, this work first explores decision-based patch attacks on video models. We analyze that the huge parameter space brought by videos and the minimal information returned by decision-based models both greatly increase the attack difficulty and query burden. To achieve a query-efficient attack, we propose a spatial-temporal differential evolution (STDE) framework. First, STDE introduces target videos as patch textures and only adds patches on keyframes that are adaptively selected by temporal difference. Second, STDE takes minimizing the patch area as the optimization objective and adopts spatialtemporal mutation and crossover to search for the global optimum without falling into the local optimum. Experiments show STDE has demonstrated state-of-the-art performance in terms of threat, efficiency and imperceptibility. Hence, STDE has the potential to be a powerful tool for evaluating the robustness of video recognition models. 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）表现出了出色的性能，但它们很容易受到对抗性补丁的影响，这些补丁会给输入带来可感知的局部扰动。在图像上生成对抗性补丁受到了广泛关注，而视频上的对抗性补丁尚未得到很好的研究。此外，基于决策的攻击（攻击者仅通过查询威胁模型来访问预测的硬标签）在视频模型上也没有得到很好的探索，即使它们在现实世界的视频识别场景中很实用。缺乏此类研究导致视频模型的稳健性评估存在巨大差距。为了弥补这一差距，这项工作首先探讨了对视频模型的基于决策的补丁攻击。我们分析，视频带来的巨大参数空间和基于决策的模型返回的极少信息都大大增加了攻击难度和查询负担。为了实现高效的查询攻击，我们提出了时空差分进化（STDE）框架。首先，STDE 将目标视频引入为补丁纹理，并且仅在通过时间差异自适应选择的关键帧上添加补丁。其次，STDE以最小化斑块面积为优化目标，采用时空变异和交叉来搜索全局最优，而不陷入局部最优。实验表明，STDE 在威胁、效率和不可察觉性方面表现出了最先进的性能。因此，STDE 有潜力成为评估视频识别模型鲁棒性的强大工具。 本文提出一种高效的基于决策的黑盒补丁攻击方法STDE，用于针对视频识别模型的对抗攻击。 Kaixun Jiang,Zhaoyu Chen,Hao Huang,Jiafeng Wang,Dingkang Yang,Bo Li,Yan Wang,Wenqiang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Geonmo Gu,Sanghyuk Chun,Wonjae Kim,HeeJae Jun,Yoohoon Kang,Sangdoo Yun
title: CompoDiff: Versatile Composed Image Retrieval With Latent Diffusion
title_zh: CompoDiff：具有潜在扩散的多功能组合图像检索
comment: TMLR camera-ready; First two authors contributed equally; TMLR Expert Certification; 30 pages, 5.9MB
comments: TMLR camera-ready; First two authors contributed equally; TMLR Expert Certification; 30 pages, 5.9MB
abstract: This paper proposes a novel diffusion-based model, CompoDiff, for solving zero-shot Composed Image Retrieval (ZS-CIR) with latent diffusion. This paper also introduces a new synthetic dataset, named SynthTriplets18M, with 18.8 million reference images, conditions, and corresponding target image triplets to train CIR models. CompoDiff and SynthTriplets18M tackle the shortages of the previous CIR approaches, such as poor generalizability due to the small dataset scale and the limited types of conditions. CompoDiff not only achieves a new state-of-the-art on four ZS-CIR benchmarks, including FashionIQ, CIRR, CIRCO, and GeneCIS, but also enables a more versatile and controllable CIR by accepting various conditions, such as negative text, and image mask conditions. CompoDiff also shows the controllability of the condition strength between text and image queries and the trade-off between inference speed and performance, which are unavailable with existing CIR methods. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/navervision/CompoDiff
summary: This paper proposes a novel diffusion-based model, CompoDiff, for solving zero-shot Composed Image Retrieval (ZS-CIR) with latent diffusion. This paper also introduces a new synthetic dataset, named SynthTriplets18M, with 18.8 million reference images, conditions, and corresponding target image triplets to train CIR models. CompoDiff and SynthTriplets18M tackle the shortages of the previous CIR approaches, such as poor generalizability due to the small dataset scale and the limited types of conditions. CompoDiff not only achieves a new state-of-the-art on four ZS-CIR benchmarks, including FashionIQ, CIRR, CIRCO, and GeneCIS, but also enables a more versatile and controllable CIR by accepting various conditions, such as negative text, and image mask conditions. CompoDiff also shows the controllability of the condition strength between text and image queries and the trade-off between inference speed and performance, which are unavailable with existing CIR methods. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/navervision/CompoDiff
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于扩散的模型 CompoDiff，用于解决具有潜在扩散的零样本合成图像检索（ZS-CIR）。本文还介绍了一个名为 SynthTriplets18M 的新合成数据集，其中包含 1880 万张参考图像、条件和相应的目标图像三元组，用于训练 CIR 模型。 CompoDiff 和 SynthTriplets18M 解决了以前 CIR 方法的不足，例如由于数据集规模小和条件类型有限而导致通用性差。 CompoDiff 不仅在四个 ZS-CIR 基准测试（包括 FashionIQ、CIRR、CIRCO 和 GeneCIS）上达到了新的最先进水平，而且还通过接受各种条件（例如负文本和图像掩模条件）实现了更加通用和可控的 CIR。 CompoDiff 还展示了文本和图像查询之间条件强度的可控性以及推理速度和性能之间的权衡，这是现有 CIR 方法所不具备的。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/navervision/CompoDiff 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩散模型的CompoDiff方法及SynthTriplets18M数据集，解决零样本组合图像检索（ZS-CIR）问题，提升模型泛化能力和条件控制多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有CIR方法因数据集规模小、条件类型有限导致泛化能力不足，且缺乏对条件强度控制和推理速度-性能权衡的支持。
AI.method: 设计融合潜在扩散的CompoDiff模型，结合文本、图像掩码及负样本等多条件输入，并构建包含1880万三元组的合成数据集SynthTriplets18M进行训练。
AI.result: 在FashionIQ、CIRR等四个ZS-CIR基准测试中达到新SOTA，支持条件强度调节及推理速度与性能的平衡控制。
AI.conclusion: CompoDiff通过创新模型架构与大规模合成数据集，显著提升了CIR任务的泛化性、可控性和实用性。

authors_text: Anirban Sarkar,Matthew Groth,Ian Mason,Tomotake Sasaki,Xavier Boix
title: Deephys: Deep Electrophysiology, Debugging Neural Networks under Distribution Shifts
title_zh: Deephys：深度电生理学，调试分布变化下的神经网络
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) often fail in out-of-distribution scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a tool to visualize and understand such failures. We draw inspiration from concepts from neural electrophysiology, which are based on inspecting the internal functioning of a neural networks by analyzing the feature tuning and invariances of individual units. Deep Electrophysiology, in short Deephys, provides insights of the DNN's failures in out-of-distribution scenarios by comparative visualization of the neural activity in in-distribution and out-of-distribution datasets. Deephys provides seamless analyses of individual neurons, individual images, and a set of set of images from a category, and it is capable of revealing failures due to the presence of spurious features and novel features. We substantiate the validity of the qualitative visualizations of Deephys thorough quantitative analyses using convolutional and transformers architectures, in several datasets and distribution shifts (namely, colored MNIST, CIFAR-10 and ImageNet).
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) often fail in out-of-distribution scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a tool to visualize and understand such failures. We draw inspiration from concepts from neural electrophysiology, which are based on inspecting the internal functioning of a neural networks by analyzing the feature tuning and invariances of individual units. Deep Electrophysiology, in short Deephys, provides insights of the DNN's failures in out-of-distribution scenarios by comparative visualization of the neural activity in in-distribution and out-of-distribution datasets. Deephys provides seamless analyses of individual neurons, individual images, and a set of set of images from a category, and it is capable of revealing failures due to the presence of spurious features and novel features. We substantiate the validity of the qualitative visualizations of Deephys thorough quantitative analyses using convolutional and transformers architectures, in several datasets and distribution shifts (namely, colored MNIST, CIFAR-10 and ImageNet).
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在分布外场景中经常失败。在本文中，我们介绍了一种工具来可视化和理解此类故障。我们从神经电生理学的概念中汲取灵感，这些概念基于通过分析各个单元的特征调整和不变性来检查神经网络的内部功能。深度电生理学（简称 Deephys）通过对分布内和分布外数据集中的神经活动进行比较可视化，提供了 DNN 在分布外场景中失败的见解。 Deephys 提供对单个神经元、单个图像以及同一类别中的一组图像的无缝分析，并且能够揭示由于虚假特征和新颖特征的存在而导致的失败。我们在多个数据集和分布变化（即彩色 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet）中使用卷积和 Transformer 架构进行彻底定量分析，证实了 Deephys 定性可视化的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepPhys工具，通过可视化和分析深度神经网络在分布偏移场景下的内部活动，揭示其失败原因。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在分布外数据场景中常出现性能下降，但缺乏有效的分析工具来理解其失败机制。
AI.method: 受神经电生理学启发，通过比较分布内与分布外数据的神经活动特征，分析单个神经元、图像及类别级特征，识别虚假特征与新特征的影响。
AI.result: 在多个数据集（如MNIST、CIFAR-10、ImageNet）及不同网络架构（卷积神经网络、Transformer）上验证了DeepPhys的定量有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeepPhys能够有效揭示分布偏移导致的模型失效原因，为提升模型鲁棒性提供可视化分析支持。

authors_text: Zhifeng Teng,Jiaming Zhang,Kailun Yang,Kunyu Peng,Hao Shi,Simon Reiß,Ke Cao,Rainer Stiefelhagen
title: 360BEV: Panoramic Semantic Mapping for Indoor Bird's-Eye View
title_zh: 360BEV：室内鸟瞰全景语义映射
comment: Code and datasets are available at the project page: https://jamycheung.github.io/360BEV.html. Accepted to WACV 2024
comments: Code and datasets are available at the project page: https://jamycheung.github.io/360BEV.html. Accepted to WACV 2024
abstract: Seeing only a tiny part of the whole is not knowing the full circumstance. Bird's-eye-view (BEV) perception, a process of obtaining allocentric maps from egocentric views, is restricted when using a narrow Field of View (FoV) alone. In this work, mapping from 360° panoramas to BEV semantics, the 360BEV task, is established for the first time to achieve holistic representations of indoor scenes in a top-down view. Instead of relying on narrow-FoV image sequences, a panoramic image with depth information is sufficient to generate a holistic BEV semantic map. To benchmark 360BEV, we present two indoor datasets, 360BEV-Matterport and 360BEV-Stanford, both of which include egocentric panoramic images and semantic segmentation labels, as well as allocentric semantic maps. Besides delving deep into different mapping paradigms, we propose a dedicated solution for panoramic semantic mapping, namely 360Mapper. Through extensive experiments, our methods achieve 44.32% and 45.78% in mIoU on both datasets respectively, surpassing previous counterparts with gains of +7.60% and +9.70% in mIoU. Code and datasets are available at the project page: https://jamycheung.github.io/360BEV.html.
summary: Seeing only a tiny part of the whole is not knowing the full circumstance. Bird's-eye-view (BEV) perception, a process of obtaining allocentric maps from egocentric views, is restricted when using a narrow Field of View (FoV) alone. In this work, mapping from 360° panoramas to BEV semantics, the 360BEV task, is established for the first time to achieve holistic representations of indoor scenes in a top-down view. Instead of relying on narrow-FoV image sequences, a panoramic image with depth information is sufficient to generate a holistic BEV semantic map. To benchmark 360BEV, we present two indoor datasets, 360BEV-Matterport and 360BEV-Stanford, both of which include egocentric panoramic images and semantic segmentation labels, as well as allocentric semantic maps. Besides delving deep into different mapping paradigms, we propose a dedicated solution for panoramic semantic mapping, namely 360Mapper. Through extensive experiments, our methods achieve 44.32% and 45.78% in mIoU on both datasets respectively, surpassing previous counterparts with gains of +7.60% and +9.70% in mIoU. Code and datasets are available at the project page: https://jamycheung.github.io/360BEV.html.
abstract_zh: 只看到整体的一小部分是无法了解全部情况的。鸟瞰图 (BEV) 感知是从自我中心视图获取异中心地图的过程，在单独使用窄视场 (FoV) 时会受到限制。在这项工作中，首次建立了从 360° 全景到 BEV 语义的映射，即 360BEV 任务，以实现自上而下视图中室内场景的整体表示。具有深度信息的全景图像足以生成整体 BEV 语义图，而不是依赖窄视场图像序列。为了对 360BEV 进行基准测试，我们提供了两个室内数据集：360BEV-Matterport 和 360BEV-Stanford，这两个数据集都包含以自我为中心的全景图像和语义分割标签，以及以异体为中心的语义图。除了深入研究不同的映射范式之外，我们还提出了全景语义映射的专用解决方案，即360Mapper。通过大量实验，我们的方法在两个数据集上的 mIoU 分别达到了 44.32% 和 45.78%，超过了之前的同行，mIoU 提高了 +7.60% 和 +9.70%。代码和数据集可在项目页面获取：https://jamycheung.github.io/360BEV.html。

AI.tldr: 本文提出360BEV任务，通过全景图像生成室内场景的鸟瞰语义地图，解决传统窄视野BEV感知的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于窄视野的BEV感知难以获取完整场景信息，而全景图像能提供更全面的视角，需建立新的映射方法实现全貌语义表示。
AI.method: 提出专用解决方案360Mapper，并构建两个室内数据集（360BEV-Matterport和360BEV-Stanford），利用全景图像及深度信息生成鸟瞰语义地图。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上分别达到44.32%和45.78%的mIoU，较先前方法提升7.60%和9.70%。
AI.conclusion: 360Mapper通过全景语义映射取得SOTA结果，验证了全景数据在室内BEV感知中的有效性，并为后续研究提供数据与代码支持。

authors_text: Simon Dahan,Logan Z. J. Williams,Daniel Rueckert,Emma C. Robinson
title: The Multiscale Surface Vision Transformer
title_zh: 多尺度表面视觉转换器
comment: Accepted for publication at MIDL 2024, 17 pages, 6 figures
comments: Accepted for publication at MIDL 2024, 17 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Surface meshes are a favoured domain for representing structural and functional information on the human cortex, but their complex topology and geometry pose significant challenges for deep learning analysis. While Transformers have excelled as domain-agnostic architectures for sequence-to-sequence learning, the quadratic cost of the self-attention operation remains an obstacle for many dense prediction tasks. Inspired by some of the latest advances in hierarchical modelling with vision transformers, we introduce the Multiscale Surface Vision Transformer (MS-SiT) as a backbone architecture for surface deep learning. The self-attention mechanism is applied within local-mesh-windows to allow for high-resolution sampling of the underlying data, while a shifted-window strategy improves the sharing of information between windows. Neighbouring patches are successively merged, allowing the MS-SiT to learn hierarchical representations suitable for any prediction task. Results demonstrate that the MS-SiT outperforms existing surface deep learning methods for neonatal phenotyping prediction tasks using the Developing Human Connectome Project (dHCP) dataset. Furthermore, building the MS-SiT backbone into a U-shaped architecture for surface segmentation demonstrates competitive results on cortical parcellation using the UK Biobank (UKB) and manually-annotated MindBoggle datasets. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/metrics-lab/surface-vision-transformers.
summary: Surface meshes are a favoured domain for representing structural and functional information on the human cortex, but their complex topology and geometry pose significant challenges for deep learning analysis. While Transformers have excelled as domain-agnostic architectures for sequence-to-sequence learning, the quadratic cost of the self-attention operation remains an obstacle for many dense prediction tasks. Inspired by some of the latest advances in hierarchical modelling with vision transformers, we introduce the Multiscale Surface Vision Transformer (MS-SiT) as a backbone architecture for surface deep learning. The self-attention mechanism is applied within local-mesh-windows to allow for high-resolution sampling of the underlying data, while a shifted-window strategy improves the sharing of information between windows. Neighbouring patches are successively merged, allowing the MS-SiT to learn hierarchical representations suitable for any prediction task. Results demonstrate that the MS-SiT outperforms existing surface deep learning methods for neonatal phenotyping prediction tasks using the Developing Human Connectome Project (dHCP) dataset. Furthermore, building the MS-SiT backbone into a U-shaped architecture for surface segmentation demonstrates competitive results on cortical parcellation using the UK Biobank (UKB) and manually-annotated MindBoggle datasets. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/metrics-lab/surface-vision-transformers.
abstract_zh: 表面网格是表示人类皮层结构和功能信息的首选领域，但其复杂的拓扑和几何形状给深度学习分析带来了重大挑战。虽然 Transformer 作为序列到序列学习的领域无关架构表现出色，但自注意力操作的二次成本仍然是许多密集预测任务的障碍。受到视觉变压器分层建模的一些最新进展的启发，我们引入了多尺度表面视觉变压器（MS-SiT）作为表面深度学习的骨干架构。自注意力机制应用于本地网格窗口中，以允许对底层数据进行高分辨率采样，而移位窗口策略则改善了窗口之间的信息共享。相邻的补丁被连续合并，允许 MS-SiT 学习适合任何预测任务的分层表示。结果表明，对于使用开发人类连接组项目 (dHCP) 数据集的新生儿表型预测任务，MS-SiT 优于现有的表面深度学习方法。此外，将 MS-SiT 主干构建成用于表面分割的 U 形架构，展示了使用英国生物银行 (UKB) 和手动注释的 MindBoggle 数据集在皮质分割方面具有竞争力的结果。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/metrics-lab/surface-vision-transformers 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多尺度表面视觉变换器（MS-SiT）架构，用于解决表面网格数据在深度学习中的复杂拓扑与几何挑战。
AI.motivation: 表面网格数据的复杂结构及传统Transformer自注意力机制的二次计算成本限制了其在密集预测任务中的应用。
AI.method: 通过局部网格窗口内自注意力机制实现高分辨率采样，结合移位窗口策略增强信息共享，并通过补丁合并学习层次化表示。
AI.result: 在新生儿表型预测（dHCP数据集）和皮层分割（UKB/MindBoggle数据集）任务中均优于现有方法，且代码模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: MS-SiT有效解决了表面深度学习的挑战，其模块化设计适用于多种预测任务，开源资源促进进一步研究。

search_text: The Multiscale Surface Vision Transformer 多尺度表面视觉转换器 Surface meshes are a favoured domain for representing structural and functional information on the human cortex, but their complex topology and geometry pose significant challenges for deep learning analysis. While Transformers have excelled as domain-agnostic architectures for sequence-to-sequence learning, the quadratic cost of the self-attention operation remains an obstacle for many dense prediction tasks. Inspired by some of the latest advances in hierarchical modelling with vision transformers, we introduce the Multiscale Surface Vision Transformer (MS-SiT) as a backbone architecture for surface deep learning. The self-attention mechanism is applied within local-mesh-windows to allow for high-resolution sampling of the underlying data, while a shifted-window strategy improves the sharing of information between windows. Neighbouring patches are successively merged, allowing the MS-SiT to learn hierarchical representations suitable for any prediction task. Results demonstrate that the MS-SiT outperforms existing surface deep learning methods for neonatal phenotyping prediction tasks using the Developing Human Connectome Project (dHCP) dataset. Furthermore, building the MS-SiT backbone into a U-shaped architecture for surface segmentation demonstrates competitive results on cortical parcellation using the UK Biobank (UKB) and manually-annotated MindBoggle datasets. authors_text: Yuexiao Ma,Huixia Li,Xiawu Zheng,Xuefeng Xiao,Rui Wang,Shilei Wen,Xin Pan,Fei Chao,Rongrong Ji
title: Solving Oscillation Problem in Post-Training Quantization Through a Theoretical Perspective
title_zh: 从理论角度解决训练后量化中的振荡问题
abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is widely regarded as one of the most efficient compression methods practically, benefitting from its data privacy and low computation costs. We argue that an overlooked problem of oscillation is in the PTQ methods. In this paper, we take the initiative to explore and present a theoretical proof to explain why such a problem is essential in PTQ. And then, we try to solve this problem by introducing a principled and generalized framework theoretically. In particular, we first formulate the oscillation in PTQ and prove the problem is caused by the difference in module capacity. To this end, we define the module capacity (ModCap) under data-dependent and data-free scenarios, where the differentials between adjacent modules are used to measure the degree of oscillation. The problem is then solved by selecting top-k differentials, in which the corresponding modules are jointly optimized and quantized. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method successfully reduces the performance drop and is generalized to different neural networks and PTQ methods. For example, with 2/4 bit ResNet-50 quantization, our method surpasses the previous state-of-the-art method by 1.9%. It becomes more significant on small model quantization, e.g. surpasses BRECQ method by 6.61% on MobileNetV2*0.5.
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is widely regarded as one of the most efficient compression methods practically, benefitting from its data privacy and low computation costs. We argue that an overlooked problem of oscillation is in the PTQ methods. In this paper, we take the initiative to explore and present a theoretical proof to explain why such a problem is essential in PTQ. And then, we try to solve this problem by introducing a principled and generalized framework theoretically. In particular, we first formulate the oscillation in PTQ and prove the problem is caused by the difference in module capacity. To this end, we define the module capacity (ModCap) under data-dependent and data-free scenarios, where the differentials between adjacent modules are used to measure the degree of oscillation. The problem is then solved by selecting top-k differentials, in which the corresponding modules are jointly optimized and quantized. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method successfully reduces the performance drop and is generalized to different neural networks and PTQ methods. For example, with 2/4 bit ResNet-50 quantization, our method surpasses the previous state-of-the-art method by 1.9%. It becomes more significant on small model quantization, e.g. surpasses BRECQ method by 6.61% on MobileNetV2*0.5.
abstract_zh: 训练后量化（PTQ）被广泛认为是实际上最有效的压缩方法之一，受益于其数据隐私和较低的计算成本。我们认为 PTQ 方法中存在一个被忽视的振荡问题。在本文中，我们主动探索并提出理论证明来解释为什么这样的问题在 PTQ 中至关重要。然后，我们尝试通过理论上引入一个原则性的、通用的框架来解决这个问题。特别是，我们首先制定了 PTQ 中的振荡，并证明问题是由模块容量差异引起的。为此，我们定义了依赖数据和无数据场景下的模块容量（ModCap），其中相邻模块之间的差异用于衡量振荡程度。然后通过选择top-k差异来解决问题，其中相应的模块被联合优化和量化。大量实验表明，我们的方法成功地减少了性能下降，并可推广到不同的神经网络和 PTQ 方法。例如，通过 2/4 位 ResNet-50 量化，我们的方法超越了之前最先进的方法 1.9%。它在小模型量化上变得更加重要，例如在 MobileNetV2*0.5 上超过 BRECQ 方法 6.61%。

AI.tldr: 本文从理论角度探讨并解决后训练量化（PTQ）中的振荡问题，提出了一种基于模块容量差异的框架以减少量化性能下降。
AI.motivation: 现有PTQ方法在实际应用中存在未被重视的振荡问题，导致模型性能下降，需通过理论分析和框架设计解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过理论证明振荡源于模块容量差异，定义数据依赖和数据无关场景下的模块容量（ModCap），利用相邻模块差异度量振荡程度，并通过选择前k个差异模块进行联合优化与量化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种网络和PTQ方法中有效减少性能损失，例如2/4位ResNet-50量化优于现有方法1.9%，MobileNetV2*0.5量化优于BRECQ方法6.61%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的理论框架有效解决了PTQ振荡问题，显著提升量化性能，尤其在小模型量化中表现突出。

search_text: Solving Oscillation Problem in Post-Training Quantization Through a Theoretical Perspective 从理论角度解决训练后量化中的振荡问题 Post-training quantization (PTQ) is widely regarded as one of the most efficient compression methods practically, benefitting from its data privacy and low computation costs. We argue that an overlooked problem of oscillation is in the PTQ methods. In this paper, we take the initiative to explore and present a theoretical proof to explain why such a problem is essential in PTQ. And then, we try to solve this problem by introducing a principled and generalized framework theoretically. In particular, we first formulate the oscillation in PTQ and prove the problem is caused by the difference in module capacity. To this end, we define the module capacity (ModCap) under data-dependent and data-free scenarios, where the differentials between adjacent modules are used to measure the degree of oscillation. The problem is then solved by selecting top-k differentials, in which the corresponding modules are jointly optimized and quantized. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method successfully reduces the performance drop and is generalized to different neural networks and PTQ methods. For example, with 2/4 bit ResNet-50 quantization, our method surpasses the previous state-of-the-art method by 1.9%. It becomes more significant on small model quantization, e.g. surpasses BRECQ method by 6.61% on MobileNetV2*0.5. 训练后量化（PTQ）被广泛认为是实际上最有效的压缩方法之一，受益于其数据隐私和较低的计算成本。我们认为 PTQ 方法中存在一个被忽视的振荡问题。在本文中，我们主动探索并提出理论证明来解释为什么这样的问题在 PTQ 中至关重要。然后，我们尝试通过理论上引入一个原则性的、通用的框架来解决这个问题。特别是，我们首先制定了 PTQ 中的振荡，并证明问题是由模块容量差异引起的。为此，我们定义了依赖数据和无数据场景下的模块容量（ModCap），其中相邻模块之间的差异用于衡量振荡程度。然后通过选择top-k差异来解决问题，其中相应的模块被联合优化和量化。大量实验表明，我们的方法成功地减少了性能下降，并可推广到不同的神经网络和 PTQ 方法。例如，通过 2/4 位 ResNet-50 量化，我们的方法超越了之前最先进的方法 1.9%。它在小模型量化上变得更加重要，例如在 MobileNetV2*0.5 上超过 BRECQ 方法 6.61%。 本文从理论角度探讨并解决后训练量化（PTQ）中的振荡问题，提出了一种基于模块容量差异的框架以减少量化性能下降。 Yuexiao Ma,Huixia Li,Xiawu Zheng,Xuefeng Xiao,Rui Wang,Shilei Wen,Xin Pan,Fei Chao,Rongrong Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Hankang Gu,Shangbo Wang,Xiaoguang Ma,Dongyao Jia,Guoqiang Mao,Eng Gee Lim,Cheuk Pong Ryan Wong
title: Large-Scale Traffic Signal Control Using Constrained Network Partition and Adaptive Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用约束网络分区和自适应深度强化学习的大规模交通信号控制
abstract: Multi-agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (MADRL) based traffic signal control becomes a popular research topic in recent years. To alleviate the scalability issue of completely centralized RL techniques and the non-stationarity issue of completely decentralized RL techniques on large-scale traffic networks, some literature utilizes a regional control approach where the whole network is firstly partitioned into multiple disjoint regions, followed by applying the centralized RL approach to each region. However, the existing partitioning rules either have no constraints on the topology of regions or require the same topology for all regions. Meanwhile, no existing regional control approach explores the performance of optimal joint action in an exponentially growing regional action space when intersections are controlled by 4-phase traffic signals (EW, EWL, NS, NSL). In this paper, we propose a novel RL training framework named RegionLight to tackle the above limitations. Specifically, the topology of regions is firstly constrained to a star network which comprises one center and an arbitrary number of leaves. Next, the network partitioning problem is modeled as an optimization problem to minimize the number of regions. Then, an Adaptive Branching Dueling Q-Network (ABDQ) model is proposed to decompose the regional control task into several joint signal control sub-tasks corresponding to particular intersections. Subsequently, these sub-tasks maximize the regional benefits cooperatively. Finally, the global control strategy for the whole network is obtained by concatenating the optimal joint actions of all regions. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed framework over all baselines under both real and synthetic datasets in all evaluation metrics.
summary: Multi-agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (MADRL) based traffic signal control becomes a popular research topic in recent years. To alleviate the scalability issue of completely centralized RL techniques and the non-stationarity issue of completely decentralized RL techniques on large-scale traffic networks, some literature utilizes a regional control approach where the whole network is firstly partitioned into multiple disjoint regions, followed by applying the centralized RL approach to each region. However, the existing partitioning rules either have no constraints on the topology of regions or require the same topology for all regions. Meanwhile, no existing regional control approach explores the performance of optimal joint action in an exponentially growing regional action space when intersections are controlled by 4-phase traffic signals (EW, EWL, NS, NSL). In this paper, we propose a novel RL training framework named RegionLight to tackle the above limitations. Specifically, the topology of regions is firstly constrained to a star network which comprises one center and an arbitrary number of leaves. Next, the network partitioning problem is modeled as an optimization problem to minimize the number of regions. Then, an Adaptive Branching Dueling Q-Network (ABDQ) model is proposed to decompose the regional control task into several joint signal control sub-tasks corresponding to particular intersections. Subsequently, these sub-tasks maximize the regional benefits cooperatively. Finally, the global control strategy for the whole network is obtained by concatenating the optimal joint actions of all regions. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed framework over all baselines under both real and synthetic datasets in all evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的交通信号控制成为近年来的热门研究课题。为了缓解大规模交通网络上完全集中式强化学习技术的可扩展性问题和完全分散式强化学习技术的非平稳性问题，一些文献采用区域控制方法，首先将整个网络划分为多个不相交的区域，然后将集中式强化学习方法应用于每个区域。然而，现有的分区规则要么对区域的拓扑没有限制，要么要求所有区域具有相同的拓扑。同时，当交叉口由四相交通信号（EW、EWL、NS、NSL）控制时，现有的区域控制方法还没有探索在指数增长的区域行动空间中最优联合行动的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 RegionLight 的新型 RL 训练框架来解决上述限制。具体来说，区域的拓扑首先被限制为由一个中心和任意数量的叶子组成的星形网络。接下来，将网络划分问题建模为优化问题，以最小化区域数量。然后，提出了自适应分支决斗Q网络（ABDQ）模型，将区域控制任务分解为与特定交叉口相对应的多个联合信号控制子任务。随后，这些子任务共同实现区域利益最大化。最后，通过串联所有区域的最优联合动作，得到整个网络的全局控制策略。实验结果表明，我们提出的框架在所有评估指标中均优于真实数据集和合成数据集下的所有基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RegionLight的新型强化学习框架，通过约束网络分区和自适应深度强化学习解决大规模交通信号控制中的可扩展性和非平稳性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有区域控制方法在分区拓扑约束、区域动作空间复杂度处理及全局策略协调方面存在不足，难以有效应对大规模交通网络的动态特性。
AI.method: 首先将区域拓扑约束为星型网络结构，建立最小化区域数量的优化模型；设计自适应分支双重Q网络(ABDQ)分解区域控制任务为子任务，通过子任务协同优化实现全局策略生成。
AI.result: 实验表明RegionLight在真实和合成数据集上均优于所有基线方法，在通行效率、等待时间等评估指标上表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 通过约束分区拓扑与自适应任务分解机制，RegionLight有效解决了大规模交通信号控制中的可扩展性与非平稳性难题，为区域协同控制提供了新思路。

search_text: Large-Scale Traffic Signal Control Using Constrained Network Partition and Adaptive Deep Reinforcement Learning 使用约束网络分区和自适应深度强化学习的大规模交通信号控制 Multi-agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (MADRL) based traffic signal control becomes a popular research topic in recent years. To alleviate the scalability issue of completely centralized RL techniques and the non-stationarity issue of completely decentralized RL techniques on large-scale traffic networks, some literature utilizes a regional control approach where the whole network is firstly partitioned into multiple disjoint regions, followed by applying the centralized RL approach to each region. In this paper, we propose a novel RL training framework named RegionLight to tackle the above limitations. Specifically, the topology of regions is firstly constrained to a star network which comprises one center and an arbitrary number of leaves. Next, the network partitioning problem is modeled as an optimization problem to minimize the number of regions. Then, an Adaptive Branching Dueling Q-Network (ABDQ) model is proposed to decompose the regional control task into several joint signal control sub-tasks corresponding to particular intersections. Subsequently, these sub-tasks maximize the regional benefits cooperatively. Finally, the global control strategy for the whole network is obtained by concatenating the optimal joint actions of all regions. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed framework over all baselines under both real and synthetic datasets in all evaluation metrics. 基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的交通信号控制成为近年来的热门研究课题。为了缓解大规模交通网络上完全集中式强化学习技术的可扩展性问题和完全分散式强化学习技术的非平稳性问题，一些文献采用区域控制方法，首先将整个网络划分为多个不相交的区域，然后将集中式强化学习方法应用于每个区域。然而，现有的分区规则要么对区域的拓扑没有限制，要么要求所有区域具有相同的拓扑。同时，当交叉口由四相交通信号（EW、EWL、NS、NSL）控制时，现有的区域控制方法还没有探索在指数增长的区域行动空间中最优联合行动的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 RegionLight 的新型 RL 训练框架来解决上述限制。具体来说，区域的拓扑首先被限制为由一个中心和任意数量的叶子组成的星形网络。接下来，将网络划分问题建模为优化问题，以最小化区域数量。然后，提出了自适应分支决斗Q网络（ABDQ）模型，将区域控制任务分解为与特定交叉口相对应的多个联合信号控制子任务。随后，这些子任务共同实现区域利益最大化。最后，通过串联所有区域的最优联合动作，得到整个网络的全局控制策略。实验结果表明，我们提出的框架在所有评估指标中均优于真实数据集和合成数据集下的所有基线。 本文提出一种名为RegionLight的新型强化学习框架，通过约束网络分区和自适应深度强化学习解决大规模交通信号控制中的可扩展性和非平稳性问题。 Hankang Gu,Shangbo Wang,Xiaoguang Ma,Dongyao Jia,Guoqiang Mao,Eng Gee Lim,Cheuk Pong Ryan Wong cs.AI

authors_text: Ignacio Rocco,Iurii Makarov,Filippos Kokkinos,David Novotny,Benjamin Graham,Natalia Neverova,Andrea Vedaldi
title: Real-time volumetric rendering of dynamic humans
title_zh: 动态人体的实时体积渲染
abstract: We present a method for fast 3D reconstruction and real-time rendering of dynamic humans from monocular videos with accompanying parametric body fits. Our method can reconstruct a dynamic human in less than 3h using a single GPU, compared to recent state-of-the-art alternatives that take up to 72h. These speedups are obtained by using a lightweight deformation model solely based on linear blend skinning, and an efficient factorized volumetric representation for modeling the shape and color of the person in canonical pose. Moreover, we propose a novel local ray marching rendering which, by exploiting standard GPU hardware and without any baking or conversion of the radiance field, allows visualizing the neural human on a mobile VR device at 40 frames per second with minimal loss of visual quality. Our experimental evaluation shows superior or competitive results with state-of-the art methods while obtaining large training speedup, using a simple model, and achieving real-time rendering.
summary: We present a method for fast 3D reconstruction and real-time rendering of dynamic humans from monocular videos with accompanying parametric body fits. Our method can reconstruct a dynamic human in less than 3h using a single GPU, compared to recent state-of-the-art alternatives that take up to 72h. These speedups are obtained by using a lightweight deformation model solely based on linear blend skinning, and an efficient factorized volumetric representation for modeling the shape and color of the person in canonical pose. Moreover, we propose a novel local ray marching rendering which, by exploiting standard GPU hardware and without any baking or conversion of the radiance field, allows visualizing the neural human on a mobile VR device at 40 frames per second with minimal loss of visual quality. Our experimental evaluation shows superior or competitive results with state-of-the art methods while obtaining large training speedup, using a simple model, and achieving real-time rendering.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从单眼视频中快速 3D 重建和实时渲染动态人体的方法，并附带参数化身体拟合。我们的方法可以使用单个 GPU 在不到 3 小时的时间内重建动态人体，而最近最先进的替代方案则需要长达 72 小时。这些加速是通过使用仅基于线性混合蒙皮的轻量级变形模型以及用于对规范姿势中的人的形状和颜色进行建模的有效分解体积表示来获得的。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的本地光线行进渲染，通过利用标准 GPU 硬件，无需对辐射场进行任何烘焙或转换，可以在移动 VR 设备上以每秒 40 帧的速度可视化神经人类，同时将视觉质量损失降至最低。我们的实验评估表明，采用最先进的方法获得了优越或有竞争力的结果，同时使用简单的模型获得了大幅训练加速，并实现了实时渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单目视频和参数化身体拟合的动态人类实时体渲染方法，实现快速3D重建与移动VR设备上的高质量实时渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有动态人类重建方法计算复杂度高、耗时长（达72小时），难以满足实时渲染需求，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用轻量级线性混合蒙皮变形模型与高效分解体素表示，结合无需烘焙的局部光线步进渲染技术，直接在移动VR设备实现40fps实时渲染。
AI.result: 单GPU下3小时内完成重建（较现有方法加速24倍），移动设备实现40fps实时渲染，视觉质量损失极小，模型复杂度低且训练效率高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在速度、模型复杂度和实时渲染效果上均优于或匹配现有技术，为动态人类实时渲染提供了可行方案。

search_text: Real-time volumetric rendering of dynamic humans 动态人体的实时体积渲染 We present a method for fast 3D reconstruction and real-time rendering of dynamic humans from monocular videos with accompanying parametric body fits. Our method can reconstruct a dynamic human in less than 3h using a single GPU, compared to recent state-of-the-art alternatives that take up to 72h. These speedups are obtained by using a lightweight deformation model solely based on linear blend skinning, and an efficient factorized volumetric representation for modeling the shape and color of the person in canonical pose. Moreover, we propose a novel local ray marching rendering which, by exploiting standard GPU hardware and without any baking or conversion of the radiance field, allows visualizing the neural human on a mobile VR device at 40 frames per second with minimal loss of visual quality. Our experimental evaluation shows superior or competitive results with state-of-the art methods while obtaining large training speedup, using a simple model, and achieving real-time rendering. 我们提出了一种从单眼视频中快速 3D 重建和实时渲染动态人体的方法，并附带参数化身体拟合。我们的方法可以使用单个 GPU 在不到 3 小时的时间内重建动态人体，而最近最先进的替代方案则需要长达 72 小时。这些加速是通过使用仅基于线性混合蒙皮的轻量级变形模型以及用于对规范姿势中的人的形状和颜色进行建模的有效分解体积表示来获得的。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的本地光线行进渲染，通过利用标准 GPU 硬件，无需对辐射场进行任何烘焙或转换，可以在移动 VR 设备上以每秒 40 帧的速度可视化神经人类，同时将视觉质量损失降至最低。我们的实验评估表明，采用最先进的方法获得了优越或有竞争力的结果，同时使用简单的模型获得了大幅训练加速，并实现了实时渲染。 本文提出一种基于单目视频和参数化身体拟合的动态人类实时体渲染方法，实现快速3D重建与移动VR设备上的高质量实时渲染。 Ignacio Rocco,Iurii Makarov,Filippos Kokkinos,David Novotny,Benjamin Graham,Natalia Neverova,Andrea Vedaldi cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Yushi Hu,Benlin Liu,Jungo Kasai,Yizhong Wang,Mari Ostendorf,Ranjay Krishna,Noah A Smith
title: TIFA: Accurate and Interpretable Text-to-Image Faithfulness Evaluation with Question Answering
title_zh: TIFA：通过问答进行准确且可解释的文本到图像的忠实度评估
abstract: Despite thousands of researchers, engineers, and artists actively working on improving text-to-image generation models, systems often fail to produce images that accurately align with the text inputs. We introduce TIFA (Text-to-Image Faithfulness evaluation with question Answering), an automatic evaluation metric that measures the faithfulness of a generated image to its text input via visual question answering (VQA). Specifically, given a text input, we automatically generate several question-answer pairs using a language model. We calculate image faithfulness by checking whether existing VQA models can answer these questions using the generated image. TIFA is a reference-free metric that allows for fine-grained and interpretable evaluations of generated images. TIFA also has better correlations with human judgments than existing metrics. Based on this approach, we introduce TIFA v1.0, a benchmark consisting of 4K diverse text inputs and 25K questions across 12 categories (object, counting, etc.). We present a comprehensive evaluation of existing text-to-image models using TIFA v1.0 and highlight the limitations and challenges of current models. For instance, we find that current text-to-image models, despite doing well on color and material, still struggle in counting, spatial relations, and composing multiple objects. We hope our benchmark will help carefully measure the research progress in text-to-image synthesis and provide valuable insights for further research.
summary: Despite thousands of researchers, engineers, and artists actively working on improving text-to-image generation models, systems often fail to produce images that accurately align with the text inputs. We introduce TIFA (Text-to-Image Faithfulness evaluation with question Answering), an automatic evaluation metric that measures the faithfulness of a generated image to its text input via visual question answering (VQA). Specifically, given a text input, we automatically generate several question-answer pairs using a language model. We calculate image faithfulness by checking whether existing VQA models can answer these questions using the generated image. TIFA is a reference-free metric that allows for fine-grained and interpretable evaluations of generated images. TIFA also has better correlations with human judgments than existing metrics. Based on this approach, we introduce TIFA v1.0, a benchmark consisting of 4K diverse text inputs and 25K questions across 12 categories (object, counting, etc.). We present a comprehensive evaluation of existing text-to-image models using TIFA v1.0 and highlight the limitations and challenges of current models. For instance, we find that current text-to-image models, despite doing well on color and material, still struggle in counting, spatial relations, and composing multiple objects. We hope our benchmark will help carefully measure the research progress in text-to-image synthesis and provide valuable insights for further research.
abstract_zh: 尽管成千上万的研究人员、工程师和艺术家积极致力于改进文本到图像的生成模型，但系统通常无法生成与文本输入精确对齐的图像。我们引入了 TIFA（带有问答的文本到图像忠实度评估），这是一种自动评估指标，可通过视觉问答 (VQA) 来衡量生成的图像对其文本输入的忠实度。具体来说，给定文本输入，我们使用语言模型自动生成几个问答对。我们通过检查现有的 VQA 模型是否可以使用生成的图像回答这些问题来计算图像忠实度。 TIFA 是一种无参考指标，可对生成的图像进行细粒度且可解释的评估。与现有指标相比，TIFA 与人类判断的相关性也更好。基于这种方法，我们引入了 TIFA v1.0，这是一个由 4K 不同文本输入和 12 个类别（对象、计数等）的 25K 问题组成的基准测试。我们使用 TIFA v1.0 对现有文本到图像模型进行了全面评估，并强调了当前模型的局限性和挑战。例如，我们发现当前的文本到图像模型尽管在颜色和材质方面表现良好，但在计数、空间关系和组合多个对象方面仍然存在困难。我们希望我们的基准能够帮助仔细衡量文本到图像合成的研究进展，并为进一步的研究提供有价值的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIFA，一种通过视觉问答（VQA）评估文本到图像生成模型忠实度的自动指标。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型常无法准确对齐文本输入，且现有评估指标缺乏细粒度和可解释性，难以反映人类判断。
AI.method: 利用语言模型自动生成文本输入的问答对，通过检查VQA模型是否能基于生成图像回答这些问题，计算图像忠实度。该方法无需参考图像，支持细粒度评估。
AI.result: 构建包含4K文本输入和25K问题的TIFA v1.0基准，发现当前模型在颜色和材质表现良好，但在计数、空间关系和多物体组合上存在明显不足。
AI.conclusion: TIFA为文本到图像合成研究提供更精确的评估基准，揭示当前模型局限性，并为未来研究提供方向。

Specifically, given a text input, we automatically generate several question-answer pairs using a language model. We calculate image faithfulness by checking whether existing VQA models can answer these questions using the generated image. TIFA is a reference-free metric that allows for fine-grained and interpretable evaluations of generated images. TIFA also has better correlations with human judgments than existing metrics. Based on this approach, we introduce TIFA v1.0, a benchmark consisting of 4K diverse text inputs and 25K questions across 12 categories (object, counting, etc.). We present a comprehensive evaluation of existing text-to-image models using TIFA v1.0 and highlight the limitations and challenges of current models. For instance, we find that current text-to-image models, despite doing well on color and material, still struggle in counting, spatial relations, and composing multiple objects. We hope our benchmark will help carefully measure the research progress in text-to-image synthesis and provide valuable insights for further research. 尽管成千上万的研究人员、工程师和艺术家积极致力于改进文本到图像的生成模型，但系统通常无法生成与文本输入精确对齐的图像。我们引入了 TIFA（带有问答的文本到图像忠实度评估），这是一种自动评估指标，可通过视觉问答 (VQA) 来衡量生成的图像对其文本输入的忠实度。具体来说，给定文本输入，我们使用语言模型自动生成几个问答对。我们通过检查现有的 VQA 模型是否可以使用生成的图像回答这些问题来计算图像忠实度。 TIFA 是一种无参考指标，可对生成的图像进行细粒度且可解释的评估。与现有指标相比，TIFA 与人类判断的相关性也更好。基于这种方法，我们引入了 TIFA v1.0，这是一个由 4K 不同文本输入和 12 个类别（对象、计数等）的 25K 问题组成的基准测试。我们使用 TIFA v1.0 对现有文本到图像模型进行了全面评估，并强调了当前模型的局限性和挑战。例如，我们发现当前的文本到图像模型尽管在颜色和材质方面表现良好，但在计数、空间关系和组合多个对象方面仍然存在困难。我们希望我们的基准能够帮助仔细衡量文本到图像合成的研究进展，并为进一步的研究提供有价值的见解。 本文提出TIFA，一种通过视觉问答（VQA）评估文本到图像生成模型忠实度的自动指标。 Yushi Hu,Benlin Liu,Jungo Kasai,Yizhong Wang,Mari Ostendorf,Ranjay Krishna,Noah A Smith cs.CV

authors_text: Hongkuan Zhou,Aifen Sui,Letian Shi,Yinxian Li
title: Penalty-Based Imitation Learning With Cross Semantics Generation Sensor Fusion for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 用于自动驾驶的基于惩罚的模仿学习与交叉语义生成传感器融合
abstract: In recent times, there has been a growing focus on end-to-end autonomous driving technologies. This technology involves the replacement of the entire driving pipeline with a single neural network, which has a simpler structure and faster inference time. However, while this approach reduces the number of components in the driving pipeline, it also presents challenges related to interpretability and safety. For instance, the trained policy may not always comply with traffic rules, and it is difficult to determine the reason for such misbehavior due to the lack of intermediate outputs. Additionally, the successful implementation of autonomous driving technology heavily depends on the reliable and expedient processing of sensory data to accurately perceive the surrounding environment. In this paper, we provide penalty-based imitation learning approach combined with cross semantics generation sensor fusion technologies (P-CSG) to efficiently integrate multiple modalities of information and enable the autonomous agent to effectively adhere to traffic regulations. Our model undergoes evaluation within the Town 05 Long benchmark, where we observe a remarkable increase in the driving score by more than 12% when compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) model, InterFuser. Notably, our model achieves this performance enhancement while achieving a 7-fold increase in inference speed and reducing the model size by approximately 30%. For more detailed information, including code-based resources, they can be found at https://hk-zh.github.io/p-csg/
summary: In recent times, there has been a growing focus on end-to-end autonomous driving technologies. This technology involves the replacement of the entire driving pipeline with a single neural network, which has a simpler structure and faster inference time. However, while this approach reduces the number of components in the driving pipeline, it also presents challenges related to interpretability and safety. For instance, the trained policy may not always comply with traffic rules, and it is difficult to determine the reason for such misbehavior due to the lack of intermediate outputs. Additionally, the successful implementation of autonomous driving technology heavily depends on the reliable and expedient processing of sensory data to accurately perceive the surrounding environment. In this paper, we provide penalty-based imitation learning approach combined with cross semantics generation sensor fusion technologies (P-CSG) to efficiently integrate multiple modalities of information and enable the autonomous agent to effectively adhere to traffic regulations. Our model undergoes evaluation within the Town 05 Long benchmark, where we observe a remarkable increase in the driving score by more than 12% when compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) model, InterFuser. Notably, our model achieves this performance enhancement while achieving a 7-fold increase in inference speed and reducing the model size by approximately 30%. For more detailed information, including code-based resources, they can be found at https://hk-zh.github.io/p-csg/
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们越来越关注端到端自动驾驶技术。该技术涉及用单个神经网络替换整个驱动管道，其结构更简单，推理时间更快。然而，虽然这种方法减少了驱动管道中的组件数量，但它也带来了与可解释性和安全性相关的挑战。例如，经过训练的策略可能并不总是符合交通规则，并且由于缺乏中间输出，很难确定这种不当行为的原因。此外，自动驾驶技术的成功实施在很大程度上取决于可靠、便捷的传感数据处理，以准确感知周围环境。在本文中，我们提供基于惩罚的模仿学习方法与跨语义生成传感器融合技术（P-CSG）相结合，以有效地集成多种信息模态，并使自主代理能够有效地遵守交通规则。我们的模型在 Town 05 Long 基准测试中进行评估，我们观察到与最先进的 (SOTA) 模型 InterFuser 相比，驾驶分数显着提高了 12% 以上。值得注意的是，我们的模型实现了这种性能增强，同时推理速度提高了 7 倍，模型大小减少了约 30%。有关更多详细信息，包括基于代码的资源，可以在 https://hk-zh.github.io/p-csg/ 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合惩罚式模仿学习与跨语义生成传感器融合技术（P-CSG）的方法，旨在提升自动驾驶系统的交通规则遵守能力与多模态感知效率。
AI.motivation: 端到端自动驾驶神经网络虽结构简单且推理速度快，但存在可解释性差、安全性不足等问题，如无法确保遵循交通规则且难以定位错误原因，同时依赖高效传感器数据处理以准确感知环境。
AI.method: 设计惩罚式模仿学习框架，结合跨语义生成传感器融合技术，通过多模态信息整合与交通规则约束，提升模型对环境的感知能力与行为合规性。
AI.result: 在Town 05 Long基准测试中，相比InterFuser模型，驾驶评分提升超12%，推理速度加快7倍，模型体积缩减约30%。
AI.conclusion: P-CSG方法有效平衡了自动驾驶系统的安全性、效率与模型规模，为实际应用提供了可行的优化方案。

search_text: Penalty-Based Imitation Learning With Cross Semantics Generation Sensor Fusion for Autonomous Driving 用于自动驾驶的基于惩罚的模仿学习与交叉语义生成传感器融合 In recent times, there has been a growing focus on end-to-end autonomous driving technologies. This technology involves the replacement of the entire driving pipeline with a single neural network, which has a simpler structure and faster inference time. However, while this approach reduces the number of components in the driving pipeline, it also presents challenges related to interpretability and safety. For instance, the trained policy may not always comply with traffic rules, and it is difficult to determine the reason for such misbehavior due to the lack of intermediate outputs. Additionally, the successful implementation of autonomous driving technology heavily depends on the reliable and expedient processing of sensory data to accurately perceive the surrounding environment. In this paper, we provide penalty-based imitation learning approach combined with cross semantics generation sensor fusion technologies (P-CSG) to efficiently integrate multiple modalities of information and enable the autonomous agent to effectively adhere to traffic regulations. Our model undergoes evaluation within the Town 05 Long benchmark, where we observe a remarkable increase in the driving score by more than 12% when compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) model, InterFuser. Notably, our model achieves this performance enhancement while achieving a 7-fold increase in inference speed and reducing the model size by approximately 30%. For more detailed information, including code-based resources, they can be found at https://hk-zh.github.io/p-csg/ 近年来，人们越来越关注端到端自动驾驶技术。该技术涉及用单个神经网络替换整个驱动管道，其结构更简单，推理时间更快。然而，虽然这种方法减少了驱动管道中的组件数量，但它也带来了与可解释性和安全性相关的挑战。例如，经过训练的策略可能并不总是符合交通规则，并且由于缺乏中间输出，很难确定这种不当行为的原因。此外，自动驾驶技术的成功实施在很大程度上取决于可靠、便捷的传感数据处理，以准确感知周围环境。在本文中，我们提供基于惩罚的模仿学习方法与跨语义生成传感器融合技术（P-CSG）相结合，以有效地集成多种信息模态，并使自主代理能够有效地遵守交通规则。我们的模型在 Town 05 Long 基准测试中进行评估，我们观察到与最先进的 (SOTA) 模型 InterFuser 相比，驾驶分数显着提高了 12% 以上。值得注意的是，我们的模型实现了这种性能增强，同时推理速度提高了 7 倍，模型大小减少了约 30%。有关更多详细信息，包括基于代码的资源，可以在 https://hk-zh.github.io/p-csg/ 找到 本文提出了一种结合惩罚式模仿学习与跨语义生成传感器融合技术（P-CSG）的方法，旨在提升自动驾驶系统的交通规则遵守能力与多模态感知效率。 Hongkuan Zhou,Aifen Sui,Letian Shi,Yinxian Li cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Sukrut Rao,Moritz Böhle,Bernt Schiele
title: Better Understanding Differences in Attribution Methods via Systematic Evaluations
title_zh: 通过系统评估更好地理解归因方法的差异
comment: 35 pages, 36 figures, 2 tables, extended version of arXiv:2205.10435, IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
comments: 35 pages, 36 figures, 2 tables, extended version of arXiv:2205.10435, IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
abstract: Deep neural networks are very successful on many vision tasks, but hard to interpret due to their black box nature. To overcome this, various post-hoc attribution methods have been proposed to identify image regions most influential to the models' decisions. Evaluating such methods is challenging since no ground truth attributions exist. We thus propose three novel evaluation schemes to more reliably measure the faithfulness of those methods, to make comparisons between them more fair, and to make visual inspection more systematic. To address faithfulness, we propose a novel evaluation setting (DiFull) in which we carefully control which parts of the input can influence the output in order to distinguish possible from impossible attributions. To address fairness, we note that different methods are applied at different layers, which skews any comparison, and so evaluate all methods on the same layers (ML-Att) and discuss how this impacts their performance on quantitative metrics. For more systematic visualizations, we propose a scheme (AggAtt) to qualitatively evaluate the methods on complete datasets. We use these evaluation schemes to study strengths and shortcomings of some widely used attribution methods over a wide range of models. Finally, we propose a post-processing smoothing step that significantly improves the performance of some attribution methods, and discuss its applicability.
summary: Deep neural networks are very successful on many vision tasks, but hard to interpret due to their black box nature. To overcome this, various post-hoc attribution methods have been proposed to identify image regions most influential to the models' decisions. Evaluating such methods is challenging since no ground truth attributions exist. We thus propose three novel evaluation schemes to more reliably measure the faithfulness of those methods, to make comparisons between them more fair, and to make visual inspection more systematic. To address faithfulness, we propose a novel evaluation setting (DiFull) in which we carefully control which parts of the input can influence the output in order to distinguish possible from impossible attributions. To address fairness, we note that different methods are applied at different layers, which skews any comparison, and so evaluate all methods on the same layers (ML-Att) and discuss how this impacts their performance on quantitative metrics. For more systematic visualizations, we propose a scheme (AggAtt) to qualitatively evaluate the methods on complete datasets. We use these evaluation schemes to study strengths and shortcomings of some widely used attribution methods over a wide range of models. Finally, we propose a post-processing smoothing step that significantly improves the performance of some attribution methods, and discuss its applicability.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在许多视觉任务上都非常成功，但由于其黑盒性质而难以解释。为了克服这个问题，人们提出了各种事后归因方法来识别对模型决策最有影响的图像区域。评估此类方法具有挑战性，因为不存在基本事实归因。因此，我们提出了三种新颖的评估方案，以更可靠地衡量这些方法的可信度，使它们之间的比较更加公平，并使目视检查更加系统化。为了解决忠实度问题，我们提出了一种新颖的评估设置（DiFull），在该设置中，我们仔细控制输入的哪些部分可以影响输出，以便区分可能的归因和不可能的归因。为了解决公平性，我们注意到不同的方法应用于不同的层，这会扭曲任何比较，因此评估同一层（ML-Att）上的所有方法，并讨论这如何影响它们在定量指标上的性能。为了更系统的可视化，我们提出了一种方案（AggAtt）来定性评估完整数据集上的方法。我们使用这些评估方案来研究一些广泛使用的归因方法在各种模型上的优点和缺点。最后，我们提出了一种后处理平滑步骤，可以显着提高某些归因方法的性能，并讨论其适用性。

AI.tldr: 通过系统评估方法比较和分析不同归因方法的差异，以提高其可靠性和公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法缺乏有效评估标准，难以准确衡量其忠实度与公平性，需系统性评估方案。
AI.method: 提出三种评估方案（DiFull、ML-Att、AggAtt）及后处理平滑步骤，分别从忠实度、公平性和可视化系统性角度评估归因方法。
AI.result: 通过评估方案发现常用归因方法的优缺点，并提出后处理平滑步骤显著提升部分方法性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的评估方案为归因方法的比较提供更可靠框架，后处理步骤可提升方法效果。

authors_text: Liang Li,Pengfei Zhao
title: Protective Self-Adaptive Pruning to Better Compress DNNs
title_zh: 保护性自适应剪枝以更好地压缩 DNN
abstract: Adaptive network pruning approach has recently drawn significant attention due to its excellent capability to identify the importance and redundancy of layers and filters and customize a suitable pruning solution. However, it remains unsatisfactory since current adaptive pruning methods rely mostly on an additional monitor to score layer and filter importance, and thus faces high complexity and weak interpretability. To tackle these issues, we have deeply researched the weight reconstruction process in iterative prune-train process and propose a Protective Self-Adaptive Pruning (PSAP) method. First of all, PSAP can utilize its own information, weight sparsity ratio, to adaptively adjust pruning ratio of layers before each pruning step. Moreover, we propose a protective reconstruction mechanism to prevent important filters from being pruned through supervising gradients and to avoid unrecoverable information loss as well. Our PSAP is handy and explicit because it merely depends on weights and gradients of model itself, instead of requiring an additional monitor as in early works. Experiments on ImageNet and CIFAR-10 also demonstrate its superiority to current works in both accuracy and compression ratio, especially for compressing with a high ratio or pruning from scratch.
summary: Adaptive network pruning approach has recently drawn significant attention due to its excellent capability to identify the importance and redundancy of layers and filters and customize a suitable pruning solution. However, it remains unsatisfactory since current adaptive pruning methods rely mostly on an additional monitor to score layer and filter importance, and thus faces high complexity and weak interpretability. To tackle these issues, we have deeply researched the weight reconstruction process in iterative prune-train process and propose a Protective Self-Adaptive Pruning (PSAP) method. First of all, PSAP can utilize its own information, weight sparsity ratio, to adaptively adjust pruning ratio of layers before each pruning step. Moreover, we propose a protective reconstruction mechanism to prevent important filters from being pruned through supervising gradients and to avoid unrecoverable information loss as well. Our PSAP is handy and explicit because it merely depends on weights and gradients of model itself, instead of requiring an additional monitor as in early works. Experiments on ImageNet and CIFAR-10 also demonstrate its superiority to current works in both accuracy and compression ratio, especially for compressing with a high ratio or pruning from scratch.
abstract_zh: 自适应网络剪枝方法最近引起了极大的关注，因为它具有识别层和过滤器的重要性和冗余并定制合适的剪枝解决方案的出色能力。然而，它仍然不能令人满意，因为当前的自适应剪枝方法主要依赖于额外的监视器来对层和过滤器重要性进行评分，因此面临着高复杂性和弱可解释性。为了解决这些问题，我们深入研究了迭代剪枝训练过程中的权重重建过程，并提出了一种保护性自适应剪枝（PSAP）方法。首先，PSAP可以利用自己的信息，权重稀疏比，在每个剪枝步骤之前自适应地调整层的剪枝比率。此外，我们提出了一种保护性重建机制，以防止重要的过滤器通过监督梯度被修剪，并避免不可恢复的信息丢失。我们的 PSAP 方便且明确，因为它仅取决于模型本身的权重和梯度，而不是像早期作品中那样需要额外的监视器。在 ImageNet 和 CIFAR-10 上的实验也证明了其在精度和压缩比方面优于当前工作，特别是在高压缩比或从头开始剪枝方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PSAP的保护性自适应剪枝方法，旨在通过更高效、可解释的方式压缩深度神经网络（DNN）。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应剪枝方法依赖额外监控模块评估层和滤波器重要性，导致复杂度高且可解释性差，亟需更简洁有效的剪枝方案。
AI.method: PSAP利用模型自身权重稀疏比自适应调整剪枝比例，并引入保护性重建机制通过梯度监督防止关键滤波器被误剪，无需额外监控模块。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和CIFAR-10数据集上，PSAP在保持较高精度的同时实现了优于现有方法的压缩比，尤其在高比例压缩和从零开始剪枝场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: PSAP通过自适应剪枝与保护性重建机制，有效解决了传统方法的复杂性与可解释性问题，为DNN压缩提供了更高效且可靠的解决方案。
