ai_content_json.method: PSAP利用模型自身权重稀疏比自适应调整剪枝比例，并引入保护性重建机制通过梯度监督防止关键滤波器被误剪，无需额外监控模块。
ai_content_json.result: 在ImageNet和CIFAR-10数据集上，PSAP在保持较高精度的同时实现了优于现有方法的压缩比，尤其在高比例压缩和从零开始剪枝场景下表现突出。
ai_content_json.conclusion: PSAP通过自适应剪枝与保护性重建机制，有效解决了传统方法的复杂性与可解释性问题，为DNN压缩提供了更高效且可靠的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PSAP的保护性自适应剪枝方法，旨在通过更高效、可解释的方式压缩深度神经网络（DNN）。
motivation: 现有自适应剪枝方法依赖额外监控模块评估层和滤波器重要性，导致复杂度高且可解释性差，亟需更简洁有效的剪枝方案。
method: PSAP利用模型自身权重稀疏比自适应调整剪枝比例，并引入保护性重建机制通过梯度监督防止关键滤波器被误剪，无需额外监控模块。
result: 在ImageNet和CIFAR-10数据集上，PSAP在保持较高精度的同时实现了优于现有方法的压缩比，尤其在高比例压缩和从零开始剪枝场景下表现突出。
conclusion: PSAP通过自适应剪枝与保护性重建机制，有效解决了传统方法的复杂性与可解释性问题，为DNN压缩提供了更高效且可靠的解决方案。
search_text: Protective Self-Adaptive Pruning to Better Compress DNNs 保护性自适应剪枝以更好地压缩 DNN Adaptive network pruning approach has recently drawn significant attention due to its excellent capability to identify the importance and redundancy of layers and filters and customize a suitable pruning solution. However, it remains unsatisfactory since current adaptive pruning methods rely mostly on an additional monitor to score layer and filter importance, and thus faces high complexity and weak interpretability. To tackle these issues, we have deeply researched the weight reconstruction process in iterative prune-train process and propose a Protective Self-Adaptive Pruning (PSAP) method. First of all, PSAP can utilize its own information, weight sparsity ratio, to adaptively adjust pruning ratio of layers before each pruning step. Moreover, we propose a protective reconstruction mechanism to prevent important filters from being pruned through supervising gradients and to avoid unrecoverable information loss as well. Our PSAP is handy and explicit because it merely depends on weights and gradients of model itself, instead of requiring an additional monitor as in early works. Experiments on ImageNet and CIFAR-10 also demonstrate its superiority to current works in both accuracy and compression ratio, especially for compressing with a high ratio or pruning from scratch. 自适应网络剪枝方法最近引起了极大的关注，因为它具有识别层和过滤器的重要性和冗余并定制合适的剪枝解决方案的出色能力。然而，它仍然不能令人满意，因为当前的自适应剪枝方法主要依赖于额外的监视器来对层和过滤器重要性进行评分，因此面临着高复杂性和弱可解释性。为了解决这些问题，我们深入研究了迭代剪枝训练过程中的权重重建过程，并提出了一种保护性自适应剪枝（PSAP）方法。首先，PSAP可以利用自己的信息，权重稀疏比，在每个剪枝步骤之前自适应地调整层的剪枝比率。此外，我们提出了一种保护性重建机制，以防止重要的过滤器通过监督梯度被修剪，并避免不可恢复的信息丢失。我们的 PSAP 方便且明确，因为它仅取决于模型本身的权重和梯度，而不是像早期作品中那样需要额外的监视器。在 ImageNet 和 CIFAR-10 上的实验也证明了其在精度和压缩比方面优于当前工作，特别是在高压缩比或从头开始剪枝方面。 本文提出了一种名为PSAP的保护性自适应剪枝方法，旨在通过更高效、可解释的方式压缩深度神经网络（DNN）。 Liang Li,Pengfei Zhao cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Qiaoqiao Wei,Hui Zhang,Jun-Hai Yong
title: Focused and Collaborative Feedback Integration for Interactive Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于交互式图像分割的集中协作反馈集成
abstract: Interactive image segmentation aims at obtaining a segmentation mask for an image using simple user annotations. During each round of interaction, the segmentation result from the previous round serves as feedback to guide the user's annotation and provides dense prior information for the segmentation model, effectively acting as a bridge between interactions. Existing methods overlook the importance of feedback or simply concatenate it with the original input, leading to underutilization of feedback and an increase in the number of required annotations. To address this, we propose an approach called Focused and Collaborative Feedback Integration (FCFI) to fully exploit the feedback for click-based interactive image segmentation. FCFI first focuses on a local area around the new click and corrects the feedback based on the similarities of high-level features. It then alternately and collaboratively updates the feedback and deep features to integrate the feedback into the features. The efficacy and efficiency of FCFI were validated on four benchmarks, namely GrabCut, Berkeley, SBD, and DAVIS. Experimental results show that FCFI achieved new state-of-the-art performance with less computational overhead than previous methods. The source code is available at https://github.com/veizgyauzgyauz/FCFI.
summary: Interactive image segmentation aims at obtaining a segmentation mask for an image using simple user annotations. During each round of interaction, the segmentation result from the previous round serves as feedback to guide the user's annotation and provides dense prior information for the segmentation model, effectively acting as a bridge between interactions. Existing methods overlook the importance of feedback or simply concatenate it with the original input, leading to underutilization of feedback and an increase in the number of required annotations. To address this, we propose an approach called Focused and Collaborative Feedback Integration (FCFI) to fully exploit the feedback for click-based interactive image segmentation. FCFI first focuses on a local area around the new click and corrects the feedback based on the similarities of high-level features. It then alternately and collaboratively updates the feedback and deep features to integrate the feedback into the features. The efficacy and efficiency of FCFI were validated on four benchmarks, namely GrabCut, Berkeley, SBD, and DAVIS. Experimental results show that FCFI achieved new state-of-the-art performance with less computational overhead than previous methods. The source code is available at https://github.com/veizgyauzgyauz/FCFI.
abstract_zh: 交互式图像分割旨在使用简单的用户注释获得图像的分割掩模。在每一轮交互过程中，上一轮的分割结果作为反馈来指导用户的标注，并为分割模型提供密集的先验信息，有效地充当交互之间的桥梁。现有的方法忽视了反馈的重要性，或者只是将其与原始输入连接起来，导致反馈的利用不足和所需注释数量的增加。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为聚焦协作反馈集成（FCFI）的方法，以充分利用基于点击的交互式图像分割的反馈。 FCFI 首先关注新点击周围的局部区域，并根据高级特征的相似性纠正反馈。然后它交替地、协作地更新反馈和深层特征，将反馈集成到特征中。 FCFI 的功效和效率在四个基准上得到了验证，即 GrabCut、Berkeley、SBD 和 DAVIS。实验结果表明，FCFI 比以前的方法以更少的计算开销实现了新的最先进的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/veizgyauzgyauz/FCFI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种聚焦与协作反馈集成方法（FCFI），用于改进基于点击的交互式图像分割，通过有效利用用户反馈降低标注次数。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分利用反馈信息，导致需要更多用户标注。本文旨在通过优化反馈整合机制，提升交互效率。
AI.method: FCFI首先聚焦新点击周围的局部区域，基于高层特征相似性修正反馈，再交替协作更新反馈与深度特征以融合信息。
AI.result: 在GrabCut、Berkeley、SBD和DAVIS四个基准测试中，FCFI以更少计算开销达到新状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: FCFI通过聚焦与协作机制有效利用反馈，显著提升交互式图像分割的效率与精度，代码已开源。

authors_text: Zaid Khan,Yun Fu
title: Contrastive Alignment of Vision to Language Through Parameter-Efficient Transfer Learning
title_zh: 通过参数高效的迁移学习实现视觉与语言的对比对齐
abstract: Contrastive vision-language models (e.g. CLIP) are typically created by updating all the parameters of a vision model and language model through contrastive training. Can such models be created by a small number of parameter updates to an already-trained language model and vision model? The literature describes techniques that can create vision-language models by updating a small number of parameters in a language model, but these require already aligned visual representations and are non-contrastive, hence unusable for latency-sensitive applications such as neural search. We explore the feasibility and benefits of parameter-efficient contrastive vision-language alignment through transfer learning: creating a model such as CLIP by minimally updating an already-trained vision and language model. We find that a minimal set of parameter updates ($<$7%) can achieve the same performance as full-model training, and updating specific components ($<$1% of parameters) can match 75% of full-model training. We describe a series of experiments: we show that existing knowledge is conserved more strongly in parameter-efficient training and that parameter-efficient scaling scales with model and dataset size. Where paired-image text data is scarce but strong multilingual language models exist (e.g. low resource languages), parameter-efficient training is even preferable to full-model training. Given a fixed compute budget, parameter-efficient training allows training larger models on the same hardware, achieving equivalent performance in less time. Parameter-efficient training hence constitutes an energy-efficient and effective training strategy for contrastive vision-language models that may be preferable to the full-model training paradigm for common use cases. Code and weights at https://github.com/codezakh/LilT.
summary: Contrastive vision-language models (e.g. CLIP) are typically created by updating all the parameters of a vision model and language model through contrastive training. Can such models be created by a small number of parameter updates to an already-trained language model and vision model? The literature describes techniques that can create vision-language models by updating a small number of parameters in a language model, but these require already aligned visual representations and are non-contrastive, hence unusable for latency-sensitive applications such as neural search. We explore the feasibility and benefits of parameter-efficient contrastive vision-language alignment through transfer learning: creating a model such as CLIP by minimally updating an already-trained vision and language model. We find that a minimal set of parameter updates ($<$7%) can achieve the same performance as full-model training, and updating specific components ($<$1% of parameters) can match 75% of full-model training. We describe a series of experiments: we show that existing knowledge is conserved more strongly in parameter-efficient training and that parameter-efficient scaling scales with model and dataset size. Where paired-image text data is scarce but strong multilingual language models exist (e.g. low resource languages), parameter-efficient training is even preferable to full-model training. Given a fixed compute budget, parameter-efficient training allows training larger models on the same hardware, achieving equivalent performance in less time. Parameter-efficient training hence constitutes an energy-efficient and effective training strategy for contrastive vision-language models that may be preferable to the full-model training paradigm for common use cases. Code and weights at https://github.com/codezakh/LilT.
abstract_zh: 对比视觉语言模型（例如 CLIP）通常是通过对比训练更新视觉模型和语言模型的所有参数来创建的。是否可以通过对已经训练好的语言模型和视觉模型进行少量参数更新来创建这样的模型？文献描述了可以通过更新语言模型中的少量参数来创建视觉语言模型的技术，但这些技术需要已经对齐的视觉表示并且是非对比度的，因此无法用于神经搜索等延迟敏感的应用程序。我们通过迁移学习探索参数高效的对比视觉-语言对齐的可行性和好处：通过最少地更新已经训练的视觉和语言模型来创建诸如 CLIP 之类的模型。我们发现，最小的参数更新集（$<$7%）可以达到与全模型训练相同的性能，并且更新特定组件（$<$1% 的参数）可以匹配全模型训练的 75%。我们描述了一系列实验：我们表明，在参数有效的训练中，现有的知识得到了更强烈的保存，并且参数有效的缩放随着模型和数据集的大小而扩展。在配对图像文本数据稀缺但存在强大的多语言语言模型（例如资源匮乏的语言）的情况下，参数高效训练甚至比全模型训练更可取。给定固定的计算预算，参数高效的训练允许在相同的硬件上训练更大的模型，从而在更短的时间内实现同等的性能。因此，参数高效训练构成了对比视觉语言模型的节能且有效的训练策略，对于常见用例来说，它可能比全模型训练范例更可取。代码和权重位于 https://github.com/codezakh/LilT。

AI.tldr: 通过参数高效迁移学习实现视觉-语言对比对齐，以最小参数更新构建类似CLIP的模型。
AI.motivation: 传统对比模型需全参数更新，但计算成本高且难以适应低资源场景，需探索参数高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 在预训练视觉和语言模型基础上，通过迁移学习仅更新少量参数（<7%）实现对比对齐，并验证特定组件更新（<1%）的可行性。
AI.result: 少量参数更新可匹配全模型性能，低资源语言场景下更优，相同硬件下可训练更大模型并节省时间与能耗。
AI.conclusion: 参数高效训练为对比视觉-语言模型提供节能有效的解决方案，适用于多数实际应用场景。

Where paired-image text data is scarce but strong multilingual language models exist (e.g. low resource languages), parameter-efficient training is even preferable to full-model training. Given a fixed compute budget, parameter-efficient training allows training larger models on the same hardware, achieving equivalent performance in less time. Parameter-efficient training hence constitutes an energy-efficient and effective training strategy for contrastive vision-language models that may be preferable to the full-model training paradigm for common use cases. Code and weights at https://github.com/codezakh/LilT. 对比视觉语言模型（例如 CLIP）通常是通过对比训练更新视觉模型和语言模型的所有参数来创建的。是否可以通过对已经训练好的语言模型和视觉模型进行少量参数更新来创建这样的模型？文献描述了可以通过更新语言模型中的少量参数来创建视觉语言模型的技术，但这些技术需要已经对齐的视觉表示并且是非对比度的，因此无法用于神经搜索等延迟敏感的应用程序。我们通过迁移学习探索参数高效的对比视觉-语言对齐的可行性和好处：通过最少地更新已经训练的视觉和语言模型来创建诸如 CLIP 之类的模型。我们发现，最小的参数更新集（$<$7%）可以达到与全模型训练相同的性能，并且更新特定组件（$<$1% 的参数）可以匹配全模型训练的 75%。我们描述了一系列实验：我们表明，在参数有效的训练中，现有的知识得到了更强烈的保存，并且参数有效的缩放随着模型和数据集的大小而扩展。在配对图像文本数据稀缺但存在强大的多语言语言模型（例如资源匮乏的语言）的情况下，参数高效训练甚至比全模型训练更可取。给定固定的计算预算，参数高效的训练允许在相同的硬件上训练更大的模型，从而在更短的时间内实现同等的性能。因此，参数高效训练构成了对比视觉语言模型的节能且有效的训练策略，对于常见用例来说，它可能比全模型训练范例更可取。代码和权重位于 https://github.com/codezakh/LilT。 通过参数高效迁移学习实现视觉-语言对比对齐，以最小参数更新构建类似CLIP的模型。 Zaid Khan,Yun Fu cs.CV

authors_text: Donggyu Lee,Sangwon Jung,Taesup Moon
title: Continual Learning in the Presence of Spurious Correlation
title_zh: 存在虚假相关性时的持续学习
abstract: Most continual learning (CL) algorithms have focused on tackling the stability-plasticity dilemma, that is, the challenge of preventing the forgetting of previous tasks while learning new ones. However, they have overlooked the impact of the knowledge transfer when the dataset in a certain task is biased - namely, when some unintended spurious correlations of the tasks are learned from the biased dataset. In that case, how would they affect learning future tasks or the knowledge already learned from the past tasks? In this work, we carefully design systematic experiments using one synthetic and two real-world datasets to answer the question from our empirical findings. Specifically, we first show through two-task CL experiments that standard CL methods, which are unaware of dataset bias, can transfer biases from one task to another, both forward and backward, and this transfer is exacerbated depending on whether the CL methods focus on the stability or the plasticity. We then present that the bias transfer also exists and even accumulate in longer sequences of tasks. Finally, we propose a simple, yet strong plug-in method for debiasing-aware continual learning, dubbed as Group-class Balanced Greedy Sampling (BGS). As a result, we show that our BGS can always reduce the bias of a CL model, with a slight loss of CL performance at most.
summary: Most continual learning (CL) algorithms have focused on tackling the stability-plasticity dilemma, that is, the challenge of preventing the forgetting of previous tasks while learning new ones. However, they have overlooked the impact of the knowledge transfer when the dataset in a certain task is biased - namely, when some unintended spurious correlations of the tasks are learned from the biased dataset. In that case, how would they affect learning future tasks or the knowledge already learned from the past tasks? In this work, we carefully design systematic experiments using one synthetic and two real-world datasets to answer the question from our empirical findings. Specifically, we first show through two-task CL experiments that standard CL methods, which are unaware of dataset bias, can transfer biases from one task to another, both forward and backward, and this transfer is exacerbated depending on whether the CL methods focus on the stability or the plasticity. We then present that the bias transfer also exists and even accumulate in longer sequences of tasks. Finally, we propose a simple, yet strong plug-in method for debiasing-aware continual learning, dubbed as Group-class Balanced Greedy Sampling (BGS). As a result, we show that our BGS can always reduce the bias of a CL model, with a slight loss of CL performance at most.
abstract_zh: 大多数持续学习（CL）算法都专注于解决稳定性-可塑性困境，即在学习新任务的同时防止忘记以前的任务。然而，当某个任务中的数据集有偏差时，即从有偏差的数据集中学习到任务的一些意外的虚假相关性时，他们忽略了知识转移的影响。在这种情况下，它们将如何影响学习未来的任务或从过去的任务中已经学到的知识？在这项工作中，我们使用一个合成数据集和两个真实世界数据集精心设计系统实验，以根据我们的实证研究结果回答问题。具体来说，我们首先通过双任务 CL 实验证明，不知道数据集偏差的标准 CL 方法可以将偏差从一个任务转移到另一个任务，无论是向前还是向后，并且这种转移会根据 CL 方法是否关注稳定性或可塑性而加剧。然后我们提出偏差转移也存在，甚至在较长的任务序列中累积。最后，我们提出了一种简单但强大的插件方法，用于消除偏差感知的持续学习，称为组级平衡贪婪采样（BGS）。结果，我们表明我们的 BGS 总是可以减少 CL 模型的偏差，最多只稍微损失 CL 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了持续学习中因数据集偏差导致的虚假相关性问题，并提出了一种去偏方法以减少知识迁移中的偏差影响。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习算法未考虑任务数据集的偏差问题，可能导致虚假相关性被学习并影响后续任务性能。
AI.method: 设计了包含合成数据和真实数据的系统实验，提出了一种名为Group-class Balanced Greedy Sampling (BGS)的去偏方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，BGS能有效降低持续学习模型的偏差，且性能损失最小。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了持续学习中偏差迁移的机制，并证明BGS方法在减少偏差方面具有有效性。

authors_text: Nathan Leroux,Jan Finkbeiner,Emre Neftci
title: Online Transformers with Spiking Neurons for Fast Prosthetic Hand Control
title_zh: 带有尖峰神经元的在线变压器，用于快速假肢控制
abstract: Transformers are state-of-the-art networks for most sequence processing tasks. However, the self-attention mechanism often used in Transformers requires large time windows for each computation step and thus makes them less suitable for online signal processing compared to Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs). In this paper, instead of the self-attention mechanism, we use a sliding window attention mechanism. We show that this mechanism is more efficient for continuous signals with finite-range dependencies between input and target, and that we can use it to process sequences element-by-element, this making it compatible with online processing. We test our model on a finger position regression dataset (NinaproDB8) with Surface Electromyographic (sEMG) signals measured on the forearm skin to estimate muscle activities. Our approach sets the new state-of-the-art in terms of accuracy on this dataset while requiring only very short time windows of 3.5 ms at each inference step. Moreover, we increase the sparsity of the network using Leaky-Integrate and Fire (LIF) units, a bio-inspired neuron model that activates sparsely in time solely when crossing a threshold. We thus reduce the number of synaptic operations up to a factor of $\times5.3$ without loss of accuracy. Our results hold great promises for accurate and fast online processing of sEMG signals for smooth prosthetic hand control and is a step towards Transformers and Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) co-integration for energy efficient temporal signal processing.
summary: Transformers are state-of-the-art networks for most sequence processing tasks. However, the self-attention mechanism often used in Transformers requires large time windows for each computation step and thus makes them less suitable for online signal processing compared to Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs). In this paper, instead of the self-attention mechanism, we use a sliding window attention mechanism. We show that this mechanism is more efficient for continuous signals with finite-range dependencies between input and target, and that we can use it to process sequences element-by-element, this making it compatible with online processing. We test our model on a finger position regression dataset (NinaproDB8) with Surface Electromyographic (sEMG) signals measured on the forearm skin to estimate muscle activities. Our approach sets the new state-of-the-art in terms of accuracy on this dataset while requiring only very short time windows of 3.5 ms at each inference step. Moreover, we increase the sparsity of the network using Leaky-Integrate and Fire (LIF) units, a bio-inspired neuron model that activates sparsely in time solely when crossing a threshold. We thus reduce the number of synaptic operations up to a factor of $\times5.3$ without loss of accuracy. Our results hold great promises for accurate and fast online processing of sEMG signals for smooth prosthetic hand control and is a step towards Transformers and Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) co-integration for energy efficient temporal signal processing.
abstract_zh: Transformer 是适用于大多数序列处理任务的最先进的网络。然而，Transformers 中经常使用的自注意力机制需要每个计算步骤都需要很大的时间窗口，因此与循环神经网络 (RNN) 相比，它们不太适合在线信号处理。在本文中，我们使用滑动窗口注意机制来代替自注意机制。我们证明，这种机制对于输入和目标之间具有有限范围依赖性的连续信号更有效，并且我们可以使用它逐个元素地处理序列，这使其与在线处理兼容。我们在手指位置回归数据集 (NinaproDB8) 上测试我们的模型，并使用在前臂皮肤上测量的表面肌电 (sEMG) 信号来估计肌肉活动。我们的方法在该数据集的准确性方面设定了新的最先进技术，同时每个推理步骤仅需要 3.5 毫秒的非常短的时间窗口。此外，我们使用 Leaky-Integrate and Fire (LIF) 单元来增加网络的稀疏性，LIF 是一种受生物启发的神经元模型，仅在跨越阈值时才及时稀疏地激活。因此，我们将突触操作的数量减少到 $\times5.3$ 倍，而不会损失准确性。我们的结果为准确、快速地在线处理 sEMG 信号以实现平滑的假手控制带来了巨大的希望，并且是朝着 Transformer 和尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 协同集成以实现节能时间信号处理迈出的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用脉冲神经元的在线Transformer模型，用于快速控制假肢手。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型在序列处理任务中表现优异，但由于自注意力机制需要较大的时间窗口，因此不适合在线信号处理。本文旨在改进Transformer，使其适用于在线处理，并提高处理速度和效率。
AI.method: 本文采用滑动窗口注意力机制替代自注意力机制，并结合漏积分火（LIF）脉冲神经元模型，以提高网络稀疏性，减少计算量。
AI.result: 该模型在NinaproDB8数据集上实现了新的最先进精度，每个推理步骤仅需3.5毫秒的时间窗口，同时通过LIF单元将突触操作减少了5.3倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为准确且快速的sEMG信号在线处理提供了新思路，有助于实现平滑的假肢手控制，并为Transformer与脉冲神经网络的集成奠定了基础。

Transformer 是适用于大多数序列处理任务的最先进的网络。然而，Transformers 中经常使用的自注意力机制需要每个计算步骤都需要很大的时间窗口，因此与循环神经网络 (RNN) 相比，它们不太适合在线信号处理。在本文中，我们使用滑动窗口注意机制来代替自注意机制。我们证明，这种机制对于输入和目标之间具有有限范围依赖性的连续信号更有效，并且我们可以使用它逐个元素地处理序列，这使其与在线处理兼容。我们在手指位置回归数据集 (NinaproDB8) 上测试我们的模型，并使用在前臂皮肤上测量的表面肌电 (sEMG) 信号来估计肌肉活动。我们的方法在该数据集的准确性方面设定了新的最先进技术，同时每个推理步骤仅需要 3.5 毫秒的非常短的时间窗口。此外，我们使用 Leaky-Integrate and Fire (LIF) 单元来增加网络的稀疏性，LIF 是一种受生物启发的神经元模型，仅在跨越阈值时才及时稀疏地激活。因此，我们将突触操作的数量减少到 $\times5.3$ 倍，而不会损失准确性。我们的结果为准确、快速地在线处理 sEMG 信号以实现平滑的假手控制带来了巨大的希望，并且是朝着 Transformer 和尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 协同集成以实现节能时间信号处理迈出的一步。 本文提出了一种使用脉冲神经元的在线Transformer模型，用于快速控制假肢手。 Nathan Leroux,Jan Finkbeiner,Emre Neftci cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhiqiang Dong,Jiale Cao,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Jin Xie,Fahad Khan,Yanwei Pang
title: LEAPS: End-to-End One-Step Person Search With Learnable Proposals
title_zh: LEAPS：具有可学习建议的端到端一步式人员搜索
abstract: We propose an end-to-end one-step person search approach with learnable proposals, named LEAPS. Given a set of sparse and learnable proposals, LEAPS employs a dynamic person search head to directly perform person detection and corresponding re-id feature generation without non-maximum suppression post-processing. The dynamic person search head comprises a detection head and a novel flexible re-id head. Our flexible re-id head first employs a dynamic region-of-interest (RoI) operation to extract discriminative RoI features of the proposals. Then, it generates re-id features using a plain and a hierarchical interaction re-id module. To better guide discriminative re-id feature learning, we introduce a diverse re-id sample matching strategy, instead of bipartite matching in detection head. Comprehensive experiments reveal the benefit of the proposed LEAPS, achieving a favorable performance on two public person search benchmarks: CUHK-SYSU and PRW. When using the same ResNet50 backbone, our LEAPS obtains a mAP score of 55.0%, outperforming the best reported results in literature by 1.7%, while achieving around a two-fold speedup on the challenging PRW dataset. Our source code and models will be released.
summary: We propose an end-to-end one-step person search approach with learnable proposals, named LEAPS. Given a set of sparse and learnable proposals, LEAPS employs a dynamic person search head to directly perform person detection and corresponding re-id feature generation without non-maximum suppression post-processing. The dynamic person search head comprises a detection head and a novel flexible re-id head. Our flexible re-id head first employs a dynamic region-of-interest (RoI) operation to extract discriminative RoI features of the proposals. Then, it generates re-id features using a plain and a hierarchical interaction re-id module. To better guide discriminative re-id feature learning, we introduce a diverse re-id sample matching strategy, instead of bipartite matching in detection head. Comprehensive experiments reveal the benefit of the proposed LEAPS, achieving a favorable performance on two public person search benchmarks: CUHK-SYSU and PRW. When using the same ResNet50 backbone, our LEAPS obtains a mAP score of 55.0%, outperforming the best reported results in literature by 1.7%, while achieving around a two-fold speedup on the challenging PRW dataset. Our source code and models will be released.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种具有可学习建议的端到端一步式人员搜索方法，名为 LEAPS。给定一组稀疏且可学习的提案，LEAPS 采用动态人物搜索头直接执行人物检测和相应的重新识别特征生成，无需非极大值抑制后处理。动态人物搜索头包括检测头和新型柔性重识别头。我们灵活的重新识别头首先采用动态感兴趣区域（RoI）操作来提取提案的判别性 RoI 特征。然后，它使用普通和分层交互重识别模块生成重识别特征。为了更好地指导判别性重识别特征学习，我们引入了多样化的重识别样本匹配策略，而不是检测头中的二分匹配。综合实验揭示了所提出的 LEAPS 的好处，在两个公众人物搜索基准上取得了良好的表现：CUHK-SYSU 和 PRW。当使用相同的 ResNet50 主干网时，我们的 LEAPS 获得了 55.0% 的 mAP 分数，比文献中报告的最佳结果高出 1.7%，同时在具有挑战性的 PRW 数据集上实现了大约两倍的加速。我们的源代码和模型将被发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种端到端的一次性行人搜索方法LEAPS，利用可学习的提议直接进行行人检测与重识别特征生成，无需后处理。
AI.motivation: 传统行人搜索方法通常依赖多阶段流程及非极大值抑制后处理，导致效率低下。本文旨在通过可学习提议与动态头部结构，实现更高效准确的端到端行人搜索。
AI.method: 方法包含动态行人搜索头（含检测头与灵活re-id头），通过动态RoI提取特征，结合简单与分层交互模块生成re-id特征，并采用多样化样本匹配策略优化特征学习。
AI.result: 在CUHK-SYSU和PRW数据集上，使用ResNet50时mAP达55.0%，优于现有方法1.7%，且在PRW上速度提升约两倍。
AI.conclusion: LEAPS通过端到端结构和动态组件有效提升行人搜索性能与效率，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Yunjie He,Mojtaba Nayyeri,Bo Xiong,Yuqicheng Zhu,Evgeny Kharlamov,Steffen Staab
title: Modeling Relational Patterns for Logical Query Answering over Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 通过知识图对逻辑查询应答的关系模式进行建模
comment: The results reported in this paper are included in our accepted paper arXiv:2407.09212 at ECAI 2024
comments: The results reported in this paper are included in our accepted paper arXiv:2407.09212 at ECAI 2024
abstract: Answering first-order logical (FOL) queries over knowledge graphs (KG) remains a challenging task mainly due to KG incompleteness. Query embedding approaches this problem by computing the low-dimensional vector representations of entities, relations, and logical queries. KGs exhibit relational patterns such as symmetry and composition and modeling the patterns can further enhance the performance of query embedding models. However, the role of such patterns in answering FOL queries by query embedding models has not been yet studied in the literature. In this paper, we fill in this research gap and empower FOL queries reasoning with pattern inference by introducing an inductive bias that allows for learning relation patterns. To this end, we develop a novel query embedding method, RoConE, that defines query regions as geometric cones and algebraic query operators by rotations in complex space. RoConE combines the advantages of Cone as a well-specified geometric representation for query embedding, and also the rotation operator as a powerful algebraic operation for pattern inference. Our experimental results on several benchmark datasets confirm the advantage of relational patterns for enhancing logical query answering task.
summary: Answering first-order logical (FOL) queries over knowledge graphs (KG) remains a challenging task mainly due to KG incompleteness. Query embedding approaches this problem by computing the low-dimensional vector representations of entities, relations, and logical queries. KGs exhibit relational patterns such as symmetry and composition and modeling the patterns can further enhance the performance of query embedding models. However, the role of such patterns in answering FOL queries by query embedding models has not been yet studied in the literature. In this paper, we fill in this research gap and empower FOL queries reasoning with pattern inference by introducing an inductive bias that allows for learning relation patterns. To this end, we develop a novel query embedding method, RoConE, that defines query regions as geometric cones and algebraic query operators by rotations in complex space. RoConE combines the advantages of Cone as a well-specified geometric representation for query embedding, and also the rotation operator as a powerful algebraic operation for pattern inference. Our experimental results on several benchmark datasets confirm the advantage of relational patterns for enhancing logical query answering task.
abstract_zh: 回答知识图（KG）上的一阶逻辑（FOL）查询仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，主要是由于知识图谱的不完整性。查询嵌入通过计算实体、关系和逻辑查询的低维向量表示来解决这个问题。知识图谱表现出对称性和组合等关系模式，对这些模式进行建模可以进一步提高查询嵌入模型的性能。然而，文献中尚未研究此类模式在通过查询嵌入模型回答 FOL 查询中的作用。在本文中，我们填补了这一研究空白，并通过引入允许学习关系模式的归纳偏差，通过模式推理增强 FOL 查询推理能力。为此，我们开发了一种新颖的查询嵌入方法 RoConE，它将查询区域定义为几何锥体和通过复杂空间中旋转的代数查询运算符。 RoConE 结合了 Cone 作为查询嵌入的明确几何表示的优点，以及旋转运算符作为模式推理的强大代数运算的优点。我们在几个基准数据集上的实验结果证实了关系模式在增强逻辑查询回答任务方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RoConE的新方法，通过建模知识图谱中的关系模式（如对称性和组合性）来增强逻辑查询回答的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有查询嵌入方法未充分研究知识图谱中关系模式对逻辑查询回答的影响，而这些模式（如对称性、组合性）可能显著提升模型性能。
AI.method: 开发RoConE方法，将查询区域定义为复数空间中的几何锥体，并通过旋转操作符实现代数查询运算，结合几何表示与模式推理能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了RoConE方法的有效性，证明关系模式建模能显著提升逻辑查询回答的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入归纳偏置，RoConE成功利用关系模式增强了查询嵌入模型，为逻辑查询回答任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Konrad Habel,Fabian Deuser,Norbert Oswald
title: CLIP-ReIdent: Contrastive Training for Player Re-Identification
title_zh: CLIP-ReIdent：玩家重新识别的对比训练
abstract: Sports analytics benefits from recent advances in machine learning providing a competitive advantage for teams or individuals. One important task in this context is the performance measurement of individual players to provide reports and log files for subsequent analysis. During sport events like basketball, this involves the re-identification of players during a match either from multiple camera viewpoints or from a single camera viewpoint at different times. In this work, we investigate whether it is possible to transfer the out-standing zero-shot performance of pre-trained CLIP models to the domain of player re-identification. For this purpose we reformulate the contrastive language-to-image pre-training approach from CLIP to a contrastive image-to-image training approach using the InfoNCE loss as training objective. Unlike previous work, our approach is entirely class-agnostic and benefits from large-scale pre-training. With a fine-tuned CLIP ViT-L/14 model we achieve 98.44 % mAP on the MMSports 2022 Player Re-Identification challenge. Furthermore we show that the CLIP Vision Transformers have already strong OCR capabilities to identify useful player features like shirt numbers in a zero-shot manner without any fine-tuning on the dataset. By applying the Score-CAM algorithm we visualise the most important image regions that our fine-tuned model identifies when calculating the similarity score between two images of a player.
summary: Sports analytics benefits from recent advances in machine learning providing a competitive advantage for teams or individuals. One important task in this context is the performance measurement of individual players to provide reports and log files for subsequent analysis. During sport events like basketball, this involves the re-identification of players during a match either from multiple camera viewpoints or from a single camera viewpoint at different times. In this work, we investigate whether it is possible to transfer the out-standing zero-shot performance of pre-trained CLIP models to the domain of player re-identification. For this purpose we reformulate the contrastive language-to-image pre-training approach from CLIP to a contrastive image-to-image training approach using the InfoNCE loss as training objective. Unlike previous work, our approach is entirely class-agnostic and benefits from large-scale pre-training. With a fine-tuned CLIP ViT-L/14 model we achieve 98.44 % mAP on the MMSports 2022 Player Re-Identification challenge. Furthermore we show that the CLIP Vision Transformers have already strong OCR capabilities to identify useful player features like shirt numbers in a zero-shot manner without any fine-tuning on the dataset. By applying the Score-CAM algorithm we visualise the most important image regions that our fine-tuned model identifies when calculating the similarity score between two images of a player.
abstract_zh: 体育分析受益于机器学习的最新进展，为团队或个人提供竞争优势。在这种情况下，一项重要任务是对各个玩家的表现进行测量，以提供报告和日志文件以供后续分析。在篮球等体育赛事中，这涉及到在比赛期间从多个摄像机视角或在不同时间从单个摄像机视角重新识别球员。在这项工作中，我们研究是否有可能将预训练 CLIP 模型出色的零样本性能转移到玩家重新识别领域。为此，我们将对比语言到图像预训练方法从 CLIP 重新表述为使用 InfoNCE 损失作为训练目标的对比图像到图像训练方法。与以前的工作不同，我们的方法完全与类无关，并且受益于大规模预训练。借助经过微调的 CLIP ViT-L/14 模型，我们在 MMSports 2022 玩家重新识别挑战中实现了 98.44% 的 mAP。此外，我们还表明，CLIP Vision Transformers 已经具有强大的 OCR 功能，可以以零样本的方式识别有用的球员特征，例如球衣号码，而无需对数据集进行任何微调。通过应用 Score-CAM 算法，我们可以可视化我们的微调模型在计算球员的两个图像之间的相似度得分时识别的最重要的图像区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIP-ReIdent方法，通过对比训练将预训练CLIP模型应用于篮球比赛中球员的跨视角重识别任务。
AI.motivation: 体育分析需要准确的球员个体性能评估，而现有方法在多视角或时序视角下识别效果有限，需探索零样本迁移能力更强的解决方案。
AI.method: 将CLIP的对比语言-图像预训练改为图像-图像对比训练，采用InfoNCE损失函数，利用微调后的CLIP ViT-L/14模型并结合Score-CAM算法可视化关键特征区域。
AI.result: 在MMSports 2022球员重识别挑战赛中达到98.44% mAP，且模型无需数据集微调即可通过OCR识别球员球衣号码等特征。
AI.conclusion: 基于CLIP的对比训练方法有效提升了球员重识别性能，验证了视觉Transformer模型在零样本场景下的强大特征提取能力。

authors_text: Yuanyuan Yang,Bowen Xu,Yinjie Li,Sören Schwertfeger
title: The SLAM Hive Benchmarking Suite
title_zh: SLAM Hive 基准测试套件
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: 7 pages, 3 figures, IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: Benchmarking Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) algorithms is important to scientists and users of robotic systems alike. But through their many configuration options in hardware and software, SLAM systems feature a vast parameter space that scientists up to now were not able to explore. The proposed SLAM Hive Benchmarking Suite is able to analyze SLAM algorithms in 1000's of mapping runs, through its utilization of container technology and deployment in a cluster. This paper presents the architecture and open source implementation of SLAM Hive and compares it to existing efforts on SLAM evaluation. Furthermore, we highlight the function of SLAM Hive by exploring some open source algorithms on public datasets in terms of accuracy. We compare the algorithms against each other and evaluate how parameters effect not only accuracy but also CPU and memory usage. Through this we show that SLAM Hive can become an essential tool for proper comparisons and evaluations of SLAM algorithms and thus drive the scientific development in the research on SLAM.
summary: Benchmarking Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) algorithms is important to scientists and users of robotic systems alike. But through their many configuration options in hardware and software, SLAM systems feature a vast parameter space that scientists up to now were not able to explore. The proposed SLAM Hive Benchmarking Suite is able to analyze SLAM algorithms in 1000's of mapping runs, through its utilization of container technology and deployment in a cluster. This paper presents the architecture and open source implementation of SLAM Hive and compares it to existing efforts on SLAM evaluation. Furthermore, we highlight the function of SLAM Hive by exploring some open source algorithms on public datasets in terms of accuracy. We compare the algorithms against each other and evaluate how parameters effect not only accuracy but also CPU and memory usage. Through this we show that SLAM Hive can become an essential tool for proper comparisons and evaluations of SLAM algorithms and thus drive the scientific development in the research on SLAM.
abstract_zh: 对同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 算法进行基准测试对于科学家和机器人系统用户来说都很重要。但通过硬件和软件方面的众多配置选项，SLAM 系统具有巨大的参数空间，这是科学家迄今为止无法探索的。所提出的 SLAM Hive 基准测试套件能够通过利用容器技术和在集群中部署来分析数千次映射运行中的 SLAM 算法。本文介绍了 SLAM Hive 的架构和开源实现，并将其与现有的 SLAM 评估工作进行了比较。此外，我们通过在公共数据集上探索一些开源算法的准确性来强调 SLAM Hive 的功能。我们对这些算法进行相互比较，并评估参数如何影响准确性以及 CPU 和内存使用情况。通过这一点，我们表明SLAM Hive可以成为正确比较和评估SLAM算法的重要工具，从而推动SLAM研究的科学发展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLAM Hive基准测试套件，用于高效评估SLAM算法性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM系统参数空间庞大，传统评估方法难以全面探索，需更高效的基准测试工具。
AI.method: 利用容器技术与集群部署，进行数千次映射运行，对比开源算法在公开数据集上的准确性及参数对资源使用的影响。
AI.result: 验证了SLAM Hive可有效评估算法准确性、CPU及内存消耗，揭示参数对性能的关键影响。
AI.conclusion: SLAM Hive成为SLAM算法比较与评估的核心工具，推动算法研究的科学化发展。

authors_text: Donghwi Jung,Jae-Kyung Cho,Younghwa Jung,Soohyun Shin,Seong-Woo Kim
title: LoRCoN-LO: Long-term Recurrent Convolutional Network-based LiDAR Odometry
title_zh: LoRCoN-LO：基于长期循环卷积网络的激光雷达里程计
abstract: We propose a deep learning-based LiDAR odometry estimation method called LoRCoN-LO that utilizes the long-term recurrent convolutional network (LRCN) structure. The LRCN layer is a structure that can process spatial and temporal information at once by using both CNN and LSTM layers. This feature is suitable for predicting continuous robot movements as it uses point clouds that contain spatial information. Therefore, we built a LoRCoN-LO model using the LRCN layer, and predicted the pose of the robot through this model. For performance verification, we conducted experiments exploiting a public dataset (KITTI). The results of the experiment show that LoRCoN-LO displays accurate odometry prediction in the dataset. The code is available at https://github.com/donghwijung/LoRCoN-LO.
summary: We propose a deep learning-based LiDAR odometry estimation method called LoRCoN-LO that utilizes the long-term recurrent convolutional network (LRCN) structure. The LRCN layer is a structure that can process spatial and temporal information at once by using both CNN and LSTM layers. This feature is suitable for predicting continuous robot movements as it uses point clouds that contain spatial information. Therefore, we built a LoRCoN-LO model using the LRCN layer, and predicted the pose of the robot through this model. For performance verification, we conducted experiments exploiting a public dataset (KITTI). The results of the experiment show that LoRCoN-LO displays accurate odometry prediction in the dataset. The code is available at https://github.com/donghwijung/LoRCoN-LO.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于深度学习的 LiDAR 里程计估计方法，称为 LoRCoN-LO，该方法利用长期循环卷积网络（LRCN）结构。 LRCN 层是一种可以通过使用 CNN 和 LSTM 层同时处理空间和时间信息的结构。此功能适用于预测连续机器人运动，因为它使用包含空间信息的点云。因此，我们利用LRCN层构建了LoRCoN-LO模型，并通过该模型预测机器人的位姿。为了验证性能，我们利用公共数据集（KITTI）进行了实验。实验结果表明，LoRCoN-LO 在数据集中显示了准确的里程预测。代码可在 https://github.com/donghwijung/LoRCoN-LO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的深度学习方法LoRCoN-LO，用于提高激光雷达里程计的精度。
AI.motivation: 传统激光雷达里程计方法在动态环境或复杂场景中存在精度不足的问题，需利用深度学习同时处理时空信息以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用长短期记忆卷积网络（LRCN）结构，结合CNN提取点云空间特征与LSTM建模时间序列信息，通过端到端网络预测机器人位姿。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上的实验表明，LoRCoN-LO在里程计预测任务中表现出较高的准确性，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LoRCoN-LO通过融合时空特征有效提升了激光雷达里程计性能，开源代码为后续研究提供了实现基础。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的深度学习方法LoRCoN-LO，用于提高激光雷达里程计的精度。
motivation: 传统激光雷达里程计方法在动态环境或复杂场景中存在精度不足的问题，需利用深度学习同时处理时空信息以提升鲁棒性。
method: 采用长短期记忆卷积网络（LRCN）结构，结合CNN提取点云空间特征与LSTM建模时间序列信息，通过端到端网络预测机器人位姿。
result: 在KITTI数据集上的实验表明，LoRCoN-LO在里程计预测任务中表现出较高的准确性，验证了方法的有效性。
conclusion: LoRCoN-LO通过融合时空特征有效提升了激光雷达里程计性能，开源代码为后续研究提供了实现基础。
search_text: LoRCoN-LO: Long-term Recurrent Convolutional Network-based LiDAR Odometry LoRCoN-LO：基于长期循环卷积网络的激光雷达里程计 We propose a deep learning-based LiDAR odometry estimation method called LoRCoN-LO that utilizes the long-term recurrent convolutional network (LRCN) structure. The LRCN layer is a structure that can process spatial and temporal information at once by using both CNN and LSTM layers. This feature is suitable for predicting continuous robot movements as it uses point clouds that contain spatial information. Therefore, we built a LoRCoN-LO model using the LRCN layer, and predicted the pose of the robot through this model. For performance verification, we conducted experiments exploiting a public dataset (KITTI). The results of the experiment show that LoRCoN-LO displays accurate odometry prediction in the dataset. The code is available at https://github.com/donghwijung/LoRCoN-LO. 我们提出了一种基于深度学习的 LiDAR 里程计估计方法，称为 LoRCoN-LO，该方法利用长期循环卷积网络（LRCN）结构。 LRCN 层是一种可以通过使用 CNN 和 LSTM 层同时处理空间和时间信息的结构。此功能适用于预测连续机器人运动，因为它使用包含空间信息的点云。因此，我们利用LRCN层构建了LoRCoN-LO模型，并通过该模型预测机器人的位姿。为了验证性能，我们利用公共数据集（KITTI）进行了实验。实验结果表明，LoRCoN-LO 在数据集中显示了准确的里程预测。代码可在 https://github.com/donghwijung/LoRCoN-LO 获取。 本文提出了一种基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的深度学习方法LoRCoN-LO，用于提高激光雷达里程计的精度。 Donghwi Jung,Jae-Kyung Cho,Younghwa Jung,Soohyun Shin,Seong-Woo Kim cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Fabian Deuser,Konrad Habel,Norbert Oswald
title: Sample4Geo: Hard Negative Sampling For Cross-View Geo-Localisation
title_zh: Sample4Geo：跨视图地理定位的硬负采样
abstract: Cross-View Geo-Localisation is still a challenging task where additional modules, specific pre-processing or zooming strategies are necessary to determine accurate positions of images. Since different views have different geometries, pre-processing like polar transformation helps to merge them. However, this results in distorted images which then have to be rectified. Adding hard negatives to the training batch could improve the overall performance but with the default loss functions in geo-localisation it is difficult to include them. In this article, we present a simplified but effective architecture based on contrastive learning with symmetric InfoNCE loss that outperforms current state-of-the-art results. Our framework consists of a narrow training pipeline that eliminates the need of using aggregation modules, avoids further pre-processing steps and even increases the generalisation capability of the model to unknown regions. We introduce two types of sampling strategies for hard negatives. The first explicitly exploits geographically neighboring locations to provide a good starting point. The second leverages the visual similarity between the image embeddings in order to mine hard negative samples. Our work shows excellent performance on common cross-view datasets like CVUSA, CVACT, University-1652 and VIGOR. A comparison between cross-area and same-area settings demonstrate the good generalisation capability of our model.
summary: Cross-View Geo-Localisation is still a challenging task where additional modules, specific pre-processing or zooming strategies are necessary to determine accurate positions of images. Since different views have different geometries, pre-processing like polar transformation helps to merge them. However, this results in distorted images which then have to be rectified. Adding hard negatives to the training batch could improve the overall performance but with the default loss functions in geo-localisation it is difficult to include them. In this article, we present a simplified but effective architecture based on contrastive learning with symmetric InfoNCE loss that outperforms current state-of-the-art results. Our framework consists of a narrow training pipeline that eliminates the need of using aggregation modules, avoids further pre-processing steps and even increases the generalisation capability of the model to unknown regions. We introduce two types of sampling strategies for hard negatives. The first explicitly exploits geographically neighboring locations to provide a good starting point. The second leverages the visual similarity between the image embeddings in order to mine hard negative samples. Our work shows excellent performance on common cross-view datasets like CVUSA, CVACT, University-1652 and VIGOR. A comparison between cross-area and same-area settings demonstrate the good generalisation capability of our model.
abstract_zh: 跨视图地理定位仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要额外的模块、特定的预处理或缩放策略来确定图像的准确位置。由于不同的视图具有不同的几何形状，因此极坐标变换等预处理有助于合并它们。然而，这会导致图像失真，然后必须对其进行校正。在训练批次中添加硬负例可以提高整体性能，但由于地理定位中的默认损失函数，很难将它们包括在内。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于对比学习和对称 InfoNCE 损失的简化但有效的架构，其性能优于当前最先进的结果。我们的框架由一个狭窄的训练管道组成，消除了使用聚合模块的需要，避免了进一步的预处理步骤，甚至提高了模型对未知区域的泛化能力。我们引入两种类型的硬负片采样策略。第一个明确利用地理上相邻的位置来提供一个良好的起点。第二个利用图像嵌入之间的视觉相似性来挖掘硬负样本。我们的工作在常见的跨视图数据集（例如 CVUSA、CVACT、University-1652 和 VIGOR）上表现出了出色的性能。跨区域和同区域设置之间的比较证明了我们模型的良好泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sample4Geo方法，通过改进困难负样本采样策略提升跨视角地理定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨视角地理定位方法依赖复杂预处理和聚合模块，且难以有效利用困难负样本提升模型性能。
AI.method: 基于对比学习框架设计对称InfoNCE损失函数，提出地理邻近采样和视觉相似性采样两种困难负样本策略，构建轻量级训练流程。
AI.result: 在CVUSA、CVACT等数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，展现跨区域和同区域场景下的强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化流程和优化负样本采样策略，为跨视角地理定位提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Vasileios Sevetlidis,George Pavlidis,Spyridon Mouroutsos,Antonios Gasteratos
title: Dens-PU: PU Learning with Density-Based Positive Labeled Augmentation
title_zh: Dens-PU：具有基于密度的正标记增强的 PU 学习
abstract: This study proposes a novel approach for solving the PU learning problem based on an anomaly-detection strategy. Latent encodings extracted from positive-labeled data are linearly combined to acquire new samples. These new samples are used as embeddings to increase the density of positive-labeled data and, thus, define a boundary that approximates the positive class. The further a sample is from the boundary the more it is considered as a negative sample. Once a set of negative samples is obtained, the PU learning problem reduces to binary classification. The approach, named Dens-PU due to its reliance on the density of positive-labeled data, was evaluated using benchmark image datasets, and state-of-the-art results were attained.
summary: This study proposes a novel approach for solving the PU learning problem based on an anomaly-detection strategy. Latent encodings extracted from positive-labeled data are linearly combined to acquire new samples. These new samples are used as embeddings to increase the density of positive-labeled data and, thus, define a boundary that approximates the positive class. The further a sample is from the boundary the more it is considered as a negative sample. Once a set of negative samples is obtained, the PU learning problem reduces to binary classification. The approach, named Dens-PU due to its reliance on the density of positive-labeled data, was evaluated using benchmark image datasets, and state-of-the-art results were attained.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种基于异常检测策略来解决 PU 学习问题的新方法。从正标记数据中提取的潜在编码被线性组合以获得新样本。这些新样本用作嵌入，以增加正标记数据的密度，从而定义近似正类的边界。样本距离边界越远，它就越被视为负样本。一旦获得一组负样本，PU学习问题就简化为二元分类。该方法由于依赖于阳性标记数据的密度而被命名为 Dens-PU，使用基准图像数据集进行了评估，并获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于密度的正样本增强方法Dens-PU，用于解决PU学习问题，通过生成新样本提升正类数据密度并构建分类边界。
AI.motivation: 传统PU学习方法在正样本不足时难以准确界定正类边界，导致分类性能受限，需通过数据增强提升正样本密度以优化边界定义。
AI.method: 从正样本提取潜在编码并线性组合生成新样本，利用这些嵌入增加正类密度，通过距离边界远近判定负样本，最终转化为二分类任务。
AI.result: 在基准图像数据集上验证，Dens-PU方法达到当时最先进的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: Dens-PU通过密度增强策略有效解决了PU学习中的正类边界模糊问题，在图像分类任务中表现出优越性。

authors_text: Qinyan Zhou,Hongbin Fang,Zhihai Bi,Jian Xu
title: Dynamic models for Planar Peristaltic Locomotion of a Metameric Earthworm-like Robot
title_zh: 同色异体类蚯蚓机器人平面蠕动运动的动力学模型
abstract: The development of versatile robots capable of traversing challenging and irregular environments is of increasing interest in the field of robotics, and metameric robots have been identified as a promising solution due to their slender, deformable bodies. Inspired by the effective locomotion of earthworms, earthworm-like robots capable of both rectilinear and planar locomotion have been designed and prototyped. While much research has focused on developing kinematic models to describe the planar locomotion of earthworm-like robots, the authors argue that the development of dynamic models is critical to improving the accuracy and efficiency of these robots. A comprehensive analysis of the dynamics of a metameric earthworm-like robot capable of planar motion is presented in this work. The model takes into account the complex interactions between the robot's deformable body and the forces acting on it and draws on the methods previously used to develop mathematical models of snake-like robots. The proposed model represents a significant advancement in the field of metameric robotics and has the potential to enhance the performance of earthworm-like robots in a variety of challenging environments, such as underground pipes and tunnels, and serves as a foundation for future research into the dynamics of soft-bodied robots.
summary: The development of versatile robots capable of traversing challenging and irregular environments is of increasing interest in the field of robotics, and metameric robots have been identified as a promising solution due to their slender, deformable bodies. A comprehensive analysis of the dynamics of a metameric earthworm-like robot capable of planar motion is presented in this work. The model takes into account the complex interactions between the robot's deformable body and the forces acting on it and draws on the methods previously used to develop mathematical models of snake-like robots. The proposed model represents a significant advancement in the field of metameric robotics and has the potential to enhance the performance of earthworm-like robots in a variety of challenging environments, such as underground pipes and tunnels, and serves as a foundation for future research into the dynamics of soft-bodied robots.
abstract_zh: 能够穿越具有挑战性和不规则环境的多功能机器人的开发越来越受到机器人领域的关注，同色异体机器人由于其细长、可变形的身体而被认为是一种有前途的解决方案。受蚯蚓有效运动的启发，能够进行直线和平面运动的类蚯蚓机器人已经被设计和原型化。虽然许多研究都集中在开发运动学模型来描述类蚯蚓机器人的平面运动，但作者认为动态模型的开发对于提高这些机器人的准确性和效率至关重要。这项工作对具有平面运动能力的同色异体类蚯蚓机器人的动力学进行了全面分析。该模型考虑了机器人可变形身体与作用在其上的力之间的复杂相互作用，并借鉴了先前用于开发蛇形机器人数学模型的方法。所提出的模型代表了同色异体机器人领域的重大进步，有潜力提高类蚯蚓机器人在地下管道和隧道等各种具有挑战性的环境中的性能，并为未来软体机器人动力学研究奠定了基础。

AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注运动学模型，而动态模型对提升蚯蚓类机器人的性能至关重要，尤其在地下管道等复杂环境中。
AI.method: 通过分析机器人可变形躯干与作用力的复杂相互作用，并借鉴蛇形机器人数学建模方法，建立动态模型。
AI.result: 提出的动态模型显著提升了仿生蚯蚓机器人在复杂地形中的运动性能，为软体机器人研究奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为 metameric 机器人动力学研究提供了新方向，有望推动其在地下勘探等场景的应用发展。

search_text: Dynamic models for Planar Peristaltic Locomotion of a Metameric Earthworm-like Robot 同色异体类蚯蚓机器人平面蠕动运动的动力学模型 The development of versatile robots capable of traversing challenging and irregular environments is of increasing interest in the field of robotics, and metameric robots have been identified as a promising solution due to their slender, deformable bodies. Inspired by the effective locomotion of earthworms, earthworm-like robots capable of both rectilinear and planar locomotion have been designed and prototyped. While much research has focused on developing kinematic models to describe the planar locomotion of earthworm-like robots, the authors argue that the development of dynamic models is critical to improving the accuracy and efficiency of these robots. A comprehensive analysis of the dynamics of a metameric earthworm-like robot capable of planar motion is presented in this work. The model takes into account the complex interactions between the robot's deformable body and the forces acting on it and draws on the methods previously used to develop mathematical models of snake-like robots. The proposed model represents a significant advancement in the field of metameric robotics and has the potential to enhance the performance of earthworm-like robots in a variety of challenging environments, such as underground pipes and tunnels, and serves as a foundation for future research into the dynamics of soft-bodied robots. 能够穿越具有挑战性和不规则环境的多功能机器人的开发越来越受到机器人领域的关注，同色异体机器人由于其细长、可变形的身体而被认为是一种有前途的解决方案。受蚯蚓有效运动的启发，能够进行直线和平面运动的类蚯蚓机器人已经被设计和原型化。虽然许多研究都集中在开发运动学模型来描述类蚯蚓机器人的平面运动，但作者认为动态模型的开发对于提高这些机器人的准确性和效率至关重要。这项工作对具有平面运动能力的同色异体类蚯蚓机器人的动力学进行了全面分析。该模型考虑了机器人可变形身体与作用在其上的力之间的复杂相互作用，并借鉴了先前用于开发蛇形机器人数学模型的方法。所提出的模型代表了同色异体机器人领域的重大进步，有潜力提高类蚯蚓机器人在地下管道和隧道等各种具有挑战性的环境中的性能，并为未来软体机器人动力学研究奠定了基础。 本文提出了一种用于仿生蚯蚓机器人的平面蠕动运动动态模型，以提高其在复杂环境中的运动效率和准确性。 Qinyan Zhou,Hongbin Fang,Zhihai Bi,Jian Xu cs.RO,physics.app-ph

authors_text: MohammadHossein Bateni,Hossein Esfandiari,Hendrik Fichtenberger,Monika Henzinger,Rajesh Jayaram,Vahab Mirrokni,Andreas Wiese
title: Optimal Fully Dynamic $k$-Center Clustering for Adaptive and Oblivious Adversaries
title_zh: 针对自适应和健忘对手的最佳全动态 $k$-中心聚类
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.07050, arXiv:2112.07217
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.07050, arXiv:2112.07217
abstract: In fully dynamic clustering problems, a clustering of a given data set in a metric space must be maintained while it is modified through insertions and deletions of individual points. In this paper, we resolve the complexity of fully dynamic $k$-center clustering against both adaptive and oblivious adversaries. Against oblivious adversaries, we present the first algorithm for fully dynamic $k$-center in an arbitrary metric space that maintains an optimal $(2+ε)$-approximation in $O(k \cdot \mathrm{polylog}(n,Δ))$ amortized update time. Here, $n$ is an upper bound on the number of active points at any time, and $Δ$ is the aspect ratio of the metric space. Previously, the best known amortized update time was $O(k^2\cdot \mathrm{polylog}(n,Δ))$, and is due to Chan, Gourqin, and Sozio (2018). Moreover, we demonstrate that our runtime is optimal up to $\mathrm{polylog}(n,Δ)$ factors. In fact, we prove that even offline algorithms for $k$-clustering tasks in arbitrary metric spaces, including $k$-medians, $k$-means, and $k$-center, must make at least $Ω(n k)$ distance queries to achieve any non-trivial approximation factor. This implies a lower bound of $Ω(k)$ which holds even for the insertions-only setting. We also show deterministic lower and upper bounds for adaptive adversaries, demonstrate that an update time sublinear in $k$ is possible against oblivious adversaries for metric spaces which admit locally sensitive hash functions (LSH) and give the first fully dynamic $O(1)$-approximation algorithms for the closely related $k$-sum-of-radii and $k$-sum-of-diameter problems.
summary: In fully dynamic clustering problems, a clustering of a given data set in a metric space must be maintained while it is modified through insertions and deletions of individual points. In this paper, we resolve the complexity of fully dynamic $k$-center clustering against both adaptive and oblivious adversaries. Against oblivious adversaries, we present the first algorithm for fully dynamic $k$-center in an arbitrary metric space that maintains an optimal $(2+ε)$-approximation in $O(k \cdot \mathrm{polylog}(n,Δ))$ amortized update time. Here, $n$ is an upper bound on the number of active points at any time, and $Δ$ is the aspect ratio of the metric space. Previously, the best known amortized update time was $O(k^2\cdot \mathrm{polylog}(n,Δ))$, and is due to Chan, Gourqin, and Sozio (2018). Moreover, we demonstrate that our runtime is optimal up to $\mathrm{polylog}(n,Δ)$ factors. In fact, we prove that even offline algorithms for $k$-clustering tasks in arbitrary metric spaces, including $k$-medians, $k$-means, and $k$-center, must make at least $Ω(n k)$ distance queries to achieve any non-trivial approximation factor. This implies a lower bound of $Ω(k)$ which holds even for the insertions-only setting. We also show deterministic lower and upper bounds for adaptive adversaries, demonstrate that an update time sublinear in $k$ is possible against oblivious adversaries for metric spaces which admit locally sensitive hash functions (LSH) and give the first fully dynamic $O(1)$-approximation algorithms for the closely related $k$-sum-of-radii and $k$-sum-of-diameter problems.
abstract_zh: 在完全动态的聚类问题中，必须维持度量空间中给定数据集的聚类，同时通过插入和删除单个点来修改该数据集。在本文中，我们解决了针对自适应和不经意的对手的完全动态$k$中心聚类的复杂性。针对不经意的对手，我们提出了第一个在任意度量空间中实现完全动态 $k$-center 的算法，该算法在 $O(k \cdot \mathrm{polylog}(n,Δ))$ 摊销更新时间中保持最佳 $(2+ε)$-近似值。这里，$n$是任意时刻活动点数量的上限，$Δ$是度量空间的长宽比。此前，最著名的摊销更新时间是 $O(k^2\cdot \mathrm{polylog}(n,Δ))$，由 Chan、Gourqin 和 Sozio (2018) 提出。此外，我们证明我们的运行时间在 $\mathrm{polylog}(n,Δ)$ 因子下是最佳的。事实上，我们证明，即使是任意度量空间中 $k$ 聚类任务的离线算法，包括 $k$-medians、$k$-means 和 $k$-center，也必须进行至少 $Ω(n k)$ 距离查询才能实现任何非平凡的近似因子。这意味着 $Ω(k)$ 的下限即使对于仅插入设置也成立。我们还展示了自适应对手的确定性下限和上限，证明了对于度量空间的不经意对手来说，$k$ 的更新时间次线性是可能的，该度量空间允许局部敏感哈希函数（LSH），并为密切相关的 $k$-半径和和 $k$-直径和问题给出第一个完全动态的 $O(1)$ 近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在动态数据环境下，针对自适应和无记忆对手的最优全动态k中心聚类算法。
AI.motivation: 动态聚类问题在数据频繁变化的场景中至关重要，但现有算法在处理插入和删除操作时效率不足，且缺乏对对手模型的全面分析。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的动态k中心聚类算法，结合近似因子分析与复杂度理论证明，并通过距离查询下界分析验证算法最优性。
AI.result: 实现了任意度量空间下(2+ε)近似比的最优动态算法，将更新时间从O(k²)降至O(k·polylog(n,Δ))，并证明了离线算法的Ω(nk)距离查询下界。
AI.conclusion: 解决了动态k中心聚类的复杂度边界问题，为对抗性动态环境提供了理论最优解与实用算法框架。

authors_text: Zhenqian Wu,Xiaoyuan Li,Yazhou Ren,Xiaorong Pu,Xiaofeng Zhu,Lifang He
title: Self-Paced Neutral Expression-Disentangled Learning for Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 用于面部表情识别的自定进度中性表情解缠学习
abstract: The accuracy of facial expression recognition is typically affected by the following factors: high similarities across different expressions, disturbing factors, and micro-facial movement of rapid and subtle changes. One potentially viable solution for addressing these barriers is to exploit the neutral information concealed in neutral expression images. To this end, in this paper we propose a self-Paced Neutral Expression-Disentangled Learning (SPNDL) model. SPNDL disentangles neutral information from facial expressions, making it easier to extract key and deviation features. Specifically, it allows to capture discriminative information among similar expressions and perceive micro-facial movements. In order to better learn these neutral expression-disentangled features (NDFs) and to alleviate the non-convex optimization problem, a self-paced learning (SPL) strategy based on NDFs is proposed in the training stage. SPL learns samples from easy to complex by increasing the number of samples selected into the training process, which enables to effectively suppress the negative impacts introduced by low-quality samples and inconsistently distributed NDFs. Experiments on three popular databases (i.e., CK+, Oulu-CASIA, and RAF-DB) show the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: The accuracy of facial expression recognition is typically affected by the following factors: high similarities across different expressions, disturbing factors, and micro-facial movement of rapid and subtle changes. One potentially viable solution for addressing these barriers is to exploit the neutral information concealed in neutral expression images. To this end, in this paper we propose a self-Paced Neutral Expression-Disentangled Learning (SPNDL) model. SPNDL disentangles neutral information from facial expressions, making it easier to extract key and deviation features. Specifically, it allows to capture discriminative information among similar expressions and perceive micro-facial movements. In order to better learn these neutral expression-disentangled features (NDFs) and to alleviate the non-convex optimization problem, a self-paced learning (SPL) strategy based on NDFs is proposed in the training stage. SPL learns samples from easy to complex by increasing the number of samples selected into the training process, which enables to effectively suppress the negative impacts introduced by low-quality samples and inconsistently distributed NDFs. Experiments on three popular databases (i.e., CK+, Oulu-CASIA, and RAF-DB) show the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 面部表情识别的准确性通常受到以下因素的影响：不同表情的高度相似性、干扰因素以及快速而微妙变化的微面部运动。解决这些障碍的一种潜在可行的解决方案是利用中性表情图像中隐藏的中性信息。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种自定进度的中性表达解缠学习（SPNDL）模型。 SPNDL 将中性信息与面部表情分离，从而更容易提取关键和偏差特征。具体来说，它可以捕获相似表情之间的区分信息并感知微面部运动。为了更好地学习这些中性表达解缠结特征（NDF）并缓解非凸优化问题，在训练阶段提出了一种基于NDF的自定进度学习（SPL）策略。 SPL通过增加训练过程中选择的样本数量来学习从简单到复杂的样本，能够有效抑制低质量样本和分布不一致的NDF带来的负面影响。在三个流行数据库（即 CK+、Oulu-CASIA 和 RAF-DB）上的实验表明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应中性表情解耦学习模型（SPNDL），用于解决面部表情识别中的相似表情混淆、干扰因素和微表情识别难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因表情相似性高、干扰因素多及微表情变化快而难以准确识别面部表情，需利用中性表情中隐藏的信息提升特征区分度。
AI.method: 通过解耦中性表情信息提取关键特征与偏差特征，并采用基于中性解耦特征的自适应学习策略，从简单到复杂逐步训练以抑制低质量样本干扰。
AI.result: 在CK+、Oulu-CASIA和RAF-DB三个数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，显著提升表情识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: SPNDL模型通过中性表情解耦与自适应学习策略，有效解决了表情识别中的关键挑战，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Self-Paced Neutral Expression-Disentangled Learning for Facial Expression Recognition 用于面部表情识别的自定进度中性表情解缠学习 The accuracy of facial expression recognition is typically affected by the following factors: high similarities across different expressions, disturbing factors, and micro-facial movement of rapid and subtle changes. One potentially viable solution for addressing these barriers is to exploit the neutral information concealed in neutral expression images. To this end, in this paper we propose a self-Paced Neutral Expression-Disentangled Learning (SPNDL) model. SPNDL disentangles neutral information from facial expressions, making it easier to extract key and deviation features. Specifically, it allows to capture discriminative information among similar expressions and perceive micro-facial movements. In order to better learn these neutral expression-disentangled features (NDFs) and to alleviate the non-convex optimization problem, a self-paced learning (SPL) strategy based on NDFs is proposed in the training stage. SPL learns samples from easy to complex by increasing the number of samples selected into the training process, which enables to effectively suppress the negative impacts introduced by low-quality samples and inconsistently distributed NDFs. Experiments on three popular databases (i.e., CK+, Oulu-CASIA, and RAF-DB) show the effectiveness of our proposed method. 面部表情识别的准确性通常受到以下因素的影响：不同表情的高度相似性、干扰因素以及快速而微妙变化的微面部运动。解决这些障碍的一种潜在可行的解决方案是利用中性表情图像中隐藏的中性信息。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种自定进度的中性表达解缠学习（SPNDL）模型。 SPNDL 将中性信息与面部表情分离，从而更容易提取关键和偏差特征。具体来说，它可以捕获相似表情之间的区分信息并感知微面部运动。为了更好地学习这些中性表达解缠结特征（NDF）并缓解非凸优化问题，在训练阶段提出了一种基于NDF的自定进度学习（SPL）策略。 SPL通过增加训练过程中选择的样本数量来学习从简单到复杂的样本，能够有效抑制低质量样本和分布不一致的NDF带来的负面影响。在三个流行数据库（即 CK+、Oulu-CASIA 和 RAF-DB）上的实验表明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种自适应中性表情解耦学习模型（SPNDL），用于解决面部表情识别中的相似表情混淆、干扰因素和微表情识别难题。 Zhenqian Wu,Xiaoyuan Li,Yazhou Ren,Xiaorong Pu,Xiaofeng Zhu,Lifang He cs.CV

authors_text: Zahra Tabatabaei,Adrian colomer,Kjersti Engan,Javier Oliver,Valery Naranjo
title: Self-supervised learning of a tailored Convolutional Auto Encoder for histopathological prostate grading
title_zh: 用于组织病理学前列腺分级的定制卷积自动编码器的自我监督学习
abstract: According to GLOBOCAN 2020, prostate cancer is the second most common cancer in men worldwide and the fourth most prevalent cancer overall. For pathologists, grading prostate cancer is challenging, especially when discriminating between Grade 3 (G3) and Grade 4 (G4). This paper proposes a Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) framework to classify prostate histopathological images when labeled images are scarce. In particular, a tailored Convolutional Auto Encoder (CAE) is trained to reconstruct 128x128x3 patches of prostate cancer Whole Slide Images (WSIs) as a pretext task. The downstream task of the proposed SSL paradigm is the automatic grading of histopathological patches of prostate cancer. The presented framework reports promising results on the validation set, obtaining an overall accuracy of 83% and on the test set, achieving an overall accuracy value of 76% with F1-score of 77% in G4.
summary: According to GLOBOCAN 2020, prostate cancer is the second most common cancer in men worldwide and the fourth most prevalent cancer overall. For pathologists, grading prostate cancer is challenging, especially when discriminating between Grade 3 (G3) and Grade 4 (G4). This paper proposes a Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) framework to classify prostate histopathological images when labeled images are scarce. In particular, a tailored Convolutional Auto Encoder (CAE) is trained to reconstruct 128x128x3 patches of prostate cancer Whole Slide Images (WSIs) as a pretext task. The downstream task of the proposed SSL paradigm is the automatic grading of histopathological patches of prostate cancer. The presented framework reports promising results on the validation set, obtaining an overall accuracy of 83% and on the test set, achieving an overall accuracy value of 76% with F1-score of 77% in G4.
abstract_zh: 根据 GLOBOCAN 2020，前列腺癌是全球男性第二大常见癌症，也是第四大常见癌症。对于病理学家来说，对前列腺癌进行分级具有挑战性，尤其是在区分 3 级 (G3) 和 4 级 (G4) 时。本文提出了一种自我监督学习（SSL）框架，用于在标记图像稀缺时对前列腺组织病理学图像进行分类。特别是，训练定制的卷积自动编码器 (CAE) 来重建前列腺癌整体幻灯片图像 (WSI) 的 128x128x3 块，作为借口任务。所提出的 SSL 范例的下游任务是对前列腺癌的组织病理学斑块进行自动分级。所提出的框架在验证集上报告了有希望的结果，获得了 83% 的总体准确度；在测试集上，实现了 76% 的总体准确度值，G4 中的 F1 分数为 77%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的卷积自编码器（CAE）框架，用于解决前列腺癌病理图像分级中标签数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 前列腺癌分级（尤其是G3与G4的区分）对病理学家具有挑战性，而标注数据的不足限制了传统监督学习方法的应用。
AI.method: 通过训练定制化的卷积自编码器重建前列腺癌全切片图像（WSI）的128x128x3图像块作为预训练任务，随后在下游任务中实现病理图像的自动分级。
AI.result: 在验证集上达到83%的总体准确率，在测试集上实现76%的总体准确率和G4类别的77% F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 该自监督学习框架在有限标注数据下展现了有效的前列腺癌分级能力，为病理图像分析提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Michele Pascale,Vivek Muthurangu,Javier Montalt Tordera,Heather E Fitzke,Gauraang Bhatnagar,Stuart Taylor,Jennifer Steeden
title: CLADE: Cycle Loss Augmented Degradation Enhancement for Unpaired Super-Resolution of Anisotropic Medical Images
title_zh: CLADE：各向异性医学图像的不成对超分辨率的循环损失增强退化增强
abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) imaging is popular in medical applications, however, anisotropic 3D volumes with thick, low-spatial-resolution slices are often acquired to reduce scan times. Deep learning (DL) offers a solution to recover high-resolution features through super-resolution reconstruction (SRR). Unfortunately, paired training data is unavailable in many 3D medical applications and therefore we propose a novel unpaired approach; CLADE (Cycle Loss Augmented Degradation Enhancement). CLADE uses a modified CycleGAN architecture with a cycle-consistent gradient mapping loss, to learn SRR of the low-resolution dimension, from disjoint patches of the high-resolution plane within the anisotropic 3D volume data itself. We show the feasibility of CLADE in abdominal MRI and abdominal CT and demonstrate significant improvements in CLADE image quality over low-resolution volumes and state-of-the-art self-supervised SRR; SMORE (Synthetic Multi-Orientation Resolution Enhancement). Quantitative PIQUE (qualitative perception-based image quality evaluator) scores and quantitative edge sharpness (ES - calculated as the maximum gradient of pixel intensities over a border of interest), showed superior performance for CLADE in both MRI and CT. Qualitatively CLADE had the best overall image quality and highest perceptual ES over the low-resolution volumes and SMORE. This paper demonstrates the potential of using CLADE for super-resolution reconstruction of anisotropic 3D medical imaging data without the need for paired 3D training data.
summary: Three-dimensional (3D) imaging is popular in medical applications, however, anisotropic 3D volumes with thick, low-spatial-resolution slices are often acquired to reduce scan times. Deep learning (DL) offers a solution to recover high-resolution features through super-resolution reconstruction (SRR). Unfortunately, paired training data is unavailable in many 3D medical applications and therefore we propose a novel unpaired approach; CLADE (Cycle Loss Augmented Degradation Enhancement). CLADE uses a modified CycleGAN architecture with a cycle-consistent gradient mapping loss, to learn SRR of the low-resolution dimension, from disjoint patches of the high-resolution plane within the anisotropic 3D volume data itself. We show the feasibility of CLADE in abdominal MRI and abdominal CT and demonstrate significant improvements in CLADE image quality over low-resolution volumes and state-of-the-art self-supervised SRR; SMORE (Synthetic Multi-Orientation Resolution Enhancement). Quantitative PIQUE (qualitative perception-based image quality evaluator) scores and quantitative edge sharpness (ES - calculated as the maximum gradient of pixel intensities over a border of interest), showed superior performance for CLADE in both MRI and CT. Qualitatively CLADE had the best overall image quality and highest perceptual ES over the low-resolution volumes and SMORE. This paper demonstrates the potential of using CLADE for super-resolution reconstruction of anisotropic 3D medical imaging data without the need for paired 3D training data.
abstract_zh: 三维 (3D) 成像在医疗应用中很流行，但是，通常会采集具有厚的、低空间分辨率切片的各向异性 3D 体积以减少扫描时间。深度学习（DL）提供了一种通过超分辨率重建（SRR）恢复高分辨率特征的解决方案。不幸的是，配对训练数据在许多 3D 医学应用中不可用，因此我们提出了一种新颖的不配对方法； CLADE（循环损失增强降解增强）。 CLADE 使用修改后的 CycleGAN 架构，具有循环一致的梯度映射损失，从各向异性 3D 体积数据本身内高分辨率平面的不相交补丁来学习低分辨率维度的 SRR。我们展示了 CLADE 在腹部 MRI 和腹部 CT 中的可行性，并证明 CLADE 图像质量相对于低分辨率体积和最先进的自监督 SRR 具有显着改善； SMORE（综合多方向分辨率增强）。定量 PIQUE（基于定性感知的图像质量评估器）评分和定量边缘锐度（ES - 计算为感兴趣边界上像素强度的最大梯度）在 MRI 和 CT 中都显示出 CLADE 的卓越性能。定性地讲，与低分辨率体积和 SMORE 相比，CLADE 具有最佳的整体图像质量和最高的感知 ES。本文展示了使用 CLADE 对各向异性 3D 医学成像数据进行超分辨率重建的潜力，而无需配对 3D 训练数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLADE方法，用于在没有配对训练数据的情况下，对各向异性医学图像进行非配对超分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: 医学3D成像中常因扫描时间限制导致低分辨率切片，而现有超分辨率方法依赖配对数据，但实际应用中难以获取。
AI.method: 基于CycleGAN架构，引入循环一致梯度映射损失，利用高分辨率平面的离散块学习低分辨率维度的重建。
AI.result: 在腹部MRI和CT数据中，CLADE的PIQUE评分和边缘锐度指标均优于低分辨率数据和SMORE方法，且定性图像质量最佳。
AI.conclusion: CLADE无需配对数据即可有效提升各向异性医学图像的超分辨率，为临床应用提供可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CLADE方法，用于在没有配对训练数据的情况下，对各向异性医学图像进行非配对超分辨率重建。

ai_content.method: 基于CycleGAN架构，引入循环一致梯度映射损失，利用高分辨率平面的离散块学习低分辨率维度的重建。

search_text: CLADE: Cycle Loss Augmented Degradation Enhancement for Unpaired Super-Resolution of Anisotropic Medical Images CLADE：各向异性医学图像的不成对超分辨率的循环损失增强退化增强 Three-dimensional (3D) imaging is popular in medical applications, however, anisotropic 3D volumes with thick, low-spatial-resolution slices are often acquired to reduce scan times. Deep learning (DL) offers a solution to recover high-resolution features through super-resolution reconstruction (SRR). Unfortunately, paired training data is unavailable in many 3D medical applications and therefore we propose a novel unpaired approach; CLADE (Cycle Loss Augmented Degradation Enhancement). CLADE uses a modified CycleGAN architecture with a cycle-consistent gradient mapping loss, to learn SRR of the low-resolution dimension, from disjoint patches of the high-resolution plane within the anisotropic 3D volume data itself. We show the feasibility of CLADE in abdominal MRI and abdominal CT and demonstrate significant improvements in CLADE image quality over low-resolution volumes and state-of-the-art self-supervised SRR; SMORE (Synthetic Multi-Orientation Resolution Enhancement). Quantitative PIQUE (qualitative perception-based image quality evaluator) scores and quantitative edge sharpness (ES - calculated as the maximum gradient of pixel intensities over a border of interest), showed superior performance for CLADE in both MRI and CT. Qualitatively CLADE had the best overall image quality and highest perceptual ES over the low-resolution volumes and SMORE. This paper demonstrates the potential of using CLADE for super-resolution reconstruction of anisotropic 3D medical imaging data without the need for paired 3D training data. 三维 (3D) 成像在医疗应用中很流行，但是，通常会采集具有厚的、低空间分辨率切片的各向异性 3D 体积以减少扫描时间。深度学习（DL）提供了一种通过超分辨率重建（SRR）恢复高分辨率特征的解决方案。不幸的是，配对训练数据在许多 3D 医学应用中不可用，因此我们提出了一种新颖的不配对方法； CLADE（循环损失增强降解增强）。 CLADE 使用修改后的 CycleGAN 架构，具有循环一致的梯度映射损失，从各向异性 3D 体积数据本身内高分辨率平面的不相交补丁来学习低分辨率维度的 SRR。我们展示了 CLADE 在腹部 MRI 和腹部 CT 中的可行性，并证明 CLADE 图像质量相对于低分辨率体积和最先进的自监督 SRR 具有显着改善； SMORE（综合多方向分辨率增强）。定量 PIQUE（基于定性感知的图像质量评估器）评分和定量边缘锐度（ES - 计算为感兴趣边界上像素强度的最大梯度）在 MRI 和 CT 中都显示出 CLADE 的卓越性能。定性地讲，与低分辨率体积和 SMORE 相比，CLADE 具有最佳的整体图像质量和最高的感知 ES。本文展示了使用 CLADE 对各向异性 3D 医学成像数据进行超分辨率重建的潜力，而无需配对 3D 训练数据。 本文提出CLADE方法，用于在没有配对训练数据的情况下，对各向异性医学图像进行非配对超分辨率重建。 Michele Pascale,Vivek Muthurangu,Javier Montalt Tordera,Heather E Fitzke,Gauraang Bhatnagar,Stuart Taylor,Jennifer Steeden cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Caixia Zhou,Yaping Huang,Mengyang Pu,Qingji Guan,Li Huang,Haibin Ling
title: The Treasure Beneath Multiple Annotations: An Uncertainty-aware Edge Detector
title_zh: 多重注释下的宝藏：不确定性感知边缘检测器
abstract: Deep learning-based edge detectors heavily rely on pixel-wise labels which are often provided by multiple annotators. Existing methods fuse multiple annotations using a simple voting process, ignoring the inherent ambiguity of edges and labeling bias of annotators. In this paper, we propose a novel uncertainty-aware edge detector (UAED), which employs uncertainty to investigate the subjectivity and ambiguity of diverse annotations. Specifically, we first convert the deterministic label space into a learnable Gaussian distribution, whose variance measures the degree of ambiguity among different annotations. Then we regard the learned variance as the estimated uncertainty of the predicted edge maps, and pixels with higher uncertainty are likely to be hard samples for edge detection. Therefore we design an adaptive weighting loss to emphasize the learning from those pixels with high uncertainty, which helps the network to gradually concentrate on the important pixels. UAED can be combined with various encoder-decoder backbones, and the extensive experiments demonstrate that UAED achieves superior performance consistently across multiple edge detection benchmarks. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/ZhouCX117/UAED}
summary: Deep learning-based edge detectors heavily rely on pixel-wise labels which are often provided by multiple annotators. Existing methods fuse multiple annotations using a simple voting process, ignoring the inherent ambiguity of edges and labeling bias of annotators. In this paper, we propose a novel uncertainty-aware edge detector (UAED), which employs uncertainty to investigate the subjectivity and ambiguity of diverse annotations. Specifically, we first convert the deterministic label space into a learnable Gaussian distribution, whose variance measures the degree of ambiguity among different annotations. Then we regard the learned variance as the estimated uncertainty of the predicted edge maps, and pixels with higher uncertainty are likely to be hard samples for edge detection. Therefore we design an adaptive weighting loss to emphasize the learning from those pixels with high uncertainty, which helps the network to gradually concentrate on the important pixels. UAED can be combined with various encoder-decoder backbones, and the extensive experiments demonstrate that UAED achieves superior performance consistently across multiple edge detection benchmarks. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/ZhouCX117/UAED}
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的边缘检测器严重依赖于像素级标签，这些标签通常由多个注释器提供。现有方法使用简单的投票过程融合多个注释，忽略了边缘固有的模糊性和注释者的标签偏差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的不确定性感知边缘检测器（UAED），它利用不确定性来研究不同注释的主观性和模糊性。具体来说，我们首先将确定性标签空间转换为可学习的高斯分布，其方差衡量不同注释之间的模糊程度。然后我们将学习到的方差视为预测边缘图的估计不确定性，不确定性较高的像素很可能是边缘检测的硬样本。因此，我们设计了一个自适应权重损失来强调对那些具有高不确定性的像素的学习，这有助于网络逐渐集中在重要的像素上。 UAED 可以与各种编码器-解码器主干结合使用，大量的实验表明，UAED 在多个边缘检测基准上一致地实现了卓越的性能。源代码位于\url{https://github.com/ZhouCX117/UAED}

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性的边缘检测器（UAED），通过建模多标注间的模糊性与标注偏差，提升边缘检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过简单投票融合多标注，忽视了边缘的主观模糊性及标注者偏差，导致模型难以学习复杂边缘特征。
AI.method: 将确定性标签转换为可学习的高斯分布，用方差量化标注模糊度；以方差作为预测不确定性，设计自适应加权损失函数，强化对高不确定性像素的学习。
AI.result: UAED在多个边缘检测基准上均取得优于现有方法的性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模标注不确定性，UAED能有效提升边缘检测模型对模糊区域的感知能力，具有广泛的骨干网络兼容性。

authors_text: Matthew Brehmer,Maxime Cordeil,Christophe Hurter,Takayuki Itoh
title: The MERCADO Workshop at IEEE VIS 2023: Multimodal Experiences for Remote Communication Around Data Online
title_zh: IEEE VIS 2023 的 MECADO 研讨会：围绕数据在线的远程通信的多模式体验
comment: Workshop accepted for IEEE VIS 2023 (https://ieeevis.org/year/2023/info/workshops): October 22 - 27 in Melbourne, Australia. Website: https://sites.google.com/view/mercadoworkshop
comments: Workshop accepted for IEEE VIS 2023 (https://ieeevis.org/year/2023/info/workshops): October 22 - 27 in Melbourne, Australia. Website: https://sites.google.com/view/mercadoworkshop
abstract: We propose a half-day workshop at IEEE VIS 2023 on the topic of communication and collaboration around data. Specifically, we aim to gather researchers interested on multimodal, synchronous, and remote or hybrid forms of communication and collaboration within organizational and educational settings. This topic lies at the intersection of data visualization, human-computer interaction, and computer-supported collaborative work, and overlaps thematically with several prior seminars and workshops. Our intended outcomes for the workshop include assembling a corpus of inspiring examples and a design space, ideally consolidated into a survey paper, as well as the establishment of new collaborations and a shared research agenda. We anticipate a format comprised of short presentations and demos, an invited keynote or fireside chat, and a breakout group session organized around specific application domains. Website: https://sites.google.com/view/mercadoworkshop.
summary: We propose a half-day workshop at IEEE VIS 2023 on the topic of communication and collaboration around data. Specifically, we aim to gather researchers interested on multimodal, synchronous, and remote or hybrid forms of communication and collaboration within organizational and educational settings. This topic lies at the intersection of data visualization, human-computer interaction, and computer-supported collaborative work, and overlaps thematically with several prior seminars and workshops. Our intended outcomes for the workshop include assembling a corpus of inspiring examples and a design space, ideally consolidated into a survey paper, as well as the establishment of new collaborations and a shared research agenda. We anticipate a format comprised of short presentations and demos, an invited keynote or fireside chat, and a breakout group session organized around specific application domains. Website: https://sites.google.com/view/mercadoworkshop.
abstract_zh: 我们建议在 IEEE VIS 2023 上举办为期半天的研讨会，主题是围绕数据的通信和协作。具体来说，我们的目标是聚集对组织和教育环境中多模式、同步、远程或混合形式的沟通和协作感兴趣的研究人员。该主题位于数据可视化、人机交互和计算机支持的协作工作的交叉点，并且与之前的几个研讨会和讲习班在主题上重叠。我们对研讨会的预期成果包括收集一系列鼓舞人心的例子和一个设计空间，最好将其合并到一份调查论文中，以及建立新的合作和共同的研究议程。我们预期的形式包括简短的演示和演示、受邀的主题演讲或炉边聊天以及围绕特定应用领域组织的分组会议。网站：https://sites.google.com/view/mercadoworkshop。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出在IEEE VIS 2023举办为期半天的工作坊，聚焦数据驱动的远程多模态通信与协作技术。
AI.motivation: 随着远程协作需求增长，现有研究缺乏对多模态、同步化及混合场景下数据通信的系统性探索，需整合可视化、人机交互与协作计算领域成果。
AI.method: 采用主题演讲、案例演示、分组研讨等形式，收集典型应用案例并构建设计空间，最终形成综述论文与研究路线图。
AI.result: 产出多模态通信案例库、跨学科设计框架及合作网络，推动可视化与协作技术的融合创新。
AI.conclusion: 工作坊为远程数据协作研究提供了跨领域方法论，明确了未来在教育、企业等场景的技术突破方向。
