authors_text: SeokYeong Lee,JunYong Choi,Seungryong Kim,Ig-Jae Kim,Junghyun Cho
title: Few-shot Neural Radiance Fields Under Unconstrained Illumination
title_zh: 无约束照明下的少样本神经辐射场
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new challenge for synthesizing novel view images in practical environments with limited input multi-view images and varying lighting conditions. Neural radiance fields (NeRF), one of the pioneering works for this task, demand an extensive set of multi-view images taken under constrained illumination, which is often unattainable in real-world settings. While some previous works have managed to synthesize novel views given images with different illumination, their performance still relies on a substantial number of input multi-view images. To address this problem, we suggest ExtremeNeRF, which utilizes multi-view albedo consistency, supported by geometric alignment. Specifically, we extract intrinsic image components that should be illumination-invariant across different views, enabling direct appearance comparison between the input and novel view under unconstrained illumination. We offer thorough experimental results for task evaluation, employing the newly created NeRF Extreme benchmark-the first in-the-wild benchmark for novel view synthesis under multiple viewing directions and varying illuminations.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a new challenge for synthesizing novel view images in practical environments with limited input multi-view images and varying lighting conditions. Neural radiance fields (NeRF), one of the pioneering works for this task, demand an extensive set of multi-view images taken under constrained illumination, which is often unattainable in real-world settings. While some previous works have managed to synthesize novel views given images with different illumination, their performance still relies on a substantial number of input multi-view images. To address this problem, we suggest ExtremeNeRF, which utilizes multi-view albedo consistency, supported by geometric alignment. Specifically, we extract intrinsic image components that should be illumination-invariant across different views, enabling direct appearance comparison between the input and novel view under unconstrained illumination. We offer thorough experimental results for task evaluation, employing the newly created NeRF Extreme benchmark-the first in-the-wild benchmark for novel view synthesis under multiple viewing directions and varying illuminations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了在输入多视图图像有限和照明条件变化的实际环境中合成新颖视图图像的新挑战。神经辐射场（NeRF）是这项任务的开创性工作之一，需要在受限照明下拍摄大量的多视图图像，这在现实环境中通常是无法实现的。虽然之前的一些工作已经成功地在给定不同照明的图像的情况下合成新颖的视图，但它们的性能仍然依赖于大量的输入多视图图像。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用 ExtremeNeRF，它利用多视图反照率一致性，并由几何对齐支持。具体来说，我们提取在不同视图中应保持照明不变的固有图像分量，从而能够在无约束照明下对输入视图和新视图进行直接外观比较。我们采用新创建的 NeRF Extreme 基准测试，为任务评估提供全面的实验结果，这是第一个在多个观察方向和不同照明下进行新颖视图合成的野外基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在非受限光照条件下，利用少量多视角图像合成新视角图像的挑战性任务。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法需要大量受控光照下的多视角图像，而实际场景中难以获取此类数据，且现有方法仍依赖大量输入图像。
AI.method: 提出ExtremeNeRF方法，通过几何对齐的多视角反照率一致性，提取跨视角光照不变的内在图像成分，实现非受限光照下的直接外观比较。
AI.result: 在新构建的NeRF Extreme基准测试中验证了方法有效性，展示了在多视角方向和变化光照下的新视角合成能力。
AI.conclusion: ExtremeNeRF通过利用光照不变特性，显著提升了真实场景中少量输入图像下的新视角合成性能。

To address this problem, we suggest ExtremeNeRF, which utilizes multi-view albedo consistency, supported by geometric alignment. Specifically, we extract intrinsic image components that should be illumination-invariant across different views, enabling direct appearance comparison between the input and novel view under unconstrained illumination. We offer thorough experimental results for task evaluation, employing the newly created NeRF Extreme benchmark-the first in-the-wild benchmark for novel view synthesis under multiple viewing directions and varying illuminations. 在本文中，我们提出了在输入多视图图像有限和照明条件变化的实际环境中合成新颖视图图像的新挑战。神经辐射场（NeRF）是这项任务的开创性工作之一，需要在受限照明下拍摄大量的多视图图像，这在现实环境中通常是无法实现的。虽然之前的一些工作已经成功地在给定不同照明的图像的情况下合成新颖的视图，但它们的性能仍然依赖于大量的输入多视图图像。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用 ExtremeNeRF，它利用多视图反照率一致性，并由几何对齐支持。具体来说，我们提取在不同视图中应保持照明不变的固有图像分量，从而能够在无约束照明下对输入视图和新视图进行直接外观比较。我们采用新创建的 NeRF Extreme 基准测试，为任务评估提供全面的实验结果，这是第一个在多个观察方向和不同照明下进行新颖视图合成的野外基准测试。 本文提出了一种在非受限光照条件下，利用少量多视角图像合成新视角图像的挑战性任务。 SeokYeong Lee,JunYong Choi,Seungryong Kim,Ig-Jae Kim,Junghyun Cho cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaoxuan Ma,Jiajun Su,Chunyu Wang,Wentao Zhu,Yizhou Wang
title: 3D Human Mesh Estimation from Virtual Markers
title_zh: 根据虚拟标记进行 3D 人体网格估计
abstract: Inspired by the success of volumetric 3D pose estimation, some recent human mesh estimators propose to estimate 3D skeletons as intermediate representations, from which, the dense 3D meshes are regressed by exploiting the mesh topology. However, body shape information is lost in extracting skeletons, leading to mediocre performance. The advanced motion capture systems solve the problem by placing dense physical markers on the body surface, which allows to extract realistic meshes from their non-rigid motions. However, they cannot be applied to wild images without markers. In this work, we present an intermediate representation, named virtual markers, which learns 64 landmark keypoints on the body surface based on the large-scale mocap data in a generative style, mimicking the effects of physical markers. The virtual markers can be accurately detected from wild images and can reconstruct the intact meshes with realistic shapes by simple interpolation. Our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on three datasets. In particular, it surpasses the existing methods by a notable margin on the SURREAL dataset, which has diverse body shapes. Code is available at https://github.com/ShirleyMaxx/VirtualMarker
summary: Inspired by the success of volumetric 3D pose estimation, some recent human mesh estimators propose to estimate 3D skeletons as intermediate representations, from which, the dense 3D meshes are regressed by exploiting the mesh topology. However, body shape information is lost in extracting skeletons, leading to mediocre performance. The advanced motion capture systems solve the problem by placing dense physical markers on the body surface, which allows to extract realistic meshes from their non-rigid motions. However, they cannot be applied to wild images without markers. In this work, we present an intermediate representation, named virtual markers, which learns 64 landmark keypoints on the body surface based on the large-scale mocap data in a generative style, mimicking the effects of physical markers. The virtual markers can be accurately detected from wild images and can reconstruct the intact meshes with realistic shapes by simple interpolation. Our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on three datasets. In particular, it surpasses the existing methods by a notable margin on the SURREAL dataset, which has diverse body shapes. Code is available at https://github.com/ShirleyMaxx/VirtualMarker
abstract_zh: 受体积 3D 姿态估计成功的启发，最近的一些人体网格估计器提出将 3D 骨架估计为中间表示，从中通过利用网格拓扑来回归密集的 3D 网格。然而，在提取骨骼时，身体形状信息会丢失，导致表现平平。先进的运动捕捉系统通过在身体表面放置密集的物理标记来解决这个问题，从而可以从非刚性运动中提取逼真的网格。然而，它们不能应用于没有标记的野生图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为虚拟标记的中间表示，它基于大规模动作捕捉数据以生成方式学习身体表面的 64 个地标关键点，模仿物理标记的效果。虚拟标记可以从野生图像中准确检测出来，并可以通过简单的插值重建具有真实形状的完整网格。我们的方法在三个数据集上优于最先进的方法。特别是，它在具有多种身体形状的 SURREAL 数据集上明显超越了现有方法。代码可在 https://github.com/ShirleyMaxx/VirtualMarker 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟标记的人体3D网格估计方法，用于从普通图像中重建人体的完整3D网格。
AI.motivation: 传统的3D人体网格估计方法在提取骨骼信息时会丢失身体形状信息，而高级动作捕捉系统虽然能提取真实网格，但无法应用于没有标记的野外图像。因此，需要一种新的中间表示方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为虚拟标记的中间表示，通过生成风格的学习方法，在大规模动作捕捉数据上学习64个身体表面的关键点，模拟物理标记的效果。这些虚拟标记可以从野外图像中准确检测，并通过简单插值重建出具有真实形状的完整网格。
AI.result: 该方法在三个数据集上优于现有最先进的方法，尤其在具有多样人体形状的SURREAL数据集上表现显著。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的虚拟标记方法有效解决了传统方法在人体形状信息丢失和应用范围受限的问题，为从野外图像中重建真实人体3D网格提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alessandro Navone,Mauro Martini,Simone Angarano,Marcello Chiaberge
title: Online Learning of Wheel Odometry Correction for Mobile Robots with Attention-based Neural Network
title_zh: 基于注意力的神经网络移动机器人车轮里程校正在线学习
abstract: Modern robotic platforms need a reliable localization system to operate daily beside humans. Simple pose estimation algorithms based on filtered wheel and inertial odometry often fail in the presence of abrupt kinematic changes and wheel slips. Moreover, despite the recent success of visual odometry, service and assistive robotic tasks often present challenging environmental conditions where visual-based solutions fail due to poor lighting or repetitive feature patterns. In this work, we propose an innovative online learning approach for wheel odometry correction, paving the way for a robust multi-source localization system. An efficient attention-based neural network architecture has been studied to combine precise performances with real-time inference. The proposed solution shows remarkable results compared to a standard neural network and filter-based odometry correction algorithms. Nonetheless, the online learning paradigm avoids the time-consuming data collection procedure and can be adopted on a generic robotic platform on-the-fly.
summary: Modern robotic platforms need a reliable localization system to operate daily beside humans. Simple pose estimation algorithms based on filtered wheel and inertial odometry often fail in the presence of abrupt kinematic changes and wheel slips. Moreover, despite the recent success of visual odometry, service and assistive robotic tasks often present challenging environmental conditions where visual-based solutions fail due to poor lighting or repetitive feature patterns. In this work, we propose an innovative online learning approach for wheel odometry correction, paving the way for a robust multi-source localization system. An efficient attention-based neural network architecture has been studied to combine precise performances with real-time inference. The proposed solution shows remarkable results compared to a standard neural network and filter-based odometry correction algorithms. Nonetheless, the online learning paradigm avoids the time-consuming data collection procedure and can be adopted on a generic robotic platform on-the-fly.
abstract_zh: 现代机器人平台需要可靠的定位系统来日常与人类一起操作。基于滤波车轮和惯性里程计的简单姿态估计算法在出现突然的运动变化和车轮打滑时通常会失败。此外，尽管视觉里程计最近取得了成功，但服务和辅助机器人任务经常面临具有挑战性的环境条件，其中基于视觉的解决方案由于照明不良或重复的特征模式而失败。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于车轮里程计校正的创新在线学习方法，为强大的多源定位系统铺平了道路。研究了一种高效的基于注意力的神经网络架构，将精确的性能与实时推理结合起来。与标准神经网络和基于滤波器的里程计校正算法相比，所提出的解决方案显示出显着的结果。尽管如此，在线学习范式避免了耗时的数据收集过程，并且可以在通用机器人平台上即时采用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制神经网络的在线学习方法，用于校正移动机器人的轮式里程计，以提升复杂环境下的定位鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有轮式里程计和视觉里程计在动态环境、轮滑或光照不足等场景下定位精度不足，且传统方法依赖离线数据采集，难以适应实时变化的环境。
AI.method: 设计注意力机制神经网络架构，结合多源传感器数据实现在线学习，无需离线数据训练，支持实时推理与动态环境适应。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定位精度上优于传统神经网络和滤波算法，且能实时运行，适用于通用移动机器人平台。
AI.conclusion: 在线学习框架结合注意力机制有效解决了动态环境下的里程计校正问题，为多源融合定位系统提供了轻量化、实时化的解决方案。

authors_text: Linda-Sophie Schneider,Mareike Thies,Christopher Syben,Richard Schielein,Mathias Unberath,Andreas Maier
title: Task-based Generation of Optimized Projection Sets using Differentiable Ranking
title_zh: 使用可微排序基于任务生成优化投影集
abstract: We present a method for selecting valuable projections in computed tomography (CT) scans to enhance image reconstruction and diagnosis. The approach integrates two important factors, projection-based detectability and data completeness, into a single feed-forward neural network. The network evaluates the value of projections, processes them through a differentiable ranking function and makes the final selection using a straight-through estimator. Data completeness is ensured through the label provided during training. The approach eliminates the need for heuristically enforcing data completeness, which may exclude valuable projections. The method is evaluated on simulated data in a non-destructive testing scenario, where the aim is to maximize the reconstruction quality within a specified region of interest. We achieve comparable results to previous methods, laying the foundation for using reconstruction-based loss functions to learn the selection of projections.
summary: We present a method for selecting valuable projections in computed tomography (CT) scans to enhance image reconstruction and diagnosis. The approach integrates two important factors, projection-based detectability and data completeness, into a single feed-forward neural network. The network evaluates the value of projections, processes them through a differentiable ranking function and makes the final selection using a straight-through estimator. Data completeness is ensured through the label provided during training. The approach eliminates the need for heuristically enforcing data completeness, which may exclude valuable projections. The method is evaluated on simulated data in a non-destructive testing scenario, where the aim is to maximize the reconstruction quality within a specified region of interest. We achieve comparable results to previous methods, laying the foundation for using reconstruction-based loss functions to learn the selection of projections.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在计算机断层扫描（CT）扫描中选择有价值的投影以增强图像重建和诊断的方法。该方法将两个重要因素（基于投影的可检测性和数据完整性）集成到单个前馈神经网络中。该网络评估预测的价值，通过可微的排名函数对其进行处理，并使用直通估计器进行最终选择。通过训练期间提供的标签确保数据完整性。该方法消除了启发式强制数据完整性的需要，这可能会排除有价值的预测。该方法在无损测试场景中的模拟数据上进行评估，其目的是最大化指定感兴趣区域内的重建质量。我们取得了与以前的方法相当的结果，为使用基于重建的损失函数来学习投影的选择奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于任务的优化投影集生成方法，通过神经网络选择CT扫描中的关键投影以提高图像重建质量。
AI.motivation: 传统CT投影选择方法依赖启发式规则可能排除有效投影，需平衡投影可检测性与数据完整性以提升诊断准确性。
AI.method: 构建前馈神经网络整合投影可检测性与数据完整性，通过可微分排序函数和直通估计器进行投影选择，利用训练标签保证数据完整性。
AI.result: 在非破坏性检测模拟数据中，该方法重建质量与现有技术相当，验证了基于重建损失函数的投影选择可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为利用重建质量指导投影选择提供了新思路，未来可拓展至临床CT扫描优化场景。

search_text: Task-based Generation of Optimized Projection Sets using Differentiable Ranking 使用可微排序基于任务生成优化投影集 We present a method for selecting valuable projections in computed tomography (CT) scans to enhance image reconstruction and diagnosis. The approach integrates two important factors, projection-based detectability and data completeness, into a single feed-forward neural network. The network evaluates the value of projections, processes them through a differentiable ranking function and makes the final selection using a straight-through estimator. Data completeness is ensured through the label provided during training. The approach eliminates the need for heuristically enforcing data completeness, which may exclude valuable projections. The method is evaluated on simulated data in a non-destructive testing scenario, where the aim is to maximize the reconstruction quality within a specified region of interest. We achieve comparable results to previous methods, laying the foundation for using reconstruction-based loss functions to learn the selection of projections. 我们提出了一种在计算机断层扫描（CT）扫描中选择有价值的投影以增强图像重建和诊断的方法。该方法将两个重要因素（基于投影的可检测性和数据完整性）集成到单个前馈神经网络中。该网络评估预测的价值，通过可微的排名函数对其进行处理，并使用直通估计器进行最终选择。通过训练期间提供的标签确保数据完整性。该方法消除了启发式强制数据完整性的需要，这可能会排除有价值的预测。该方法在无损测试场景中的模拟数据上进行评估，其目的是最大化指定感兴趣区域内的重建质量。我们取得了与以前的方法相当的结果，为使用基于重建的损失函数来学习投影的选择奠定了基础。 本文提出一种基于任务的优化投影集生成方法，通过神经网络选择CT扫描中的关键投影以提高图像重建质量。 Linda-Sophie Schneider,Mareike Thies,Christopher Syben,Richard Schielein,Mathias Unberath,Andreas Maier cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Shuzhou Yang,Moxuan Ding,Yanmin Wu,Zihan Li,Jian Zhang
title: Implicit Neural Representation for Cooperative Low-light Image Enhancement
title_zh: 用于协作低光图像增强的隐式神经表示
abstract: The following three factors restrict the application of existing low-light image enhancement methods: unpredictable brightness degradation and noise, inherent gap between metric-favorable and visual-friendly versions, and the limited paired training data. To address these limitations, we propose an implicit Neural Representation method for Cooperative low-light image enhancement, dubbed NeRCo. It robustly recovers perceptual-friendly results in an unsupervised manner. Concretely, NeRCo unifies the diverse degradation factors of real-world scenes with a controllable fitting function, leading to better robustness. In addition, for the output results, we introduce semantic-orientated supervision with priors from the pre-trained vision-language model. Instead of merely following reference images, it encourages results to meet subjective expectations, finding more visual-friendly solutions. Further, to ease the reliance on paired data and reduce solution space, we develop a dual-closed-loop constrained enhancement module. It is trained cooperatively with other affiliated modules in a self-supervised manner. Finally, extensive experiments demonstrate the robustness and superior effectiveness of our proposed NeRCo. Our code is available at https://github.com/Ysz2022/NeRCo.
summary: The following three factors restrict the application of existing low-light image enhancement methods: unpredictable brightness degradation and noise, inherent gap between metric-favorable and visual-friendly versions, and the limited paired training data. To address these limitations, we propose an implicit Neural Representation method for Cooperative low-light image enhancement, dubbed NeRCo. It robustly recovers perceptual-friendly results in an unsupervised manner. Concretely, NeRCo unifies the diverse degradation factors of real-world scenes with a controllable fitting function, leading to better robustness. In addition, for the output results, we introduce semantic-orientated supervision with priors from the pre-trained vision-language model. Instead of merely following reference images, it encourages results to meet subjective expectations, finding more visual-friendly solutions. Further, to ease the reliance on paired data and reduce solution space, we develop a dual-closed-loop constrained enhancement module. It is trained cooperatively with other affiliated modules in a self-supervised manner. Finally, extensive experiments demonstrate the robustness and superior effectiveness of our proposed NeRCo. Our code is available at https://github.com/Ysz2022/NeRCo.
abstract_zh: 以下三个因素限制了现有低光图像增强方法的应用：不可预测的亮度退化和噪声、度量有利的版本和视觉友好的版本之间的固有差距以及有限的配对训练数据。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种用于协作低光图像增强的隐式神经表示方法，称为 NeRCo。它以无人监督的方式稳健地恢复感知友好的结果。具体来说，NeRCo将现实场景的多种退化因素与可控的拟合函数结合起来，从而具有更好的鲁棒性。此外，对于输出结果，我们引入了基于预训练视觉语言模型先验的面向语义的监督。它不是仅仅遵循参考图像，而是鼓励结果满足主观期望，找到更视觉友好的解决方案。此外，为了减轻对配对数据的依赖并减少解决方案空间，我们开发了双闭环约束增强模块。它以自我监督的方式与其他附属模块合作训练。最后，大量的实验证明了我们提出的 NeRCo 的稳健性和卓越的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Ysz2022/NeRCo 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种隐式神经表示方法NeRCo，用于解决低光图像增强中的亮度退化、视觉与度量差异及数据限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有低光增强方法受限于亮度退化不可预测、视觉效果与度量指标不一致以及依赖成对训练数据等问题。
AI.method: 通过可控拟合函数统一退化因素，引入预训练视觉语言模型的语义监督，并设计双闭环约束模块实现自监督训练。
AI.result: 实验验证了NeRCo在鲁棒性和增强效果上的优越性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: NeRCo有效解决了低光增强中的关键挑战，实现了更符合主观期望的视觉效果。

authors_text: Kamil Adamczewski,Christos Sakaridis,Vaishakh Patil,Luc Van Gool
title: Lidar Line Selection with Spatially-Aware Shapley Value for Cost-Efficient Depth Completion
title_zh: 具有空间感知 Shapley 值的激光雷达线路选择，可实现经济高效的深度完井
abstract: Lidar is a vital sensor for estimating the depth of a scene. Typical spinning lidars emit pulses arranged in several horizontal lines and the monetary cost of the sensor increases with the number of these lines. In this work, we present the new problem of optimizing the positioning of lidar lines to find the most effective configuration for the depth completion task. We propose a solution to reduce the number of lines while retaining the up-to-the-mark quality of depth completion. Our method consists of two components, (1) line selection based on the marginal contribution of a line computed via the Shapley value and (2) incorporating line position spread to take into account its need to arrive at image-wide depth completion. Spatially-aware Shapley values (SaS) succeed in selecting line subsets that yield a depth accuracy comparable to the full lidar input while using just half of the lines.
summary: Lidar is a vital sensor for estimating the depth of a scene. Typical spinning lidars emit pulses arranged in several horizontal lines and the monetary cost of the sensor increases with the number of these lines. In this work, we present the new problem of optimizing the positioning of lidar lines to find the most effective configuration for the depth completion task. We propose a solution to reduce the number of lines while retaining the up-to-the-mark quality of depth completion. Our method consists of two components, (1) line selection based on the marginal contribution of a line computed via the Shapley value and (2) incorporating line position spread to take into account its need to arrive at image-wide depth completion. Spatially-aware Shapley values (SaS) succeed in selecting line subsets that yield a depth accuracy comparable to the full lidar input while using just half of the lines.
abstract_zh: 激光雷达是估计场景深度的重要传感器。典型的旋转激光雷达发射排列在几条水平线中的脉冲，并且传感器的货币成本随着这些线的数量而增加。在这项工作中，我们提出了优化激光雷达线定位的新问题，以找到深度完成任务的最有效配置。我们提出了一种解决方案，可以减少行数，同时保持深度完成的最高质量。我们的方法由两个部分组成，(1) 基于通过 Shapley 值计算的线的边际贡献进行线选择，(2) 结合线位置扩展以考虑其达到图像范围深度完成的需要。空间感知 Shapley 值 (SaS) 成功选择线子集，仅使用一半线，即可产生与完整激光雷达输入​​相当的深度精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间感知夏普利值的方法，通过优化激光雷达线配置，在减少线数的同时保持深度补全质量。
AI.motivation: 激光雷达的线数越多成本越高，但现有方法未充分探索如何以更少线数实现高质量深度补全，需在成本与性能间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 方法包含两部分：(1)基于夏普利值计算单条线的边际贡献进行线选择；(2)引入线位置分布约束以确保全局深度补全效果，提出空间感知夏普利值（SaS）框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用仅一半线数的SaS方法可获得与全量激光雷达输入相当的深度精度。
AI.conclusion: 空间感知夏普利值有效平衡了线数减少与深度精度保持，为低成本高效率的深度补全提供了新思路。

conclusion: 空间感知夏普利值有效平衡了线数减少与深度精度保持，为低成本高效率的深度补全提供了新思路。
search_text: Lidar Line Selection with Spatially-Aware Shapley Value for Cost-Efficient Depth Completion 具有空间感知 Shapley 值的激光雷达线路选择，可实现经济高效的深度完井 Lidar is a vital sensor for estimating the depth of a scene. Typical spinning lidars emit pulses arranged in several horizontal lines and the monetary cost of the sensor increases with the number of these lines. In this work, we present the new problem of optimizing the positioning of lidar lines to find the most effective configuration for the depth completion task. We propose a solution to reduce the number of lines while retaining the up-to-the-mark quality of depth completion. Our method consists of two components, (1) line selection based on the marginal contribution of a line computed via the Shapley value and (2) incorporating line position spread to take into account its need to arrive at image-wide depth completion. Spatially-aware Shapley values (SaS) succeed in selecting line subsets that yield a depth accuracy comparable to the full lidar input while using just half of the lines. 激光雷达是估计场景深度的重要传感器。典型的旋转激光雷达发射排列在几条水平线中的脉冲，并且传感器的货币成本随着这些线的数量而增加。在这项工作中，我们提出了优化激光雷达线定位的新问题，以找到深度完成任务的最有效配置。我们提出了一种解决方案，可以减少行数，同时保持深度完成的最高质量。我们的方法由两个部分组成，(1) 基于通过 Shapley 值计算的线的边际贡献进行线选择，(2) 结合线位置扩展以考虑其达到图像范围深度完成的需要。空间感知 Shapley 值 (SaS) 成功选择线子集，仅使用一半线，即可产生与完整激光雷达输入​​相当的深度精度。 本文提出一种基于空间感知夏普利值的方法，通过优化激光雷达线配置，在减少线数的同时保持深度补全质量。 Kamil Adamczewski,Christos Sakaridis,Vaishakh Patil,Luc Van Gool cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Chaoning Zhang,Chenshuang Zhang,Sheng Zheng,Yu Qiao,Chenghao Li,Mengchun Zhang,Sumit Kumar Dam,Chu Myaet Thwal,Ye Lin Tun,Le Luang Huy,Donguk kim,Sung-Ho Bae,Lik-Hang Lee,Yang Yang,Heng Tao Shen,In So Kweon,Choong Seon Hong
title: A Complete Survey on Generative AI (AIGC): Is ChatGPT from GPT-4 to GPT-5 All You Need?
title_zh: 生成式人工智能 (AIGC) 的完整调查：ChatGPT 从 GPT-4 到 GPT-5 就是您所需要的吗？
abstract: As ChatGPT goes viral, generative AI (AIGC, a.k.a AI-generated content) has made headlines everywhere because of its ability to analyze and create text, images, and beyond. With such overwhelming media coverage, it is almost impossible for us to miss the opportunity to glimpse AIGC from a certain angle. In the era of AI transitioning from pure analysis to creation, it is worth noting that ChatGPT, with its most recent language model GPT-4, is just a tool out of numerous AIGC tasks. Impressed by the capability of the ChatGPT, many people are wondering about its limits: can GPT-5 (or other future GPT variants) help ChatGPT unify all AIGC tasks for diversified content creation? Toward answering this question, a comprehensive review of existing AIGC tasks is needed. As such, our work comes to fill this gap promptly by offering a first look at AIGC, ranging from its techniques to applications. Modern generative AI relies on various technical foundations, ranging from model architecture and self-supervised pretraining to generative modeling methods (like GAN and diffusion models). After introducing the fundamental techniques, this work focuses on the technological development of various AIGC tasks based on their output type, including text, images, videos, 3D content, etc., which depicts the full potential of ChatGPT's future. Moreover, we summarize their significant applications in some mainstream industries, such as education and creativity content. Finally, we discuss the challenges currently faced and present an outlook on how generative AI might evolve in the near future.
summary: As ChatGPT goes viral, generative AI (AIGC, a.k.a AI-generated content) has made headlines everywhere because of its ability to analyze and create text, images, and beyond. With such overwhelming media coverage, it is almost impossible for us to miss the opportunity to glimpse AIGC from a certain angle. In the era of AI transitioning from pure analysis to creation, it is worth noting that ChatGPT, with its most recent language model GPT-4, is just a tool out of numerous AIGC tasks. Impressed by the capability of the ChatGPT, many people are wondering about its limits: can GPT-5 (or other future GPT variants) help ChatGPT unify all AIGC tasks for diversified content creation? Toward answering this question, a comprehensive review of existing AIGC tasks is needed. As such, our work comes to fill this gap promptly by offering a first look at AIGC, ranging from its techniques to applications. Modern generative AI relies on various technical foundations, ranging from model architecture and self-supervised pretraining to generative modeling methods (like GAN and diffusion models). After introducing the fundamental techniques, this work focuses on the technological development of various AIGC tasks based on their output type, including text, images, videos, 3D content, etc., which depicts the full potential of ChatGPT's future. Moreover, we summarize their significant applications in some mainstream industries, such as education and creativity content. Finally, we discuss the challenges currently faced and present an outlook on how generative AI might evolve in the near future.
abstract_zh: 随着 ChatGPT 的病毒式传播，生成式 AI（AIGC，又名 AI 生成的内容）因其分析和创建文本、图像等的能力而成为各地的头条新闻。如此铺天盖地的媒体报道，我们几乎不可能错过从某个角度一睹AIGC的机会。在人工智能从纯粹分析转向创造的时代，值得注意的是，ChatGPT及其最新语言模型GPT-4只是众多AIGC任务中的一个工具。很多人对 ChatGPT 的能力印象深刻，但也想知道它的局限性：GPT-5（或其他未来的 GPT 变体）能否帮助 ChatGPT 统一所有 AIGC 任务以实现多样化的内容创作？为了回答这个问题，需要对现有 AIGC 任务进行全面审查。因此，我们的工作通过提供对 AIGC 的初步了解（从技术到应用）来迅速填补这一空白。现代生成人工智能依赖于各种技术基础，从模型架构和自监督预训练到生成建模方法（如 GAN 和扩散模型）。在介绍了基本技术之后，这项工作根据其输出类型，重点介绍了各种 AIGC 任务的技术开发，包括文本、图像、视频、3D 内容等，这描绘了 ChatGPT 未来的全部潜力。此外，我们总结了它们在一些主流行业的重要应用，例如教育和创意内容。最后，我们讨论了当前面临的挑战，并对生成式人工智能在不久的将来如何发展提出了展望。

AI.tldr: 本文对生成式AI（AIGC）进行全面综述，探讨从GPT-4到GPT-5等模型在多样化内容创作中的潜力与挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着ChatGPT的爆火，生成式AI技术引发广泛关注，但其技术边界和未来发展方向（如GPT-5能否统一多模态任务）尚不明确，需系统性梳理现有研究。
AI.method: 通过技术分类（如模型架构、预训练方法）和应用领域（教育、创意内容等）的系统性综述，结合当前挑战与未来趋势分析。
AI.result: 总结了文本、图像、视频等AIGC任务的技术演进与行业应用，指出模型通用性、多模态整合及伦理问题等核心挑战，并预测未来技术可能向更强泛化能力发展。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI已展现跨领域创造力，但需突破单一模型泛化能力瓶颈，未来需结合更先进架构与多模态技术实现统一化内容生成。

authors_text: Dapeng Li,Feiyang Pan,Jia He,Zhiwei Xu,Dandan Tu,Guoliang Fan
title: Style Miner: Find Significant and Stable Explanatory Factors in Time Series with Constrained Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 风格挖掘器：通过约束强化学习在时间序列中找到显着且稳定的解释因素
abstract: In high-dimensional time-series analysis, it is essential to have a set of key factors (namely, the style factors) that explain the change of the observed variable. For example, volatility modeling in finance relies on a set of risk factors, and climate change studies in climatology rely on a set of causal factors. The ideal low-dimensional style factors should balance significance (with high explanatory power) and stability (consistent, no significant fluctuations). However, previous supervised and unsupervised feature extraction methods can hardly address the tradeoff. In this paper, we propose Style Miner, a reinforcement learning method to generate style factors. We first formulate the problem as a Constrained Markov Decision Process with explanatory power as the return and stability as the constraint. Then, we design fine-grained immediate rewards and costs and use a Lagrangian heuristic to balance them adaptively. Experiments on real-world financial data sets show that Style Miner outperforms existing learning-based methods by a large margin and achieves a relatively 10% gain in R-squared explanatory power compared to the industry-renowned factors proposed by human experts.
summary: In high-dimensional time-series analysis, it is essential to have a set of key factors (namely, the style factors) that explain the change of the observed variable. For example, volatility modeling in finance relies on a set of risk factors, and climate change studies in climatology rely on a set of causal factors. The ideal low-dimensional style factors should balance significance (with high explanatory power) and stability (consistent, no significant fluctuations). However, previous supervised and unsupervised feature extraction methods can hardly address the tradeoff. In this paper, we propose Style Miner, a reinforcement learning method to generate style factors. We first formulate the problem as a Constrained Markov Decision Process with explanatory power as the return and stability as the constraint. Then, we design fine-grained immediate rewards and costs and use a Lagrangian heuristic to balance them adaptively. Experiments on real-world financial data sets show that Style Miner outperforms existing learning-based methods by a large margin and achieves a relatively 10% gain in R-squared explanatory power compared to the industry-renowned factors proposed by human experts.
abstract_zh: 在高维时间序列分析中，必须有一组关键因素（即风格因素）来解释观察变量的变化。例如，金融中的波动性模型依赖于一组风险因素，气候学中的气候变化研究依赖于一组因果因素。理想的低维风格因子应该平衡显着性（具有高解释力）和稳定性（一致，无显着波动）。然而，以前的监督和无监督特征提取方法很难解决这个问题。在本文中，我们提出了 Style Miner，一种生成风格因素的强化学习方法。我们首先将问题表述为约束马尔可夫决策过程，其中解释力作为回报，稳定性作为约束。然后，我们设计细粒度的即时奖励和成本，并使用拉格朗日启发式来自适应地平衡它们。在现实世界金融数据集上的实验表明，Style Miner 大幅优于现有的基于学习的方法，并且与人类专家提出的业界知名因子相比，R 方解释力获得了相对 10% 的增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Style Miner方法，利用约束强化学习在时间序列中寻找具有显著性和稳定性的解释性因子。
AI.motivation: 高维时间序列分析需要平衡显著性（高解释力）和稳定性（无显著波动）的低维因子，但传统方法难以兼顾这一矛盾。
AI.method: 将问题建模为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），以解释力为回报、稳定性为约束，设计细粒度即时奖励与成本，并采用拉格朗日启发式方法自适应平衡。
AI.result: 在真实金融数据集上，Style Miner相较现有方法提升显著，R平方解释力较行业专家提出的因子提升约10%。
AI.conclusion: Style Miner通过约束强化学习有效解决了时间序列因子提取中的显著性与稳定性平衡问题，为相关领域提供新方法。

Experiments on real-world financial data sets show that Style Miner outperforms existing learning-based methods by a large margin and achieves a relatively 10% gain in R-squared explanatory power compared to the industry-renowned factors proposed by human experts. 在高维时间序列分析中，必须有一组关键因素（即风格因素）来解释观察变量的变化。例如，金融中的波动性模型依赖于一组风险因素，气候学中的气候变化研究依赖于一组因果因素。理想的低维风格因子应该平衡显着性（具有高解释力）和稳定性（一致，无显着波动）。然而，以前的监督和无监督特征提取方法很难解决这个问题。在本文中，我们提出了 Style Miner，一种生成风格因素的强化学习方法。我们首先将问题表述为约束马尔可夫决策过程，其中解释力作为回报，稳定性作为约束。然后，我们设计细粒度的即时奖励和成本，并使用拉格朗日启发式来自适应地平衡它们。在现实世界金融数据集上的实验表明，Style Miner 大幅优于现有的基于学习的方法，并且与人类专家提出的业界知名因子相比，R 方解释力获得了相对 10% 的增益。 本文提出Style Miner方法，利用约束强化学习在时间序列中寻找具有显著性和稳定性的解释性因子。 Dapeng Li,Feiyang Pan,Jia He,Zhiwei Xu,Dandan Tu,Guoliang Fan cs.LG,cs.AI,q-fin.RM

authors_text: Emilio Gamba,Bart Bogaerts,Tias Guns
title: Efficiently Explaining CSPs with Unsatisfiable Subset Optimization (extended algorithms and examples)
title_zh: 通过不可满足子集优化有效解释 CSP（扩展算法和示例）
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.11763
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.11763
abstract: We build on a recently proposed method for stepwise explaining solutions of Constraint Satisfaction Problems (CSP) in a human-understandable way. An explanation here is a sequence of simple inference steps where simplicity is quantified using a cost function. The algorithms for explanation generation rely on extracting Minimal Unsatisfiable Subsets (MUS) of a derived unsatisfiable formula, exploiting a one-to-one correspondence between so-called non-redundant explanations and MUSs. However, MUS extraction algorithms do not provide any guarantee of subset minimality or optimality with respect to a given cost function. Therefore, we build on these formal foundations and tackle the main points of improvement, namely how to generate explanations efficiently that are provably optimal (with respect to the given cost metric). For that, we developed (1) a hitting set-based algorithm for finding the optimal constrained unsatisfiable subsets; (2) a method for re-using relevant information over multiple algorithm calls; and (3) methods exploiting domain-specific information to speed up the explanation sequence generation. We experimentally validated our algorithms on a large number of CSP problems. We found that our algorithms outperform the MUS approach in terms of explanation quality and computational time (on average up to 56 % faster than a standard MUS approach).
summary: We build on a recently proposed method for stepwise explaining solutions of Constraint Satisfaction Problems (CSP) in a human-understandable way. An explanation here is a sequence of simple inference steps where simplicity is quantified using a cost function. The algorithms for explanation generation rely on extracting Minimal Unsatisfiable Subsets (MUS) of a derived unsatisfiable formula, exploiting a one-to-one correspondence between so-called non-redundant explanations and MUSs. However, MUS extraction algorithms do not provide any guarantee of subset minimality or optimality with respect to a given cost function. Therefore, we build on these formal foundations and tackle the main points of improvement, namely how to generate explanations efficiently that are provably optimal (with respect to the given cost metric). For that, we developed (1) a hitting set-based algorithm for finding the optimal constrained unsatisfiable subsets; (2) a method for re-using relevant information over multiple algorithm calls; and (3) methods exploiting domain-specific information to speed up the explanation sequence generation. We experimentally validated our algorithms on a large number of CSP problems. We found that our algorithms outperform the MUS approach in terms of explanation quality and computational time (on average up to 56 % faster than a standard MUS approach).
abstract_zh: 我们以最近提出的一种方法为基础，以人类可理解的方式逐步解释约束满足问题（CSP）的解决方案。这里的解释是一系列简单的推理步骤，其中使用成本函数来量化简单性。解释生成算法依赖于提取派生不可满足公式的最小不可满足子集 (MUS)，利用所谓的非冗余解释和 MUS 之间的一对一对应关系。然而，MUS 提取算法不提供关于给定成本函数的子集最小性或最优性的任何保证。因此，我们建立在这些正式的基础上并解决改进的要点，即如何有效地生成可证明最佳的解释（相对于给定的成本指标）。为此，我们开发了（1）一种基于命中集的算法，用于寻找最优的约束不可满足子集； (2)在多个算法调用中重用相关信息的方法； (3)利用特定领域信息来加速解释序列生成的方法。我们针对大量 CSP 问题对我们的算法进行了实验验证。我们发现我们的算法在解释质量和计算时间方面优于 MUS 方法（比标准 MUS 方法平均快 56%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过优化不可满足子集来高效解释约束满足问题（CSP）的方法，旨在生成符合给定成本函数的最优解释序列。
AI.motivation: 现有最小不可满足子集（MUS）提取算法无法保证子集最小性或成本函数最优性，导致解释质量与效率不足，需改进以提升CSP解释的准确性与计算效率。
AI.method: 开发了基于击打集的最优不可满足子集算法、跨调用信息复用机制以及领域特定信息加速方法，结合形式化理论生成可证明最优的解释序列。
AI.result: 实验表明，新算法在多个CSP问题上平均比标准MUS方法快56%，且在解释质量与计算时间上均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化不可满足子集的提取与复用，本文方法实现了CSP解释的高效性与最优性，为约束问题求解提供了更可靠的解释框架。

authors_text: Amer Delilbasic,Bertrand Le Saux,Morris Riedel,Kristel Michielsen,Gabriele Cavallaro
title: A Single-Step Multiclass SVM based on Quantum Annealing for Remote Sensing Data Classification
title_zh: 基于量子退火的单步多类支持向量机遥感数据分类
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to IEEE JSTARS
comments: 12 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to IEEE JSTARS
abstract: In recent years, the development of quantum annealers has enabled experimental demonstrations and has increased research interest in applications of quantum annealing, such as in quantum machine learning and in particular for the popular quantum SVM. Several versions of the quantum SVM have been proposed, and quantum annealing has been shown to be effective in them. Extensions to multiclass problems have also been made, which consist of an ensemble of multiple binary classifiers. This work proposes a novel quantum SVM formulation for direct multiclass classification based on quantum annealing, called Quantum Multiclass SVM (QMSVM). The multiclass classification problem is formulated as a single Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problem solved with quantum annealing. The main objective of this work is to evaluate the feasibility, accuracy, and time performance of this approach. Experiments have been performed on the D-Wave Advantage quantum annealer for a classification problem on remote sensing data. The results indicate that, despite the memory demands of the quantum annealer, QMSVM can achieve accuracy that is comparable to standard SVM methods and, more importantly, it scales much more efficiently with the number of training examples, resulting in nearly constant time. This work shows an approach for bringing together classical and quantum computation, solving practical problems in remote sensing with current hardware.
summary: In recent years, the development of quantum annealers has enabled experimental demonstrations and has increased research interest in applications of quantum annealing, such as in quantum machine learning and in particular for the popular quantum SVM. Several versions of the quantum SVM have been proposed, and quantum annealing has been shown to be effective in them. Extensions to multiclass problems have also been made, which consist of an ensemble of multiple binary classifiers. This work proposes a novel quantum SVM formulation for direct multiclass classification based on quantum annealing, called Quantum Multiclass SVM (QMSVM). The multiclass classification problem is formulated as a single Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problem solved with quantum annealing. The main objective of this work is to evaluate the feasibility, accuracy, and time performance of this approach. Experiments have been performed on the D-Wave Advantage quantum annealer for a classification problem on remote sensing data. The results indicate that, despite the memory demands of the quantum annealer, QMSVM can achieve accuracy that is comparable to standard SVM methods and, more importantly, it scales much more efficiently with the number of training examples, resulting in nearly constant time. This work shows an approach for bringing together classical and quantum computation, solving practical problems in remote sensing with current hardware.
abstract_zh: 近年来，量子退火器的发展使得实验演示成为可能，并增加了人们对量子退火应用的研究兴趣，例如量子机器学习，特别是流行的量子支持向量机。量子支持向量机的几个版本已经被提出，并且量子退火已被证明在其中是有效的。还对多类问题进行了扩展，其中包含多个二元分类器的集合。这项工作提出了一种基于量子退火的直接多类分类的新型量子 SVM 公式，称为量子多类 SVM (QMSVM)。多类分类问题被表述为通过量子退火解决的单个二次无约束二元优化 (QUBO) 问题。这项工作的主要目标是评估该方法的可行性、准确性和时间性能。已经在 D-Wave Advantage 量子退火机上针对遥感数据的分类问题进行了实验。结果表明，尽管量子退火器需要内存，QMSVM 仍能实现与标准 SVM 方法相当的精度，更重要的是，它可以更有效地随着训练样本数量的增加而扩展，从而产生几乎恒定的时间。这项工作展示了一种将经典计算和量子计算结合起来的方法，用当前的硬件解决遥感中的实际问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于量子退火的单步多类支持向量机（QMSVM），用于遥感数据分类，将多类分类问题转化为单个QUBO问题进行求解。
AI.motivation: 传统多类SVM需组合多个二分类器，计算复杂度高；量子退火在量子机器学习中展现潜力，需探索其在多类分类中的直接应用。
AI.method: 将多类分类问题转化为单个二次无约束二进制优化（QUBO）问题，利用量子退火（D-Wave Advantage）直接求解，形成QMSVM框架。
AI.result: QMSVM在遥感数据分类中准确率与传统SVM相当，且训练时间随样本数量增长近似恒定，表现出更高的效率。
AI.conclusion: QMSVM通过量子退火实现高效多类分类，验证了量子经典混合计算在遥感等实际问题中的可行性。

authors_text: Argyrios Deligkas,Michelle Döring,Eduard Eiben,Tiger-Lily Goldsmith,George Skretas
title: Being an Influencer is Hard: The Complexity of Influence Maximization in Temporal Graphs with a Fixed Source
title_zh: 成为影响者很困难：具有固定来源的时间图中影响力最大化的复杂性
abstract: We consider the influence maximization problem over a temporal graph, where there is a single fixed source. We deviate from the standard model of influence maximization, where the goal is to choose the set of most influential vertices. Instead, in our model we are given a fixed vertex, or source, and the goal is to find the best time steps to transmit so that the influence of this vertex is maximized. We frame this problem as a spreading process that follows a variant of the susceptible-infected-susceptible (SIS) model and we focus on four objective functions. In the MaxSpread objective, the goal is to maximize the total number of vertices that get infected at least once. In the MaxViral objective, the goal is to maximize the number of vertices that are infected at the same time step. In the MaxViralTstep objective, the goal is to maximize the number of vertices that are infected at a given time step. Finally, in MinNonViralTime, the goal is to maximize the total number of vertices that get infected every $d$ time steps. We perform a thorough complexity theoretic analysis for these four objectives over three different scenarios: (1) the unconstrained setting where the source can transmit whenever it wants; (2) the window-constrained setting where the source has to transmit at either a predetermined, or a shifting window; (3) the periodic setting where the temporal graph has a small period. We prove that all of these problems, with the exception of MaxSpread for periodic graphs, are intractable even for very simple underlying graphs.
summary: We consider the influence maximization problem over a temporal graph, where there is a single fixed source. We deviate from the standard model of influence maximization, where the goal is to choose the set of most influential vertices. Instead, in our model we are given a fixed vertex, or source, and the goal is to find the best time steps to transmit so that the influence of this vertex is maximized. We frame this problem as a spreading process that follows a variant of the susceptible-infected-susceptible (SIS) model and we focus on four objective functions. In the MaxSpread objective, the goal is to maximize the total number of vertices that get infected at least once. In the MaxViral objective, the goal is to maximize the number of vertices that are infected at the same time step. In the MaxViralTstep objective, the goal is to maximize the number of vertices that are infected at a given time step. Finally, in MinNonViralTime, the goal is to maximize the total number of vertices that get infected every $d$ time steps. We perform a thorough complexity theoretic analysis for these four objectives over three different scenarios: (1) the unconstrained setting where the source can transmit whenever it wants; (2) the window-constrained setting where the source has to transmit at either a predetermined, or a shifting window; (3) the periodic setting where the temporal graph has a small period. We prove that all of these problems, with the exception of MaxSpread for periodic graphs, are intractable even for very simple underlying graphs.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑时间图上的影响最大化问题，其中存在单个固定源。我们偏离了影响力最大化的标准模型，其目标是选择最有影响力的顶点集。相反，在我们的模型中，我们给定一个固定的顶点或源，目标是找到传输的最佳时间步长，以使该顶点的影响最大化。我们将这个问题描述为遵循易感者-感染者-易感者（SIS）模型变体的传播过程，并且我们关注四个目标函数。在 MaxSpread 目标中，目标是最大化至少被感染一次的顶点总数。在 MaxViral 目标中，目标是最大化同一时间步骤中被感染的顶点数量。在 MaxViralTstep 目标中，目标是最大化给定时间步内受感染的顶点数量。最后，在 MinNonViralTime 中，目标是最大化每 $d$ 时间步感染的顶点总数。我们对三种不同场景下的这四个目标进行了彻底的复杂性理论分析：（1）不受约束的设置，源可以随时传输； (2) 窗口约束设置，其中源必须在预定窗口或移动窗口进行传输； (3)时间图具有小周期的周期设置。我们证明，除了周期图的 MaxSpread 之外，所有这些问题即使对于非常简单的基础图来说也是棘手的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在具有固定源节点的时序图中最大化影响力的复杂性问题，提出了四种目标函数并分析其计算难度。
AI.motivation: 传统影响力最大化问题关注选择最优节点集，而本文从固定源节点出发，探讨在不同时间步传播策略对影响力扩散的影响，更贴近实际社交网络中传播者的决策困境。
AI.method: 基于SIS模型变体，定义四种优化目标（MaxSpread/MaxViral/MaxViralTstep/MinNonViralTime），通过计算复杂性理论分析其在无约束、窗口约束和周期性时序图场景下的可解性。
AI.result: 证明除周期性图的MaxSpread外，所有目标函数在三种场景下均为NP难问题，揭示了时序图结构对影响力传播优化的计算挑战。
AI.conclusion: 固定源节点的时序影响力最大化问题普遍存在计算不可行性，需依赖近似算法或特定场景优化策略解决实际应用需求。

We prove that all of these problems, with the exception of MaxSpread for periodic graphs, are intractable even for very simple underlying graphs. 我们考虑时间图上的影响最大化问题，其中存在单个固定源。我们偏离了影响力最大化的标准模型，其目标是选择最有影响力的顶点集。相反，在我们的模型中，我们给定一个固定的顶点或源，目标是找到传输的最佳时间步长，以使该顶点的影响最大化。我们将这个问题描述为遵循易感者-感染者-易感者（SIS）模型变体的传播过程，并且我们关注四个目标函数。在 MaxSpread 目标中，目标是最大化至少被感染一次的顶点总数。在 MaxViral 目标中，目标是最大化同一时间步骤中被感染的顶点数量。在 MaxViralTstep 目标中，目标是最大化给定时间步内受感染的顶点数量。最后，在 MinNonViralTime 中，目标是最大化每 $d$ 时间步感染的顶点总数。我们对三种不同场景下的这四个目标进行了彻底的复杂性理论分析：（1）不受约束的设置，源可以随时传输； (2) 窗口约束设置，其中源必须在预定窗口或移动窗口进行传输； (3)时间图具有小周期的周期设置。我们证明，除了周期图的 MaxSpread 之外，所有这些问题即使对于非常简单的基础图来说也是棘手的。 本文研究了在具有固定源节点的时序图中最大化影响力的复杂性问题，提出了四种目标函数并分析其计算难度。 Argyrios Deligkas,Michelle Döring,Eduard Eiben,Tiger-Lily Goldsmith,George Skretas cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Emile Reyn Engelbrecht,Johan du Preez
title: On the link between generative semi-supervised learning and generative open-set recognition
title_zh: 关于生成半监督学习和生成开放集识别之间的联系
abstract: This study investigates the relationship between semi-supervised learning (SSL, which is training off partially labelled datasets) and open-set recognition (OSR, which is classification with simultaneous novelty detection) under the context of generative adversarial networks (GANs). Although no previous study has formally linked SSL and OSR, their respective methods share striking similarities. Specifically, SSL-GANs and OSR-GANs require their generators to produce 'bad-looking' samples which are used to regularise their classifier networks. We hypothesise that the definitions of bad-looking samples in SSL and OSR represents the same concept and realises the same goal. More formally, bad-looking samples lie in the complementary space, which is the area between and around the boundaries of the labelled categories within the classifier's embedding space. By regularising a classifier with samples in the complementary space, classifiers achieve improved generalisation for SSL and also generalise the open space for OSR. To test this hypothesis, we compare a foundational SSL-GAN with the state-of-the-art OSR-GAN under the same SSL-OSR experimental conditions. Our results find that SSL-GANs achieve near identical results to OSR-GANs, proving the SSL-OSR link. Subsequently, to further this new research path, we compare several SSL-GANs various SSL-OSR setups which this first benchmark results. A combined framework of SSL-OSR certainly improves the practicality and cost-efficiency of classifier training, and so further theoretical and application studies are also discussed.
summary: This study investigates the relationship between semi-supervised learning (SSL, which is training off partially labelled datasets) and open-set recognition (OSR, which is classification with simultaneous novelty detection) under the context of generative adversarial networks (GANs). Although no previous study has formally linked SSL and OSR, their respective methods share striking similarities. Specifically, SSL-GANs and OSR-GANs require their generators to produce 'bad-looking' samples which are used to regularise their classifier networks. We hypothesise that the definitions of bad-looking samples in SSL and OSR represents the same concept and realises the same goal. More formally, bad-looking samples lie in the complementary space, which is the area between and around the boundaries of the labelled categories within the classifier's embedding space. By regularising a classifier with samples in the complementary space, classifiers achieve improved generalisation for SSL and also generalise the open space for OSR. To test this hypothesis, we compare a foundational SSL-GAN with the state-of-the-art OSR-GAN under the same SSL-OSR experimental conditions. Our results find that SSL-GANs achieve near identical results to OSR-GANs, proving the SSL-OSR link. Subsequently, to further this new research path, we compare several SSL-GANs various SSL-OSR setups which this first benchmark results. A combined framework of SSL-OSR certainly improves the practicality and cost-efficiency of classifier training, and so further theoretical and application studies are also discussed.
abstract_zh: 本研究研究了生成对抗网络 (GAN) 背景下的半监督学习（SSL，使用部分标记的数据集进行训练）和开放集识别（OSR，同时进行新颖性检测的分类）之间的关系。尽管之前没有研究正式将 SSL 和 OSR 联系起来，但它们各自的方法具有惊人的相似之处。具体来说，SSL-GAN 和 OSR-GAN 要求其生成器生成“难看”的样本，用于规范其分类器网络。我们假设SSL和OSR中对不良样本的定义代表相同的概念并实现相同的目标。更正式地说，不好看的样本位于互补空间中，即分类器嵌入空间内标记类别的边界之间和周围的区域。通过使用互补空间中的样本对分类器进行正则化，分类器可以提高 SSL 的泛化能力，并泛化 OSR 的开放空间。为了验证这一假设，我们在相同的 SSL-OSR 实验条件下将基础 SSL-GAN 与最先进的 OSR-GAN 进行了比较。我们的结果发现 SSL-GAN 取得了与 OSR-GAN 几乎相同的结果，证明了 SSL-OSR 链接。随后，为了进一步推进这一新的研究路径，我们比较了第一个基准测试结果中的几种 SSL-GAN 和各种 SSL-OSR 设置。 SSL-OSR 的组合框架无疑提高了分类器训练的实用性和成本效率，因此还讨论了进一步的理论和应用研究。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨生成对抗网络（GANs）框架下半监督学习（SSL）与开放集识别（OSR）的内在联系，并验证二者方法的等效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管SSL和OSR在目标上存在差异，但其方法论中均涉及利用生成的'低质量样本'进行分类器正则化，可能存在未被明确的理论关联。
AI.method: 通过比较基础SSL-GAN与先进OSR-GAN在相同实验条件下的表现，验证二者在互补空间样本正则化机制上的等效性，并构建首个SSL-OSR基准测试框架。
AI.result: 实验表明SSL-GAN与OSR-GAN在性能上几乎一致，证明了SSL与OSR在生成模型中的方法论统一性，并为后续研究提供了基准数据。
AI.conclusion: 融合SSL与OSR的框架能提升分类器训练的实用性和成本效益，未来需进一步探索其理论基础与实际应用场景。

authors_text: Xiaotian Weng,Yi Chen,Zhichao Zheng,Yanhui Gu,Junsheng Zhou,Yudong Zhang
title: A High-Frequency Focused Network for Lightweight Single Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于轻量级单图像超分辨率的高频聚焦网络
abstract: Lightweight neural networks for single-image super-resolution (SISR) tasks have made substantial breakthroughs in recent years. Compared to low-frequency information, high-frequency detail is much more difficult to reconstruct. Most SISR models allocate equal computational resources for low-frequency and high-frequency information, which leads to redundant processing of simple low-frequency information and inadequate recovery of more challenging high-frequency information. We propose a novel High-Frequency Focused Network (HFFN) through High-Frequency Focused Blocks (HFFBs) that selectively enhance high-frequency information while minimizing redundant feature computation of low-frequency information. The HFFB effectively allocates more computational resources to the more challenging reconstruction of high-frequency information. Moreover, we propose a Local Feature Fusion Block (LFFB) effectively fuses features from multiple HFFBs in a local region, utilizing complementary information across layers to enhance feature representativeness and reduce artifacts in reconstructed images. We assess the efficacy of our proposed HFFN on five benchmark datasets and show that it significantly enhances the super-resolution performance of the network. Our experimental results demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in reconstructing high-frequency information while using a low number of parameters.
summary: Lightweight neural networks for single-image super-resolution (SISR) tasks have made substantial breakthroughs in recent years. Compared to low-frequency information, high-frequency detail is much more difficult to reconstruct. Most SISR models allocate equal computational resources for low-frequency and high-frequency information, which leads to redundant processing of simple low-frequency information and inadequate recovery of more challenging high-frequency information. We propose a novel High-Frequency Focused Network (HFFN) through High-Frequency Focused Blocks (HFFBs) that selectively enhance high-frequency information while minimizing redundant feature computation of low-frequency information. The HFFB effectively allocates more computational resources to the more challenging reconstruction of high-frequency information. Moreover, we propose a Local Feature Fusion Block (LFFB) effectively fuses features from multiple HFFBs in a local region, utilizing complementary information across layers to enhance feature representativeness and reduce artifacts in reconstructed images. We assess the efficacy of our proposed HFFN on five benchmark datasets and show that it significantly enhances the super-resolution performance of the network. Our experimental results demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in reconstructing high-frequency information while using a low number of parameters.
abstract_zh: 近年来，用于单图像超分辨率（SISR）任务的轻量级神经网络取得了实质性突破。与低频信息相比，高频细节的重构要困难得多。大多数SISR模型为低频和高频信息分配相等的计算资源，这导致简单的低频信息的冗余处理和更具挑战性的高频信息的恢复不充分。我们通过高频聚焦块（HFFB）提出了一种新颖的高频聚焦网络（HFFN），它有选择地增强高频信息，同时最大限度地减少低频信息的冗余特征计算。 HFFB 有效地将更多的计算资源分配给更具挑战性的高频信息重建。此外，我们提出了局部特征融合块（LFFB），有效地融合了局部区域中多个 HFFB 的特征，利用跨层的互补信息来增强特征代表性并减少重建图像中的伪影。我们评估了我们提出的 HFFN 在五个基准数据集上的功效，并表明它显着增强了网络的超分辨率性能。我们的实验结果证明了在使用少量参数的情况下重建高频信息的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级单图像超分辨率网络，通过聚焦高频信息提升重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率模型对低频和高频信息分配同等计算资源，导致低频冗余处理且高频信息恢复不足。
AI.method: 设计高频聚焦块（HFFB）选择性增强高频信息并减少低频计算冗余，结合局部特征融合块（LFFB）跨层融合互补特征。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上验证，HFFN在参数量较少的情况下实现了高频信息重建的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: HFFN通过聚焦高频信息与局部特征融合，在轻量化框架下显著提升了超分辨率效果。

search_text: A High-Frequency Focused Network for Lightweight Single Image Super-Resolution 用于轻量级单图像超分辨率的高频聚焦网络 Lightweight neural networks for single-image super-resolution (SISR) tasks have made substantial breakthroughs in recent years. Compared to low-frequency information, high-frequency detail is much more difficult to reconstruct. Most SISR models allocate equal computational resources for low-frequency and high-frequency information, which leads to redundant processing of simple low-frequency information and inadequate recovery of more challenging high-frequency information. We propose a novel High-Frequency Focused Network (HFFN) through High-Frequency Focused Blocks (HFFBs) that selectively enhance high-frequency information while minimizing redundant feature computation of low-frequency information. The HFFB effectively allocates more computational resources to the more challenging reconstruction of high-frequency information. Moreover, we propose a Local Feature Fusion Block (LFFB) effectively fuses features from multiple HFFBs in a local region, utilizing complementary information across layers to enhance feature representativeness and reduce artifacts in reconstructed images. We assess the efficacy of our proposed HFFN on five benchmark datasets and show that it significantly enhances the super-resolution performance of the network. Our experimental results demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in reconstructing high-frequency information while using a low number of parameters. 近年来，用于单图像超分辨率（SISR）任务的轻量级神经网络取得了实质性突破。与低频信息相比，高频细节的重构要困难得多。大多数SISR模型为低频和高频信息分配相等的计算资源，这导致简单的低频信息的冗余处理和更具挑战性的高频信息的恢复不充分。我们通过高频聚焦块（HFFB）提出了一种新颖的高频聚焦网络（HFFN），它有选择地增强高频信息，同时最大限度地减少低频信息的冗余特征计算。 HFFB 有效地将更多的计算资源分配给更具挑战性的高频信息重建。此外，我们提出了局部特征融合块（LFFB），有效地融合了局部区域中多个 HFFB 的特征，利用跨层的互补信息来增强特征代表性并减少重建图像中的伪影。我们评估了我们提出的 HFFN 在五个基准数据集上的功效，并表明它显着增强了网络的超分辨率性能。我们的实验结果证明了在使用少量参数的情况下重建高频信息的最先进的性能。 本文提出一种轻量级单图像超分辨率网络，通过聚焦高频信息提升重建效果。 Xiaotian Weng,Yi Chen,Zhichao Zheng,Yanhui Gu,Junsheng Zhou,Yudong Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Linfeng Shi,Yan Li,Xi Zhu
title: Anchor Free remote sensing detector based on solving discrete polar coordinate equation
title_zh: 基于求解离散极坐标方程的Anchor Free遥感探测器
abstract: As the rapid development of depth learning, object detection in aviatic remote sensing images has become increasingly popular in recent years. Most of the current Anchor Free detectors based on key point detection sampling directly regression and classification features, with the design of object loss function based on the horizontal bounding box. It is more challenging for complex and diverse aviatic remote sensing object. In this paper, we propose an Anchor Free aviatic remote sensing object detector (BWP-Det) to detect rotating and multi-scale object. Specifically, we design a interactive double-branch(IDB) up-sampling network, in which one branch gradually up-sampling is used for the prediction of Heatmap, and the other branch is used for the regression of boundary box parameters. We improve a weighted multi-scale convolution (WmConv) in order to highlight the difference between foreground and background. We extracted Pixel level attention features from the middle layer to guide the two branches to pay attention to effective object information in the sampling process. Finally, referring to the calculation idea of horizontal IoU, we design a rotating IoU based on the split polar coordinate plane, namely JIoU, which is expressed as the intersection ratio following discretization of the inner ellipse of the rotating bounding box, to solve the correlation between angle and side length in the regression process of the rotating bounding box. Ultimately, BWP-Det, our experiments on DOTA, UCAS-AOD and NWPU VHR-10 datasets show, achieves advanced performance with simpler models and fewer regression parameters.
summary: As the rapid development of depth learning, object detection in aviatic remote sensing images has become increasingly popular in recent years. Most of the current Anchor Free detectors based on key point detection sampling directly regression and classification features, with the design of object loss function based on the horizontal bounding box. It is more challenging for complex and diverse aviatic remote sensing object. In this paper, we propose an Anchor Free aviatic remote sensing object detector (BWP-Det) to detect rotating and multi-scale object. Specifically, we design a interactive double-branch(IDB) up-sampling network, in which one branch gradually up-sampling is used for the prediction of Heatmap, and the other branch is used for the regression of boundary box parameters. We improve a weighted multi-scale convolution (WmConv) in order to highlight the difference between foreground and background. We extracted Pixel level attention features from the middle layer to guide the two branches to pay attention to effective object information in the sampling process. Finally, referring to the calculation idea of horizontal IoU, we design a rotating IoU based on the split polar coordinate plane, namely JIoU, which is expressed as the intersection ratio following discretization of the inner ellipse of the rotating bounding box, to solve the correlation between angle and side length in the regression process of the rotating bounding box. Ultimately, BWP-Det, our experiments on DOTA, UCAS-AOD and NWPU VHR-10 datasets show, achieves advanced performance with simpler models and fewer regression parameters.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的快速发展，航空遥感图像中的目标检测近年来变得越来越流行。目前的Anchor Free检测器大多基于关键点检测采样直接回归和分类特征，并设计基于水平边界框的目标损失函数。对于复杂多样的航空遥感目标来说更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种无锚航空遥感物体检测器（BWP-Det）来检测旋转和多尺度物体。具体来说，我们设计了一种交互式双分支（IDB）上采样网络，其中一个分支逐渐上采样用于热图的预测，另一个分支用于边界框参数的回归。我们改进了加权多尺度卷积（WmConv）以突出前景和背景之间的差异。我们从中间层提取像素级注意力特征，以指导两个分支在采样过程中关注有效的对象信息。最后，借鉴水平IoU的计算思想，设计了一种基于分割极坐标平面的旋转IoU，即JIoU，表示为旋转包围盒内椭圆离散化后的相交比，以解决旋转包围盒回归过程中角度与边长的相关性。最终，我们在 DOTA、UCAS-AOD 和 NWPU VHR-10 数据集上进行的实验表明，BWP-Det 通过更简单的模型和更少的回归参数实现了先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离散极坐标方程求解的无锚点遥感目标检测器BWP-Det，用于检测旋转和多尺度遥感图像中的复杂目标。
AI.motivation: 现有基于关键点检测的无锚点检测器在处理复杂多样的航空遥感目标时存在挑战，尤其在旋转目标和多尺度目标检测方面表现不足。
AI.method: 设计交互双分支（IDB）上采样网络，包含热力图预测分支和边界框参数回归分支；改进加权多尺度卷积（WmConv）增强前景背景差异；提取像素级注意力特征引导采样过程；提出基于离散极坐标平面的旋转IoU（JIoU）解决旋转边界框回归中的角度与边长关联问题。
AI.result: 在DOTA、UCAS-AOD和NWPU VHR-10数据集上实验表明，BWP-Det在模型更简单、回归参数更少的情况下取得先进性能。
AI.conclusion: BWP-Det通过极坐标方程求解和多分支结构有效提升了遥感图像中旋转目标的检测精度，为复杂场景下的目标检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xingjian Du,Zijie Wang,Xia Liang,Huidong Liang,Bilei Zhu,Zejun Ma
title: ByteCover3: Accurate Cover Song Identification on Short Queries
title_zh: ByteCover3：短查询下准确的翻唱歌曲识别
abstract: Deep learning based methods have become a paradigm for cover song identification (CSI) in recent years, where the ByteCover systems have achieved state-of-the-art results on all the mainstream datasets of CSI. However, with the burgeon of short videos, many real-world applications require matching short music excerpts to full-length music tracks in the database, which is still under-explored and waiting for an industrial-level solution. In this paper, we upgrade the previous ByteCover systems to ByteCover3 that utilizes local features to further improve the identification performance of short music queries. ByteCover3 is designed with a local alignment loss (LAL) module and a two-stage feature retrieval pipeline, allowing the system to perform CSI in a more precise and efficient way. We evaluated ByteCover3 on multiple datasets with different benchmark settings, where ByteCover3 beat all the compared methods including its previous versions.
summary: Deep learning based methods have become a paradigm for cover song identification (CSI) in recent years, where the ByteCover systems have achieved state-of-the-art results on all the mainstream datasets of CSI. However, with the burgeon of short videos, many real-world applications require matching short music excerpts to full-length music tracks in the database, which is still under-explored and waiting for an industrial-level solution. In this paper, we upgrade the previous ByteCover systems to ByteCover3 that utilizes local features to further improve the identification performance of short music queries. ByteCover3 is designed with a local alignment loss (LAL) module and a two-stage feature retrieval pipeline, allowing the system to perform CSI in a more precise and efficient way. We evaluated ByteCover3 on multiple datasets with different benchmark settings, where ByteCover3 beat all the compared methods including its previous versions.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习的方法已成为翻唱歌曲识别（CSI）的范例，其中 ByteCover 系统在 CSI 的所有主流数据集上都取得了最先进的结果。然而，随着短视频的兴起，许多现实世界的应用程序需要将短音乐片段与数据库中的完整音乐曲目进行匹配，这一点仍处于探索之中，等待工业级的解决方案。在本文中，我们将之前的ByteCover系统升级为ByteCover3，利用局部特征进一步提高短音乐查询的识别性能。 ByteCover3设计有局部对齐丢失（LAL）模块和两级特征检索管道，允许系统以更精确和高效的方式执行CSI。我们在具有不同基准设置的多个数据集上评估了 ByteCover3，其中 ByteCover3 击败了所有比较方法，包括其之前的版本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ByteCover3系统，通过局部特征改进短音乐查询的封面歌曲识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在主流数据集表现优异，但短视频等实际场景中短音乐片段与完整曲目匹配仍缺乏工业级解决方案。
AI.method: 设计局部对齐损失模块（LAL）和双阶段特征检索流程，利用局部特征提升短查询识别精度与效率。
AI.result: 在多数据集基准测试中，ByteCover3超越所有对比方法包括其前代版本。
AI.conclusion: ByteCover3通过局部特征建模和双阶段流程有效解决了短音乐查询的封面歌曲识别难题。

search_text: ByteCover3: Accurate Cover Song Identification on Short Queries ByteCover3：短查询下准确的翻唱歌曲识别 Deep learning based methods have become a paradigm for cover song identification (CSI) in recent years, where the ByteCover systems have achieved state-of-the-art results on all the mainstream datasets of CSI. However, with the burgeon of short videos, many real-world applications require matching short music excerpts to full-length music tracks in the database, which is still under-explored and waiting for an industrial-level solution. In this paper, we upgrade the previous ByteCover systems to ByteCover3 that utilizes local features to further improve the identification performance of short music queries. ByteCover3 is designed with a local alignment loss (LAL) module and a two-stage feature retrieval pipeline, allowing the system to perform CSI in a more precise and efficient way. We evaluated ByteCover3 on multiple datasets with different benchmark settings, where ByteCover3 beat all the compared methods including its previous versions. 近年来，基于深度学习的方法已成为翻唱歌曲识别（CSI）的范例，其中 ByteCover 系统在 CSI 的所有主流数据集上都取得了最先进的结果。然而，随着短视频的兴起，许多现实世界的应用程序需要将短音乐片段与数据库中的完整音乐曲目进行匹配，这一点仍处于探索之中，等待工业级的解决方案。在本文中，我们将之前的ByteCover系统升级为ByteCover3，利用局部特征进一步提高短音乐查询的识别性能。 ByteCover3设计有局部对齐丢失（LAL）模块和两级特征检索管道，允许系统以更精确和高效的方式执行CSI。我们在具有不同基准设置的多个数据集上评估了 ByteCover3，其中 ByteCover3 击败了所有比较方法，包括其之前的版本。 本文提出ByteCover3系统，通过局部特征改进短音乐查询的封面歌曲识别性能。 Xingjian Du,Zijie Wang,Xia Liang,Huidong Liang,Bilei Zhu,Zejun Ma cs.SD,cs.IR,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuxuan Han,Zhibo Wang,Feng Xu
title: Learning a 3D Morphable Face Reflectance Model from Low-cost Data
title_zh: 从低成本数据学习 3D 可变形人脸反射率模型
abstract: Modeling non-Lambertian effects such as facial specularity leads to a more realistic 3D Morphable Face Model. Existing works build parametric models for diffuse and specular albedo using Light Stage data. However, only diffuse and specular albedo cannot determine the full BRDF. In addition, the requirement of Light Stage data is hard to fulfill for the research communities. This paper proposes the first 3D morphable face reflectance model with spatially varying BRDF using only low-cost publicly-available data. We apply linear shiness weighting into parametric modeling to represent spatially varying specular intensity and shiness. Then an inverse rendering algorithm is developed to reconstruct the reflectance parameters from non-Light Stage data, which are used to train an initial morphable reflectance model. To enhance the model's generalization capability and expressive power, we further propose an update-by-reconstruction strategy to finetune it on an in-the-wild dataset. Experimental results show that our method obtains decent rendering results with plausible facial specularities. Our code is released \href{https://yxuhan.github.io/ReflectanceMM/index.html}{\textcolor{magenta}{here}}.
summary: Modeling non-Lambertian effects such as facial specularity leads to a more realistic 3D Morphable Face Model. Existing works build parametric models for diffuse and specular albedo using Light Stage data. However, only diffuse and specular albedo cannot determine the full BRDF. In addition, the requirement of Light Stage data is hard to fulfill for the research communities. This paper proposes the first 3D morphable face reflectance model with spatially varying BRDF using only low-cost publicly-available data. We apply linear shiness weighting into parametric modeling to represent spatially varying specular intensity and shiness. Then an inverse rendering algorithm is developed to reconstruct the reflectance parameters from non-Light Stage data, which are used to train an initial morphable reflectance model. To enhance the model's generalization capability and expressive power, we further propose an update-by-reconstruction strategy to finetune it on an in-the-wild dataset. Experimental results show that our method obtains decent rendering results with plausible facial specularities. Our code is released \href{https://yxuhan.github.io/ReflectanceMM/index.html}{\textcolor{magenta}{here}}.
abstract_zh: 对非朗伯效应（例如面部镜面反射）进行建模可以生成更真实的 3D 可变形面部模型。现有作品使用 Light Stage 数据构建漫反射和镜面反照率的参数模型。然而，仅漫反射和镜面反照率无法确定完整的 BRDF。此外，Light Stage 数据的要求对于研究界来说很难满足。本文提出了第一个仅使用低成本公开数据的具有空间变化 BRDF 的 3D 可变形人脸反射率模型。我们将线性光泽权重应用于参数建模中，以表示空间变化的镜面反射强度和光泽度。然后开发逆渲染算法来从非Light Stage数据重建反射率参数，这些参数用于训练初始可变形反射率模型。为了增强模型的泛化能力和表达能力，我们进一步提出了一种通过重建更新的策略来在野外数据集上对其进行微调。实验结果表明，我们的方法获得了不错的渲染结果和合理的面部镜面反射。我们的代码已发布\href{https://yxuhan.github.io/ReflectanceMM/index.html}{\textcolor{magenta}{here}}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低成本数据的3D可变形人脸反射模型，用于模拟面部非朗伯反射特性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型依赖昂贵的Light Stage数据且无法完整描述BRDF特性，而低成本数据难以建模复杂反射效果。
AI.method: 引入线性光泽度加权参数化模型，结合逆渲染算法从非Light Stage数据重建反射参数，并通过重建-更新策略优化模型。
AI.result: 在真实场景数据集上实现具有合理面部高光效果的渲染结果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 证明无需Light Stage数据即可建立具有空间可变BRDF的3D人脸反射模型的可行性。

authors_text: Yajing Zheng,Jiyuan Zhang,Rui Zhao,Jianhao Ding,Shiyan Chen,Ruiqin Xiong,Zhaofei Yu,Tiejun Huang
title: SpikeCV: Open a Continuous Computer Vision Era
title_zh: SpikeCV：开启连续计算机视觉时代
abstract: SpikeCV is a new open-source computer vision platform for the spike camera, which is a neuromorphic visual sensor that has developed rapidly in recent years. In the spike camera, each pixel position directly accumulates the light intensity and asynchronously fires spikes. The output binary spikes can reach a frequency of 40,000 Hz. As a new type of visual expression, spike sequence has high spatiotemporal completeness and preserves the continuous visual information of the external world. Taking advantage of the low latency and high dynamic range of the spike camera, many spike-based algorithms have made significant progress, such as high-quality imaging and ultra-high-speed target detection. To build up a community ecology for the spike vision to facilitate more users to take advantage of the spike camera, SpikeCV provides a variety of ultra-high-speed scene datasets, hardware interfaces, and an easy-to-use modules library. SpikeCV focuses on encapsulation for spike data, standardization for dataset interfaces, modularization for vision tasks, and real-time applications for challenging scenes. With the advent of the open-source Python ecosystem, modules of SpikeCV can be used as a Python library to fulfilled most of the numerical analysis needs of researchers. We demonstrate the efficiency of the SpikeCV on offline inference and real-time applications. The project repository address are \url{https://openi.pcl.ac.cn/Cordium/SpikeCV} and \url{https://github.com/Zyj061/SpikeCV
summary: SpikeCV is a new open-source computer vision platform for the spike camera, which is a neuromorphic visual sensor that has developed rapidly in recent years. In the spike camera, each pixel position directly accumulates the light intensity and asynchronously fires spikes. The output binary spikes can reach a frequency of 40,000 Hz. As a new type of visual expression, spike sequence has high spatiotemporal completeness and preserves the continuous visual information of the external world. Taking advantage of the low latency and high dynamic range of the spike camera, many spike-based algorithms have made significant progress, such as high-quality imaging and ultra-high-speed target detection. To build up a community ecology for the spike vision to facilitate more users to take advantage of the spike camera, SpikeCV provides a variety of ultra-high-speed scene datasets, hardware interfaces, and an easy-to-use modules library. SpikeCV focuses on encapsulation for spike data, standardization for dataset interfaces, modularization for vision tasks, and real-time applications for challenging scenes. With the advent of the open-source Python ecosystem, modules of SpikeCV can be used as a Python library to fulfilled most of the numerical analysis needs of researchers. We demonstrate the efficiency of the SpikeCV on offline inference and real-time applications. The project repository address are \url{https://openi.pcl.ac.cn/Cordium/SpikeCV} and \url{https://github.com/Zyj061/SpikeCV
abstract_zh: SpikeCV是一款针对尖峰相机的新型开源计算机视觉平台，尖峰相机是近年来发展迅速的神经形态视觉传感器。在尖峰相机中，每个像素位置直接累积光强度并异步发射尖峰。输出二进制尖峰频率可达 40,000 Hz。尖峰序列作为一种新型的视觉表达方式，具有较高的时空完整性，保留了外部世界的连续视觉信息。利用秒针相机的低延迟和高动态范围的优势，许多基于秒针的算法取得了显着的进步，例如高质量成像和超高速目标检测。为了构建秒杀视觉的社区生态，方便更多用户使用秒杀相机，SpikeCV提供了多种超高速场景数据集、硬件接口以及易于使用的模块库。 SpikeCV 专注于尖峰数据的封装、数据集接口的标准化、视觉任务的模块化以及挑战性场景的实时应用。随着开源Python生态系统的出现，SpikeCV的模块可以作为Python库来满足研究人员的大部分数值分析需求。我们展示了 SpikeCV 在离线推理和实时应用程序上的效率。项目仓库地址为 \url{https://openi.pcl.ac.cn/Cordium/SpikeCV} 和 \url{https://github.com/Zyj061/SpikeCV

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpikeCV，一个面向脉冲相机的开源计算机视觉平台，旨在支持脉冲序列数据的处理与应用。
AI.motivation: 脉冲相机作为新型视觉传感器具有低延迟和高动态范围优势，但缺乏统一的工具链和社区支持，限制了其应用发展。
AI.method: 构建包含超高速场景数据集、硬件接口、模块化库的开源平台，通过Python生态实现脉冲数据封装、接口标准化及实时任务处理。
AI.result: 验证了SpikeCV在离线推理与实时场景中的效率，并提供开源代码库供研究者使用。
AI.conclusion: SpikeCV为脉冲视觉研究提供了完整工具链，推动了连续视觉信息处理技术的发展。

In the spike camera, each pixel position directly accumulates the light intensity and asynchronously fires spikes. The output binary spikes can reach a frequency of 40,000 Hz. As a new type of visual expression, spike sequence has high spatiotemporal completeness and preserves the continuous visual information of the external world. Taking advantage of the low latency and high dynamic range of the spike camera, many spike-based algorithms have made significant progress, such as high-quality imaging and ultra-high-speed target detection. To build up a community ecology for the spike vision to facilitate more users to take advantage of the spike camera, SpikeCV provides a variety of ultra-high-speed scene datasets, hardware interfaces, and an easy-to-use modules library. SpikeCV focuses on encapsulation for spike data, standardization for dataset interfaces, modularization for vision tasks, and real-time applications for challenging scenes. With the advent of the open-source Python ecosystem, modules of SpikeCV can be used as a Python library to fulfilled most of the numerical analysis needs of researchers. We demonstrate the efficiency of the SpikeCV on offline inference and real-time applications. The project repository address are \url{https://openi.pcl.ac.cn/Cordium/SpikeCV} and \url{https://github.com/Zyj061/SpikeCV SpikeCV是一款针对尖峰相机的新型开源计算机视觉平台，尖峰相机是近年来发展迅速的神经形态视觉传感器。在尖峰相机中，每个像素位置直接累积光强度并异步发射尖峰。输出二进制尖峰频率可达 40,000 Hz。尖峰序列作为一种新型的视觉表达方式，具有较高的时空完整性，保留了外部世界的连续视觉信息。利用秒针相机的低延迟和高动态范围的优势，许多基于秒针的算法取得了显着的进步，例如高质量成像和超高速目标检测。为了构建秒杀视觉的社区生态，方便更多用户使用秒杀相机，SpikeCV提供了多种超高速场景数据集、硬件接口以及易于使用的模块库。 SpikeCV 专注于尖峰数据的封装、数据集接口的标准化、视觉任务的模块化以及挑战性场景的实时应用。随着开源Python生态系统的出现，SpikeCV的模块可以作为Python库来满足研究人员的大部分数值分析需求。我们展示了 SpikeCV 在离线推理和实时应用程序上的效率。项目仓库地址为 \url{https://openi.pcl.ac.cn/Cordium/SpikeCV} 和 \url{https://github.com/Zyj061/SpikeCV 本文提出SpikeCV，一个面向脉冲相机的开源计算机视觉平台，旨在支持脉冲序列数据的处理与应用。 Yajing Zheng,Jiyuan Zhang,Rui Zhao,Jianhao Ding,Shiyan Chen,Ruiqin Xiong,Zhaofei Yu,Tiejun Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Weijia Wu,Yuzhong Zhao,Mike Zheng Shou,Hong Zhou,Chunhua Shen
title: DiffuMask: Synthesizing Images with Pixel-level Annotations for Semantic Segmentation Using Diffusion Models
title_zh: DiffuMask：使用扩散模型合成具有像素级注释的图像以进行语义分割
abstract: Collecting and annotating images with pixel-wise labels is time-consuming and laborious. In contrast, synthetic data can be freely available using a generative model (e.g., DALL-E, Stable Diffusion). In this paper, we show that it is possible to automatically obtain accurate semantic masks of synthetic images generated by the Off-the-shelf Stable Diffusion model, which uses only text-image pairs during training. Our approach, called DiffuMask, exploits the potential of the cross-attention map between text and image, which is natural and seamless to extend the text-driven image synthesis to semantic mask generation. DiffuMask uses text-guided cross-attention information to localize class/word-specific regions, which are combined with practical techniques to create a novel high-resolution and class-discriminative pixel-wise mask. The methods help to reduce data collection and annotation costs obviously. Experiments demonstrate that the existing segmentation methods trained on synthetic data of DiffuMask can achieve a competitive performance over the counterpart of real data (VOC 2012, Cityscapes). For some classes (e.g., bird), DiffuMask presents promising performance, close to the stateof-the-art result of real data (within 3% mIoU gap). Moreover, in the open-vocabulary segmentation (zero-shot) setting, DiffuMask achieves a new SOTA result on Unseen class of VOC 2012. The project website can be found at https://weijiawu.github.io/DiffusionMask/.
summary: Collecting and annotating images with pixel-wise labels is time-consuming and laborious. In contrast, synthetic data can be freely available using a generative model (e.g., DALL-E, Stable Diffusion). In this paper, we show that it is possible to automatically obtain accurate semantic masks of synthetic images generated by the Off-the-shelf Stable Diffusion model, which uses only text-image pairs during training. Our approach, called DiffuMask, exploits the potential of the cross-attention map between text and image, which is natural and seamless to extend the text-driven image synthesis to semantic mask generation. DiffuMask uses text-guided cross-attention information to localize class/word-specific regions, which are combined with practical techniques to create a novel high-resolution and class-discriminative pixel-wise mask. The methods help to reduce data collection and annotation costs obviously. Experiments demonstrate that the existing segmentation methods trained on synthetic data of DiffuMask can achieve a competitive performance over the counterpart of real data (VOC 2012, Cityscapes). For some classes (e.g., bird), DiffuMask presents promising performance, close to the stateof-the-art result of real data (within 3% mIoU gap). Moreover, in the open-vocabulary segmentation (zero-shot) setting, DiffuMask achieves a new SOTA result on Unseen class of VOC 2012. The project website can be found at https://weijiawu.github.io/DiffusionMask/.
abstract_zh: 使用逐像素标签收集和注释图像既费时又费力。相比之下，可以使用生成模型（例如 DALL-E、稳定扩散）免费获得合成数据。在本文中，我们证明可以自动获得由现成的稳定扩散模型生成的合成图像的准确语义掩模，该模型在训练期间仅使用文本图像对。我们的方法称为 DiffuMask，利用了文本和图像之间交叉注意力图的潜力，这种方法自然且无缝地将文本驱动的图像合成扩展到语义掩模生成。 DiffuMask 使用文本引导的交叉注意信息来定位类/单词特定区域，并与实用技术相结合，创建一种新颖的高分辨率和类区分像素级掩模。这些方法有助于明显降低数据收集和注释成本。实验表明，在 DiffuMask 合成数据上训练的现有分割方法可以实现比真实数据对应的竞争性能（VOC 2012，Cityscapes）。对于某些类别（例如鸟类），DiffuMask 呈现出令人鼓舞的性能，接近真实数据的最新结果（在 3% mIoU 差距内）。此外，在开放词汇分割（零样本）设置下，DiffuMask 在 VOC 2012 的 Unseen 类上取得了新的 SOTA 结果。项目网站可以在 https://weijiawu.github.io/DiffusionMask/ 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffuMask方法，利用扩散模型生成带有像素级标注的合成图像，用于语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 像素级标注数据的收集和标注成本高昂，而现有生成模型（如Stable Diffusion）可生成合成数据，但缺乏对应的像素级标注。
AI.method: 通过分析文本-图像对的交叉注意力图，定位文本驱动的图像区域，结合实用技术生成高分辨率且类别可区分的像素级掩码。
AI.result: 在VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上，基于DiffuMask合成数据训练的分割模型性能接近真实数据（部分类别mIoU差距小于3%），并在开放词汇分割任务中达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: DiffuMask有效降低了数据标注成本，为语义分割任务提供了高质量合成数据，尤其在开放词汇场景下表现突出。
